step1.title: Qala uhambo lwakho
step1.trackCycleDesc: Landela umjikelezo wakho wokuya esikhathini, uqagele izigaba, futhi ubhale izimpawu zansuku zonke.
step1.planPregnancyDesc: Hlela ukukhulelwa kwakho ngokunemba kokulandelela iwindi elizala kahle.

step2.title: Uqale nini ukuya esikhathini kwakho kokugcina?

step3.title: Ukuya esikhathini kwakho kuhlala isikhathi esingakanani?

step4.title: Umjikelezo wakho uhlala isikhathi esingakanani?
step4.tip: Uma umjikelezo wakho ujwayelekile, ukuqagela kuba nokunemba okwengeziwe

step5.title:
Izimpawu Zenyanga
(Izaziso)
step5.anonymousTooltip: Ukuze kugcinwe ubumfihlo bakho, izaziso zizofika ngombhalo ongathathi hlangothi (isb., 'Isenzakalo se-Eluna'), ezifihla izigaba zomjikelezo esikrinini sokukhiya.

mainScreen.ttcHigh:
TTC: Ithuba elihle lokukhulelwa.
Ukuhlolwa kwe-LH - phezulu.

expectedPeriodInfo.title: Ukuya esikhathini
expectedPeriodInfo.desc: Lolu suku lubalwa ngokusekelwe emlandweni wakho. Ukushintsha kwezinsuku ezingu-2–3 kuyindlela ejwayelekile yomzimba yokuphendula ekucindezelekeni, ekulaleni, noma ekushintsheni kwesimo sezulu.
expectedPeriodInfo.tip: Iseluleko: Ukuze wenze isibikezelo sinembe kakhudlwana, bhala izimpawu zakho nezinga lokucindezeleka. Lokhu kusiza i-algorithm ukuqonda kangcono izikhathi zakho zomuntu siqu.

phase1.title: Ukulungiselela (Isigaba se-Follicular)
phase1.desc: Umzimba wakho uqala ukulungiselela umjikelezo omusha. Amazinga e-FSH akhuthaza ukukhula kwe-follicular, kancane kancane enyusa i-estrogen yakho futhi ebeka isisekelo sokukhulelwa okuzayo.
phase1.tip: Iseluleko: Qala izilinganiso ze-BBT zansuku zonke ngesikhathi esifanayo. Lokhu kudala "isisekelo" ukuze i-algorithm ikwazi ukuthola ngokunembile lapho iqanda likhishwa.

phase2.title: Ukulinda (Iwindi Lokuzala)
phase2.desc: Amazinga e-estrogen ayakhuphuka, enza indawo ibe yinhle kakhulu kumasperm. "Iwindi lakho legolide" livuliwe—amathuba okukhulelwa ngempumelelo ayakhula.
phase2.tip: Iseluleko: Qala ukuthatha izivivinyo ze-LH kabili ngosuku. Ukugcwala okuphezulu kwehomoni kutshela i-algorithm ukuthi ukukhulelwa kuzokwenzeka phakathi namahora angu-24–48.

phase3.title: Ukukhulelwa (Usuku Olukhulu)
phase3.desc: Ukukhula kwakho kwemvelo. Amazinga e-LH afinyelele phezulu, ekhuthaza ukukhishwa kweqanda. Lona ngumzuzu osebenzayo kakhulu kumjikelezo wakho wokukhulelwa.
phase3.tip: Iseluleko: Namuhla kubalulekile. Ukuhlolwa kwe-LH okuhle kuhlanganiswe nokushintsha kwe-BBT okuqinisekisiwe kuvumela i-Eluna ukuthi ivale ukukhulelwa kwakho ngokunemba okungu-100%.

phase4.title: Ukulinda Umphumela (Isigaba se-Luteal)
phase4.desc: Ukukhulelwa sekuphelile, futhi amazinga e-progesterone aqala ukukhuphuka. Umzimba wakho manje usakha izimo zokufakwa okungenzeka nokugcina ibhalansi yangaphakathi.
phase4.tip: Iseluleko: Gxila ekuphumuleni nasekulaleni kahle. Qhubeka ubhala idatha yezimpawu: lokhu kusiza i-algorithm ukuqonda ukuthi ukukhulelwa kwenzekile yini.

averageCycleInfo.title: Umjikelezo Ojwayelekile
averageCycleInfo.desc: Lona ubude obujwayelekile bomjikelezo wakho obusekelwe ezinyangeni zakamuva. Le metric isiza i-algorithm ukubhala amamephu wezikhathi zomzimba wakho futhi ibikezele izinsuku ngokunemba okungafika ku-95%.
averageCycleInfo.tip: Iseluleko: Qhubeka ubhala izinsuku zokuqala zomjikelezo wakho. Lapho idatha yomlando itholakala, i-Eluna iyazivumelanisa nezindlela zakho zomuntu siqu futhi ibikezele iwindi lakho lokuzala ngokunembile.

conceptionInfo.title: Ithuba Lokukhulelwa
conceptionInfo.descHigh: Phezulu: Usewindini lakho lokuzala. Lezi izinsuku ezinhle kakhulu zokuhlela ukukhulelwa.
conceptionInfo.descMedium: Ephakathi: Iwindi lakho lokuzala liyasondela noma seliphelile muva nje. Amathuba okukhulelwa aphakathi.
conceptionInfo.descLow: Phansi: Esigabeni samanje somjikelezo wakho, amathuba okukhulelwa mancane.
conceptionInfo.howItWorksDesc:
• I-algorithm ihlaziya imijikelezo yakho nezinkomba zomzimba (BBT, LH, umswakama)
• Ibala iwindi lokuzala (kufika ezinsukwini eziyisi-6)
• Amathuba aphezulu kakhulu ngosuku lokukhulelwa kanye nosuku olwandulela

confidenceInfo.title: Ukunemba Kwesibikezelo
confidenceInfo.descHigh: Ukuzethemba okuphezulu: I-algorithm iqoqe idatha eyanele yezinkomba zomzimba ukuze kube nesibikezelo esinembile sezibalo.
confidenceInfo.descMedium: Ukuzethemba okuphakathi: Isibikezelo sisekelwe kakhulu kumlando ojwayelekile. Engeza izivivinyo ze-LH noma i-BBT ukuze wenze kube ngokwakho.
confidenceInfo.descLow: Ukuzethemba okuphansi: Uhlelo alunayo idatha ngomjikelezo wakho. Bhala njalo isikhathi sakho nezimpawu ukuze uthuthukise ukunemba.
confidenceInfo.howToImproveDesc:
• Bhala njalo izinsuku zakho zokuqala zomjikelezo
• Thatha izivivinyo zokukhulelwa (LH)
• Linganisa futhi ubhale izinga lokushisa lomzimba (BBT)

mainScreen.proBannerDesc: Susa izikhangiso futhi uvule izici ze-PRO ngo-$5.99

menstruation.desc1: I-estrogen ephansi ibuthakathaka imisebenzi yesithiyo sesikhumba. Ukoma nokuphendula kungenzeka.
menstruation.tip1: Iseluleko: Sebenzisa ukuhlanza okuthambile nokuthambisa okuyisisekelo.
menstruation.desc2: Umzimba usebenzisa izinsiza ekubuyiselweni kwe-endometrial. Amazinga e-serotonin ancipha okwamanje.
menstruation.tip2: Iseluleko: Ukulala ubusuku bonke nokuhamba kuzokusiza ululame ngokushesha.
menstruation.desc3: Ama-prostaglandins angabangela ukuvuvukala nokungakhululeki emhlane ongezansi.
menstruation.tip3: Iseluleko: Iphakethe lokushisa noma ibhavu elishisayo lizokusiza ukhulule imisipha ethambile.

follicular.desc1: Ukukhuphuka kwe-estrogen kukhuthaza ukukhiqizwa kwe-collagen ne-hyaluronic acid. Isikhumba siqina.
follicular.tip1: Iseluleko: Isikhathi esihle sokwethula izithako ezintsha ezisebenzayo kumkhuba wakho.
follicular.desc2: Ama-hormone akhuphula imisebenzi yokwazi nokukhuthazela. Uzizwa unamandla.
follicular.tip2: Iseluleko: Hlela imisebenzi yakho eyinkimbinkimbi kakhulu nokuzivocavoca okusebenzayo kulezi zinsuku.
follicular.desc3: Amazinga e-dopamine ayakhuphuka, akwenza ube nomphakathi futhi uthembele kakhulu.
follicular.tip3: Iseluleko: Isikhathi esihle sokuxhumana nokukhuluma emphakathini.

ovulatory.desc1: I-estrogen isesicongweni sayo, izimbotshana zincishisiwe, futhi umbala wobuso uyalingana kakhulu. Ubukeka uphumule.
ovulatory.tip1: Iseluleko: Izimonyo ezincane zizogqamisa ubuhle bakho bemvelo.
ovulatory.desc2: I-testosterone ne-estrogen ephezulu iletha amandla omzimba aphezulu kakhulu ne-libido.
ovulatory.tip2: Iseluleko: Sebenzisa leli shayela ukuze ufinyelele imigomo yakho emikhulu kakhulu.
ovulatory.desc3: Umzimba wakho ukhombisa ukulungela ukukhulelwa ngokukhuphula izimpawu zokuzala.
ovulatory.tip3: Iseluleko: Lalela izimpawu zomzimba wakho; uzwela kakhulu manje.

luteal.desc1: I-progesterone ikhuthaza izindlala ze-sebaceous, ezingaholela ekuphukeni.
luteal.tip1: Iseluleko: Gxila ekuhlanzeni kwekhwalithi namamaski e-detox.
luteal.desc2: Umzimba ubamba i-sodium, okubangela ukuvuvukala okuncane nokusinda.
luteal.tip2: Iseluleko: Nciphisa ukusetshenziswa kukasawoti futhi wengeze ukukhishwa okukhanyayo kwe-lymphatic.
luteal.desc3: Ukwehla kwe-hormone ngaphambi komjikelezo kungabangela ukuvuvukala (PMS).
luteal.tip3: Iseluleko: Zilolonge ukuzindla futhi udale indawo ekhululekile kakhulu ezungezile.

menstruation.title: Ukuthula Nokululama
menstruation.desc: Isikhathi sokunciphisa ijubane nokulalela wena. Umzimba wakho uyabuyiselwa, uqondisa zonke izinsiza ekululameni nasekuphumuleni.
menstruation.skin: Ukuzwela kuphakeme. Ukoma nokukhanya okuncane kungenzeka. Kunconywa ukuthambisa okuthambile nokugwema ama-peels anolaka.
menstruation.energy: Amazinga e-hormone aphansi. Ukwehla kwemvelo emandleni omzimba nokugxila. Isikhathi esihle sokulala ngokugcwele nokuhamba okuthule.
menstruation.body: Izinqubo zokuhlanza ziyaqhubeka. Ukungakhululeki emhlane ongezansi nasezansi kwesisu kungenzeka. Ukushisa okuthambile nokuphumula kuzokusiza ukhulule imisipha.

follicular.title: Ukukhuphuka Nokudala
follicular.desc: Amandla abuyela kanye nokukhuphuka kwe-estrogen. Isikhathi esihle kakhulu sokuqalisa okusha, izinhlelo ezisebenzayo, nokunyakaza okuqinisekile phambili.
follicular.skin: Isimo sesikhumba siyasheshisa ukuthuthuka. Isikhathi esihle sokwenza izinqubo ezintsha zezimonyo, i-peeling elula noma ukuhlanza.
follicular.energy: I-estrogen iyakhuphuka. Ukukhuthazela kuyabuyiselwa. Isikhathi esihle sokuzivocavoca okukhulu nokuzivocavoca umzimba.
follicular.body: Umzimba wakho uzizwa ulula. Ukuguquguquka nokuhlangana kuyathuthuka, imisipha iphendula ngokushesha ekucindezelekeni.

ovulatory.title: Ukukhula Nokukhanya
ovulatory.desc: Ubukhulu bakho bemvelo. Usephakeme kokudonsa nokuzethemba—yisikhathi esihle sokukhanya nokudlulisa amandla akho emhlabeni.
ovulatory.skin: Isikhumba sakho sibukeka sikhazimula, sibushelelezi, futhi sicacile. Uhlelo lokunakekelwa kwesikhumba oluyisisekelo olulula yilokho okudingayo njengamanje.
ovulatory.energy: Amandla omzimba nomphakathi aphezulu. Hlela imihlangano ebalulekile, izinsuku, nezinhlelo ezinkulu.
ovulatory.body: I-libido iphezulu. Usekhululekile kakhulu, umzimba wakho uzizwa unamandla futhi uqine.

luteal.title: Ukufudumala Nokunakekela
luteal.desc: Isikhathi sokunciphisa kancane nokugxila ngaphakathi. Zizungeze ngokunethezeka, wehlise ijubane, futhi uziphathe kahle ngangokunokwenzeka.
luteal.skin: Ukukhuphuka okungenzeka kokukhanya kwesikhumba nokuphuka. Hlanza kancane, gwema ama-scrubs anolaka.
luteal.energy: I-estrogen iyancipha, ukuvuvukala kungenzeka. Zama ukulala ngokwengeziwe futhi uhambise imisebenzi edinga amandla amaningi.
luteal.body: I-progesterone iyakhuphuka. Ukubanjwa kwe-fluid okungenzeka, ubuhlungu bezinwele, nokuvuvukala okuncane. Ziphathise kahle.

calendarScreen.anomalyGenericDesc: Ufakile idatha ephuma ngaphandle komjikelezo ojwayelekile. Uqinisekile ukuthi ufuna ukuyilondoloza njengokungajwayelekile?
calendarScreen.anomalyCycleLongDesc: Uchaze ubude bomjikelezo obungu-{{cLength}} izinsuku. Lokhu kudlula kakhulu okujwayelekile. Ingabe mhlawumbe ukhohliwe ukubhala isikhathi sakho sangaphambilini? Uma uqinisekile ukuthi konke kulungile, ungayilondoloza le datha njengokungajwayelekile.
calendarScreen.anomalyCycleShortDesc: Uchaze ubude bomjikelezo obungu-{{cLength}} izinsuku kuphela. Lokhu kuphuma ngaphandle kwe-physiology ejwayelekile. Uqinisekile ukuthi ufuna ukuyilondoloza njengokungajwayelekile?
calendarScreen.anomalyMensesDesc: Uchaze ubude besikhathi obungu-{{mLength}} izinsuku. Ngokuvamile, akudluli izinsuku eziyi-7-8. Qinisekisa ukuthi awuzange uqaphele izinsuku ezengeziwe ngengozi.
calendarScreen.anomalousMensesAlert: Lesi sikhathi sibonakala side kunokujwayelekile (ngaphezu kwezinsuku eziyi-14). Ukuze kugcinwe ukunemba kwesibikezelo, sibheka kuphela izinsuku zokuqala eziyi-14.
calendarScreen.anomalyCycleWarning: Lo mjikelezo ubukeka ungajwayelekile futhi uyasuswa ezibikezelweni zezibalo. Sicela uhlole izinsuku zakho zokuy esikhathini.
calendarScreen.editHintCombined:
👆 Thepha — engeza/susa usuku
↔ Hudula — khetha isikhathi

addLogModal.title: Engeza i-log
addLogModal.notesPlaceholder: Chaza izimpawu zakho noma imicabango (kufika kubalingiswa abayi-1000)...

insights.day1: Umjikelezo uyaqala. I-Progesterone iyancipha, ibangele ukuvuvukala kwe-endometrial nokuvuvukala okungenzeka.
insights.day2: Ukugeleza okuphezulu. Ungase uzwe ukukhathala okwandayo nokulala ngenxa yokulahlekelwa yinsimbi.
insights.day3: Umzimba uyazivumelanisa. Izinqubo zokuvuvukala ziyancipha, futhi ukuvuvukala kuba buthaka.
insights.day4: I-Estrogen iqala ukukhuphuka kancane. Isimo siyazinzisa, futhi isikhumba siyacaca.
insights.day5: Isigaba siyaphela. Amandla abuyela njengoba umzimba ulungiselela ukuvuthwa kweqanda elisha.
insights.day6_8: I-Estrogen iyakhuphuka. Qaphela ukukhuphuka kokugxila nomsebenzi womphakathi.
insights.day9_10: Isikhumba siyakhazimula. Ama-hormone akhuthaza ukukhiqizwa kwe-collagen, futhi i-libido iqala ukukhuphuka.
insights.day11_12: Iwindi lokuzala liyavuleka. Ukukhishwa kuba manzi ('okhilimu' noma 'amanzi'), amathuba okukhulelwa ayakhuphuka.
insights.day13: Isicongco sangaphambi kokukhulelwa. Amandla aphezulu kakhulu nezinga lokuzethemba ngaphambi kokukhishwa kweqanda.
insights.day14: Ukukhulelwa. Iqanda liyakhishwa. Ubuhlungu bokudonsa obuncane (mittelschmerz) ne-libido ephezulu kungenzeka.
insights.day15: Iwindi legolide liyavalwa. Izinga lokushisa lomzimba liyakhuphuka, liqinisekisa ukuphela kokukhulelwa.
insights.day16_18: I-Progesterone iyathatha. Ungase uzizwe uthule futhi ukwehla okuncane emsebenzini womphakathi.
insights.day19_21: Iwindi lokufakwa. Umzimba usesimweni sokulinda, i-metabolism iyashesha kancane.
insights.day22_24: Ukuqala kwe-PMS. Ukuzwela kwamabele, ukukhukhumala, nokucasuka okuncane kungenzeka.
insights.day25_26: Isizinda semizwa asizinzile. Ukwehla kwe-hormone kungabangela ukukhathazeka noma ukudabuka.
insights.day27_28: Imodi yokulinda. Umzimba ulungiselela umjikelezo omusha. Nciphisa ukuzivocavoca futhi uqinisekise ukulala kwekhwalithi.
insights.title: Ukuqonda

hero.onTrackDesc: Umjikelezo wakho wamanje uyahambisana namaphethini omlando.
hero.startDesc: Bhala izimpawu nsuku zonke ukuze uvule ukuhlaziywa kwakho okwenziwe ngokwezifiso.
hero.anomaliesDesc: Sithole okuphambukayo emlandweni wakho. Sisebenzisa {{validCount}} kwe-{{totalCount}} imijikelezo.
hero.gatheringDesc: Sidinga eminye imijikelezo embalwa ukuze sakhe iphrofayili yakho yezibalo ephelele.
hero.outlierDesc: Umjikelezo wakho wamanje uhluke kakhulu kusukela ebangeni lakho lomuntu siqu.
hero.slightDeviationDesc: Kukhona ukuphambuka okuncane, kodwa usendaweni evamile.
hero.preliminaryNote: Ukuzethemba kusho ukuthi unemininingwane eminingi yomlando womjikelezo ukuze usungule isisekelo sakho sezokwelapha esijwayelekile.

cycleCore.title: Iphasipoti Lomjikelezo
cycleCore.subtitle: Izibalo ezihlanganisiwe zomjikelezo wakho wokugcina {{count}}.
cycleCore.insufficientDataDescription: Ukuzethemba kusho ukuthi unemininingwane eminingi yomlando womjikelezo ukuze usungule isisekelo sakho sezokwelapha esijwayelekile.

medicalExplanation.follicularNormal: Ngesikhathi sesigaba se-follicular, amazinga e-estrogen aqala ukukhuphuka, okuvame ukuhambisana nokwanda kwamandla nokuthuthuka kwesimo sengqondo. Lokhu umzimba wakho ulungiselela ukuvuthwa kweqanda.

patterns.frequent: Sibone ukuthi uvame ukubhala lesi simo ngesikhathi lesi sigaba semijikelezo yakho edlule.
patterns.historicalMatchSandwich: Sihlaziye idatha yakho sabona ukuthi uzwe into efanayo ngesikhathi semijikelezo edlule kulesi sigaba. Lokhu kungase kuhlobane nempendulo yakho yomuntu siqu ekushintsheni kwehomoni.

emptyState.title: Qala Uhambo Lwakho
emptyState.desc: Bhala isikhathi sakho nezimpawu zansuku zonke ukuze uvule izibalo.

learnMore.title: Funda Okuningi
learnMore.desc: Ngena kumininingwane yezokwelapha ukuze uqonde kangcono umzimba wakho.

confidence.high: Ngokusekelwe ekuhlaziyweni okujulile kwedatha yakho yemijikelezo emi-3 noma ngaphezulu. Ukunemba okuphezulu.
confidence.medium: Sifunda amaphethini akho. Qhubeka ubhala izimpawu ukuze uthuthukise ukunemba.
confidence.low: Ayikho idatha eyanele okwamanje. Izibalo zamanje zisekelwe ezingeni elijwayelekile lezokwelapha.

reasons.cycleCount: {{cycleCount}} imijikelezo evumelekile ilandelwe, {{excludedCount}} ikhishwe ngenxa yamaphutha

daily.cycleLonger: Umjikelezo wakho mude kunokujwayelekile. Qaphela inhlalakahle yakho.
daily.anovulatory: Iphethini engenzeka yokungavuthwa kweqanda. Qhubeka ulandelela ama-LH strips.
daily.normal: Idatha isemazingeni aphilile. Usuku oluhle lokugxila kuwe!

recovery.title: Ukuhlaziywa Kwemibhalo
recovery.severeDescription: Le datha inobude obungajwayelekile. Imvamisa le mibhalo ivela uma ungakhohlwa ukubhala esinye sezikhathi zakho, okubangela ukuthi umjikelezo welule. Ukuze kugwenywe izibikezelo ezingamanga, le mijikelezo ikhishelwa ngaphandle kwesikhashana ekuhlaziyweni kwe-Eluna.
recovery.highAnomalyDesc: Ngaphezu kuka-80% wemibhalo yakho iphume ngaphandle komjikelezo ojwayelekile. Sincoma ukuthi uhlole kabili izinsuku, njengoba lokhu kwehlisa kakhulu ukunemba kwezibikezelo.
recovery.warningDesc: Imijikelezo eminingi yakho mide noma mifushane kunokujwayelekile. Zifakiwe ekuhlaziyweni, kodwa kwehlisa ukuzethemba okuphelele kwe-algorithm.
recovery.autoFixDesc: Sizonciphisa ubude bezikhathi ezingajwayelekile zibe izinsuku eziyi-14 ukuze sibuyisele ukuhlaziywa. Lesi senzo singahlehliswa nganoma yisiphi isikhathi.

anomaly.title: Idatha Engajwayelekile
anomaly.desc: Izibalo zisekelwe ku-{{used}} kwe-{{total}} imijikelezo. {{excluded}} umjikelezo(i) ukhishwe ezibikezelweni njengokungajwayelekile.

settings.title: Izilungiselelo
settings.footer: Yonke idatha iyafihlwa futhi igcinwa kuphela kudivayisi le
settings.resetDisclaimer: Uqinisekile? Lesi senzo sizosusa unomphela yonke imilando yezimpawu zakho, imijikelezo, nezilungiselelo. Ukubuyiselwa kwedatha kuzoba nzima.
settings.shareAppMessage: I-Eluna uhlelo lokulandelela umjikelezo olunokugxila ekuphepheni. Zama: {{url}}

cyclePhases.tooltip: Izithonjana zikhombisa isigaba somjikelezo wakho. Thepha usuku ukuze ubone ukuthi kusho ukuthini.
cyclePhases.descMenstruation: Ukuchithwa kwesendlalelo sesibeletho. Amandla angase abe phansi.
cyclePhases.descFollicular: I-estrogen iyakhuphuka. Isikhathi sokwanda kwamandla nokulungiselela ukuvuthwa kweqanda.
cyclePhases.descFertileWindow: Izinsuku eziholela ekuvuthweni kweqanda lapho ukukhulelwa kungenzeka khona.
cyclePhases.descLuteal: I-progesterone iyakhuphuka. Amandla angase ehle njengoba umzimba ulungiselela umjikelezo olandelayo.
cyclePhases.descLutealLate: AmaHormoni ayawa ngaphambi kwesikhathi sokukhulelwa. Ungase uzwe izimpawu ze-PMS ezifana nokushintsha kwesimo sengqondo noma ukuvuvukala.

backup.exportDesc: Kudala ifayela le-.eluna elifihlwe ukuze udlulisele idatha yakho kudivayisi entsha. Ngaphandle kwephasiwedi ayikwazi ukuvulwa.
backup.exportWarning: Gcina le phasiwedi. Ngaphandle kwayo, isipele asikwazi ukubuyiselwa.
backup.importDesc: Khetha ifayela lesipele le-.eluna bese ufaka iphasiwedi oyisebenzisile lapho ulidala.
backup.importWarning: Yonke idatha yamanje kudivayisi le izosulwa unomphela idluliselwe idatha yesipele.
backup.importConfirmDesc: Lokhu kuzokhipha unomphela yonke idatha yamanje bese kuyibuyisela ngesipele. Lokhu akunakuhlehliswa.
backup.importDoneDesc: Yonke idatha yakho ibuyisiwe. Isimo se-PRO asidluliselwa — sebenzisa Buyisela Ukuthenga ukuze usebenzise kabusha.
backup.errorPasswordShort: Iphasiwedi kumele ibe okungenani izinhlamvu ezi-6.
backup.errorInvalidFile: Leli fayela alilona isipele esivumelekile se-Eluna.
backup.errorUnknown: Kube nephutha elingalindelekile. Sicela uzame futhi.

about.title: Mayelana Nohlelo
about.description: I-Eluna iyisihleli somjikelezo esigxile ekuphepheni, esisebenza ngaphandle kwe-inthanethi, esine-injini yokuhlaziya ehlakaniphile. Yonke idatha yakho iyafihlwa futhi igcinwa ngokuphepha kuphela kudivayisi le.
about.licensesDesc: Sisebenzisa isoftware nezakhi zomthombo ovulekile ezilandelayo:

privacy.title: 1. Inqubomgomo Yobumfihlo
privacy.subtitle: IDATHA YAKHO IYAKHO YODWA
privacy.p1: Sikholelwa ukuthi ulwazi lwezempilo yabesifazane luyindawo ebucayi kakhulu. Ngakho-ke, i-Eluna yakhiwe phezu kwesimiso se-Zero-Knowledge:
privacy.p2: Isitoreji Sendawo: Zonke izimpawu, izinsuku, nezincwadi ozifakayo zigcinwa kuphela kudathabheyisi efihlwe kudivayisi yakho.
privacy.p3: Azikho Iziseva: I-Eluna ayinazo iziseva ezihlanganisiwe zokuhlanganisa idatha yakho yomuntu siqu. Asikwazi ukubona, ukuthengisa, noma ukudlulisa ulwazi lwakho kwabanye abantu ngoba asinalo ukufinyelela kulo.
privacy.p4: Umthwalo Wakho: Njengoba idatha igcinwa kudivayisi, ukuphepha kwayo kuncike kuwe. Uma ususa uhlelo ngaphandle kwesipele sefayela, idatha izolahleka unomphela.

eula.title: 2. Isivumelwano Selayisensi Yomsebenzisi Wokugcina (EULA)
eula.subtitle: IMIGOMO YOKUSEBENZISA YE-ELUNA
eula.p1: Ilayisensi: I-Eluna ikunikeza ilayisensi yomuntu siqu, engeyona eyokukhethekile yokusebenzisa uhlelo ngezinhloso zomuntu siqu.
eula.p2: Izibuyekezo: Sihlala sithuthukisa ama-algorithms ethu okubikezela, ngakho ukusebenza nokubukeka kungase kubuyekezwe.
eula.p3: Ukubhaliswa kwe-PRO: Izici ezikhokhelwayo zinikezwa ngokwemigomo yohlelo olukhethiwe. Ukuphathwa kokubhaliswa nokubuyiselwa kwemali kuphathwa nge-Apple App Store / Google Play Store.
eula.p4: Ukukhawulelwa Komthwalo: Umthuthukisi akanasibopho sokuhluleka kwezobuchwepheshe okubangelwa ukusebenza kohlelo lokusebenza lwedivayisi yakho.

disclaimer.title: 3. Isaziso Sezokwelapha
disclaimer.subtitle: QAPHELA: LOKHU AKUSIYO IDIVAYISI YOKWELAPHA
disclaimer.p1: I-Eluna iyithuluzi lokuzilandelela nokubonisa izikhathi zakho zomzimba. Ulwazi oluqukethwe kuhlelo luhloselwe izinjongo zolwazi kuphela.
disclaimer.p2: Akusiyo Indlela Yokuvimbela Ukukhulelwa: Izibikezelo ze-Eluna (kufaka phakathi "Izinsuku Zegolide") azikwazi ukusetshenziswa njengendlela yokuvimbela ukukhulelwa.
disclaimer.p3: Akusiyo Ukuxilongwa: I-Eluna ayibuyiseli ukubonisana nodokotela. Zonke izinqumo zezokwelapha, kufaka phakathi ukuthatha imishanguzo, kumele zivunyelwane nodokotela.
disclaimer.p4: Ukwehlukahlukana: Ukunemba kwezibikezelo kuncike ekuzinzile komjikelezo wakho nasekugcineni okujwayelekile kwencwadi yakho. Imijikelezo yezinto eziphilayo ingashintsha ngaphansi kwethonya lokucindezeleka, izifo, nezici zangaphandle.
disclaimer.p5: Ngokusebenzisa i-Eluna, uqinisekisa ukuthi uthatha umthwalo ophelele wezinqumo ezenziwe ngokusekelwe kudatha yohlelo.

texts.t3: I-hypothalamus imisa isivinini somjikelezo ngokukhishwa kwe-GnRH okushaya.
texts.t4: I-hypothalamus iyilawuli eliyinhloko le-hypothalamic–pituitary–ovarian axis. Ikhipha i-GnRH ngokushaya kunokukhululwa okuqhubekayo; iphethini yokushaya iyona enquma ukukhishwa kwe-FSH ne-LH.
texts.t5: Indima ye-hypothalamus kumjikelezo wokukhulelwa iyisici esibalulekile sokulawulwa kwehomoni.
texts.t6: I-hypothalamus ihlanganisa umjikelezo ngezinzwa ze-GnRH. Zikhulula i-GnRH ngokushaya, hhayi ngokuqhubekayo. Esigabeni se-follicular, isivinini sokushaya ngokuvamile siyanda, kanti esigabeni se-luteal, siyancipha ngaphansi kwethonya le-progesterone. Ukuphazamiseka ekulawuleni kwe-hypothalamic kungaholela ku-anovulation, oligomenorrhea, kanye ne-functional hypothalamic amenorrhea.
texts.t7: uma umjikelezo usuphenduke ongajwayelekile, ungajwayelekile kakhulu, noma umisiwe
texts.t8: uma kunezimpawu ze-anovulation, ukungazali, noma izimpawu ezivelele zokuphazamiseka kwehomoni
texts.t9: uma kukhona ukuqhubeka okusheshayo kwezimpawu, ukopha okukhulu kakhulu, izinhlungu ezinzima ekhanda, ukuphazamiseka kokubona, noma ukusola ukukhulelwa okungajwayelekile
texts.t16: Amanani ancike endleleni, ilabhorethri, ubudala, isimo sezokwelapha, nosuku lomjikelezo.
texts.t18: ukuhlanganiswa kwezikhathi ezingekho nokulahlekelwa isisindo, ukucindezeleka, noma ukuzivocavoca ngokweqile
texts.t19: ihomoni kufanele ihlolwe ngokwesigaba somjikelezo, izimpawu, nenhloso yezokwelapha
texts.t20: ukuphambuka kwehomoni okuqhubekayo kanye nezimpawu nokuphazamiseka komjikelezo
texts.t30: ukuxilongwa akunakwenziwa ngokusekelwe kusimptom esisodwa noma ukuhlolwa okukodwa ngaphandle komongo
texts.t31: ukuphazamiseka komjikelezo okuqhubekayo noma izimpawu ezivelele kudinga ukuhlolwa kwesizathu
texts.t34: uma kukhona i-amenorrhea/anovulation kanye ne-gonadotropins ephansi-evamile -> cabanga ngokucindezelwa okuphakathi kwe-axis
texts.t35: uma kukhona ukucindezeleka, ukuntuleka kwamandla, noma ukuzivocavoca ngokweqile -> hlola i-functional hypothalamic dysfunction
texts.t36: ukwenza isinqumo ngokuhlolwa okukodwa ngaphandle komongo wezokwelapha
texts.t37: ukuchaza amahomoni ngaphandle kokucabangela isigaba somjikelezo nokukhulelwa
texts.t39: isimptom ngaphandle kwephethini ephindaphindekayo kuwo wonke imijikelezo
texts.t40: chaza indima ye-physiological ye-hormone noma i-axis
texts.t41: chaza ukuthi lokhu kuhlobene kanjani nezigaba zomjikelezo
texts.t46: I-hypothalamus ilawula umjikelezo ngokukhishwa kwe-GnRH okushaya.
texts.t47: Ukuphazamiseka kokulawulwa kwe-hypothalamic kungaholela ku-amenorrhea kanye ne-anovulation.
texts.t48: Kwakunikezwe ukubaluleka kumhlahlandlela wezokwelapha, i-Endotext/NCBI Bookshelf, kanye nezibuyekezo ku-endocrinology yokuzala.
texts.t59: chaza isigaba somjikelezo kanye nokuba khona kokukhulelwa
texts.t60: hlobanisa idatha yelabhorethri nezimpawu kanye ne-ultrasound/umlando wezokwelapha
texts.t61: uma kukhona ukuphambuka okuqhubekayo, funa isizathu esiyinhloko kunokukhawulela ekuchazeni umphumela
texts.t63: ungasebenzisi amagama ajwayelekile njengokufaka esikhundleni sokuxilongwa
texts.t64: Ukuhlaziywa kwehomoni kudinga ukucatshangelwa komongo wezokwelapha, isigaba somjikelezo, nendlela yokuhlaziya; izincazelo ezilula ezijwayelekile zivame ukudukisa.
texts.t68: Isibindi sishintsha izimpawu ze-GnRH ekukhishweni kwe-FSH ne-LH.
texts.t69: Isibindi sangaphambili siphendula ku-GnRH ngokukhulula i-FSH ne-LH, ezishukumisa ukukhula kwe-follicle, ukukhiqizwa kwe-estradiol, ukukhulelwa, kanye ne-luteinization.
texts.t70: Indima yesibindi somjikelezo iyisici esibalulekile sokulawulwa kwehomoni.
texts.t71: Isibindi siyisikhungo esiphakathi phakathi kwe-hypothalamus nama-ovari. I-FSH isekela ikakhulukazi ukukhula kwe-follicle nokukhiqizwa kwe-estradiol kumaseli e-granulosa, kanti i-LH ishukumisa amaseli e-theca futhi ibandakanyeka ekukhulelweni nasekwakheni i-corpus luteum. Izinguquko ezingeni lesibindi zingaphazamisa umjikelezo wokukhulelwa ngisho noma ama-ovari esesimweni esihle.
texts.t78: uma i-prolactin iphakeme ngokuphikelelayo -> qeda imithi, ukukhulelwa, i-hypothyroidism, ne-prolactinoma
texts.t79: uma kukhona i-galactorrhea, i-amenorrhea, noma ukungazali -> kudingeka ukuhlolwa kwesizathu sesibindi
texts.t80: Isibindi siphendula ku-GnRH ngokukhishwa kwe-FSH ne-LH.
texts.t81: Izifo zesibindi zifakiwe ekuxilongweni okuhlukanisayo kwe-amenorrhea kanye ne-anovulation.
texts.t87: I-GnRH iyihomoni ekhishwa yi-gonadotropin, isignali eyinhloko evela ku-hypothalamus kuya esibindini.
texts.t88: I-GnRH iyadingeka ukuze isibindi sikhulule i-FSH ne-LH. Ukukhishwa okushaya kubalulekile: ngokuphathwa okuqhubekayo, izamukeli zesibindi ziyazwela.
texts.t89: Yini i-GnRH futhi kungani idingeka — isici esibalulekile sokulawulwa kwehomoni.
texts.t90: I-GnRH iyiswishi ye-neuroendocrine eyinhloko yokuzala. Ukukhishwa okushaya kugcina umsebenzi ojwayelekile we-HPO axis; izinguquko esivinini sokushaya zithinta iphrofayili ye-LH ne-FSH phakathi kwezigaba ezahlukene zomjikelezo. Ngakho-ke, ekusebenzeni kwezokwelapha, ama-agonists nama-antagonists e-GnRH angakhuthaza noma acindezele umsebenzi wokuzala kuye ngohlelo lokuphatha.
texts.t93: I-GnRH isebenza ngokufanayo ngokuphathwa okuqhubekayo nokushaya
texts.t96: I-GnRH iyisikhuthazi esiyinhloko se-hypothalamic sokukhishwa kwe-FSH ne-LH.
texts.t97: Ukukhishwa kwe-GnRH okushaya kuyadingeka ukugcina umsebenzi ojwayelekile wesibindi.
texts.t100: I-FSH ishukumisa ukukhula kwe-follicle futhi isiza ukukhetha i-follicle ebusayo.
texts.t101: I-FSH isebenza ikakhulukazi kumaseli e-granulosa, isekela ukukhula kwama-follicle e-antral, ukuvezwa kwe-aromatase, nokukhiqizwa kwe-estradiol.
texts.t103: I-FSH ibaluleke kakhulu esigabeni sokuqala naphakathi kwe-follicular. Amazinga e-FSH ayanda ngesikhathi sokushintsha kusuka esigabeni se-luteal kuya esigabeni sokuqala se-follicular, okuvumela ukuqashwa kweqembu le-follicle. Ekusebenzeni kwezokwelapha, i-FSH ibhekwa njengengxenye yesithombe sokugcina ama-ovari kodwa ayikaze ichazwe ngokuhlukana nobudala, i-estradiol, i-AMH, nenhloso yezokwelapha.
texts.t106: i-FSH evamile ayikhiphi ukwehla kwesitoreji sama-ovari
texts.t109: uma umsebenzi uwukuhlola isitoreji sama-ovari -> chaza izinkomba ndawonye, hhayi ngokuhlukana
texts.t110: uma i-FSH iphakeme futhi kukhona i-hypoestrogenism -> cabanga ngokuncipha komsebenzi we-ovari/POI kumongo ofanele
texts.t111: I-FSH isekela ukukhula kwe-follicle nokukhiqizwa kwe-estradiol.
texts.t112: Ekusebenzeni kwezokwelapha, i-FSH ayichazwa ngokuhlukana, kodwa ndawonye nezinye izinkomba zesitoreji sama-ovari.
texts.t117: uma kudingeka, engeza i-AFC/ultrasound nezinye izinkomba zesitoreji sama-ovari
texts.t118: ungakhiphi iziphetho kusuka ekuhlolweni okukodwa ngaphandle komongo
texts.t120: I-LH iyadingeka ekukhuleni kokugcina kwe-follicle, ukukhulelwa, nokwakheka kwe-corpus luteum.
texts.t121: Esigabeni se-follicular, i-LH ishukumisa amaseli e-theca, futhi i-LH peak yangaphambi kokukhulelwa ishukumisa ukuqala kabusha kwe-meiosis ye-oocyte, ukuqhuma kwe-follicle, kanye ne-luteinization.
texts.t123: I-LH ayisebenzi kuphela njengesishukumisi sangaphambi kokukhulelwa. Esigabeni sokuqala somjikelezo, isekela ukukhiqizwa kwama-androgens kumaseli e-theca, okuguqulwa abe ama-estrogens. Lapho amazinga aphezulu e-estradiol egcinwa isikhathi eside ngokwanele, kwakhiwa i-LH surge, eshukumisa ukukhulelwa. Ngemuva kwalokhu, i-LH iyadingeka kumsebenzi wokuqala we-corpus luteum.
texts.t127: uma kukhona i-LH peak elandelwa ukukhuphuka kwe-progesterone/BBT -> ukukhulelwa kungenzeka
texts.t128: uma ukopha kwenzeka kodwa akukho zimpawu zesigaba se-luteal -> ungacabangi ukuthi ukukhulelwa kufakazelwe
texts.t129: isimptom esisodwa ngaphandle kokuqinisekiswa ngezinye izimpawu
texts.t131: I-LH iyadingeka ekukhuleni kwe-oocyte yangaphambi kokukhulelwa nokuqhuma kwe-follicle.
texts.t132: Isikhathi phakathi kokuqala kwe-LH surge nokukhulelwa siyahlukahluka phakathi kwabesifazane.
texts.t139: Ama-estrogens amakhulu afaka i-estradiol, i-estrone, ne-estriol; esikhathini sokuzala, i-estradiol iyinhloko.
texts.t140: Ama-Estrogens alawula ukukhula kwe-endometrial, izakhiwo ze-mucus ye-cervical, imiphumela yamathambo kanye ne-vascular, futhi abamba iqhaza ekuphenduleni emuva ezingeni le-HPO axis.
texts.t142: Ama-Estrogens awuhomoni olulodwa, kodwa iqembu lama-steroids. Kumjikelezo wokukhulelwa, i-estradiol ekhiqizwa yi-follicle idlala indima ebalulekile. I-Estrone iba nendima ebaluleke kakhulu ezicutshini eziseceleni nangemva kokuphela kokuya esikhathini, kanti i-estriol ibaluleke kakhulu ngesikhathi sokukhulelwa. Kokubili imiphumela yazo yokuzala neyomzimba—emathanjeni, esikhunjeni, emithanjeni yegazi, nasebuchosheni—kubalulekile kwezokwelapha.
texts.t146: uma kukhona izimpawu zokuntuleka kwe-estrogen noma i-progesterone -> qonda kuqala ukuthi ukukhulelwa kwenzekile yini nokuthi yini imbangela, kunokuba usebenzise amalebula ajwayelekile
texts.t147: uma ukopha kungajwayelekile futhi i-endometrium ishukunyiswa isikhathi eside ngaphandle kwe-progesterone -> cabanga ngokukhulelwa okungajwayelekile okuqhubekayo
texts.t148: Ama-Estrogens abamba iqhaza ekukhuleni kwe-endometrial nasekuphenduleni emuva ezingeni le-HPO axis.
texts.t158: I-Estradiol iyihomoni enkulu ye-estrogen yesikhathi sokuzala kanye nehomoni enkulu yesigaba se-follicular.
texts.t159: I-Estradiol ikhiqizwa yi-follicle ebusayo ekhulayo, ishukumisa ukukhula kwe-endometrial, futhi iqala i-LH peak lapho amazinga egcinwa ezingeni eliphezulu.
texts.t161: Njengoba i-follicle ebusayo ikhula, ukukhiqizwa kwe-estradiol kuyanda. I-Estradiol yenza i-mucus ye-cervical ibe namandla okungena kwe-sperm, ithuthukise ukukhula kwe-endometrial, futhi ishintshe uhlobo lokuphendula emuva ezingeni lesibindi ne-hypothalamus. Yingakho i-estradiol ingomunye 'umqondisi' omkhulu wesigaba sokuqala somjikelezo.
texts.t164: I-Estradiol ikhiqizwa yi-follicle ebusayo futhi ilungiselela i-endometrium ukuze ikhule.
texts.t165: Amazinga aphezulu e-estradiol aqhubekayo ashintsha ukuphendula kube okuhle futhi ashukumise i-LH surge.
texts.t172: I-Progesterone iyihomoni enkulu yesigaba se-luteal kanye nokuguqulwa kwe-endometrial kube isimo sokukhishwa.
texts.t173: Ngemuva kokukhulelwa, i-progesterone ikhiqizwa ikakhulukazi yi-corpus luteum futhi iguqula i-endometrium ibe isimo sokukhishwa.
texts.t175: I-Progesterone iba yihomoni ebusayo ngemuva kokukhulelwa. Yenza i-endometrium ibe namandla okwamukela ukufakwa, yandisa izinga lokushisa lomzimba, inciphise amandla okungena kwe-mucus ye-cervical, futhi ishintshe uhlobo lokuphendula emuva ezingeni le-hypothalamus nesibindi. Ngaphandle kokwakheka okujwayelekile kwe-corpus luteum, isigaba esigcwele se-progesterone ngeke senzeke.
texts.t176: I-Progesterone ichazwa maqondana nokukhulelwa, kunokuba ibe 'usuku lwe-21' olujwayelekile; ukuhlolwa okukodwa akuhlali kuchaza ikhwalithi yesigaba se-luteal.
texts.t179: I-Progesterone iyihomoni enkulu yesigaba se-luteal kanye nokuguqulwa kwe-endometrial kube isimo sokukhishwa.
texts.t180: Ngemuva kokukhulelwa, i-progesterone yandisa izinga lokushisa lomzimba futhi yenza i-mucus ye-cervical ibe namandla.
texts.t185: I-Prolactin ayiyona ihomoni yesigaba esithile somjikelezo, kodwa ukweqisa kwayo kungacindezela i-GnRH futhi kuphazamise ukukhulelwa.
texts.t186: Ngokukhuphuka okuqhubekayo kwe-prolactin, umsebenzi we-GnRH pulse generator uyancipha, ukukhishwa kwe-LH/FSH kuyancipha, futhi i-oligomenorrhea, i-amenorrhea, kanye ne-anovulation kungase kwenzeke.
texts.t187: I-Prolactin nomjikelezo kuyisici esibalulekile sokulawulwa kwehomoni.
texts.t188: I-Prolactin iyihomoni yesibindi enendima ebalulekile ekukhiqizeni ubisi, kodwa ngaphandle kokukhulelwa nokuncelisa, ukweqisa kwayo kuvame ukuphazamisa umsebenzi wokukhulelwa. Amazinga e-Prolactin azwela ekulaleni, ukucindezeleka, izinhlungu, umsebenzi womzimba, ukuvuselelwa kwe-nipple, nemithi ethile. Ngakho-ke, ukuhlolwa kwe-prolactin kudinga ukulungiselela kahle ngaphambi kokuhlolwa.
texts.t189: I-Prolactin izwela izici zangaphambi kokuhlolwa; ukukhuphuka okungamanga kungenzeka ngenxa yokucindezeleka, izinhlungu, ukuvuselelwa kwe-nipple, nemithi ethile.
texts.t192: ukwehluleka ukubheka imithi nokucindezeleka ngaphambi kokuhlolwa
texts.t193: ukukhuphuka okuncane okukodwa ngaphandle kokuphindaphinda ukuhlolwa
texts.t194: ukuqoqwa kwegazi ngemuva kokucindezeleka, izinhlungu, noma ukulala okungesihle
texts.t195: Ukukhuphuka okuqhubekayo kwe-prolactin kucindezela i-GnRH futhi kuphazamise umsebenzi wokukhulelwa.
texts.t196: I-Prolactin iyingxenye yokuhlolwa okujwayelekile kwe-amenorrhea kanye nokuphazamiseka komjikelezo.
texts.t200: phinda i-prolactin ngokulungiselela okufanele uma ukukhuphuka kungumngcele
texts.t201: hlola i-TSH, ukukhulelwa, nezimbangela ezibangelwa imithi
texts.t202: uma kukhona ukukhuphuka okukhulu okuqhubekayo, cabanga ngokuhlolwa kwesithombe/ukubonisana nodokotela we-endocrinologist
texts.t203: ungakhiphi iziphetho kusuka ekuhlolweni okukodwa ngaphandle kokukhipha i-macroprolactin/izici zangaphambi kokuhlolwa lapho kufanele
texts.t209: I-Testosterone kwabesifazane ikhona ngamanani amancane futhi ithinta isifiso socansi, izicubu zamathambo, kanye nokuguqulwa kwezicubu eziseceleni.
texts.t210: Kwabesifazane, i-testosterone ikhiqizwa ama-ovari kanye nama-adrenal glands, futhi ukweqisa kwayo kuhlotshaniswa kakhulu nezimo ze-hyperandrogenic.
texts.t211: I-Testosterone nomjikelezo wesifazane — isici esibalulekile sokulawulwa kwehomoni.
texts.t212: I-Testosterone ayiyona ihomoni 'eyinqaba' emzimbeni wesifazane. Isebenza njengokhokho wama-estrogens futhi ibamba iqhaza ekulawuleni isifiso socansi, izicubu zemisipha, nezicubu zamathambo. Inkinga yezokwelapha ngokuvamile ayihlobene nokuba khona kwayo, kodwa ngokweqisa kwefayili yamahhala, okungaholela ku-acne, i-hirsutism, kanye nezinkinga zokukhulelwa.
texts.t213: Kwama-androgens, indlela yokulinganisa, i-SHBG, isikhathi sokuqoqwa, nomongo wezokwelapha kubalulekile; ukuchezuka okuncane kudinga ukuchazwa ngokucophelela.
texts.t217: uma kukhona i-hirsutism, i-acne, noma umjikelezo ongajwayelekile -> hlola i-hyperandrogenism nezimbangela ze-anovulation
texts.t218: uma ama-androgens ephakeme kakhulu noma izimpawu ziqhubeka ngokushesha -> qeda izimbangela ze-neoplastic/ezinzima ze-endocrine
texts.t219: ukunganaki indlela yokuhlola ne-SHBG kumagugu angumngcele
texts.t221: ukuhlola i-testosterone kuphela ngaphandle komongo we-SHBG
texts.t222: I-Testosterone kwabesifazane ibalulekile ngamanani amancane, futhi ukweqisa kwayo kuhlotshaniswa ne-hyperandrogenism kanye nezinkinga zokukhulelwa.
texts.t228: hlola umjikelezo, isisindo somzimba, ukumelana ne-insulin, kanye ne-PCOS
texts.t229: uma kukhona izimpawu ezinzima ezisheshayo, qeda izimbangela ezinzima ezingavamile
texts.t230: Indlela yokuhlaziya ibalulekile ekuhloleni i-testosterone kwabesifazane; ama-immunoassays kumazinga aphansi kwabesifazane awathembekile kangako kunezindlela ezisezingeni eliphezulu ze-mass spectrometry.
texts.t233: Ama-Androgens adingeka futhi emzimbeni wesifazane, kodwa ukweqisa kwawo kuphazamisa ukukhulelwa futhi kuthinta isikhumba, izinwele, nomjikelezo.
texts.t234: Ama-Androgens afaka i-testosterone, i-androstenedione, i-DHEA, ne-DHEAS. Akukhona kuphela izinga eliphelele kodwa futhi ne-fraction etholakalayo kanye nezimpawu ezihambisana nazo ezibalulekile kwezokwelapha.
texts.t235: Ama-Androgens kwabesifazane — isici esibalulekile sokulawulwa kwehomoni.
texts.t236: Ngamanani e-physiological, ama-androgens abamba iqhaza ekwakhiweni kwe-steroid ejwayelekile futhi asebenza njengesisekelo sokukhiqizwa kwe-estrogen. Ngokweqile, angavimbela ukukhula okujwayelekile kwe-follicle ebusayo futhi anikele ku-anovulation okuqhubekayo. Kufanele ahlolwe ngokucatshangelwa kobudala, izimpawu, i-SHBG, kanye nemithombo engenzeka — ama-ovari nama-adrenal.
texts.t244: Ukweqisa kwama-androgens kwabesifazane kuhlotshaniswa ne-hirsutism, i-acne, kanye ne-anovulation.
texts.t252: I-AMH ibonisa inani lama-follicle e-preantral namancane e-antral futhi isetshenziswa njengesikhombisi sesitoreji sama-ovari.
texts.t253: I-AMH ayikhombisi ngqo ikhwalithi yamaqanda futhi ayiqinisekisi ukungazali ngokwayo. Isiza ukuhlola impendulo elindelekile ye-ovari ekushukumiseni.
texts.t254: I-Anti-Müllerian hormone (AMH) iyisici esibalulekile sokulawulwa kwehomoni.
texts.t255: I-AMH ikhiqizwa amaseli e-granulosa ama-follicle e-preantral namancane e-antral. Ukulula kwayo kusekutheni incike kancane osukwini lomjikelezo kune-FSH noma i-inhibin B. Nokho, i-AMH kufanele ichazwe ngokucophelela: i-AMH ephansi ayilingani nokungazali ngokushesha, futhi i-AMH ephezulu ayiqinisekisi ukukhulelwa okujwayelekile. Ivame ukuphakanyiswa ku-PCOS futhi incipha lapho isitoreji sama-ovari sincishiswa.
texts.t256: Ukuhumusha kuncike endleleni, ubudala, inhloso yokuhlola, nelabhorethri; izitayela nomongo kubaluleke kakhulu kunenombolo eyodwa.
texts.t262: ukulinganisa i-AMH nekhwalithi yamaqanda noma amathuba okukhulelwa kwemvelo
texts.t263: I-AMH ibonisa inani lama-follicle e-preantral namancane e-antral futhi isebenza njengesikhombisi sesitoreji sama-ovari.
texts.t264: I-AMH akufanele isetshenziswe njengokuhlolwa okukodwa kokuxilonga i-PCOS noma ukuhlola ukungazali.
texts.t265: ama-follicle angaphambi kwe-antral kanye nama-antral amancane
texts.t268: I-AMH ibonisa kangcono isikhwama se-ovarian kunokukhulelwa kwamanje noma ikhwalithi yamaqanda; akufanele ihunyushwe njengokubikezela okuqondile kokukhulelwa kwemvelo.
texts.t271: I-Inhibin B ikhiqizwa amaseli e-granulosa ama-follicle e-antral asanda kuqala futhi ivimbela i-FSH.
texts.t272: I-Inhibin B ibalulekile njengengxenye yokuphendula okungekuhle esigabeni sokuqala se-follicular. Isetshenziswa kancane kune-AMH ngoba iyahlukahluka kakhulu phakathi nomjikelezo.
texts.t273: I-Inhibin B iyisici esibalulekile sokulawulwa kwehomoni.
texts.t274: I-Inhibin B isiza ukulawula ukukhula kweqembu le-follicular ngokuvimbela i-FSH. Emithini yokuzala, kwesinye isikhathi isetshenziswa njengesibonakaliso esengeziwe somsebenzi we-ovarian, kodwa ekusebenziseni kwesimanje, ingaphansi kwe-AMH mayelana nokulula nokuphindaphinda kokuhlola isikhwama se-ovarian.
texts.t278: I-Inhibin B ikhiqizwa amaseli e-granulosa ama-follicle akhula futhi ivimbela i-FSH.
texts.t279: I-Inhibin B isetshenziswa kancane kune-AMH ekuhloleni isikhwama se-ovarian ngenxa yokuhluka okukhulu komjikelezo.
texts.t284: I-TSH ngokwayo ayilawuli umjikelezo ngqo, kodwa isebenza njengesikhombisi sesimo se-thyroid, esithinta i-ovulation nokujwayeleka komjikelezo.
texts.t285: Ukuphazamiseka kwe-TSH kungahambisana ne-hypo- noma i-hyperthyroidism, futhi lezi zimo zihlotshaniswa nokuphazamiseka komjikelezo, izinguquko ku-SHBG, i-prolactin, nomsebenzi we-ovulatory.
texts.t286: I-TSH nomjikelezo wokuya esikhathini — isici esibalulekile sokulawulwa kwehomoni.
texts.t287: I-TSH iyasiza njengesikhombisi sokuhlola umsebenzi we-thyroid ezimweni zokuphazamiseka komjikelezo. Nakuba ingeyona i-hormone yokuzala ngencazelo encane, ukuguqulwa kwayo kusiza ukusola imbangela ye-endocrine ye-anovulation, i-oligomenorrhea, noma i-amenorrhea. Ngakho-ke, i-TSH ivame ukufakwa ekusebenzeni okuyisisekelo kokuxilongwa.
texts.t288: Izilinganiso zereferensi zincike endleleni nesimo sezokwelapha; ekuhloleni kokuzala, i-TSH ihunyushwa kanye ne-T4 yamahhala nomlando wezokwelapha.
texts.t292: uma kukhona ukuphazamiseka komjikelezo + izimpawu zokuphazamiseka kwe-thyroid -> hlola i-TSH ne-T4 yamahhala
texts.t293: uma i-hyperprolactinemia ihlanganiswa ne-TSH ephezulu -> khumbula isixhumanisi se-TRH/prolactin
texts.t294: I-TSH iyingxenye yokuhlola okujwayelekile kokuphazamiseka komjikelezo wokuya esikhathini ne-amenorrhea.
texts.t295: Isifo se-thyroid singaphazamisa i-ovulation nomsebenzi wokuya esikhathini.
texts.t300: hlola i-TSH kanye ne-T4 yamahhala nokubonakaliswa kwezokwelapha
texts.t302: lungisa ukuphazamiseka kwe-thyroid ngaphambi kokuhumusha izikhalazo zokuzala
texts.t307: Ama-hormone e-thyroid asekelwa umsebenzi ojwayelekile we-ovaries, i-endometrium, kanye nesimo semetabolism se-ovulation.
texts.t308: Kokubili i-hypothyroidism ne-hyperthyroidism kungaphazamisa i-ovulation, kwandise noma kwehlise umjikelezo, futhi kubangele i-anovulation.
texts.t309: Ama-hormone e-thyroid ne-ovulation — isici esibalulekile sokulawulwa kwehomoni.
texts.t310: Ama-hormone e-thyroid athinta izicubu eziningi zesistimu yokuzala, okuhlanganisa ama-ovaries, i-endometrium, nezakhiwo ze-placental. Ku-hypothyroidism, ukukhuphuka kwe-TRH kanye ne-hyperprolactinemia yesibili nakho kungenzeka, okwandisa ingozi ye-anovulation. Ngakho-ke, ezimweni zokuphazamiseka komjikelezo, kubalulekile hhayi kuphela ukukala i-TSH kodwa futhi ukuhlola iphrofayili ye-thyroid iyonke.
texts.t314: Kokubili i-hypothyroidism ne-hyperthyroidism kungahambisana ne-anovulation nokuphazamiseka komjikelezo.
texts.t315: Ukuhlolwa komsebenzi we-thyroid kunconywa nge-amenorrhea nokuphazamiseka komjikelezo wokuya esikhathini.
texts.t323: Ukucindezeleka okungapheli kanye nokuvulwa kwe-HPA axis kungacindezela i-axis yokuzala.
texts.t324: Ngaphansi kokucindezeleka okukhulu noma okuqhubekayo, amazinga e-CRH ne-cortisol ayanda, okunganciphisa i-GnRH pulsation, kushintshe ukukhishwa kwe-LH, futhi kuphazamise i-ovulation.
texts.t325: I-Cortisol nomthelela wokucindezeleka kuma-hormone kuyisici esibalulekile sokulawulwa kwehomoni.
texts.t326: Umthelela wokucindezeleka kumjikelezo uvame ukungagcini ku-cortisol kuphela. Imvamisa ihlanganisa inhlanganisela yomthwalo we-psycho-emotional, ukuphazamiseka kokulala, ukuntuleka kwamandla, umsebenzi omkhulu womzimba, nezinguquko emsebenzini we-HPA axis. Ngokwezokwelapha, lokhu kungase kubonakale njengokwelulwa komjikelezo, i-anovulation, noma i-functional hypothalamic amenorrhea.
texts.t330: uma kukhona ukuntuleka kwamandla, ukucindezeleka okukhulu, noma izimpawu ze-metabolism -> funa imbangela yesistimu, hhayi nje "ihomoni yezocansi"
texts.t331: uma umjikelezo uphazamiseka ngokumelene ne-phenotype efana ne-PCOS -> hlola ukumelana ne-insulin kanye ne-hyperandrogenism
texts.t332: Ukuvulwa kwe-HPA axis kungacindezela i-GnRH futhi kuphazamise i-ovulation.
texts.t333: Ukucindezeleka kuvame ukuba yingxenye yesimo sezokwelapha ku-functional hypothalamic amenorrhea.
texts.t338: hlola ukudla, isisindo/izinguquko zesisindo, umthwalo womzimba, ukulala, nokucindezeleka
texts.t339: funa imbangela ye-metabolism noma ehlobene namandla yokuphazamiseka komjikelezo
texts.t340: welapha umshayeli oyinhloko, hhayi nje umphumela
texts.t343: I-Insulin ihlotshaniswa eduze nomsebenzi we-ovarian futhi ibaluleke kakhulu ekwakhekeni kwe-PCOS.
texts.t344: I-Hyperinsulinemia ithuthukisa ukukhiqizwa kwe-androgen kwe-ovarian futhi inciphisa i-SHBG, ngaleyo ndlela yandisa amazinga e-androgen yamahhala.
texts.t345: I-Insulin nesistimu yokuzala kuyisici esibalulekile sokulawulwa kwehomoni.
texts.t346: I-Insulin akuyona nje ihomoni ye-metabolism kodwa futhi ebalulekile ekuzaleni. Ekumelaneni ne-insulin, ama-ovaries athola izimpawu zokwanda kwe-androgenogenesis, futhi isibindi sikhiqiza i-SHBG encane. Ngenxa yalokho, ukutholakala kwe-androgen kuyanda, i-ovulation iyaphazamiseka, futhi umjikelezo we-PCOS uyagcinwa.
texts.t350: I-Insulin ithinta i-axis yokuzala kanye ne-steroidogenesis ye-ovarian.
texts.t351: Ukumelana ne-Insulin kudlala indima enkulu ekwakhekeni kwe-PCOS kanye nezinkinga ezihlobene ne-ovulatory.
texts.t361: I-Leptin ithumela izimpawu ebuchosheni mayelana nokwaneleka kwezinqolobane zamandla zokuzala.
texts.t362: Ngokutholakala kwamandla okuphansi kakhulu kanye ne-leptin ephansi, i-axis yokuzala ingavinjelwa; nokho, izicubu eziningi ze-adipose kanye nokumelana ne-leptin nakho kungahambisana nokuphazamiseka.
texts.t363: I-Leptin nokuxhumana kwayo ne-ovulation kuyisici esibalulekile sokulawulwa kwehomoni.
texts.t364: I-Leptin iyisixhumanisi esibalulekile phakathi kwesimo samandla nokuzala. Ayilawuli i-GnRH yodwa kodwa iyingxenye yenethiwekhi yezimpawu ezazisa ubuchopho ukuthi kukhona yini izinsiza ezanele zokusekela i-ovulation. Ngakho-ke, kokubili ukuncipha okukhulu nokukhuluphala kungaphazamisa umjikelezo we-ovulatory, nakuba izindlela zihluke.
texts.t368: I-Leptin idlulisa ulwazi mayelana nezinqolobane zamandla futhi ibamba iqhaza ekuguqulweni kwenethiwekhi ye-GnRH.
texts.t369: Kokubili ukutholakala kwamandla okuphansi nokukhuluphala kungahambisana nokuphazamiseka kwe-ovulatory.
texts.t375: Ama-hormone ashintsha ngezikhathi ngoba umjikelezo wakhiwe ngokushintsha okulandelanayo phakathi kokuphendula okungekuhle nokuhle.
texts.t376: Ekuqaleni komjikelezo, i-estradiol ne-progesterone ephansi ivumela i-FSH ukuthi ikhuphuke kancane; bese, i-follicle ekhulayo yandisa i-estradiol ne-inhibin B, futhi ngemva kwe-ovulation, i-progesterone iyabusa.
texts.t377: Kungani ama-hormone eshintsha ngezikhathi zomjikelezo kuyisici esibalulekile sokulawulwa kwehomoni.
texts.t378: Umjikelezo wokuya esikhathini awuyona isethi esingashintshi samazinga kodwa uhlelo oluguquguqukayo. Okokuqala, umzimba uqasha ama-follicle, bese ukhetha i-follicle ebusayo, ulungiselela i-ovulation, futhi ngemva kwe-ovulation, ulungisa kabusha i-endometrium ngaphansi kwethonya le-progesterone. Ngakho-ke, ukuhlola ama-hormone ngaphandle kokucacisa isigaba somjikelezo kuvame ukungabi nolwazi.
texts.t382: uma kukhona ukuphazamiseka komjikelezo okuqhubekayo -> funa imbangela ethile kuma-axes e-HPO/HPT/HPA kanye nesimo se-metabolism
texts.t383: uma kutholakala ukuphazamiseka ekuhlolweni okukodwa -> qinisekisa ngaphakathi kwesimo sezokwelapha
texts.t384: Izinguquko ze-hormonal ezincike esigabeni zibonisa ukushintsha kokuphendula nezikhathi zomjikelezo.
texts.t385: Ekuqaleni komjikelezo, i-estradiol ne-progesterone ziphansi, futhi ngemva kwe-ovulation, i-progesterone iyabusa.
texts.t392: I-LH peak iyisigameko se-hormonal esandulela i-ovulatory, ngaphandle kwalokho i-ovulation ejwayelekile ayinakwenzeka.
texts.t393: I-LH peak esandulela i-ovulatory yenzeka ngemva kwesikhathi eside se-estradiol ephezulu futhi ivula i-follicle rupture kanye ne-ovulation.
texts.t394: I-LH peak ngaphambi kwe-ovulation iyisici esibalulekile sokulawulwa kwehomoni.
texts.t395: Izivivinyo ze-LH ezithengiswayo zisetshenziswa ukuthola iwindi elizalayo, kodwa azinikezi ukubikezela okunembile ngokulinganayo kuwo wonke umuntu. Kunokuhluka phakathi kwabantu ngesikhathi sokuqala kwe-LH surge kanye ne-ovulation; ngakho-ke, ngokwezokwelapha, le peak ihunyushwa kangcono njengokufika kwe-ovulation kunesikhathi sayo esiqondile.
texts.t399: I-LH peak ihamba phambili ku-ovulation futhi iyivula.
texts.t400: Isikhathi phakathi kokuqala kwe-LH surge kanye ne-ovulation sinokuhluka phakathi kwabantu.
texts.t404: I-corpus luteum yakhiwa ku-follicle ovulated kulandela i-LH surge.
texts.t405: Ngemva kwe-ovulation, amaseli e-granulosa kanye ne-theca ayaluthiniza, ukukhula kwe-vascular kuyanda, futhi isitho se-endocrine sesikhashana — i-corpus luteum — siyakheka.
texts.t406: Indlela i-corpus luteum eyakheka ngayo — isici esibalulekile sokulawulwa kwehomoni.
texts.t407: I-corpus luteum iyisakhiwo esakheka ngokushesha, esine-vascularization ephezulu esikwazi ukukhiqiza amanani amakhulu e-progesterone. Uma ukufakwa kwesisu kungenzeki, iyancipha. Uma ukukhulelwa kwenzeka, umsebenzi wayo uyagcinwa kuze kube i-placenta iqala ukukhiqiza i-progesterone eyanele.
texts.t410: I-corpus luteum yakhiwa ku-follicle ovulated ngemva kwe-LH surge.
texts.t411: Umsebenzi oyinhloko we-corpus luteum ukukhiqiza i-progesterone.
texts.t417: Igama elithi "ukuphazamiseka kwehomoni" akuyona i-diagnosis, kodwa incazelo ejwayelekile yokuphazamiseka kokulawulwa kwehomoni.
texts.t418: Ngokwesayensi, kunembe kakhudlwana ukucacisa ukuphazamiseka okuthile esikhundleni sokusebenzisa igama elijwayelekile: i-anovulation, i-hyperprolactinemia, i-hypothyroidism, i-hyperandrogenism, i-hypoestrogenism, njll.
texts.t419: Kuyini ukuphazamiseka kwehomoni — isici esibalulekile sokulawulwa kwehomoni.
texts.t420: Kwezokwelapha okudumile, "ukuphazamiseka kwehomoni" kuvame ukusetshenziswa ukuchaza noma iyiphi isikhalazo — kusuka ku-PMS kuya ku-acne. Ekusebenziseni kwezokwelapha okusekelwe ebufakazini, leli gama lisetshenziswa kuphela njengenkulumo ejwayelekile, elandelwa ukucaciswa komshini. Lokhu kubalulekile ngoba ukwelashwa kuncike hhayi ekuphazamisekeni okungaqondakali, kodwa embangeleni ethile nesimo.
texts.t424: "Ukuphazamiseka kwehomoni" akuyona i-diagnosis enembile; ngokwezokwelapha, umuntu kufanele afune ukuphazamiseka okuthile kwe-axis noma isitho.
texts.t425: noma iyiphi i-HPO/HPT/HPA axis noma isixhumanisi se-metabolism
texts.t432: Igama elithi "ukubusa kwe-estrogen" lisetshenziswa kabanzi ezincwadini ezidumile kodwa akuyona i-diagnosis ezimele ejwayelekile ku-gynecology esekelwe ebufakazini.
texts.t433: Ekusebenziseni, kuvame ukuhlanganisa i-anovulation engapheli, ukungabikho kwesigaba se-progesterone, ukukhuluphala, i-perimenopause, noma ezinye izimo ezithile.
texts.t434: Ukubusa kwe-Estrogen — isici esibalulekile sokulawulwa kwehomoni.
texts.t435: Uma umuntu enezimpawu ezibizwa ngokuthi "ukubusa kwe-estrogen" imithombo edumile, kubalulekile ngokwezokwelapha ukuhlola i-anovulation engapheli, imijikelezo engajwayelekile, ukujiya kwe-endometrial, izici ze-metabolism, i-perimenopause, noma imiphumela emibi yemithi. Lokho kusho ukuthi, kubalulekile hhayi ukuvikela leli gama, kodwa ukulihumusha libe ulimi oluwusizo ekuxilongweni.
texts.t438: noma iyiphi i-PMS isho ukweqisa kwe-estrogen
texts.t442: hluleka ukufuna i-anovulation engapheli nokungabikho kwesigaba se-progesterone
texts.t443: Igama elithi 'ukubusa kwe-estrogen' akuyona i-diagnosis ezimele ejwayelekile ku-endocrinology yokuzala esekelwe ebufakazini.
texts.t444: Imvamisa, leli gama lifihla i-anovulation engapheli, ukungabikho kwesigaba se-progesterone, noma ezinye izimo ezithile.
texts.t450: Igama elithi 'ukubusa kwe-estrogen' lisetshenziswa kabanzi kwabezindaba ezidumile kodwa akuyona i-diagnosis ezimele ejwayelekile ku-endocrinology yokuzala esekelwe ebufakazini.
texts.t453: Kunembe kakhudlwana ukukhuluma 'ngokuntuleka kwe-progesterone' kuphela kumongo we-ovulation eqinisekisiwe, isigaba se-luteal, nenhloso yezokwelapha.
texts.t454: Ekusebenziseni kwezokwelapha, i-progesterone ephansi ivame ukuhlotshaniswa hhayi nokuntuleka okuzimele, kodwa nge-anovulation noma isikhathi esingalungile sokuhlolwa.
texts.t455: Ukuntuleka kwe-Progesterone kuyisici esibalulekile sokulawulwa kwehomoni.
texts.t456: Njengoba amazinga e-progesterone eshintsha kakhulu phakathi nomjikelezo, ukuhlolwa ngaphandle kokubhekisela ku-ovulation kuvame ukuba nenani elincane. Umgomo obalulekile: qinisekisa kuqala ukuthi i-ovulation yenzekile, bese uhlole ukukhiqizwa kwe-progesterone esigabeni se-luteal esiphakathi. Ngaphandle kwalokho, ilebula elingamanga 'lokuntuleka' lingase lisetshenziswe lapho inkinga yangempela i-anovulation.
texts.t458: i-progesterone kufanele ihlolwe njalo ngosuku lwe-21
texts.t459: i-progesterone ephansi ngaphandle kokuqinisekiswa kwe-ovulation kufakazela ukuntuleka kwesigaba se-luteal
texts.t462: I-Progesterone ephansi ivame ukuhlotshaniswa ne-anovulation noma isikhathi esingalungile sokuhlolwa.
texts.t463: Ukuhlola ukukhiqizwa kwe-luteal, i-progesterone ihunyushwa maqondana nosuku lwe-ovulation, kunokuba usuku lomjikelezo olujwayelekile.
texts.t468: Umqondo 'wokuntuleka kwe-progesterone' ngaphandle kwe-anovulation eqinisekisiwe noma umongo womsebenzi we-luteal ungaba ocacile kakhulu; ekusebenziseni kwezokwelapha, imbangela ibaluleke kakhulu kunalebula.
texts.t471: I-Hyperprolactinemia ingenye yezimbangela ezivamile ze-endocrine ze-oligomenorrhea, i-amenorrhea, ne-anovulation.
texts.t472: Izimbangela zingafaka i-prolactinoma, imithi, i-hypothyroidism, izimo zomzimba, nezifo ezithile zesistimu.
texts.t473: I-Hyperprolactinemia nezinkinga zomjikelezo kuyisici esibalulekile sokulawulwa kwehomoni.
texts.t474: Ngokwezokwelapha, kubalulekile ukuqinisekisa ukuqhubeka kokukhuphuka kwe-prolactin nokungakhohlwa izici zangaphambi kokuhlolwa. Ezimweni ze-hyperprolactinemia esindayo, i-galactorrhea, izinhlungu zekhanda, noma ukuphazamiseka kokubona, ukuhlolwa okujulile kuyadingeka, okuhlanganisa nokukhishwa kwe-prolactinoma nezinye izimbangela zesifo se-pituitary.
texts.t482: Ezimweni zokukhuphuka kwe-prolactin okuqhubekayo, izimbangela ezihlanganisa i-prolactinoma, imithi, ne-hypothyroidism kufanele zihlolwe.
texts.t486: I-Hypoestrogenism yisimo sokuntuleka komphumela we-estrogenic ezicutshini.
texts.t487: Kungabonakala njengokoma kwesitho sangasese sowesifazane, ukwehla kwe-libido, ukuqubuka okushisayo, ukuphazamiseka kokulala, i-amenorrhea, nokulahlekelwa amathambo.
texts.t489: Izimpawu ze-hypoestrogenism zincike ebudaleni, embangeni, nasekutheni isimo seside kangakanani. Ebudaleni obuncane, lokhu kubaluleke kakhulu ngoba ukuntuleka kwe-estrogen okude kuthinta hhayi kuphela umjikelezo nokuzala kodwa futhi nezicubu zamathambo, izicubu ezimanzi, nekhwalithi yokuphila. Izimbangela zifaka i-hypothalamic amenorrhea, ukuntuleka kwe-ovarian okungakafiki ngesikhathi, i-hyperprolactinemia, nezinye izinyathelo zokwelashwa.
texts.t493: I-Hypoestrogenism ingabonakala njenge-amenorrhea, ukoma kwezicubu ezimanzi, nezimpawu zokuntuleka kwe-estrogen.
texts.t494: Ukuntuleka kwe-Estrogen kuthinta hhayi kuphela umjikelezo kodwa futhi namathambo, izicubu ezimanzi, nempilo yonke.
texts.t504: I-Hyperandrogenism ibonakala nge-acne, i-hirsutism, ukulahlekelwa izinwele kwe-androgenic, futhi ngokuvamile ukuphazamiseka kwe-ovulatory.
texts.t505: Imbangela evame kakhulu kwabesifazane abaneminyaka yokuzala yi-PCOS, kodwa kubalulekile ukukhipha izimbangela ezingavamile, okuhlanganisa ama-tumor kanye ne-CAH engajwayelekile.
texts.t507: Ngokwezokwelapha, i-hyperandrogenism akuyona nje inani lelebhu kodwa isifo esinezimpawu. Izinga lokuthuthuka kwezimpawu, ukujwayeleka komjikelezo, izimpawu zokumelana ne-insulin, nobukhulu bezimpawu kufanele kuhlolwe. Ukuthuthukiswa okusheshayo kwe-virilization kuyisixwayiso esithile esidinga ukuhlolwa ngokushesha.
texts.t514: I-Hyperandrogenism ibonakala nge-hirsutism, i-acne, i-alopecia ehlotshaniswa ne-androgen, futhi ngokuvamile ukuphazamiseka kwe-ovulatory.
texts.t515: Imbangela evame kakhulu ye-hyperandrogenism kwabesifazane abaneminyaka yokuzala yi-PCOS.
texts.t519: Indlela ama-hormone athinta ngayo isimo sengqondo
texts.t521: I-Estradiol ne-progesterone zisebenzisana nezinhlelo ze-neurotransmitter zobuchopho, ngakho-ke ukuguquguquka kwehomoni kungathinta isimo sengqondo.
texts.t522: Kwabaningi, le miphumela imaphakathi, kodwa kwabanye, ukuzwela ezinguqukweni zesigaba kuphawuleka kakhulu.
texts.t523: Indlela ama-hormone athinta ngayo isimo sengqondo kuyisici esibalulekile sokulawulwa kwehomoni.
texts.t524: Isimo sengqondo sithonywa hhayi kuphela amazinga ama-hormone aphelele kodwa futhi ngesilinganiso sokushintsha, ukuzwela komuntu ngamunye, ikhwalithi yokulala, amazinga okucindezeleka, nomlando wezifo zengqondo. Ngakho-ke, isigaba somjikelezo esifanayo singazwakala sihluke kubantu abahlukene. Ngokwesayensi, kunembe kakhudlwana ukukhuluma hhayi ngesigaba 'esibi', kodwa ngokusebenzisana phakathi kwe-biology nokuzwela komuntu ngamunye.

texts.t532: I-Estradiol ne-progesterone zithinta amanethiwekhi e-neural ahilelekile emoyeni nasekucubunguleni okuhlakaniphile.
texts.t533: Isimo sengqondo phakathi nomjikelezo sinqunywa hhayi kuphela amazinga ama-hormone kodwa futhi ngokuzwela komuntu ngamunye ekuguquguqukeni kwawo.
texts.t539: gcina idayari yezimpawu ezibhekayo okungenani imijikelezo emi-2
texts.t541: uma kunomthelela omkhulu kwekhwalithi yokuphila, xoxa ngosizo lwezokwelapha
texts.t542: Umthelela womjikelezo esimweni sengqondo uyikho, kodwa ubukhulu bomphumela buncike kakhulu ekuzwelweni komuntu ngamunye futhi akufanele kube yinto ejwayelekile kubo bonke abesifazane.
texts.t543: Indlela ama-hormone athinta ngayo isikhumba, izinwele, ne-libido
texts.t545: Ama-Androgen anethonya elinamandla kakhulu ku-acne, i-sebum, ne-hirsutism; ama-estrogen ne-progesterone nawo ashintsha isimo sesikhumba nesifiso socansi.
texts.t546: Ukukhuphuka kuma-androgen amahhala kwandisa ukukhiqizwa kwe-sebum futhi kungadala i-acne ne-hirsutism, kuyilapho i-hypoestrogenism evelele ivame ukuhlotshaniswa nokoma nokwehla kwe-libido.
texts.t547: Indlela ama-hormone athinta ngayo isikhumba, izinwele, ne-libido kuyisici esibalulekile sokulawulwa kwehomoni.
texts.t548: Isimo sesikhumba, izinwele, ne-libido siyisimo esihlanganisa izinto eziningi. Sithonywa ama-hormone, izakhi zofuzo, ukuzwela kwe-receptor, imithi, isitho se-thyroid, ukucindezeleka, ikhwalithi yokulala, nobudlelwano. Ngakho-ke, ngisho nemiphumela yelebhu efanayo, isithombe sezokwelapha singahluka phakathi kwabantu ababili.
texts.t549: indlela ama-hormone athinta ngayo isikhumba, izinwele, ne-libido
texts.t552: Ukweqisa kuma-androgen amahhala kuhlotshaniswa ne-acne, i-hirsutism, ne-alopecia ehlotshaniswa ne-androgen.
texts.t553: I-Hypoestrogenism ingafaka isandla ekomeni kwezicubu ezimanzi nokwehla kwe-libido.
texts.t561: Kumaphi amalanga omjikelezo ukuhlola ama-hormone ahlukene
texts.t563: Usuku lokuhlola luncike enhlosweni: amanye ama-hormone ahlolwa esigabeni sokuqala se-follicular, amanye ngemva kwe-ovulation, kanti amanye angahlolwa cishe noma yiluphi usuku.
texts.t564: Nge-FSH, LH, ne-estradiol, isigaba sokuqala se-follicular sivame ukusetshenziswa, imvamisa izinsuku 2–5 zomjikelezo. I-Progesterone ihlolwa cishe izinsuku ezi-7 ngemva kwe-ovulation. I-AMH incike kancane ngosuku lomjikelezo.
texts.t565: Kumaphi amalanga omjikelezo ukuhlola ama-hormone ahlukene — isici esibalulekile sokulawulwa kwehomoni.
texts.t566: Iphutha elivame kakhulu ukuzama ukuhlola wonke ama-hormone ngosuku olufanayo nokuwahumusha ngendlela efanayo kuwo wonke umuntu. Nge-progesterone, isikhathi maqondana ne-ovulation sibalulekile, kunokuba kube "usuku lwe-21" olujwayelekile. Nge-prolactin, izimo zokuhlola zibalulekile. Nge-TSH, isigaba somjikelezo ngokuvamile asibalulekile. Ngakho-ke, uhlelo lwelabhorethri luhlale luhlelelwa umbuzo wezokwelapha.

texts.t579: I-Progesterone ihunyushwa maqondana ne-ovulation — cishe izinsuku ezi-7 ngemva kwayo.
texts.t580: I-Prolactin idinga ukuhambisana nezimo zangaphambi kokuhlolwa, kuyilapho i-TSH ayihlotshaniswa nesigaba somjikelezo.

texts.t589: ungasebenzisi uhlelo olufanayo lokuthatha isampula kubo bonke abagulayo
texts.t590: ungabheki umjikelezo ongajwayelekile 'njengojwayelekile' uma ukuhlolwa kuthathwe nje ngosuku olungahleliwe
texts.t591: Imithetho yekhalenda evamile ilula, kodwa ngomjikelezo ongajwayelekile, kunembe kakhudlwana ukugxila ku-ovulation, umsebenzi wezokwelapha, nendlela yelabhorethri.
texts.t594: Umjikelezo wokuya esikhathini uyinqubo ye-hormonal ephindaphindayo lapho ubuchopho, ama-ovaries, nesibeletho kuhlanganisa ukukhula kwe-follicle, i-ovulation, ukulungiselela i-endometrial, nokukhulelwa.
texts.t595: Umjikelezo wokuya esikhathini akuyona nje inkathi, kodwa ukusebenza kwe-hypothalamus–pituitary–ovarian axis. Ama-pulses e-GnRH alawula i-FSH ne-LH, i-FSH isekela ukukhula kwe-follicle, i-follicle ekhulayo ikhiqiza i-estradiol, i-estradiol ephezulu ivula i-LH peak, i-ovulation ihlukanisa umjikelezo ube izigaba ezimbili, futhi i-progesterone evela ku-corpus luteum yakha isigaba se-luteal. Uma ukukhulelwa kungenzeki, amazinga e-progesterone ne-estradiol ayawa, futhi ukukhulelwa kuqala.
texts.t596: Umjikelezo wokuya esikhathini uyisistimu ye-neuroendocrine ne-reproductive cyclic eqinisekisa i-ovulation nokulungiselela i-endometrium ukuze kufakwe isisu okungenzeka.
texts.t597: Umjikelezo wokuya esikhathini ulawulwa yi-hypothalamus–pituitary–ovarian (HPO) axis. I-Hypothalamus ikhipha i-GnRH ngamapulses; yisivinini nobukhulu bama-pulses la abanquma ukukhishwa kwe-FSH ne-LH yi-anterior pituitary gland. Esigabeni sokuqala se-follicular, i-FSH ivuselela iqembu lama-follicle e-antral. Elinye lawo lithola inzuzo futhi libe ngelibusayo. Amaseli alo e-granulosa aqala ukukhiqiza i-estradiol ne-inhibin B. Njengoba amazinga e-estradiol ekhuphuka, i-endometrium ingena esigabeni sokukhula: izindlala zinde, i-stroma iyanda, futhi isibeletho sikhiqiza i-mucus evumela kakhulu isidoda. Lapho amazinga e-estradiol ephezulu egcinwa isikhathi eside ngokwanele, ukuphendula okungekuhle kushintshela ekuphenduleni okuhle, kuvula i-LH peak. I-Ovulation ngokuvamile yenzeka cishe amahora angama-24–36 ngemva kokuqala kwe-LH surge. Ngemva kwe-ovulation, i-follicle iguquka ibe yi-corpus luteum, ekhiqiza i-progesterone. I-Progesterone ishintsha i-endometrium ibe esigabeni sokukhishwa, ikhuphula izinga lokushisa lomzimba eliyisisekelo cishe ngo-0.3–0.5°C, futhi yenza i-mucus yesibeletho ibe mkhulu. Uma ukukhulelwa kungenzeki, i-corpus luteum iyancipha, amazinga e-progesterone ne-estradiol ayawa, futhi ukuqothuka kwesendlalelo esisebenzayo se-endometrium — ukukhulelwa — kuqala. Ngokwezokwelapha, kubalulekile ukuqaphela ukuthi ukopha okufana nokukhulelwa akuhlali kufakazela i-ovulation. Emijikelezweni ye-anovulatory, ukopha kungenzeka ngaphandle kwesigaba se-luteal esigcwele. Ngakho-ke, ukuhumusha umjikelezo, umuntu kufanele ahlole hhayi kuphela iqiniso lokopha kodwa futhi nobude bomjikelezo, ukujwayeleka, izimpawu ze-ovulation, izici ze-mucus, izinga lokushisa lomzimba eliyisisekelo, nezimpawu ezihambisana nazo.

texts.t647: Umjikelezo wokuya esikhathini ulawulwa ngokusebenzisana kwe-hypothalamus, isitho se-pituitary, ama-ovaries, nesibeletho.
texts.t648: I-Estradiol ephezulu ivula i-LH surge, futhi i-ovulation ngokuvamile yenzeka amahora angama-24–36 ngemva kokuqala kwayo.
texts.t649: Umjikelezo wokuya esikhathini ungathathwa njengesibonakaliso esengeziwe sokuphila.
texts.t650: Kungani umzimba udinga umjikelezo wokuya esikhathini
texts.t652: Umjikelezo wokuya esikhathini awukho kuphela ukukhulelwa: ubonisa ukusebenza okujwayelekile kwezinqubo zokuzala nezokuzala.
texts.t653: Ngokombono we-biology, umjikelezo uyadingeka ukuze kuhlume iqanda, i-ovulation, nokulungiselela i-endometrium ukuze kufakwe isisu okungenzeka. Ngokombono wezokwelapha, umjikelezo ojwayelekile we-ovulatory uyisibonakaliso sokusebenza okujwayelekile kwe-hypothalamic–pituitary–ovarian axis, ukutholakala kwamandla okwanele, nokungabi bikho kokuphazamiseka okukhulu kwe-endocrine.
texts.t654: Umjikelezo wokuya esikhathini uyindlela yokulungela ukuzala futhi ngesikhathi esifanayo uyisibonakaliso sempilo ye-endocrine.
texts.t655: Umsebenzi oyinhloko we-biological womjikelezo ukulungiselela umzimba ukukhulelwa. Emjikelezweni ngamunye, i-follicle ebusayo iyakheka, i-oocyte ifinyelela ekuvuthweni, i-ovulation iyenzeka, futhi i-endometrium ishintsha isuka esigabeni sokukhula iye esigabeni sokukhishwa. Ngaphandle kwalolu chungechunge, ukukhulelwa kwemvelo akunakwenzeka. Nokho, ukubaluleka komjikelezo kubanzi. Umjikelezo ojwayelekile we-ovulatory ubonisa umsebenzi ohlelekile we-hypothalamus, isitho se-pituitary, ama-ovaries, isitho se-thyroid, izimpawu ze-metabolism, nesimo samandla esiphelele. Yingakho odokotela basebenzisa umjikelezo njengesikhombisi esibalulekile sempilo. Ukunyamalala noma ukuphazamiseka okukhulu komjikelezo kungaba isignali yokuqala yokuphazamiseka kwe-hypothalamic, ukuntuleka kwamandla, isifo se-thyroid, i-hyperprolactinemia, noma i-PCOS. Ama-Estrogen ne-progesterone athinta ngaphezu kwesibeletho kuphela. Ama-Estrogen abalulekile ezicutshini zamathambo, ithoni yemithambo yegazi, umsebenzi wokucabanga, nezicubu ezimanzi. I-Progesterone ithinta ukulawula izinga lokushisa, isimo sengqondo, nokuguqulwa kokukhishwa kwe-endometrium. Ngakho-ke, ukuphazamiseka okuqhubekayo komjikelezo kuthinta hhayi kuphela ukuzala kodwa futhi nempilo yonke.

texts.t704: Umjikelezo wokuya esikhathini ulungiselela umzimba ukuvuthwa kweqanda nokukhulelwa okungenzeka.
texts.t705: Umjikelezo wokuya esikhathini uthathwa njengesinye isibonakaliso esibalulekile.
texts.t706: Ukungahleleki komjikelezo kungaba ukubonakaliswa kwezinkinga ze-hypothalamic, thyroid, prolactin, nezamavithamini.
texts.t707: Indlela umjikelezo osebenza ngayo: ukubuka konke okujwayelekile
texts.t709: Umjikelezo uqukethe isigaba se-follicular, ukuvuthwa kweqanda, nesigaba se-luteal; lokhu kulawulwa izinguquko ezilandelanayo ku-FSH, estradiol, LH, ne-progesterone.
texts.t710: Ekuqaleni komjikelezo, amazinga aphansi e-estradiol ne-progesterone avumela i-FSH ukuthi ivuse ukukhula kwe-follicle. I-follicle ebusayo ikhiqiza i-estradiol; amazinga aphezulu e-estradiol avuselela i-LH surge, eqala ukuvuthwa kweqanda. Ngemva kokuvuthwa kweqanda, i-corpus luteum ikhiqiza i-progesterone futhi yakha isigaba se-luteal. Uma ukukhulelwa kungenzeki, amazinga e-progesterone ehla, bese kuqala ukuya esikhathini.
texts.t711: Uhlelo lomjikelezo olujwayelekile luwushintsho olulandelanayo lwezigaba nokuphendula phakathi kwe-hypothalamus, i-pituitary gland, ama-ovari, ne-endometrium.
texts.t712: Ekuqaleni komjikelezo, i-corpus luteum evela kumjikelezo odlule isivele ibuyiselwe emuva, ngakho amazinga e-progesterone ne-estradiol aphansi. Lokhu kususa ukuvinjelwa ku-pituitary gland, futhi i-FSH iqala ukusekela ukukhula kwama-follicle e-antral amaningi. Njengoba ama-follicle ekhula, akhipha i-estradiol ne-inhibin B, futhi elilodwa lawo liba ngelibusayo. Lapho i-estradiol ifinyelela ezingeni eliphezulu, eliqhubekayo, i-pituitary gland ishintshela ekuphenduleni okuhle, bese kuba khona i-LH surge. Yilesi sikhukhula se-LH esivuselela ukuvuthwa kokugcina kwe-oocyte, ukuqhuma kwe-follicle, nokuvuthwa kweqanda. Ngemva kwalokhu, i-follicle iyaluteinize, i-corpus luteum iyakheka, futhi isigaba se-progesterone, noma i-luteal, siqala. I-progesterone yenza i-endometrium ibe yimfihlo, inyuse izinga lokushisa lomzimba eliyisisekelo, futhi yehlise ukuvuleka kwe-mucus ye-cervical. Uma i-embryo ingafaki, i-corpus luteum ibuyela emuva, amazinga e-progesterone ne-estradiol ehla, bese kuqala umjikelezo omusha. Ngokwezokwelapha, kubalulekile ukuthi ubude bomjikelezo bunqunywa ikakhulukazi ubude besigaba se-follicular, hhayi isigaba se-luteal. Ngakho-ke, ukuvuthwa kweqanda akudingeki ukuthi kwenzeke ngosuku lwe-14.

texts.t748: I-LH peak ivuselela ukuvuthwa kweqanda phakathi kwamahora angu-24–36.
texts.t749: Umsebenzi ojwayelekile wokuya esikhathini uncike ekupheleni kwe-hypothalamus, i-pituitary gland, ama-ovari, kanye nomsele wokuphuma.
texts.t752: Ubude bomjikelezo obujwayelekile buphakathi kwezinsuku ezingu-28, kodwa uhla olujwayelekile lwezokwelapha kubantu abadala lubanzi: izinsuku ezingu-24–38.
texts.t753: Inombolo yezinsuku ezingu-28 iyisilinganiso, hhayi umthetho oyimpoqo. Kubantu abadala abasezingeni lokuzala, ubude bomjikelezo obungu-24–38 izinsuku kuvame ukubhekwa njengokuvamile. Imijikelezo emifushane noma emide ivame ukufuna ukuhlolwa, ikakhulukazi uma kuyiphethini entsha.
texts.t754: Ubude bomjikelezo obujwayelekile buyinani eliphakathi elingathathi indawo yohlu olujwayelekile lwezokwelapha.
texts.t755: Nakuba isiko elidumile livame ukuchaza umjikelezo ngokuthi 'izinsuku ezingu-28,' lokhu kuyisilinganiso sezibalo kuphela. Ngokuhumusha kwesimanje kwezokwelapha, umjikelezo ojwayelekile kubantu abadala uvamise ukuwela ngaphakathi kwebanga lezinsuku ezingu-24–38. Umjikelezo wezinsuku ezingu-26, 31, noma 35 awuyona i-pathology ngokwawo uma uzinzile futhi awuhambisani nezimpawu ezibomvu. Isizathu sale nhlobo yokuhluka ukuthi isigaba se-follicular yiso esishintsha kakhulu kusuka kumjikelezo kuya kumjikelezo. Isigaba se-luteal ngemva kokuvuthwa kweqanda sivamise ukuzinza kakhulu kumuntu ofanayo. Ngakho-ke, umjikelezo omude uvame ukusho ukuvuthwa kweqanda okuphuzile kunokuthi kube i-pathology eyimpoqo. Kubalulekile ngokwezokwelapha ukuhlola hhayi kuphela ubude uqobo kodwa nokuqukethwe: ubudala, ukujwayeleka, ukuba khona kwezimpawu zokuvuthwa kweqanda, izimpawu, kanye nokushintsha okungazelelwe.

texts.t790: Ubude bomjikelezo obujwayelekile kubantu abadala ngokuvamile buyizinsuku ezingu-24–38.
texts.t791: Ukulawulwa kwe-hormonal komjikelezo kuhilela i-GnRH, i-FSH, ne-LH.
texts.t792: Ukuhlolwa kwe-clinical kudinga ukuhlaziywa kokuvuthwa kweqanda nokujwayeleka komjikelezo.
texts.t795: I-norm ithathwa hhayi njengokufana komjikelezo okungcono kakhulu, kodwa ukulandelana kwe-physiological ngaphandle kwezimpawu ezibomvu.
texts.t796: Ukushintsha okuncane kubude bomjikelezo kusuka enyangeni kuya enyangeni kuyamukeleka. Umjikelezo ojwayelekile unqunywa hhayi kuphela ngenani lezinsuku kodwa futhi ngokujwayeleka okuhlobene, ukuvuthwa kweqanda okungenzeka, nokungabi bikho kwezimpawu ezikhathazayo. Ukwehluka okwamukelekayo kwehlukile ezikhathini ezahlukene zobudala.
texts.t797: Ukwehluka okujwayelekile kubude bomjikelezo kuyizinguquko ze-physiological ezamukelekayo ebudeni bomjikelezo wokuya esikhathini ngaphandle kwezimpawu zesifo.
texts.t798: I-norm yezokwelapha akuyona 'yonke imijikelezo iyefana,' kodwa iphethini ye-physiological ephindaphindekayo. Kubantu abadala abasezingeni lokuzala, umjikelezo uvame ukuwela ngaphakathi kwebanga lezinsuku ezingu-24–38, kodwa ngisho nangaphakathi kwaleli banga, ukushintsha okuncane kwemvelo kungenzeka. Ukuhumusha kwesimanje kuncike hhayi kuphela kubude bomjikelezo kodwa futhi ekwehlukaneni phakathi kwemijikelezo. Umehluko omncane phakathi kwezinyanga ungaba yi-physiological ngoba isigaba se-follicular sizwela ukucindezeleka, ukulala, ukuhamba, ukuzivocavoca, nesimo samandla. Ngokuchazwa kwezokwelapha, ukujwayeleka kuhlolwa umehluko phakathi komjikelezo omfushane kakhulu nomude kakhulu, futhi ukushintsha okwamukelekayo kuncike ebudaleni. Kubalulekile ukukhumbula: umjikelezo ungahle uwele ngaphakathi kwebanga elijwayelekile kodwa udinga ukuhlolwa uma uhambisana nobuhlungu obukhulu, ukopha okungavamile, ukopha isikhathi eside, noma ukungabi bikho kokuvuthwa kweqanda.

texts.t838: Umjikelezo ojwayelekile kubantu abadala uvame ukuba izinsuku ezingu-24–38.
texts.t839: Ebudaleni bobusha nasezikhathini zokushintsha, ukuguquguquka komjikelezo okwamukelekayo kuphezulu.
texts.t842: Usuku 1 lomjikelezo luwusuku lokuqala lokopha okugcwele kwokuya esikhathini.
texts.t843: Usuku 1 lomjikelezo luthathwa njengosuku lokuqala lokopha okugcwele kwokuya esikhathini, kunokuba kube ukopha okungajwayelekile izinsuku ezingu-1–2 ngaphambili. Empeleni, lolu wusuku lapho ukopha kuhambisana nesikhathi esijwayelekile futhi kudinga imikhiqizo ejwayelekile yokuhlanzeka. Lo mthetho ubalulekile ngoba isigaba se-follicular esilinganiselwe, isikhathi sokuhlolwa kwe-FSH, LH, ne-estradiol, nezinkomba zokulandelela ukuvuthwa kweqanda konke kubalwa kusukela osukwini 1.
texts.t844: Ukuhlaziywa kwe-clinical nedijithali komjikelezo kudinga iphuzu lokubhekisela elifanayo njalo ngenyanga. Ngakho-ke, ukuqala kokopha okugcwele kuthathwa njengosuku 1. Ukopha okuncane okunsundu noma okupinki ngaphambili akuhlali kubonisa ukuqala kweqiniso komjikelezo omusha: kungaba ukuchithwa kwe-endometrial okusele, ukopha phakathi kwemijikelezo, impendulo ekuthatheni izidakamizwa ze-hormonal, noma ukopha ngesinye isizathu. Kungani lokhu kubalulekile? Ngoba ukuqala komjikelezo okungalungile kushintsha zonke izibalo: iwindi lokuhlolwa kwesigaba se-follicular esiphambili, usuku olulinganiselwe lokuvuthwa kweqanda, ukuhumusha kwechati yezinga lokushisa lomzimba eliyisisekelo, nobude besigaba se-luteal. Ezinhlelweni zokulandelela, lokhu kubaluleke kakhulu: uma 'noma yikuphi ukulandelela kwegazi' kubalwa njengosuku 1, i-algorithm ingase iphuthume izinsuku ezingu-1–2. Uma umuntu evame ukudida ukopha okuncane nokuyisisekelo, kuyasiza ukuqopha umbala, ivolumu, isidingo sephedi/tampon, ukuba khona kobuhlungu, nobude besigameko. Uma izigameko ezinjalo ziphindaphinda, ikakhulukazi zihambisana nobuhlungu, ukopha ngemuva kokuhlangana, noma ukopha phakathi kwemijikelezo, akusaseyona inkinga yokulandelela kodwa isizathu sokuhlolwa mathupha.
texts.t845: Kuhle ukuhlola umjikelezo ezinyangeni eziningana ezilandelanayo kunokusekelwe esigamekweni esisodwa.
texts.t846: Ukuba khona kwezimpawu ezibomvu kubaluleke kakhulu kunenani lezinsuku phakathi kwezikhathi.
texts.t847: Kuhlelo lokusebenza, kuwusizo ukuhlanganisa ikhalenda, amanothi ezimpawu, nezici zendlela yokuphila.
