texts.t858: ukulawulwa kwe-hormonal -> ukuvuthwa kweqanda -> progesterone -> umjikelezo
texts.t867: Ukulawulwa kwe-hormonal komjikelezo kuncike ku-GnRH, FSH, ne-LH
texts.t868: Ukuhlolwa kwe-clinical komjikelezo kudinga ukuhlaziywa kokuvuthwa kweqanda nokujwayeleka
texts.t871: Umjikelezo uvamise ukuchazwa ngezigaba zokuyeka, i-follicular, i-ovulatory, ne-luteal.
texts.t872: Umjikelezo uchazwa kalula ngezigaba ezine: i-menstrual, i-follicular, i-ovulatory, ne-luteal. Ezingeni le-ovari, isigaba se-follicular, ukuvuthwa kweqanda, nesigaba se-luteal kuyabonakala; ezingeni le-uterine, izigaba zokukhula, zokukhula, nezimfihlo. Lezi zinhlelo ziqedelana: isenzo se-estradiol sibusa engxenyeni yokuqala yomjikelezo, ne-progesterone ngemva kokuvuthwa kweqanda.
texts.t873: Isigaba sokuyeka yisikhathi lapho ungqimba olusebenzayo lwe-endometrium lukhishwa kulandela ukuwa kwe-progesterone ne-estradiol. Bese kuqala isigaba se-follicular: i-FSH ivuselela ukukhula kwe-follicle, amaseli e-granulosa akhiqiza i-estradiol, futhi i-endometrium ingena esigabeni sokukhula futhi iphinde iqine. Ngasikhathi sinye, i-mucus ye-cervical iba manzi futhi ibe elastic. Isigaba se-ovulatory siyisikhawu esifushane esiseduze nokukhululwa kweqanda kusuka ku-follicle ebusayo ngemva kwe-LH peak. Iwindi elizalayo lakhiwa eduze kwalesi sigaba. Ngemva kokuvuthwa kweqanda, umjikelezo ungena esigabeni se-luteal: i-corpus luteum ikhiqiza i-progesterone, i-endometrium iba yimfihlo, izinga lokushisa lomzimba eliyisisekelo livamise ukukhuphuka, futhi i-mucus ye-cervical iyancipha. Kumsebenzisi, ukwazi izigaba kusiza ukuqonda ukuthi kungani ukukhishwa, izinga lokushisa, i-libido, ukuzwela kwebele, nezimpawu zangaphambi kwesikhathi sokuyeka zishintsha. Kodokotela, lezi zigaba nazo zibalulekile ngoba izivivinyo ezahlukene nezifundo zamathuluzi zingcono ukuhunyushwa ezinsukwini ezithile zomjikelezo.
texts.t876: Isigaba se-follicular siyingxenye yokuqala yomjikelezo, lapho ama-follicle ekhula ku-ovari futhi amazinga e-estrogen akhuphuka kancane kancane.
texts.t877: Isigaba se-follicular siqala ngosuku lokuqala lokuyeka futhi siphele ngokuvuthwa kweqanda. Phakathi nalesi sikhathi, i-FSH ivuselela ukukhula kwama-follicle e-antral, amaseli e-granulosa aqala ukukhiqiza i-17-beta-estradiol ne-inhibin B, futhi i-follicle eyodwa kancane kancane iba ngelibusayo. Yisikhathi sesigaba se-follicular esivame ukuchaza ukuthi kungani umjikelezo womuntu ungaba izinsuku ezingu-26, 29, noma 33.
texts.t878: Ekuqaleni kwesigaba se-follicular, amazinga e-progesterone ne-estradiol aphansi, ngakho umphumela wokuvimbela ku-pituitary gland uba buthaka futhi i-FSH iyakhuphuka ngokulinganisela. Ngaphansi kwethonya le-FSH, ama-follicle amaningana aqala ukuthuthuka, kodwa njengoba amazinga e-estradiol ne-inhibin B ekhuphuka, izinga le-FSH lehla futhi. Lokhu kudala ukukhethwa: ama-follicle angazweli ayeka ukukhula, kuyilapho elibusayo liqhubeka nokuthuthuka. Izibuyekezo zezokwelapha zibonisa ukuthi cishe ngosuku lwesikhombisa lomjikelezo, ama-follicle angu-9–10 mm avame ukubonakala, futhi i-follicle ebusayo ikhula cishe ngo-2 mm ngosuku kuze kube yilapho ifinyelela usayizi wokuvuthwa kweqanda ongu-18–29 mm. Ezingeni le-uterine, lokhu kuhambisana nesigaba sokukhula: i-estradiol ivuselela ukubuyiselwa nokuqina kwe-endometrium, yandisa ukujula kwemithambo ye-spiral, futhi ishintsha ukwakheka kwe-mucus ye-cervical. Umsebenzisi angase aqaphele ukuthi ngemva kokuphela kwesikhathi sokuyeka, i-mucus iqala ngokuba mancane noma inamathele, futhi eduze nokuvuthwa kweqanda, iba i-creamy, bese iba icacile futhi iyeluleka. Uma isigaba se-follicular sinwetshwa ngokweqile noma ukuvuthwa kweqanda kungenzeki, umjikelezo uba mude noma ungahleleki. Lokhu kungenzeka ngokucindezeleka, ukushoda kwamandla, i-PCOS, i-hyperprolactinemia, kanye nokushintsha kwe-perimenopausal.
texts.t881: Isigaba se-ovulatory siyisikhathi esifushane esiseduze nokukhululwa kweqanda ku-ovari.
texts.t882: Isigaba se-ovulatory siyisikhathi esifushane lapho i-follicle ebusayo iqhuma futhi ikhulule i-oocyte. Lesi senzakalo sivuselelwa i-LH surge, esenzeka ngemva kwamazinga aphezulu aqhubekayo e-estradiol; ukuvuthwa kweqanda kuvamise ukwenzeka phakathi kwamahora angu-36–44 ngemva kokuqala kwe-LH surge. Ngokushesha ngaphambi kwaso, i-mucus ye-cervical iba manzi kakhulu, iyashibilika, futhi iyeluleka, futhi ngemva kokuvuthwa kweqanda, lezi zimpawu zishintsha ngokushesha.
texts.t883: Ekupheleni kwesigaba se-follicular, i-follicle ebusayo ifinyelela usayizi ovuthiwe futhi ikhiqiza amazinga aphezulu e-17-beta-estradiol. Ngasikhathi sinye, i-estradiol iyeka ukuvimbela i-pituitary gland futhi, esikhundleni salokho, ivuselela impendulo enhle, okuholela ekukhuphukeni okukhulu kwe-LH nokukhuphuka okuncane kwe-FSH. Ngaphansi kwethonya lesi siginali se-hormonal, ama-protease, ama-prostaglandin, nezinye izithwali zisebenza ku-follicle, okubangela ukuthi udonga lwe-follicular lube buthaka futhi i-oocyte ikhululwe. Kumsebenzisi, ukuvuthwa kweqanda akuhlali kuzwa. Izimpawu ezingaba khona zomzimba zifaka ubuhlungu obufushane ohlangothini olungaphansi lwesisu, isifiso socansi esikhulayo, i-mucus ecacile kakhulu futhi eyelulekayo, futhi kwesinye isikhathi ukopha okuncane. Nokho, akukho kulezi zimpawu eziqinisekisa ukuvuthwa kweqanda ngo-100%. Izinga lokushisa lomzimba eliyisisekelo, ngokuphambene nalokho, liyakhuphuka kuphela ngemva kokuvuthwa kweqanda, ngakho-ke kungcono ukuqinisekisa iqiniso lokuvuthwa kweqanda ngokubheka emuva. Ukuphambuka kubhekwa njengesimo lapho izimpawu zokuvuthwa kweqanda zingekho njalo ngokumelene nesizinda semijikelezo emide noma engahleleki kakhulu, noma kunezimpawu ze-hyperandrogenism, i-galactorrhea, ukuncipha kwesisindo esikhulu, noma i-perimenopause. Ezimweni ezinjalo, umuntu kufanele acabangele ukuphazamiseka kokuvuthwa kweqanda kunokuthi ukuvuthwa kweqanda okuphuzile nje.
texts.t886: Isigaba se-luteal siyingxenye yesibili yomjikelezo ngemva kokuvuthwa kweqanda, lapho i-corpus luteum ikhiqiza i-progesterone.
texts.t887: Isigaba se-luteal siqala ngemva kokuvuthwa kweqanda futhi siqhubeke kuze kube isikhathi sokuyeka esilandelayo. I-hormone yayo eyinhloko i-progesterone, ekhiqizwa yi-corpus luteum ngaphansi kwethonya le-LH. Ngaphansi kwesenzo se-progesterone, i-endometrium iba yimfihlo, izinga lokushisa lomzimba eliyisisekelo livamise ukukhuphuka ngo-0.3–0.6 °C, futhi i-mucus ye-cervical iyancipha futhi iba nzima ukuwela isidoda.
texts.t888: Ngemva kokuvuthwa kweqanda, udonga lwe-follicle oluqhumile luyawa, futhi amaseli e-granulosa ne-theca ayaluteinize ukuze akhe i-corpus luteum. Lesi sakhiwo se-endocrine sesikhashana siqala ukukhiqiza i-progesterone ngokukhuthele futhi, ngezinga elincane, i-estradiol. I-progesterone ishintsha i-endometrium isuka esimweni sokukhula iye esimweni semfihlo: izindlala ziba zigobile kakhulu, ziqongelele i-glycogen, inethiwekhi yemithambo iba yicebile, futhi izicubu zilungiselelwa kangcono ukufakwa okungenzeka. Izimpawu zomzimba zesigaba sesibili zifaka ukukhuphuka okuncane kwezinga lokushisa ekuseni, ukuncipha kwenani le-mucus emanzi, futhi kwesinye isikhathi ukuzwela kwebele okwandayo, ubuthongo, noma izimpawu zangaphambi kwesikhathi sokuyeka. Kubantu abaningi, ubude besigaba se-luteal buzinzile kakhulu kunesigaba se-follicular futhi kuvamise ukuba seduze kwezinsuku ezingu-12–14. Uma i-hCG ingaveli, i-corpus luteum ibuyela emuva, i-progesterone iyawa ngokushesha, futhi lokhu kuvuselela ukuya esikhathini. Uma umjikelezo umfushane njalo ngenxa yesigaba sesibili noma uma ukopha kuqala ngokushesha ngemva kokuvuthwa kweqanda, lokhu kuyisizathu sokungazihloli kodwa ukuxoxa ngesimo nodokotela. Kudinga ukuhlolwa hhayi kuphela kobude besigaba kodwa nokuqinisekiswa kokuvuthwa kweqanda uqobo, isimo se-endometrium, nezinye izimbangela zokopha.
texts.t891: Kuma-ovari, ukukhula kweqembu le-follicle, ukukhethwa kwe-follicle ebusayo, ukuvuthwa kweqanda, nokwakheka kwe-corpus luteum kwenzeka ngokulandelana.
texts.t892: Ekuqaleni komjikelezo, iqembu lama-follicle e-antral livuselelwa kuma-ovari ngaphansi kwethonya le-FSH. Elilodwa lawo liba ngelibusayo, lifinyelele usayizi wangaphambi kokuvuthwa kweqanda, futhi likhiqize amazinga aphezulu e-estradiol. Ngemva kwe-LH surge, i-follicle iqhuma—kuvuthwa kweqanda kuyenzeka. Bese amaseli ayo aguquka abe yi-corpus luteum, ekhipha i-progesterone kuze kube sekupheleni komjikelezo.
texts.t893: Izinguquko kuma-ovari phakathi nomjikelezo ziyinqubo elandelanayo ye-folliculogenesis, ukuvuthwa kweqanda, nokuluteinization.
texts.t894: Izehlakalo eziyinhloko zomjikelezo azenzeka kuphela ku-uterus kodwa futhi kuma-ovari. Ekupheleni komjikelezo odlule, lapho i-progesterone, i-estradiol, ne-inhibin A yehliswa, amazinga e-FSH aqala ukukhuphuka. Lokhu kuvumela iqembu elisha lama-follicle e-antral ukuthi liqhubeke nokukhula. Ekuqaleni komjikelezo, ama-follicle amaningana avamise ukuthuthuka, kodwa elilodwa lithola inzuzo futhi liba ngelibusayo. I-follicle ebusayo iqongelela amaseli e-granulosa, yandisa ukuvezwa kwe-FSH ne-LH receptors, futhi iqala ukukhiqiza i-estradiol ngokukhuthele. Njengoba ikhula, amanye ama-follicle ayabuyela emuva. I-follicle yangaphambi kokuvuthwa kweqanda ivamise ukufinyelela cishe ku-18–24 mm. I-estradiol ephezulu eqhubekayo ivuselela impendulo enhle, i-LH surge iyenzeka, futhi cishe phakathi kwamahora angu-24–36 kamuva, i-follicle iqhuma futhi i-oocyte iyakhululwa. Ngemva kokuvuthwa kweqanda, amaseli e-granulosa ne-theca ayaluteinize, akha i-corpus luteum. Iba umthombo oyinhloko we-progesterone futhi, ngezinga elincane, i-estradiol. Uma ukukhulelwa kungenzeki, i-corpus luteum ibuyela emuva, futhi umjikelezo uqala kabusha. Uma ukukhulelwa kwenzeka, i-hCG isekela umsebenzi wayo. Kubalulekile: ingxenye ye-ovari yomjikelezo iyinqubo yokukhetha esebenzayo, hhayi "ukuvuthwa kweqanda elilodwa" elingasebenzi.

texts.t937: Ekuqaleni komjikelezo, iqembu lama-follicle e-antral liyakhula ngaphansi kwethonya le-FSH, futhi elilodwa liba ngelibusayo.
texts.t938: I-follicle yangaphambi kokuvuthwa kweqanda ivamise ukufinyelela cishe ku-18–24 mm.
texts.t939: Ngemva kokuvuthwa kweqanda, i-corpus luteum iyakheka, eba umthombo we-progesterone.
texts.t942: I-Endometrium iqala ukuchithwa ngesikhathi sokuyeka, bese ikhula ngaphansi kwethonya le-estradiol, futhi ngemva kokuvuthwa kweqanda iba yimfihlo ngaphansi kwethonya le-progesterone.
texts.t943: I-Endometrium idlula ezimweni ezintathu eziyinhloko: ukuchithwa kwe-menstrual, ukukhula, nokuguqulwa kwemfihlo. Engxenyeni yokuqala yomjikelezo, i-estradiol ivuselela ukukhula kwe-endometrial, futhi ngemva kokuvuthwa kweqanda, i-progesterone iyenza ibe yimfihlo futhi ilungele ukufakwa okungenzeka.
texts.t944: Izinguquko ze-Endometrial phakathi nomjikelezo ziyimpendulo elandelanayo yokuphendula kwe-lining ye-uterine ku-estradiol ne-progesterone.
texts.t945: I-Endometrium iyisicubu esizwela i-hormone esidlula ezigabeni zokubhujiswa, ukukhula, nokuvuthwa okusha okusebenzayo njalo umjikelezo. Ngesikhathi sokuyeka, ungqimba olusebenzayo lwe-endometrium lukhishwa ngenxa yokwehla okukhulu kwe-progesterone ne-estradiol. Lokhu kuholela ku-spasm yemithambo ye-spiral, i-ischemia, nokubhujiswa kwezicubu. Ngemva kokuyeka, isigaba sokukhula siqala. Ngaphansi kwethonya le-estradiol, izindlala ze-endometrial ziba zinde, i-stroma ibuyiselwa, futhi ukujiya kwe-lining kuyanda. Emkhubeni wezokwelapha, phakathi naphakathi nesigaba sokukhula, ukujiya kwe-endometrial okungaba ngu-7–12 mm kuvame ukuba yisibopho, nakuba ukuhumusha kuncike osukwini lomjikelezo nendlela yokuhlola. Ngemva kokuvuthwa kweqanda, i-progesterone ishintsha i-endometrium ibe esimweni semfihlo. Izindlala ziba zigobile kakhulu, ukukhiqizwa kuyanda, i-stroma iba yisicubu esinamafutha, futhi izimo zokufakwa ziyadalwa. Uma ukukhulelwa kungenzeki, ukwesekwa kwe-progesterone kuyanyamalala futhi umjikelezo uyaphinda. Kubalulekile: i-endometrium akuyona isicubu esingaguquki. Isimo sayo asikwazi ukuhunyushwa kahle ngaphandle kokuqonda usuku lomjikelezo nesigaba se-hormonal.

texts.t996: I-Estradiol ibangela ukukhula kwe-endometrial, futhi i-progesterone ibangela ukuguqulwa kwemfihlo.
texts.t997: Ukwehla kwe-progesterone kuvuselela ukuchithwa kongqimba olusebenzayo lwe-endometrium.
texts.t998: Indlela i-cervix eshintsha ngayo ngezikhathi zomjikelezo
texts.t1000: Ngaphansi kwethonya le-hormone, i-cervix ishintsha isikhundla sayo, ukuqina, nezinga lokuvuleka: ngaphambi kokuvuthwa kweqanda, ivamise ukuba phezulu, ithambe, futhi ivuleke kakhulu; ngemva kokuvuthwa kweqanda, iba phansi futhi iqine.
texts.t1001: Engxenyeni yokuqala yomjikelezo, i-cervix kancane kancane iba phezulu, ithambe, futhi ivuleke ngaphansi kwethonya lama-estrogens. Ngemva kokuvuthwa kweqanda, i-progesterone iyenza iqine, ivale, futhi ivamise ukuba phansi. Lezi zinguquko azizivivinyo zokuxilonga ezizimele kodwa zingaqedela ukubonwa kwe-mucus nokuvuthwa kweqanda.
texts.t1002: Izinguquko ze-Cervical phakathi kwezigaba zomjikelezo ziyizinguquko ezincike ku-hormone esikhundleni sayo, ukuvumelana, nokuvuleka komsele we-cervical.
texts.t1003: I-Cervix akuyona isakhiwo esingaguquki. Kuyo yonke imijikelezo, izakhiwo zayo zishintsha ngaphansi kwethonya le-estradiol ne-progesterone. Esigabeni se-follicular esiphambili ngemva kokuyeka, i-cervix ivamise ukuba phansi, iqine, futhi ivaliwe. Njengoba i-estradiol ikhuphuka futhi ukuvuthwa kweqanda kusondela, iba ithambe, iphakama phezulu, futhi i-os yangaphandle ingase izwakale ivuleke kakhulu. Lokhu kuhlelwa kabusha kunengqondo ngokwemvelo: ngesikhathi sewindi elizalayo, ithrekhi yokuzala kufanele ivumele ukudlula kwesidoda, ngakho i-cervix ne-mucus iba "ngokudlula". Ngemva kokuvuthwa kweqanda, lapho i-progesterone iba yi-hormone ebusayo, i-cervix ivamise ukuwa, iqine, futhi umsele uba nzima ukuwela. Empeleni, abantu abaningi bazama ukulandelela isikhundla se-cervix ngokwabo, kodwa le ndlela iyisihloko. Kungaba usizo njengomthombo wedatha owengeziwe, ikakhulukazi endleleni ye-symptothermal, kodwa ngokwayo, ayithembeki kangako kunokuhlanganiswa kwe-mucus, izivivinyo ze-LH, nezinga lokushisa lomzimba eliyisisekelo. Kubalulekile: izinguquko ze-cervical ziyisikhombisi esingaqondile sewindi elizalayo, hhayi ubufakazi obuzimele bokuvuthwa kweqanda.

texts.t1031: ubuhlungu, igazi, nokukhishwa okungajwayelekile kudinga ukuhlolwa

texts.t1047: Ngesikhathi sewindi elizalayo, ngaphansi kwethonya lama-estrogens, i-cervix nomsele we-cervical kuba ngokudlula kakhulu isidoda.
texts.t1048: Indlela i-mucus ye-cervical eshintsha ngayo ngezikhathi
texts.t1050: Ngaphansi kwethonya lama-estrogens, i-mucus iba sobala, ibe mncane, futhi iyeluleka, futhi ngemva kokuvuthwa kweqanda, ngaphansi kwethonya le-progesterone, iba nzima futhi inamathele.
texts.t1051: I-Mucus ye-cervical ishintsha kanye nama-hormone. Ngemva kokuyeka, kuvame ukuba nomuzwa wokoma noma i-mucus encane. Ngasikhathi sokuvuthwa kweqanda, njengoba i-estradiol ikhuphuka, i-mucus iba sobala, iyashibilika, futhi iyeluleka, ifane neqanda elibomvu. Ngemva kokuvuthwa kweqanda, i-progesterone iyenza ibe nzima, ibe mnyama, futhi ibe nzima ukuwela isidoda.
texts.t1052: Izinguquko ku-mucus ye-cervical phakathi kwezigaba zomjikelezo ziyizinguquko ezincike ku-hormone zokukhishwa kwe-cervical okuhlobene nokuzala.
texts.t1053: I-Mucus ye-cervical ingenye yezikhombisi ezibalulekile zezokwelapha nezokuziphatha zokuzala. Esigabeni se-follicular esiphambili ngemva kokuyeka, kungase kube ne-mucus encane, futhi ngokomqondo, ukoma kuvame ukuzwakala. Njengoba i-estradiol ikhuphuka, i-cervix iqala ukukhiqiza i-mucus ecacile, emincane, futhi e-elastic. Kulesi sikhathi isidoda sithola indawo efanele yokuphila nokuqhubeka. Ezinsukwini zangaphambi kokuvuthwa kweqanda, i-mucus ivamise ukuchazwa ngokuthi "iqanda elibomvu": icacile, iyashibilika, futhi iyeluleka phakathi kwezandla. Lokhu kubonisa isigaba esibuswa i-estrogen kanye nokusondela kokuvuthwa kweqanda. Ngemva kokuvuthwa kweqanda, i-progesterone ishintsha izakhiwo zokukhishwa: i-mucus iba nzima, inamathele, ibe mnyama, futhi ibe nzima ukuwela isidoda. Kwesinye isikhathi, umuzwa wokoma uyaphinda uzwakale. Kubalulekile: i-mucus ye-cervical iyisikhombisi sokuqala sewindi elizalayo elivela ngaphambi kokuvuthwa kweqanda kuqinisekiswa izinga lokushisa. Nokho, izinguquko ku-mucus zingaphazanyiswa izifo zangasese, ama-spermicides, ezinye izidakamizwa, ukungabi namanzi, nezici zomuntu siqu.

texts.t1100: Ngemva kokuvuthwa kweqanda, ngaphansi kwethonya le-progesterone, umswakama uba mkhulu futhi ungavundile.
texts.t1101: Ukushintsha kwezinga lokushisa komzimba okuyisisekelo ngesigaba
texts.t1103: Ngaphambi kokuvuthwa kweqanda, izinga lokushisa komzimba okuyisisekelo livame ukuba phansi, futhi ngemva kokuvuthwa kweqanda, liyakhuphuka ngaphansi kwethonya le-progesterone futhi lihlale liphezulu kuze kube sekupheleni komjikelezo.
texts.t1104: Esigabeni se-follicular, izinga lokushisa komzimba okuyisisekelo livame ukuba phansi. Ngemva kokuvuthwa kweqanda, lapho i-corpus luteum iqala ukukhipha i-progesterone, izinga lokushisa liyakhuphuka cishe ngo-0.3–0.5°C futhi lihlale liphezulu kulo lonke isigaba se-luteal. Ngakho-ke, i-BBT isiza ukuqinisekisa ukuthi ukuvuthwa kweqanda sekudlule kodwa ayikubikezeli kusengaphambili.
texts.t1105: Ukushintsha kwezinga lokushisa komzimba okuyisisekelo ngesigaba kuyisiphumo sokulawula izinga lokushisa kwe-progesterone, okukhombisa ukushintsha kusuka esigabeni se-follicular kuya esigabeni se-luteal.
texts.t1106: Izinga lokushisa komzimba okuyisisekelo (BBT) liyizinga lokushisa lapho uphumule ngokuphelele, elilinganiswa ngokushesha lapho uvuka ngaphambi kokwenza noma yimuphi umsebenzi. Engxenyeni yokuqala yomjikelezo, ngaphambi kokuvuthwa kweqanda, izinga lokushisa livame ukuba phansi. Ngemva kokuvuthwa kweqanda, i-progesterone ekhiqizwa yi-corpus luteum isebenza emakhungweni okulawula izinga lokushisa le-hypothalamic futhi ikhuphule izinga lokushisa eliyisisekelo. Ngokwesiko, kulindeleke ukukhuphuka cishe ngo-0.3–0.5°C, kwesinye isikhathi kuchazwa njenge-0.5–1°F. Lokhu kukhuphuka kuvame ukuhlala kulo lonke isigaba se-luteal futhi kwehle ngaphambi kokuya esikhathini lapho i-progesterone yehla. Uma ukukhuphuka kuqhubeka izinsuku ezingu-18 noma ngaphezulu, kungase kukhombise ukukhulelwa ngokungaqondile, kodwa akuthathi indawo yokuhlolwa. Ngokwezokwelapha, i-BBT isetshenziswa kakhulu njengokuqinisekiswa kokuvuthwa kweqanda emuva kwesikhathi kunokuba ithuluzi lokubikezela ngokunembile usuku. Ishadi lithinteka ukuntuleka kokulala, utshwala, ukugula, izinguquko esikhathini sokulinganisa, izindiza, nemithi ethile. Kubalulekile ku-AI: i-BBT yandisa ukunemba uma ihlanganiswa nezivivinyo ze-LH nomsakazo, kodwa inqunyelwe yodwa.

texts.t1155: Ngemva kokuvuthwa kweqanda, i-progesterone ibangela ukukhuphuka kwezinga lokushisa komzimba okuyisisekelo cishe ngo-0.3–0.5°C.
texts.t1156: I-BBT iqinisekisa ukuvuthwa kweqanda emuva kwesikhathi futhi ayiyona umkhombandlela ozimele onembile wosuku lokuvuthwa kweqanda.
texts.t1159: Ukujwayeleka komjikelezo kuncike ekusebenzeni okuhlangene kwe-hypothalamus, isibindi, izindlala zesitho sangasese sowesifazane, izimpawu zokudla, isibindi, i-prolactin, amazinga okucindezeleka, nokutholakala kwamandla.
texts.t1160: Umjikelezo uhlale ujwayelekile uma ukuvuthwa kweqanda kwenzeka ngendlela elindelekile. Lokhu kuthonywa yi-GnRH pulsation, amazinga e-FSH ne-LH, ukusebenza kwe-ovarian, i-prolactin, ama-hormone esibindi, ukucindezeleka, ukulala, ukudla, isisindo somzimba, umsebenzi wokuzivocavoca, ukugula, nemithi ethile. Imvamisa, uma ukujwayeleka kuphazamiseka, isigaba se-follicular sithinteka, okubangela ukuthi umjikelezo ube mude noma udideke.
texts.t1161: Ukujwayeleka komjikelezo kungukuphindaphinda okuhlobene kobude bomjikelezo nezigaba, kuncike ekusebenzeni okujwayelekile kwe-ovulatory kanye nokulawulwa kwe-neuroendocrine okungaphazamisekile.
texts.t1162: Umjikelezo ojwayelekile awuyona inani elithi "elifanayo ngokuphelele" lezinsuku njalo ngenyanga, kodwa iphethini ye-ovulatory ephindaphindekayo ngaphandle kokuphambuka okukhulu. Ukuze umjikelezo uhlale ujwayelekile, wonke umgogodla we-hypothalamus–pituitary–ovarian kufanele usebenze: i-hypothalamus kufanele igcine i-GnRH pulsation evamile, i-pituitary kufanele ikhiphe i-FSH ne-LH, futhi izindlala zesitho sangasese sowesifazane kufanele ziphendule ngokukhula kwe-follicle, ukuvuthwa kweqanda, nokukhiqizwa kwe-estradiol ne-progesterone. Ukujwayeleka kuthonywa amaqembu amakhulu ezici. Eyokuqala ukulawulwa kwe-endocrine: ukusebenza okungajwayelekile kwesibindi, i-hyperprolactinemia, ukuncipha kwe-ovarian reserve, i-PCOS, noma ukungasebenzi kwe-hypothalamic kungashintsha ukuvuthwa kweqanda. Eyesibili i-metabolic kanye ne-energetic: ukuntuleka kwamandla, ukuzuza noma ukulahlekelwa isisindo ngokushesha, i-leptin ephansi, ukuqeqeshwa okukhulu, ne-RED-S kungacindezela i-GnRH futhi kwenze ukuvuthwa kweqanda kube yinto engavamile noma engaveli nhlobo. Eyesithathu ukuziphatha nezangaphandle: ukuntuleka kokulala, ukucindezeleka, izindiza, izinguquko kumkhuba, nemithi ethile. Kungani umjikelezo uvame ukuba mude kakhulu ekusebenzeni? Ngoba isigaba se-follicular sibucayi kakhulu ekuthonyweni kwangaphandle nangaphakathi kunesigaba se-luteal. Uma ukuvuthwa kweqanda kubambezeleka, wonke umjikelezo uba mude. Ngakho-ke, ukujwayeleka kuyisibonakaliso sezokwelapha sokusebenza okujwayelekile kwe-ovulatory kanye nempilo ye-neuroendocrine ephelele.

texts.t1191: noma yimuphi umjikelezo ongajwayelekile kusho inkinga efanayo

texts.t1200: Ukujwayeleka komjikelezo kuncike ekuqinisweni kwe-hypothalamus, isibindi, izindlala zesitho sangasese sowesifazane, nokuvuthwa kweqanda okujwayelekile.
texts.t1201: Ukuntuleka kwamandla kanye ne-RED-S kungaphazamisa umsebenzi wokuya esikhathini.
texts.t1204: Umjikelezo uthathwa njengojwayelekile uma ubude bawo bungashintshi ngendlela edidayo, futhi ukuhlukahluka phakathi kwemijikelezo kuhlala ngaphakathi kwemithetho efanele yobudala.
texts.t1205: Umjikelezo ojwayelekile awuyona into efanayo ngobude njalo ngenyanga. Umjikelezo wabantu abadala uthathwa njengojwayelekile uma ubude bomjikelezo bushintsha ngokulinganisela nangokulindelekile. Iziqondiso zesimanje zezokwelapha zisebenzisa ukuhlukahluka okwamukelekayo phakathi komjikelezo omfushane kakhulu nomude kakhulu: ngokuvamile kufika ezinsukwini eziyi-7 zeminyaka engu-26–41 kanye nezinsuku eziyi-9 zeminyaka engu-18–25 kanye no-42–45.
texts.t1206: Umjikelezo ojwayelekile ngumjikelezo onokuhlukahluka okwamukelekayo phakathi kwemijikelezo kanye nokulindeleka okuqhubekayo.
texts.t1207: Abaningi bacabanga ukuthi umjikelezo ujwayelekile kuphela uma ufika "ngokunembile njalo ezinsukwini ezingama-28." Lokhu akulungile. Ngokuhunyushwa kwesimanje kwe-gynecological, ukujwayeleka akuchazwa ngokufana okuphelele, kodwa ngokuhlukahluka okwamukelekayo phakathi kwemijikelezo. Uma umjikelezo ushintsha ngezinsuku ezimbalwa kodwa iphethini ihlala iphindaphindeka, ngokuvamile ihambisana nomthetho. Ubudala bubalulekile. Eminyakeni engu-26–41, umjikelezo uvame ukuthathwa njengojwayelekile uma ukuhlukahluka phakathi komjikelezo omfushane kakhulu nomude kakhulu kungadluli cishe izinsuku eziyi-7. Eminyakeni engu-18–25 kanye no-42–45, ukuhlukahluka okukhulu—kufika ezinsukwini eziyi-9—kwamukeleka. Lokhu kubonisa izici zomzimba: ebusheni obusemva kokuqala kokuya esikhathini/nasebusheni obusemva kokukhula kanye nobudala bokuzala obusemva kokukhula, ukuvuthwa kweqanda kungase kungazinzile. Ukujwayeleka kubalulekile njengesibonakaliso esingaqondile sokusebenza kwe-ovulatory kodwa akusho ukuthi ukuvuthwa kweqanda kuyenzeka. Kubantu abathile, ukopha kungaba kuhle kakhulu nakuba ukuvuthwa kweqanda kungase kuphazamiseke. Ngakho-ke, ukujwayeleka kuyisibonakaliso esiqinile kodwa esingaphelele somjikelezo ojwayelekile.

texts.t1226: ingabe umjikelezo kufanele ube ofanayo njalo ngenyanga
texts.t1231: umjikelezo ojwayelekile = inani elifanayo lezinsuku njalo
texts.t1232: umjikelezo ojwayelekile uqinisekisa ngokuzenzakalelayo ukuvuthwa kweqanda
texts.t1242: Ukujwayeleka komjikelezo kunqunywa izinga lokuhlukahluka phakathi kwemijikelezo, hhayi ukufana kwazo okuphelele.
texts.t1245: Umjikelezo uthathwa njengongajwayelekile uma ubude bomjikelezo bushintsha ngokweqile, ukopha kuba okungaqondakali, noma umjikelezo uphuma ngaphandle kwemingcele ejwayelekile yobudala.
texts.t1246: Umjikelezo ongajwayelekile akuyona nje inyanga eyodwa engajwayelekile. Ukungajwayeleki kuvame ukuchazwa uma umjikelezo ulahlekelwa ukujwayeleka, ukuhlukahluka phakathi kwemijikelezo kudlula imihlahlandlela yobudala, noma ukopha kwenzeka kaningi kakhulu, kaningi kakhulu, noma ngokudidayo. Umjikelezo wabantu abadala ohlala uphuma ngaphandle kwebanga lezinsuku ezingu-24–38 uvame ukudinga ukuhlolwa.
texts.t1247: Umjikelezo ongajwayelekile ngumjikelezo onokuhlukahluka okweqile phakathi kwemijikelezo, ukulahlekelwa ukujwayeleka, noma ukuphambuka kumthetho ojwayelekile wobudala.
texts.t1248: Ukungajwayeleki kuyiphethini yezokwelapha, hhayi ukuxilongwa. Umjikelezo uthathwa njengongajwayelekile uma uba nokuhlukahluka okweqile, uma ukopha kwenzeka ngokungaqondakali, noma uma ubude bomjikelezo buhlala buphuma ngaphandle kwemikhawulo ejwayelekile yobudala. Emkhubeni wezokwelapha, lokhu kuvame ukuvela njengokushintshana kwemijikelezo emifushane, emide, nemijikelezo ephuthelwe. Ukungajwayeleki kubaluleke kakhulu ngoba kuvame ukubonisa ukungasebenzi kwe-ovulatory. Uma isigaba se-follicular siba mude noma ukuvuthwa kweqanda kungaveli nhlobo, iphethini yokuphuma kokuya esikhathini iba didayo. Izimbangela zingase zibe ngokomzimba ngesikhathi sobusha nase-perimenopause, kodwa zidinga ukunakwa eduze ngesikhathi seminyaka yokuzala ezinzile. Ku-AI: ukungajwayeleki kuyindawo yokungena yokucabanga okuhlukanisayo. Ubudala, ubude bephethini, izimpawu zokuvuthwa kweqanda, isisindo somzimba, ukucindezeleka, imithi, nezimpawu ze-endocrine kufanele kubhekwe.

texts.t1284: Ukungajwayeleki kuchazwa ngokuhlukahluka okweqile phakathi kwemijikelezo kanye nokulahlekelwa ukujwayeleka.
texts.t1285: Ukungajwayeleki kuvame ukudinga ukuhlolwa kwezimbangela zokungavuthwa kweqanda, amazinga e-prolactin, ukusebenza kwesibindi, nezinye izici.
texts.t1286: Ukushintsha okujwayelekile komjikelezo kusuka enyangeni kuya enyangeni
texts.t1288: Ukushintsha okuncane kobude bomjikelezo kusuka enyangeni kuya enyangeni kwamukeleka futhi kuvame ukubonisa ukuhlukahluka kwesigaba se-follicular.
texts.t1289: Umjikelezo ojwayelekile akudingeki ube nobude obufanayo njalo ngenyanga. Umehluko wezinsuku ezimbalwa ungaba ngokomzimba, ikakhulukazi uma umjikelezo uhlale ulindelekile, izimpawu zokuvuthwa kweqanda zihlala zikhona, futhi azikho izimpawu ezixwayisayo. Ukushintsha okuncane kuvame ukuhlobene neqiniso lokuthi ukuvuthwa kweqanda akuhlali kwenzeka ngosuku olufanayo.
texts.t1290: Ukushintsha okujwayelekile komjikelezo kungukuhlukahluka phakathi kwemijikelezo ngaphandle kwezimpawu zesifo.
texts.t1291: Ngisho kumuntu ophilile, umjikelezo ungashintsha kancane kusuka enyangeni kuya enyangeni. Lokhu kungenxa yokuthi isigaba se-follicular—ingxenye yomjikelezo ehlala kuze kube ukuvuthwa kweqanda—sibucayi ekucindezelekeni, ekulaleni, ekuzivocavoceni ngokomzimba, ekuhambeni, esimweni samandla, nasekushintsheni okungahleliwe komzimba. Ngakho-ke, umjikelezo owodwa ungaba izinsuku ezingama-28, omunye ube izinsuku ezingama-31, kanti owesithathu ube izinsuku ezingama-29, futhi lokhu kungaba okuvamile. Isilinganiso esibalulekile akusona ukufana okuphelele, kodwa ukugcina ukujwayeleka okuphelele kanye nokuntuleka kwezimpawu ezixwayisayo. Uma ukuvuthwa kweqanda kushintsha kancane, wonke umjikelezo uzoba mude noma ube mfushane kancane, kodwa lokhu akukhombisi isifo. Ngokuphambene, ukulahlekelwa okudidayo kwesakhiwo, ukuhlukahluka okubanzi kakhulu, noma ukuhlanganiswa nobuhlungu, ukopha okungajwayelekile, noma ukungazali kwenza isithombe singabi ngokomzimba. Ku-AI, kubalulekile: umjikelezo kufanele uhlolwe ngochungechunge lwezikhathi, hhayi inyanga eyodwa kuphela.

texts.t1328: okokuqala chaza ukuthi kuyamukeleka noma cha
texts.t1330: Ukushintsha okuncane phakathi kwemijikelezo kungaba uhlobo olujwayelekile, njengoba isigaba se-follicular sihluka kakhulu kunesigaba se-luteal.
texts.t1333: Eminyakeni yokuqala ngemva kokuya esikhathini, umjikelezo uvame ukuba nokuhlukahluka okukhulu futhi ungabi ne-ovulatory ngoba i-hypothalamic-pituitary-ovarian axis isaqhubeka nokukhula.
texts.t1334: Kubantu abasebasha, umjikelezo uvame ukuba mude futhi ungajwayelekile kunakwabantu abadala. Eminyakeni yokuqala engu-1–3 ngemva kokuya esikhathini, ukuvuthwa kweqanda kungase kungaveli kuwo wonke umjikelezo ngoba i-GnRH–FSH–LH axis isaqhubeka nokukhula ngokuphelele. Nokho, izikhawu ezinde kakhulu, ukopha okukhulu kakhulu, noma ukujwayeleka okuqhubekayo eminyakeni eminingana ngemva kokuya esikhathini kudinga ukuhlolwa.
texts.t1335: Umjikelezo wobusha uyiphethini yokuphuma kokuya esikhathini yeminyaka yokuqala ngemva kokuya esikhathini, ebonakala ngokwanda kokuhlukahluka ngenxa yokungavuthwa kokulawulwa kwe-neuroendocrine.
texts.t1336: Ngemva kokuya esikhathini, umjikelezo awuphenduki ngokushesha ube njengowabantu abadala futhi ube ne-ovulatory ngokuphelele. Eminyakeni yokuqala, i-hypothalamus ayikhiqizi njalo i-GnRH ngokushaya okujwayelekile okudingekayo ukuze kube ne-ovulation ejwayelekile. Ngakho-ke, imijikelezo yobusha ivame ukuba ne-anovulatory, ibe mude, futhi ingalindelekile. Lokhu kungokwemvelo kuya ezingeni elithile. Ukuhlukahluka okukhulu kobude bomjikelezo kunakwabantu abadala kwamukeleka, futhi imijikelezo emide ngezikhathi ezithile ayisho ukuthi kukhona isifo. Nokho, kubalulekile ngokwezokwelapha ukuqapha imingcele: izikhawu ezinde kakhulu phakathi kwezikhathi, ukopha okukhulu, ubuhlungu obukhulu, i-anemia, nokujwayeleka okuqhubekayo okuqhubeka iminyaka eminingana ngemva kokuya esikhathini akufanele kusabhekelwe ngokuzenzakalelayo ebudaleni. Ku-AI: ukuhlukahluka okukhulu kwamukeleka kubantu abasebasha, kodwa lokhu akususi isidingo sokubona izimpawu ezixwayisayo.
