texts.t1366: izikhathi ezinkulu zomuntu osemusha azidingi ukunakwa
texts.t1379: Eminyakeni yokuqala ngemva kokuya esikhathini, umjikelezo uvame ukuba ne-anovulatory futhi ube nokuhlukahluka ngenxa yokungavuthwa kwe-HPO axis.
texts.t1380: Izikhawu ezingaphezu kwezinsuku ezingama-90 phakathi kwezikhathi akufanele zibhekwe njengokujwayelekile.
texts.t1383: Ngemva kokubeletha, umjikelezo uyabuya kancane futhi uncike ku-prolactin, ukuncelisa, nokubuyiselwa kwe-GnRH pulsation.
texts.t1384: Ngemva kokubeletha, i-prolactin ephezulu icindezela i-GnRH, yehlisa i-FSH ne-LH, ngakho ukuvuthwa kweqanda kungase kungaveli amasonto noma izinyanga. Umjikelezo wokuqala uvame ukuba ne-anovulatory, futhi ukuvuthwa kweqanda kungavela ngaphambi kokuya esikhathini kokuqala.
texts.t1385: Isikhathi sokubeletha ukubuyiselwa kwe-hypothalamic-pituitary-ovarian axis ngemva kokukhulelwa.
texts.t1386: Ngemva kokubeletha, kuba nokwehla okukhulu kwe-progesterone ne-estradiol, okushukumisa ukuncelisa futhi kukhuphule i-prolactin. I-prolactin isebenza ku-hypothalamus, icindezela i-GnRH pulsation, okwehlisa i-FSH ne-LH futhi ivimbele ukukhula kwe-follicle. Uma ukuncelisa kungekho, i-GnRH ibuyiselwa ngokushesha, futhi ukuvuthwa kweqanda kungavela kusukela emasontweni angu-4–8. Ngokuncelisa, ikakhulukazi ngokuncelisa ebusuku, i-prolactin ihlala iphezulu, futhi ukuvuthwa kweqanda kungacindezelwa izinyanga. Kubalulekile ngokwezokwelapha: ukuvuthwa kweqanda kokuqala kungavela ngaphambi kokuya esikhathini kokuqala, ngakho ukuvundisa kubuya ngaphambi kokubonakala. Futhi, umjikelezo wokuqala ngemva kokubeletha ungaba ne-anovulatory ngenxa yokungazinzi kokulawulwa kwe-hormonal.
texts.t1387: uma ukuya esikhathini kungakabuyi izinyanga eziningana ngemva kokuyeka ukuncelisa
texts.t1388: uma ukopha kungajwayelekile, kukhulu kakhulu, noma kube isikhathi eside
texts.t1389: uma kunezinkinga zokukhulelwa ngemva kokuba umjikelezo ubuyile
texts.t1390: uma kunobuhlungu, umkhuhlane, noma iphunga elingathandeki lokukhishwa
texts.t1395: akukho ukubuyiselwa komjikelezo ngemva kokuyeka ukuncelisa
texts.t1406: Ukuncelisa kunciphisa ukuvuthwa kweqanda nge-prolactin, kodwa umphumela uncike emvamisweni yokuncelisa futhi awuqinisekisi ukuvimbela inzalo.
texts.t1407: I-prolactin ngesikhathi sokuncelisa icindezela i-GnRH nokuvuthwa kweqanda, kodwa uma imvamisa yokuncelisa yehliswa, ukuvuthwa kweqanda kungabuya ngisho nangaphambi kokuya esikhathini kokuqala.
texts.t1408: I-amenorrhea yokuncelisa ukungabi bikho kokuya esikhathini ngesikhathi sokuncelisa.
texts.t1409: I-prolactin ikhishelwa ukuphendula ekushukumiseni kwe-nipple futhi icindezela ukukhishwa kwe-GnRH kwe-hypothalamic. Lokhu kwehlisa i-FSH ne-LH, kuvimbele ukuvuthwa kweqanda. Umphumela obonakalayo kakhulu uyabonakala ngokuncelisa okuphindaphindiwe nokukhethekile, ikakhulukazi ngokuncelisa ebusuku. Lapho izikhawu phakathi kokuncelisa zanda, ukuncelisa okungeziwe kufakwa, noma ingane ilele ubusuku bonke ingancelisi, amazinga e-prolactin angase ehle, futhi ukuvuthwa kweqanda kubuyele. Ngakho-ke, ukungabi bikho kokuya esikhathini ngesikhathi sokuncelisa akusho ukuvikelwa okuqinisekisiwe ekukhulelweni. Indlela ye-amenorrhea yokuncelisa (LAM) isebenza kuphela ngaphansi kwezimo eziqinile: ingane ingaphansi kwezinyanga eziyisi-6, ukuncelisa kukhethekile noma cishe kukhethekile, futhi ukuya esikhathini akukabuyi.
texts.t1410: uma umjikelezo ungabuyi ngemva kokunciphisa noma ukuyeka ukuncelisa
texts.t1412: uma ukukhulelwa kusolakala ekungabikhona kokuya esikhathini
texts.t1421: ukuncelisa okuphindaphindiwe -> ↑prolactin -> ↓GnRH -> ↓ukuvuthwa kweqanda; ukuncelisa okungaphindaphindile -> ↓prolactin -> ukuvuthwa kweqanda kubuyele
texts.t1422: ukungabi bikho kokuya esikhathini ngesikhathi sokuncelisa okuphindaphindiwe kungaba ngokwemvelo
texts.t1425: ingabe kujwayelekile ukuthi kungabikho izikhathi ngesikhathi sokuncelisa
texts.t1429: umphumela wokuvimbela inzalo awunakuthembiswa ngaphandle kokuhlola izimo ze-LAM
texts.t1430: ngesikhathi sokuncelisa okuphindaphindiwe, i-amenorrhea ingaba ngokwemvelo
texts.t1431: ukungabi bikho komjikelezo isikhathi eside ngemva kokuyeka ukuncelisa kudinga ukuhlolwa
texts.t1432: ukuncelisa kuphinde kuvimbele ukuvuthwa kweqanda ngokuphelele
texts.t1443: I-prolactin ngesikhathi sokuncelisa icindezela i-GnRH futhi ingacindezela ukuvuthwa kweqanda.
texts.t1446: Ngemva kokuyeka ukuvimbela inzalo nge-hormonal, umjikelezo ungaba ungajwayelekile okwesikhashana ngenkathi kulungiswa kabusha ukulawulwa kwe-ovulatory yemvelo.
texts.t1447: Ngemva kokuyeka i-COCs noma ezinye izindlela ze-hormonal, i-hypothalamic-pituitary-ovarian axis ingase idinge isikhathi sokusebenza ngokuzimela futhi. Kubaningi, ukuvuthwa kweqanda kubuya ngokushesha, kodwa umjikelezo ungaba ungajwayelekile ezinyangeni zokuqala ezi-1–3.
texts.t1448: Umjikelezo ngemva kokuyeka ukuvimbela inzalo ukubuyiselwa kokulawulwa kwe-hormonal yomuntu siqu ngemva kokuyeka ukuvimbela ukuvuthwa kweqanda nge-hormonal.
texts.t1449: Ama-contraceptives e-hormonal ahlanganisiwe acindezela ukuvuthwa kweqanda ngokusebenzisa impendulo engemihle: yehlisa i-FSH ne-LH, ivimbele i-follicle enkulu ukuthi ivuthwe. Ngemva kokuyeka lokhu kulawulwa kwangaphandle, i-hypothalamus, i-pituitary, nezindlala zesitho sangasese sowesifazane zidinga ukuvumelanisa futhi. Kubantu abaningi, ukuvuthwa kweqanda kubuya ngokushesha—ngaphakathi kwemijikelezo elandelayo. Nokho, izinyanga zokuqala ezimbalwa zingaba ungajwayelekile, ikakhulukazi uma umjikelezo wawungazinzile ngaphambi kokuqala ukuvimbela inzalo. Ngezinye izikhathi, ngemva kokuyeka, isimo esasingafihlwa ngaphambilini ama-hormone, njenge-PCOS, siyavezwa. Kubalulekile: ukuvimbela inzalo nge-hormonal akulimazi umjikelezo esikhathini eside, kodwa kungashintsha okwesikhashana iphethini yawo ngemva kokuyeka futhi kufihle izinkinga ezingaphansi.
texts.t1450: uma ukuya esikhathini kungakabuyi izinyanga ezi-3 ngemva kokuyeka
texts.t1466: Ku-perimenopause, umjikelezo uba nezinguquko eziningi ngenxa yokwehla kwesitoreji samaqanda, ukukhuphuka kwe-FSH, kanye nokungazinzi kokukhulelwa.
texts.t1467: Ku-perimenopause, ukuzwela kwama-ovari ku-FSH kuyancipha, ukukhulelwa kuba nzima ukubikezela, futhi umjikelezo uba ungazinzi. Kungase kube nezikhathi ezimfushane nezinde, kanye nezinyanga ezingenakho ukukhulelwa.
texts.t1468: I-Perimenopause yisikhathi sokushintsha ngaphambi kwe-menopause, esibonakala ngokwehla kwesitoreji samaqanda kanye nokungazinzi kwehomoni.
texts.t1469: Njengoba isitoreji samaqanda sinciphile, ama-ovari aphendula ku-FSH ngendlela engalindelekile. Ku-perimenopause yokuqala, amazinga e-FSH avame ukukhuphuka, kodwa impendulo ye-follicular iba engalindelekile: kwezinye izikhathi, ukukhulelwa kwenzeka kusenesikhathi, kwezinye sekwephuzile, futhi kwesinye isikhathi akukhona nhlobo. Ngenxa yalokhu, umjikelezo ungaba mfushane noma mude. I-Estradiol nayo ingashintsha kakhulu, ngakho izimpawu ziyahlukahluka: izinguquko ekuphuma kwegazi, ubuhlungu bezinsini, ukulala, isimo sengqondo, kanye nezifudumezi ezishisayo esikhathini sokushintsha esilandelayo. Kubalulekile ukukhumbula ukuthi nakuba inzalo yehlile, ukukhulelwa kusenokwenzeka kuze kube yi-menopause. Kubasebenzisi be-AI: i-perimenopause iyisihloko esingokwemvelo, kodwa hhayi esingokwemvelo ngokuphelele. Ukopha okukhulu kakhulu, i-anemia, nezinguquko ezingazelelwe zidinga ukuhlolwa.
texts.t1470: uma ukopha sekukhulile kakhulu noma sekude kakhulu
texts.t1471: uma umjikelezo ushintshe ngokuzumayo futhi uhambisana nezinye izimpawu
texts.t1473: uma kunobuthakathaka, isiyezi, noma ukuquleka ngesikhathi sokuphuma kwegazi
texts.t1488: Umjikelezo onokukhulelwa uhlanganisa i-LH peak, ukukhishwa kweqanda, kanye nesigaba sesibili se-progesterone; umjikelezo wokungakhulelwa awunazo lezi.
texts.t1489: Ku-ovulatory cycle, kukhona i-LH peak, ukukhulelwa, kanye nokukhuphuka kwe-progesterone — ngokuvamile >3–5 ng/ml, kanye nesakhiwo sezinga lokushisa elinezigaba ezimbili. Ku-anovulatory cycle, i-corpus luteum ayakhi, akukho sigaba se-progesterone, futhi ukopha kungase kube okungajwayelekile futhi akubonisi ukujwayeleka komjikelezo.
texts.t1490: Umjikelezo onokukhulelwa uwumjikelezo onokukhishwa kweqanda kanye nesigaba esigcwele se-luteal; umjikelezo wokungakhulelwa awunazo lezi zenzakalo.
texts.t1491: Umehluko omkhulu womjikelezo onokukhulelwa ubukhona besigaba sesibili esigcwele, i-progesterone. Ku-ovulatory cycle evamile, i-follicle ebusayo ifinyelela ekukhuleni, i-estradiol ephezulu ivusa i-LH peak, i-follicle iyaphuka, futhi ukukhishwa kweqanda kuyenzeka. Bese kuba khona i-corpus luteum, ekhupha i-progesterone. I-Progesterone ishintsha i-endometrium ibe yisigaba sokukhishwa, iphakamisela izinga lokushisa lomzimba eliyisisekelo, futhi ivale iwindi elizalayo. Ku-anovulatory cycle, i-LH peak ingaba khona noma ingaholeli ekukhulelweni okuphelele. I-Corpus luteum ayakhi, i-progesterone ihlala iphansi, futhi isigaba sesibili asikho. Ngenxa yalokhu, ukopha kungaba okungajwayelekile, okude, noma okungaqondakali. Kubasebenzisi be-AI, kubalulekile: uphawu oluyinhloko lokuhluka ubukhona bomphumela we-progesterone, hhayi nje iqiniso lokopha.
texts.t1494: uma imijikelezo ingajwayelekile noma imide kakhulu
texts.t1499: ukuthi ungakuqonda kanjani ukuthi bekukhona umjikelezo onokukhulelwa
texts.t1506: Yebo, ukukhulelwa kungase kungenzeki kuwo wonke umjikelezo.
texts.t1507: Yebo, ukukhulelwa kungase kungenzeki njalo ngenyanga. Imijikelezo yokungakhulelwa eyenzeka ngezikhathi ezithile yenzeka ngokwemvelo ngesikhathi sokukhula kanye ne-perimenopause, kanye nangemva kokucindezeleka okukhulu, ukugula, noma ushintsho oluzumayo ekudleni. Nokho, uma imijikelezo ngaphandle kokukhulelwa iphindaphinda njalo, ihambisana nemijikelezo emide, izikhathi ezilahlekile, noma ubunzima bokukhulelwa, kufanele kutholakale imbangela.
texts.t1508: Ukukhulelwa kudinga umsebenzi ohleliwe kahle we-hypothalamus, i-pituitary gland, nama-ovari. Noma yimuphi umphumela ophazamisa ukukhishwa kwe-GnRH noma umsebenzi we-ovari ungaholela kumjikelezo ngaphandle kokukhulelwa. Izimbangela ezivamile zifaka i-PCOS, ukuntuleka kwamandla, ukucindezeleka okukhulu, i-hyperprolactinemia, izinkinga ze-thyroid, izifo ezinzima, kanye nezinguquko zeminyaka. Ngokwezinto ezizwakalayo, umjikelezo ngaphandle kokukhulelwa ungase ungahluke nhlobo ngoba ukopha kusenokwenzeka. Nokho, ngokuvamile umjikelezo onjalo ubonakala ngokuba nesikhathi eside nokushintsha, ukungabikho kokukhuphuka okuqhubekayo kwezinga lokushisa, iphethini ye-mucus engajwayelekile, kanye nokuphuma kwegazi okungaqondakali phakathi kwezikhathi. Ekuqhakambiseni nase-perimenopause, imijikelezo yokungakhulelwa eyenzeka ngezikhathi ezithile ayijwayelekile, kodwa esikhathini sokuzala, ukuphindaphinda kwazo kufanele kube yinto ekhathazayo. Uma inhloso yomsebenzisi ukukhulelwa, ukuqinisekisa ukukhulelwa kuba kubaluleke kakhulu kunokuba khona kwesikhathi.
texts.t1511: Umjikelezo onezigaba ezimbili uwumjikelezo lapho kunezingxenye ezimbili ezihlukile: ngaphambi kokukhulelwa nangemva kwalo.
texts.t1512: Umjikelezo onezigaba ezimbili uwumjikelezo lapho izingxenye zangaphambi kokukhulelwa nangemva kokukhulelwa zihlukaniswa ngokucacile. Empilweni yansuku zonke, leli gama lisetshenziswa kakhulu kumashadi wezinga lokushisa lomzimba eliyisisekelo: ngaphambi kokukhulelwa, amanani aphansi; ngemva kokukhulelwa, aphakeme ngenxa ye-progesterone. Ishadi elinjalo lisekela umqondo wokuthi ukukhulelwa kwenzekile, kodwa ngokwalo alithathi indawo yokuhlolwa okuphelele kwezokwelapha.
texts.t1513: Umqondo we-biphasicity ubonisa i-physiology eyisisekelo: i-estradiol ibusa ngaphambi kokukhulelwa, kanti i-progesterone ibusa ngemva kokukhulelwa. Lokhu kubonakala ngokucacile kumashadi wezinga lokushisa lomzimba eliyisisekelo, lapho ukukhuphuka okuqhubekayo okungaba ngu-0.3–0.6 °C kuvame ukuvela ngemva kokukhulelwa. Nokho, izinga lokushisa liyisibonakaliso esingaqondile futhi sizwela ukuphazamiseka, ngakho-ke ishadi le-biphasic alikwazi ukubhekwa njengobufakazi obuphelele bokujwayeleka kwazo zonke izinqubo zokuzala. Abasebenzisi bavame ukuhumusha noma iyiphi ijika elingalingani njenge-biphasic noma, ngokuphambene nalokho, ukungabi bikho kwejika 'elihle' njengokungabi bikho kokukhulelwa. Lokhu kuyiphutha. Ukuze kube nencazelo enenjongo, izimo zokulinganisa, ubude bokukhuphuka, ukuqhathanisa nezivivinyo ze-LH, ukubuka kwe-mucus, nobude bomjikelezo jikelele kubalulekile. Uma ishadi liqhubeka nokuhluleka ukukhombisa isigaba sesibili esicacile ngokumelene nesizinda semijikelezo emide/engajwayelekile noma ukungazali, lokhu kuyisizathu sokuhlolwa okwengeziwe, hhayi iziphetho ezizimele.
texts.t1516: 'Ukuphazamiseka komjikelezo' kuyinkulumo ejwayelekile esetshenziswa ngokuvamile ukuchaza ushintsho olungalindelekile kumjikelezo ojwayelekile wezikhathi.
texts.t1517: Ukuphazamiseka komjikelezo akusona isifo sezokwelapha, kodwa indlela ejwayelekile yokuchaza ukuphambuka okuzumayo kumjikelezo ojwayelekile: ukubambezeleka, isikhathi esiphuthumayo, ubuhlungu obungajwayelekile, ukuphuma kwegazi phakathi kwezikhathi, noma ushintsho olukhulu kubuningi bokopha. Lokhu kungabangelwa ukukhulelwa, ukucindezeleka, ukungakhulelwa, ukuyeka ukusebenzisa izindlela zokuvimbela inzalo, isifo se-thyroid, i-PCOS, izifo, nezimbangela zesakhiwo zokopha.
texts.t1518: Inkinga ngenkulumo ethi 'ukuphazamiseka komjikelezo' ukuthi ayisho lutho mayelana nendlela. Umsebenzisi ofanayo angayisebenzisa ukuchaza ukubambezeleka kwezinsuku ezi-5 ngemva kokundiza, ukuphuma kwegazi phakathi kwezikhathi, noma ukungabi bikho kwezikhathi izinyanga ezi-3 zilandelana. Kubasebenzisi be-AI bendawo, kubalulekile ukuhluza le nkulumo ibe izimo ezithile zokwelapha: izinguquko kubude bomjikelezo, izinguquko kubuningi bokopha, ukuphuma kwegazi phakathi kwezikhathi, i-amenorrhea, ubuhlungu, noma ukusola ukukhulelwa. Ezingeni le-physiological, imbangela evame kakhulu yokuphazamiseka ukushintsha noma ukungabi bikho kokukhulelwa. Nokho, umuntu akufanele akhohlwe ngokukhulelwa, kuhlanganise nokukhulelwa okungaphandle kwesibeletho, imiphumela emibi yezindlela zokuvimbela inzalo, isifo se-thyroid, i-hyperprolactinemia, i-coagulopathy, nezinguquko zesakhiwo esibelethweni. Ngakho-ke, umongo uhlale ubalulekile: ukujwayeleka komsebenzi wezocansi, izindlela zokuvimbela inzalo, ukuncelisa, iminyaka, ukuqeqeshwa okunzima, ukucindezeleka, ukwehla kwesisindo, izimpawu zokutheleleka, kanye nohlobo lobuhlungu. Kubaluleke kakhulu ukukhomba izimpawu ezibomvu ngokushesha: ukopha okukhulu kakhulu, ubuhlungu obuhlangothini olulodwa, ukuquleka, umkhuhlane, noma ukuhlolwa kokukhulelwa okuhle kuhambisana nobuhlungu noma ukuphuma kwegazi.
texts.t1521: Ukucindezeleka kungathinta ukujwayeleka komjikelezo, ukukhulelwa, nobukhulu bezinye izimpawu.
texts.t1522: Ukucindezeleka kwengqondo kungashintsha imvamisa yokukhishwa kwe-GnRH, futhi ngalokhu, kuthinte i-FSH, i-LH, ukukhulelwa, nobude bomjikelezo. Ucwaningo oluhleliwe lwango-2024 luqinisekise isixhumanisi phakathi kokucindezeleka nokungajwayeleki komjikelezo, nakuba usayizi womphumela uhluka phakathi kwabantu. Empeleni, ukucindezeleka kuvame ukwelula umjikelezo, kushintshe ukukhulelwa, kubhebhethekise izimpawu zangaphambi kwesikhathi, noma kuholele ezigabeni zokungakhulelwa.
texts.t1523: Ukucindezeleka kuthinta umjikelezo hhayi ngokomlingo, kodwa ngezindlela ze-neuroendocrine. Ngesikhathi sokucindezeleka okuqhubekayo, i-hypothalamic-pituitary-adrenal axis, i-cortisol, kanye nabathumeli abahambisana nayo kuyasebenza. Lokhu kungashintsha ukukhishwa kwe-GnRH, ngaleyo ndlela iphethini yokukhishwa kwe-LH ne-FSH. Uma i-LH peak ingakhi ngesikhathi, ukukhulelwa kubambezeleka noma akwenzi nhlobo, futhi umjikelezo uyeluleka. Ngokwezokwelapha, umsebenzisi angabona izikhathi ezizayo, ukunyamalala kwezimpawu ezijwayelekile zokukhulelwa, izinguquko esimweni sengqondo, ukulala, nokwanda kokuzwela kobuhlungu. Nokho, kubalulekile ukungaguquli ukucindezeleka kube yincazelo ejwayelekile yenkinga ngayinye. Uma ukungajwayeleki kuphawuleka, kuqhubeka izinyanga eziningana, kuhambisana nokopha okukhulu, ubuhlungu, izinguquko zesisindo, i-galactorrhea, noma izimpawu ze-hypothyroidism, kufanele kuqedwe ezinye izimbangela. Isu eliwusizo eliwusizo ukuqaphela hhayi kuphela izinsuku zomjikelezo kodwa futhi namasonto anokuntuleka kokulala, ukukhathazeka okukhulu, ukugula, izindiza, kanye nezinguquko ekudleni. Lokhu kusiza ukuhlukanisa impendulo yesikhashana ekucindezelekeni kusukela ekuphazamisekeni okuqhubekayo.
texts.t1524: Ukuthi izindiza nezinguquko zesikhathi zithinta kanjani umjikelezo
texts.t1526: Izindiza, i-jet lag, ukuntuleka kokulala, nezinguquko ezizumayo kumjikelezo ojwayelekile kungathinta okwesikhashana umjikelezo.
texts.t1527: Izindiza nezinguquko zesikhathi zingashintsha okwesikhashana umjikelezo ikakhulukazi ngokuphazamiseka kokulala, izinguquko zesikhathi somzimba, ukudla, ukuntuleka kwamanzi, nokucindezeleka. Ukundiza ngokwalo akuphuli amahomoni, kodwa inhlanganisela ye-jet lag, ukuntuleka kokulala, nokuzikhandla ngokomzimba kungabambezeleka ukukhulelwa futhi kushintshe isikhathi sokuphuma kwegazi ngezinsuku ezimbalwa. Imvamisa, lezi zinguquko ziba zesikhashana.
texts.t1528: Uhlelo lokuzala luhlobene eduze nokulawulwa kwesikhathi somzimba kanye nesimo se-neuroendocrine esiphelele. Lapho umuntu eshintsha ngokuzumayo izindawo zesikhathi, elele kancane kunokujwayelekile, ebhekene nokukhathazeka kokuhamba, edla ngokungajwayelekile, noma eba nokuzikhandla ngokomzimba, lokhu kungathinta ukulawulwa kwe-GnRH yi-hypothalamic. Ngenxa yalokhu, usuku lokukhulelwa luyashintsha kancane, futhi ngalokhu, usuku lokuphuma kwegazi olulandelayo. Empeleni, lezi zinguquko zivame ukuba zincane kakhulu: ukubambezeleka noma ukuqala kwangaphambi kwesikhathi kwezikhathi ngezinsuku ezimbalwa, izinguquko ebukhulu be-PMS, noma umuzwa wokuba nzima noma ubuthakathaka okungajwayelekile ezinsukwini zokuqala zomjikelezo. Uma umjikelezo ubuyela kokujwayelekile ngemva kokubuyela kumjikelezo ojwayelekile, ngokuvamile akudingi ukuhlolwa. Nokho, umuntu akufanele athi zonke izimpawu eziphindaphindayo zibangelwa ukuhamba. Uma ukuphazamiseka komjikelezo kuphawuleka, kuhambisana nokopha okukhulu kakhulu, ubuhlungu obungajwayelekile, ukuphuma kwegazi phakathi kwezikhathi, noma kungabuyeli kokujwayelekile ngemva kokubuyisela umjikelezo, imbangela cishe ibanzi kunokushintsha kwesikhathi.
texts.t1529: Umjikelezo ongajwayelekile: lapho kuyinto evamile futhi lapho kungesiyo
texts.t1530: Okubalulekile ukuhlukanisa phakathi kokuhluka okungokwemvelo nokuphambuka okubalulekile kwezokwelapha.
texts.t1531: Kuhlolwa: ubude, ubukhulu, ukuphindaphinda, nomthelela empilweni.
texts.t1533: Ukuhlolwa kusekelwe ezicini ezine: ubukhulu, ubude, ukujwayeleka, nomthelela kwekhwalithi yempilo. Ukushintsha kwesikhathi esisodwa kuvame ukuphephile, kuyilapho izimpawu eziqhubekayo, ezithuthuka, noma ezinzima zidinga ukuhlolwa.
texts.t1549: ukulinda isikhathi eside uma kunezimpawu ezibomvu ezicacile
texts.t1550: ukujwayeleka kuchazwa hhayi ngokungabi bikho kwezimpawu, kodwa ngokubekezelelwa kwazo nokuzinza
texts.t1554: Ubuhlungu bezikhathi: lapho bubekezeleleka futhi lapho bungabekezeleleki
texts.t1555: Izikhathi ezinzima: lapho umugqa wokujwayeleka ukhona
texts.t1557: Ukuphuma kwegazi phakathi kwezikhathi: lapho kwamukelekile
texts.t1558: Ubuhlungu bokukhulelwa: lapho kujwayelekile futhi lapho kufanele kuhlolwe
texts.t1559: I-PMS: lapho kuyizimpawu ezijwayelekile futhi lapho kuyisifo se-PMDD
texts.t1560: Izivivinyo zokukhulelwa ezingezinhle: lapho kuyisikhathi esingalungile futhi lapho kuyinkinga
texts.t1561: Isikhathi esibambezelekile: lapho kufanele ulinde futhi lapho kufanele ubone udokotela
texts.t1562: Ukungabi bikho kokukhulelwa: lapho kufanele uqhubeke nokuzama futhi lapho kufanele ufune ukuhlolwa
texts.t1563: Ukuthi umjikelezo uthinta kanjani impilo enhle
texts.t1564: Izimpendulo ze-psycho-emotional kumjikelezo zakhiwa ngokusebenzisana kwama-hormone, okulindelwe, nokucindezeleka.
texts.t1565: Ukushintsha kwesimo sengqondo kujwayelekile, kodwa ukukhathazeka okuqhubekayo kudinga ukuhlolwa nokusekelwa.
texts.t1566: Umjikelezo uthinta imizwa ngokusebenzisa imodeli ye-biopsychosocial.
texts.t1567: Ukushintsha kwe-hormonal (i-estrogen, i-progesterone), okulindelwe ngokwengqondo, nomongo wezenhlalo kwakha izimpendulo zemizwa. Lapho uhlela ukukhulelwa, isici sokungaqiniseki siyangezwa, esandisa ukukhathazeka nokulawula ukuziphatha.
texts.t1570: kubalulekile ukuhlukanisa phakathi kokukhathazeka okuvamile nokukhathazeka kwezokwelapha
texts.t1571: uma ukukhathazeka noma ukucindezeleka kuphindaphinda njalo umjikelezo
texts.t1578: ama-hormone + okulindelwe → ukukhathazeka/ithemba → ukulawula → ukubhebhetheka kwezimpawu
texts.t1585: umjikelezo uthinta ingqondo, kodwa akufanele uchithe ikhwalithi yempilo
texts.t1591: Indlela yokuchaza izinguquko empilweni enhle ngezigaba kumlingani
texts.t1592: Indlela yokungaguquli ukulandelela ukukhulelwa kube umthombo wokukhathazeka
texts.t1595: Indlela yokukhuluma nodokotela mayelana nomjikelezo ngaphandle kokuzizwa unamahloni
texts.t1596: Indlela yokuxoxa ngobuhlungu nokungakhululeki ngaphakathi komndeni
texts.t1601: Iminyaka nemicimbi yempilo ishintsha i-physiology yomjikelezo futhi idinga izincazelo ezahlukene zezokwelapha.
texts.t1602: Isimptom esifanayo sinemibono ehlukene kuye ngeminyaka nomongo.
texts.t1603: Iminyaka iyisici esiyinhloko esithinta ukulawulwa kwe-hormonal nomsebenzi wokuzala.
texts.t1604: Ubushoshovu bubonakala ngokungavuthwa kwe-HPO axis, iminyaka yokuzala ngokuzinza; ngemuva kweminyaka engu-35, isitoreji samaqanda siyancipha; ngemuva kweminyaka engu-40, ukujwayeleka komjikelezo kuyanda; ku-perimenopause, amahomoni aba angazinzi. Izikhathi zokubeletha nezokusebenza ngemuva kokungenelela zengeza izimo ezihlukile zokwelapha.
texts.t1605: ukushintsha komjikelezo uma kuqhathaniswa nephethini ejwayelekile
texts.t1613: ngemuva kokubeletha → ukukhulelwa kungenzeka ngaphambi kokuphuma kwegazi
texts.t1635: Imibuzo ebuzwa ngesikhathi sokuhlangana okuhlobene nomjikelezo
texts.t1637: Ngesikhathi sokuhlangana okuhlobene nomjikelezo, ubude nobujwayelekile bemijikelezo, ubuningi bokopha, ubuhlungu, usuku lokuphuma kwegazi lokugcina, amathuba okukhulelwa, imithi, izinguquko zesisindo, ukucindezeleka, nezinhlelo zokuzala kuvame ukucaciswa.
texts.t1638: Umlando womjikelezo uvame ukuhlinzeka ngolwazi olungango ukuhlolwa. Kungumlando wezokwelapha lapho udokotela evame ukuqonda ukuthi kufanele yini ahlole ukungasebenzi kahle kokukhulelwa, i-AUB, ukukhulelwa, isifo sobuhlungu, noma izimbangela ze-endocrine.
texts.t1639: Ukuhlolwa okuyisisekelo komjikelezo kuqala ngomlando wezokwelapha onemininingwane.
texts.t1640: I-ASRM ne-ACOG kugcizelela ukuthi umlando owenziwe kahle uvame ukunquma cishe yonke indlela yokuhlola. Izici ezibalulekile zifaka isikhathi sokuphazamiseka, izinga lokushintsha, ukuhlobana nokubeletha, ukukhishwa kwezisu, ukuyeka izindlela zokuvimbela inzalo, izinguquko zemithi/isisindo, kanye nomlando wezocansi kanye nengozi yokukhulelwa.
texts.t1641: ukuhlolwa kufanele kuphendule umbuzo othile wezokwelapha, hhayi kube iphakethe elingenamkhawulo
texts.t1642: umlando wezokwelapha namaphethini ezimpawu avame ukuba abaluleke njengokuhlolwa kwegazi
texts.t1643: ukuhlolwa okukodwa okuvamile akuhlali kukhipha inkinga, futhi ukuhlolwa okukodwa okungajwayelekile akuhlali kuqinisekisa isifo
texts.t1644: uma umjikelezo ungajwayelekile, ubuhlungu, unzima, noma ungakhulelwa
texts.t1645: uma kunezinhlelo zokuzala noma i-TTC yesikhathi eside
texts.t1646: uma kusolakala imbangela ye-endocrine noma yesakhiwo
texts.t1651: imithi, isisindo, ukucindezeleka, izindlela zokuvimbela inzalo
texts.t1654: Kulesi sigaba, okubalulekile umbuzo wezokwelapha, isikhathi sokuhlolwa, kanye nezinguquko, kunokuba kube umzamo wokukhumbula inkomba eyodwa evamile.
texts.t1655: uhlobo lwesikhalazo → ukuthatha umlando, izivivinyo ezihlosiwe, izithombe noma indlela → ukunciphisa umehluko kanye nohlelo lokuphatha
texts.t1656: akuwona wonke isikhalazo esidinga ukuhlolwa okugcwele ngokushesha
texts.t1657: ukuhlolwa kwesinyathelo kwesinye isikhathi kuyasebenza kakhulu kunokuhlolwa okukhulu okungahleliwe
texts.t1658: ukopha okukhulu, ubuhlungu obuthuthuka, i-amenorrhea, ukungazali noma izimpawu ze-endocrine
texts.t1659: izimpawu ezingahambisani nokuhluka okuhle komjikelezo owodwa
texts.t1666: yimiphi imibuzo ebuzwa ngesikhathi sokuvakasha mayelana nomjikelezo
texts.t1667: kungachazwa ukuthi yiziphi izivivinyo nezindlela ezivame ukuxazulula yimuphi umbuzo
texts.t1668: isifo somuntu siqu asikwazi ukwenziwa ngokusekelwe ohlwini olujwayelekile lwezivivinyo
texts.t1669: qala ngokuchaza isikhalazo bese ukhipha izincazelo eziphuthumayo/ezivamile njengokukhulelwa
texts.t1671: khuphula izindlela noma izithombe ezijulile uma ukuhlolwa kwesigaba sokuqala kunganele
texts.t1672: izivivinyo eziningi ngesikhathi esisodwa, kungcono isifo
texts.t1673: i-ultrasound noma ukuhlolwa kwehomoni okukodwa kuphendula yonke imibuzo mayelana nomjikelezo
texts.t1674: umlingani angahlolwa kuphela ngemva kokuhlolwa okugcwele kowesifazane
texts.t1677: uma isikhalazo = ukungajwayeleki/i-amenorrhea → ukukhulelwa kuqala, bese ukuhlolwa kwe-endocrine nokukhulelwa
texts.t1678: uma isikhalazo = ubuhlungu noma ukopha okukhulu → hlola ubukhulu, ingozi ye-anemia nezimbangela zesakhiwo
texts.t1679: uma isikhalazo = ukungazali → hlola umjikelezo nomlingani ngokuhambisana
texts.t1681: uku-oda iphaneli enkulu ngaphandle kombuzo wezokwelapha
texts.t1683: umphumela owodwa wokuhlolwa okungajwayelekile ngaphandle kwezimpawu
texts.t1686: chaza ukuthi yiziphi izindawo zedatha ezidingekayo ngaphambi kokuvakasha
texts.t1687: hlukanisa izivivinyo, izithombe, nezindlela ngendima yezokwelapha
texts.t1691: Kubaluleke kakhulu i-ACOG ne-ASRM; kulesi sigaba, kubalulekile ukuchaza hhayi kuphela ukuthi yini ebekwe kodwa futhi kungani ibekwe esimweni esithile sokuhlola.
texts.t1704: ukuhlolwa okufanele kuqala ngokwakha umbuzo wezokwelapha
texts.t1705: izivivinyo, izithombe, nezindlela zinezindima ezahlukene futhi azithathi indawo yomunye nomunye
texts.t1706: ezikhalazweni zokuzala, isikhathi nomongo kuvame ukubaluleka njengokuhlolwa ngokwako
texts.t1707: qoqa i-log yezimpawu nomlando oyinhloko ngaphambi kokuvakasha
texts.t1708: khetha izivivinyo ezihlosiwe nezithombe, hhayi konke ngesikhathi esisodwa
texts.t1709: ungabambezeli ukuhlolwa uma kunezimpawu ezibomvu noma umongo wokungazali
texts.t1711: ungabambezeli ukuhlolwa kokopha okukhulu, ubuhlungu obukhulu, i-amenorrhea, noma izinkinga ze-TTC zomlingani
texts.t1712: Iphutha eliyinhloko esihlokweni sokuhlolwa ukudida ukuphelela kokuhlolwa nenani lemiyaelo; ukuhlolwa okuqinile kwezokwelapha kuvame ukuba ngesinyathelo ngesinyathelo futhi kuqhutshwa ngombuzo, kunokuba kube kubanzi ngangokunokwenzeka kusukela ngosuku lokuqala.
texts.t1713: Yiziphi izimpawu ezibalulekile ukuqopha ngaphambi kokuvakasha kodokotela
texts.t1714: Yini okufanele uyibhale phansi ngaphambi kokuvakasha
texts.t1715: Ngaphambi kokuvakasha, kuwusizo ukuqopha ubude bomjikelezo, ubude nobuningi bokopha, ubuhlungu, ukuphuma kwegazi, izimpawu zokukhulelwa, izinguquko zesimo sengqondo, izinguquko zesisindo, imithi, nezikhalazo ezihambisana nazo.
texts.t1716: I-log elungiselelwe yenza ukuhlolwa kube ngokunembile: kusiza ukuhlukanisa ukungajwayeleki okungahleliwe kusukela kuphethini eqhubekayo.
texts.t1717: I-log yezimpawu enhle yandisa ulwazi lokuvakasha.
texts.t1718: Abantu bavame ukukhumbula kuphela umjikelezo wakamuva, ocacile kakhulu, kodwa udokotela udinga iphethini. Kubaluleke kakhulu ukuqopha usuku lokuqala lokopha, ubude, inani lezinto zokuhlanzeka ezisetshenzisiwe, ubuhlungu, izinhlungu zekhanda, izimpawu zezinsini, ukukhishwa, izinguquko zesimo sengqondo, umsebenzi wezocansi, kanye nengozi yokukhulelwa.
texts.t1720: izigameko ezingacacile zokuphuma kwegazi noma i-amenorrhea
texts.t1721: yiziphi izimpawu ezibalulekile ukuqopha ngaphambi kokuvakasha kodokotela
texts.t1722: yini okufanele uyibhale phansi ngaphambi kokuvakasha
texts.t1726: Kumjikelezo ongajwayelekile, isethi yezivivinyo incike kuphethini kodwa ivame ukufaka ukukhishwa kokukhulelwa, i-TSH, i-prolactin, nokuhlolwa komongo we-ovulatory-endocrine; kwesinye isikhathi iphrofayili ye-androgen nezinye izivivinyo zengezwa njengoba kubonisiwe.
texts.t1727: Ayikho iphakethe elilodwa kuwo wonke umuntu: izivivinyo zikhethwa ngokusekelwe kuhlobo lokuphazamiseka — i-amenorrhea, i-oligomenorrhea, i-AUB, umongo wobuhlungu noma ukungazali.
texts.t1728: Izivivinyo zomjikelezo ongajwayelekile zikhethwa ngokusekelwe kumongo wezokwelapha.
texts.t1729: I-ASRM ku-amenorrhea igcizelela ukuhlolwa kwesinyathelo ngesinyathelo: kuqala ukuhlolwa kokukhulelwa, bese ukhetho olusekelwe emlandweni lwezinye izivivinyo. Ngokwe-hyperandrogenism, i-PCOS nama-androgens ayacatshangelwa; nge-galactorrhea, i-prolactin; ngezimpawu zesistimu, izinkomba ze-thyroid nezinye ze-endocrine.
texts.t1736: Kwi-dysmenorrhea eyinhloko evamile, izivivinyo azidingeki ngaso sonke isikhathi, kodwa ngobuhlungu obukhulu, obuthuthuka, noma obungesona esiyinhloko, ukuhlolwa kungafaka ukuhlolwa kokukhulelwa, i-CBC, ukuhlolwa kokuvuvukala/ukutheleleka, nezithombe ezengeziwe ngokusekelwe kumongo wezokwelapha.
texts.t1737: Izikhathi ezibuhlungu azihlali zikhuluma ngezivivinyo: kwesinye isikhathi umlando, ukuhlolwa ngokomzimba, ne-ultrasound kubaluleke kakhulu. Izivivinyo zengezwa uma kusolakala imbangela yesibili.
texts.t1738: Ngobuhlungu bokuya esikhathini, izivivinyo zibekelwa ngokusekelwe kumongo wezokwelapha, hhayi ngokuzenzakalelayo kuwo wonke umuntu.
texts.t1739: I-ACOG igcizelela ukuhlukanisa phakathi kwe-dysmenorrhea eyinhloko neyesibili. Uma ubuhlungu buqale kusenesikhathi, bujwayelekile, futhi buphendula kahle ekwelashweni, izivivinyo ezibanzi zingase zingadingeki. Kodwa uma kunobuhlungu obukhulu, i-dyspareunia, izimpawu zamathumbu, umkhuhlane noma ukopha okungajwayelekile, ukuhlolwa kuyandiswa.
texts.t1745: Yiziphi izivivinyo ezibekelwe ukungabi bikho kokukhulelwa
texts.t1747: Ekungabikhona kokukhulelwa, ukukhulelwa, i-prolactin, i-TSH, nezimbangela zokungasebenzi kahle kokukhulelwa kuvame ukuhlolwa; kwezinye izimo, ama-androgens, izinkomba zesitoreji samaqanda nezinye izivivinyo zengezwa njengoba kubonisiwe.
texts.t1748: Ukungabikhona kokukhulelwa ngokwalo akusona isifo, kodwa indawo yokungena kumahluko: i-PCOS, i-FHA, i-hyperprolactinemia, isifo se-thyroid, i-POI nezinye izimo.
texts.t1749: I-Anovulation idinga ukufuna imbangela, hhayi ukuhlolwa okukodwa kokukhulelwa.
texts.t1750: Uma ukukhulelwa kungenzeki noma ukungabikho kwako kusolakala, ukuhlolwa kwegazi kwakhiwa ngezimbangela ze-endocrine nenhloso yokuzala. Ku-PCOS, i-logic iyindlela eyodwa; kwe-FHA okusolwayo, enye; kwe-POI, eyesithathu. Yingakho izivivinyo ezifanayo zingabekwa kuwo wonke umuntu ngendlela efanayo.
texts.t1753: yiziphi izivivinyo ezibekelwe ukungabi bikho kokukhulelwa
texts.t1758: I-ultrasound ye-pelvic ibekelwa lapho kunesidingo sokuhlola isibeletho, i-endometrium, ama-ovari, izimbangela zesakhiwo se-AUB, izimpawu ze-PCOS, ama-cysts, ama-fibroids, ama-polyps nezinye izimbangela zokungajwayeleki komjikelezo noma ubuhlungu.
texts.t1759: Lena ingenye yezinyathelo ezilandelayo ezivame kakhulu kumongo we-AUB, ubuhlungu be-pelvic, i-amenorrhea nokungazali, ngoba kusiza ukuhlukanisa ngokushesha phakathi kwezinhlobo zesakhiwo nezingezona zesakhiwo.
texts.t1760: I-ultrasound ye-pelvic iyithuluzi eliyisisekelo lokuthwebula izithombe zezinkinga eziningi zomjikelezo wokuya esikhathini.
texts.t1761: I-ASRM ibonisa ngokucacile ukuthi i-ultrasound ye-pelvic ivame ukusiza ukuhlela ukuhlolwa ekuqaleni kokuhlolwa kwe-amenorrhea. Ku-AUB, i-ultrasound ibaluleke kakhulu ekuhloleni ama-fibroids, ukujiya kwe-endometrial, ama-polyps okusolwayo, nokutholakala kwe-ovari. Nokho, i-ultrasound ejwayelekile ayikhiphi zonke izimbangela ze-endocrine futhi ayithathi indawo yomlando wezokwelapha.
texts.t1762: ubuhlungu obukhulu noma ukusola isifo sesakhiwo
texts.t1771: I-Folliculometry iwuchungechunge lwe-ultrasound ngaphakathi komjikelezo owodwa wokubheka ukukhula kwe-follicle, ukukhulelwa, futhi kwesinye isikhathi i-endometrium.
texts.t1772: Ayisetshenziselwa wonke umuntu, kodwa lapho kunesidingo sokuqinisekisa ukukhulelwa, isikhathi, impendulo ekugqugquzeleni, noma ukuqonda ukuthi ukukhula kwe-follicular kwenzeka njengoba kulindelwe.
texts.t1773: I-Folliculometry iyindlela esebenzayo, kunokuba i-ultrasound yesikhathi esisodwa.
texts.t1774: Empeleni, i-folliculometry isho ukuvakashela okuningana phakathi nomjikelezo. Kuyasiza ikakhulukazi kwe-TTC, izivivinyo zokugqugquzela, nokukhulelwa okungacacile. Amandla ayo alele ekuboneni inqubo ngokuhamba kwesikhathi kunokuba kube isithombe esisodwa nje.
texts.t1782: Iphrofayili ye-hormonal ingafaka i-TSH, i-prolactin, i-FSH, i-LH, i-estradiol, ama-androgens, nezinye izinkomba — hhayi njengephakethe eliyimpoqo kuwo wonke umuntu, kodwa ngokusekelwe kumbuzo wezokwelapha.
texts.t1783: Iphutha eliyinhloko uku-oda uhlu olude lwama-hormone ngaphandle kokuqonda kahle ukuthi yini eqinisekiswayo noma ekhishwayo.
texts.t1785: Ezinye iziguli zidinga ukugxila ku-amenorrhea nezimbangela ze-pituitary-thyroid, ezinye ku-hyperandrogenism, kanti ezinye kuhlolwa kokuzala. Ngakho-ke, 'iphrofayili ye-hormonal' ngaphandle kwenhloso ethile ivame ukukhiqiza umsindo omningi kunokuhlomula. Isikhathi, umongo womjikelezo, kanye nencazelo kanye nokutholakala kwezokwelapha kubalulekile.
texts.t1786: iphaneli ebanzi eyalwe ngokwakho ngaphandle kwenhloso yezokwelapha
texts.t1793: Ukuhlolwa kwe-ferritin ngezikhathi ezinzima kuyadingeka lapho kunengozi yokuntuleka kwe-ayoni, noma ngabe i-hemoglobin ayikashoni kakhulu.
texts.t1794: Ukopha okukhulu kokuya esikhathini kunganciphisa izinqolobane ze-ayoni kancane kancane, ngakho-ke i-ferritin ibalulekile ekuhloleni ukuntuleka okucashile.
texts.t1795: I-Ferritin isiza ukukhomba ukuncipha kwezinqolobane ze-ayoni ku-HMB.
texts.t1796: Abantu abopha kakhulu bangakhononda ngokukhathala, ukungabekezelelani nokuzivocavoca, isiyezi, nokuphuma kwezinwele ngisho nangaphambi kwe-anemia evelele. Ngakho-ke, i-logics yezokwelapha iyala ukuthi ungayilindi i-anemia enkulu kodwa uhlole ukuntuleka kwe-ayoni ngaphambili, ikakhulukazi uma ukopha kuqhubeka kukhulu.
texts.t1797: ubuthakathaka, ububende, ukuphefumula okuncane kumongo we-HMB
texts.t1805: Isitho se-thyroid sihlolwa lapho umjikelezo ongajwayelekile, i-amenorrhea, ukungakhulelwa, noma ezinye izinkomba zesistimu zikhomba ekungasebenzi kahle kwe-thyroid.
texts.t1806: I-TSH ayimpoqo kuwo wonke isikhalazo, kodwa iyingxenye yokuhlolwa okuyisisekelo okuvamile kwe-amenorrhea/oligomenorrhea.
texts.t1807: Ukuhlolwa kwe-thyroid kuyadingeka lapho kunezinkomba zomjikelezo nezesistimu.
texts.t1808: Izinkinga ze-thyroid zithinta ukukhulelwa, i-metabolism futhi kwesinye isikhathi i-prolactin. Ngakho-ke, ukuhlola ukusebenza kwe-thyroid kuvame ukufaneleka ezimweni zokungajwayeleki okusha, ukungazali, i-amenorrhea engachazwanga, noma izimpawu zesistimu ezivelele.
texts.t1815: I-Prolactin ihlolwa nge-amenorrhea, i-oligomenorrhea, ukungakhulelwa, i-galactorrhea, nezinsolo ezithile ze-pituitary.
texts.t1816: Lokhu kuhlolwa kubaluleke kakhulu uma ukungajwayeleki komjikelezo kuhlanganiswa nokukhishwa kwezinhlonhlo, izinhlungu zekhanda, noma izimpawu zokubona.
texts.t1817: I-Prolactin iyadingeka uma kunezizathu zezokwelapha zokusola i-hyperprolactinemia.
texts.t1818: I-Hyperprolactinemia isalokhu iyizimbangela zakudala ze-amenorrhea yesibili. Ngakho-ke, i-prolactin ifaneleka hhayi njengokuhlolwa okuvamile kuwo wonke umuntu, kodwa njengokuhlolwa okuhlosiwe kwephethini yomjikelezo ne-pituitary ehambisanayo.
texts.t1825: I-AMH ayidingeki kuwo wonke umjikelezo wesikhalazo, kodwa lapho kunenhloso ethile yokuzala: ukuhlola isitoreji samaqanda kumongo wokuzala noma izinqumo zokuphatha ezithile.
texts.t1826: I-AMH akusona isivivinyo esijwayelekile sokukhulelwa lapha manje, futhi ayichazi yonke imijikelezo engajwayelekile.
texts.t1827: I-AMH iyisivivinyo esinenhloso encane, hhayi yonke indawo.
texts.t1828: Iphutha elivamile ukusebenzisa i-AMH njengesikhombisi esijwayelekile sempilo yabesifazane noma isilinganiso esiqinisekisiwe sokuzala. Eqinisweni, ukubaluleka kwayo kunamandla kakhulu kumongo wezokwelapha wokuzala, futhi kumjikelezo wesikhalazo ojwayelekile, kuvame ukungaphenduli umbuzo oyinhloko wezokwelapha.
texts.t1834: Ukuhlolwa kokutheleleka kudingeka lapho kunezimpawu zokuvuvukala, ukukhishwa, ubuhlungu be-pelvic, izici zobungozi ze-STI, izinkomba zokungazali noma ukukhathazeka ngemuva kokungenelela.
texts.t1835: Izifo azisona isichazamazwi sazo zonke izinkinga zomjikelezo, kodwa ngezimpawu ezithile, kubalulekile ukungaziphutheli.
texts.t1836: Ukuhlolwa kokutheleleka kusekelwe ezimpawini nasezinhlekeleleni, hhayi nje ngenxa yokuphazamiseka komjikelezo.
texts.t1837: Ezimweni zokuphuma kwegazi okungajwayelekile okunukayo, ubuhlungu be-pelvic, i-dyspareunia, ukuphuma kwegazi ngemuva kocansi noma umlando wokungazali, i-STI nokuhlolwa kokutheleleka kungaba yingxenye ebalulekile yendlela. Ikakhulukazi lokhu kuthinta izimo ngemuva kokungenelela, ngokumelene nesizinda sezimpawu zesibeletho noma ngesikhathi sokuhlolwa okusekelwe engozini.
texts.t1844: I-Hysteroscopy iyadingeka lapho kudingeka ukuhlola ngqo umgodi wesibeletho — isibonelo, uma kusolakala ama-polyps, ama-fibroids angaphansi kwesikhumba, izicubu ezisele, noma izibopho zangaphakathi zesibeletho.
texts.t1845: Lokhu akusona isivivinyo sokuhlola, kodwa indlela eqondisiwe lapho umlando, i-ultrasound, noma iphethini yokopha ikhombisa isifo sangaphakathi.
texts.t1846: I-Hysteroscopy iyadingeka uma kusolakala isifo ngaphakathi komgodi wesibeletho.
texts.t1847: Ezimweni ze-AUB eqhubekayo, ukuphuma kwegazi okuphindaphindayo phakathi kwezikhathi, ama-polyps okusolwayo, noma i-amenorrhea ngemuva kokungenelela, i-hysteroscopy ingahlinzeka ngolwazi olungaphezu kwe-ultrasound ejwayelekile. Inani layo lilele ekutheni likwazi ukubona umgodi ngqo futhi ngokuvamile lingenelele.
texts.t1853: Lapho i-MRI noma ukuhlolwa okujulile kudingeka
texts.t1854: Lapho i-MRI noma ukuhlolwa okujulile kudingeka
texts.t1855: I-MRI noma ukuhlolwa okujulile kudingeka lapho ukuhlolwa okuyisisekelo kunganele noma kunezimpawu zesakhiwo esijulile, i-pituitary, noma isifo sobuhlungu esiyinkimbinkimbi.
texts.t1856: Lokhu akusona isivivinyo sokuqala esijwayelekile; sisetshenziswa lapho isithombe sezokwelapha sikhombisa ukuthi izivivinyo ezilula ne-ultrasound azanele.
texts.t1857: I-MRI ibekelwe izinkomba, hhayi njengesinyathelo sokuqala sanoma yisiphi isikhalazo esihlobene nomjikelezo.
texts.t1858: Isibonelo, ezimweni zezimpawu ezibomvu ze-pituitary, ukusola i-endometriosis eyinkimbinkimbi, izixuku ze-pelvic ezingacacile, noma izithombe ezingaqondakali zokuqala, i-MRI ingadingeka. Inhloso akukhona 'ukwenza konke,' kodwa ukukhuphula kahle ukuhlolwa ngemva kwesigaba esiyisisekelo.
texts.t1861: lapho i-mri noma ukuhlolwa okujulile kudingeka
texts.t1862: lapho i-mri noma ukuhlolwa okujulile kudingeka
texts.t1866: Kuyasiza ukuza ekuhlolweni kokungazali ngemininingwane ngemijikelezo, imvamisa yokuhlangana ngokocansi, izivivinyo ezivele zenziwe, imithi, ukuhlinzwa, ukukhulelwa, kanye nomlando womlingani.
texts.t1867: Ukulungiselela akusheshisi ukwelashwa ngomlingo, kodwa kwenza ukuvakashela kokuqala kokuzala kube nomkhiqizo omkhulu.
texts.t1868: Ukulungiselela okuhle kunciphisa isiphithiphithi ngesikhathi sokuhlolwa kokungazali.
texts.t1869: I-ACOG ekuhlolweni kokungazali igcizelela ukuthi ukuhlolwa kuhilela isithandwa. Ngakho-ke, ngaphezu komlando womjikelezo, ukukhulelwa kwangaphambilini, izifo ezithathelwanayo, ukuhlinzwa, umlando wokuvimbela inzalo, isikhathi sokuzama ukukhulelwa, ukulandelela ukuvuthwa kweqanda, nezici zomlingani kubalulekile. Izinto eziqoqwe kusengaphambili zenza inqubo ibe lula kakhulu.
texts.t1870: ukuzama ukukhulelwa isikhathi eside ngaphandle kokuhlolwa okuhlelekile
texts.t1878: Imiphumela evamile yokuhlolwa ayivamile ukuhlinzeka ngesifo ngokwayo; incazelo yayo incike esikhathini, izimpawu, umongo womjikelezo, nombuzo ophakanyisiwe.
texts.t1879: Umphumela owodwa 'ongaphandle kobubanzi' awuhlali ulingana nesifo, njengoba umphumela ojwayelekile ungahlali ususa inkinga.
texts.t1880: Izivivinyo zihlaziywa kumongo, hhayi ngenombolo eyodwa.
texts.t1881: Lokhu kusebenza cishe kuwo wonke amalabhorethri okuzala: i-prolactin, i-TSH, i-FSH/LH, i-estradiol, i-ferritin, i-AMH. Kubalulekile ukuthi kwenziwe ngaluphi usuku lomjikelezo, ukuthi bekukhona yini i-amenorrhea, uma kukhona imithi, inhloso yokungazali, inkinga yokopha noma isifo sokuhlukumezeka. Ngaphandle kwalokhu, ukuhumusha kusengozini yokuholela ekudidekeni.
texts.t1882: iziphetho ezizimele ezisekelwe kumbiko owodwa welabhorethri
texts.t1889: Izivivinyo ziphindwa uma umphumela useduze, awuhambisani nesithombe sezokwelapha, uncike esikhathini noma emzimbeni, noma uma kudingeka ukuhlola ukuguquguquka kokwelashwa noma isimo.
texts.t1890: Akuzona zonke izivivinyo eziphindwa njalo, kodwa izinkomba eziningi zokuzala zihunyushwa ngokukhawulela ngaphandle komongo wesilinganiso esisodwa.
texts.t1891: Ukuphinda izivivinyo kuyavunyelwa uma kudingeka umongo noma ukuthambekela, kunokuba umbiko welabhorethri nje.
texts.t1892: Isibonelo, ukuhlolwa kokukhulelwa, i-prolactin, amanye amalabhorethri e-endocrine nokuhlolwa okuhlobene nokuzala kungadinga ukuphinda noma ukulandela ngesikhathi esihlukile/umongo. Okubalulekile akukhona ukuhlolwa okungapheli, kodwa ukuqonda ukuthi kungani ukuphinda kushintsha ukuphathwa.
texts.t1900: Ukuhlolwa komlingani kudingeka kakhulu kumongo wokungazali; okungenani, ukuhlolwa kwe-semen kusenesikhathi nomlando oyisisekelo wokuzala kubalulekile.
texts.t1901: Ukungazali kuyinkinga yesithandwa, ngakho-ke ukunganaki ukuhlolwa komlingani kuyimbangela evamile yokulibaziseka kokuxilongwa.
texts.t1903: I-ACOG nemihlahlandlela yokuzala igcizelela ukuthi ukuhlolwa kwesithandwa kufanele kuqhubeke ngokuhambisana, kunokuba ngemuva kwezinyanga ezinde zokuhlolwa kwabantu besifazane kuphela. Iphuzu lokuqala elisebenzayo livame ukufaka ukuhlolwa kwe-semen nomlando ofanele, ngokuhlolwa okwengeziwe okusekelwe kokutholakele.
texts.t1904: ukuzama ukukhulelwa isikhathi eside ngaphandle kokuhlolwa komlingani
texts.t1909: Izimpawu ezibomvu lapho ukuxilongwa kungakwazi ukubambezeleka
texts.t1911: Ukuxilongwa akukwazi ukubambezeleka ezimweni zokopha okukhulu ngezimpawu ze-anemia, ubuhlungu obukhulu noma obuqhubekayo, i-amenorrhea, ukucatshangwa kokukhulelwa okungahambi kahle, i-galactorrhea enekhanda, umkhuhlane noma izimpawu ezinzima zomzimba.
texts.t1912: Umthetho oyinhloko akuwona ukuhlanganisa 'ukubona nokulinda' nezimo lapho ukubambezeleka kungaba yingozi yokuphuthelwa isifo esibi noma ukulimala kokuzala.
texts.t1913: Kukhona izimo ezihlobene nomjikelezo lapho ukubuka ngaphandle kokuxilongwa sekuyingozi.
texts.t1914: Uma ikhwalithi yokuphila yomuntu iyancipha, kukhona izimpawu zokukhathala, ubuhlungu obuqhubekayo, ukucatshangwa kokukhulelwa okungaphandle kwesibeletho noma izimpawu ezibomvu ze-endocrine, umkhawulo wokuhlolwa kufanele ube phansi. Lezi zimo ezithile kufanele zihlukaniswe nokuguquguquka komjikelezo owodwa ongenangozi, lapho ukubuka kwesikhashana kwamukelekile.
texts.t1915: ukukhathala, ubuthakathaka obukhulu, noma ukopha okukhulu
texts.t1916: ubuhlungu obuhlangothi olulodwa, umkhuhlane, i-amenorrhea noma izimpawu ezibomvu ze-endocrine ezinzima
texts.t1919: izimpawu ezibomvu lapho ukuxilongwa kungakwazi ukubambezeleka
texts.t1923: Ukudla okunempilo kuthinta impilo yamahomoni ikakhulukazi ngokutholakala kwamandla, isimo sokuguquguquka, isisindo somzimba, kanye nokuhlinzekwa kwezakhi ezibalulekile.
texts.t1924: Ukudla okunempilo ngokwalo akulawuli amahomoni njengokushintsha, kodwa ukushoda kwamandla okuqhubekayo, ukudla okungahlelekile, nokushoda okukhulu kungathinta kakhulu umjikelezo nokuvuthwa kweqanda.
texts.t1925: Ukudla okunempilo kuyingxenye yemvelo lapho uhlelo lokuzala lusebenza khona.
texts.t1926: Ngokwezokwelapha, kubalulekile ukugwema izinkomba ezimbili: ukubheka ukudla okunempilo njengencazelo enamandla kunoma yiziphi izimpawu zamahomoni nokungayinaki ngokuphelele. Kumjikelezo, amandla anele, uhlelo oluzinzile, ukungabikho kokushoda okukhulu, nokungabikho kokuziphatha kokudla okuholela ekucindezelekeni kwe-metabolic noma kwe-hypothalamic kubaluleke kakhulu.
texts.t1927: indlela yokuphila ingathinta kakhulu izimpawu nokuvuthwa kweqanda, kodwa ayibuyiseli izivivinyo
texts.t1928: ukuzisiza kuyasiza ngezimpawu ezincane kuya kwezilinganiselwe uma kungekho zimpawu ezibomvu
texts.t1929: ukushoda kwamandla, ubuhlungu obukhulu, kanye nezinguquko zomjikelezo eziqhubekayo kudinga indlela ebaluleke kakhulu
texts.t1930: uma ukuzisiza kungasizi noma izimpawu zanda
texts.t1931: uma umjikelezo ushintsha ngokudla, ezemidlalo, noma ukucindezeleka
texts.t1932: uma kukhona i-PMS enkulu, ubuhlungu, noma izimpawu zokushoda
texts.t1937: izinguquko esisindweni, isifiso sokudla, nokudla okunempilo
texts.t1940: Kulesi sigaba, iphethini yezokwelapha, ukubekezelelana kwezimpawu, nokuxhumana nendlela yokuphila kubaluleke kakhulu kunenombolo eyodwa ehlukanisiwe.
texts.t1941: ukulala/ukudla/umthwalo/ukucindezeleka → umthelela ekutholakaleni kwamandla, isimo sokuzizwa, ubuhlungu, nokuvuthwa kweqanda → izinguquko kumjikelezo nezimpawu
texts.t1942: izinguquko ezincane zomjikelezo zingaphendula izinyathelo zokuzinakekela
texts.t1943: akuzona zonke izimpawu ezidinga imithi, kodwa izimpawu eziqhubekayo noma ezinzima zidinga ukuhlolwa okubanzi
texts.t1944: i-amenorrhea noma imijikelezo engavamile ngokushoda kwamandla
texts.t1945: i-PMS enkulu noma ubuhlungu bokuya esikhathini
texts.t1951: ungachaza ukuzisiza, umthelela ojwayelekile wendlela yokuphila, nezimpawu ezibomvu
texts.t1952: awukwazi ukuthembisa ukuthi ukudla okunempilo, izithasiselo, noma i-yoga kuphela kuzolapha zonke izinkinga zomjikelezo
texts.t1953: ngezinye izimpawu ezincane — ukuzinakekela okufanele kuqala nokulandelela
texts.t1954: ngezinye izimpawu eziqhubekayo, ezinzima, noma eziqhubekayo — ukudlulela ekuhlolweni kwezokwelapha
texts.t1955: uma kunenkinga ngomjikelezo, ingalungiswa njalo ngokudla noma isithasiselo
texts.t1957: ukucindezeleka kuchaza noma yikuphi ukubambezeleka ngaphandle kokuhlolwa okwengeziwe
texts.t1959: uma izimpawu zincane futhi zomjikelezo → zama ukulala, ukushisa, ukuhamba, ukulandelela
texts.t1960: uma kukhona izimpawu zokushoda kwamandla → yehlisa umthwalo, buyisela ukudla, futhi uhlaziye umjikelezo
texts.t1961: uma kukhona izimpawu ezibomvu → funa ukuhlolwa kwezokwelapha
texts.t1962: ukuzama ukwelapha ubuhlungu obukhulu ngemininingwane yendlela yokuphila kuphela
texts.t1963: ukunganaki i-amenorrhea kumongo wokuqeqesha nokushoda kwamandla
texts.t1964: ukushintsha ukuhlolwa kwe-PMDD noma ukopha okukhulu ngezithasiselo kanye nesilandeleli
texts.t1965: ukuguquguquka okuncane kwesifiso sokudla noma ukuvuvukala ngaphambi kokuya esikhathini
texts.t1966: ukukhathala okulingene ngaphandle kokuqhubeka nokungawa kokusebenza
texts.t1967: thola ukuthi inkinga ukuphathwa kwezimpawu, umthelela wokuvuthwa kweqanda, noma izimpawu ezibomvu
texts.t1968: chaza indlela yokusebenza komthelela wendlela yokuphila
texts.t1970: hlukanisa lapho lokhu kwanele nalapho kungasanele
texts.t1972: bese ukuzisiza nokuthi nini ukufuna usizo
texts.t1973: Kwakunikezwe okubalulekile ku-ACOG, Endocrine Society, MedlinePlus, nezibuyekezo zesimanje; kulesi sigaba, imingcele phakathi kokuzisiza okufanele kanye nesidingo sokuxilongwa kubaluleke kakhulu.
texts.t1980: ukuzisiza kusebenza kahle kakhulu ngezimpawu ezincane kuya kwezilinganiselwe ngaphandle kwezimpawu ezibomvu
texts.t1981: ngobuhlungu, ukopha okukhulu, noma ukungavuthwa kweqanda, izinyathelo zendlela yokuphila zingase zengeze kodwa zingashintshi izivivinyo
texts.t1982: ingozi enkulu kakhulu yendlela yokuphila yokuvuthwa kweqanda ukushoda kwamandla
texts.t1983: qala ngokuthuthukisa ukulala, ukudla, ukuphathwa kokucindezeleka, nokulandelela
texts.t1984: uma kukucatshangwa ukushoda kwamandla — hlola kabusha izinga lomsebenzi nokudla
texts.t1985: uma iphethini inzima noma iqhubeka — dlulela ekuhlolweni kwezokwelapha
texts.t1986: ungaphathi izimpawu ezibomvu ngemininingwane yababhali kuphela
texts.t1987: ungacabangi ukuthi ukungabi khona kokuya esikhathini ngaphansi kohlelo oluqinile kuyintengo yokuzibamba
texts.t1988: Iphutha eliyinhloko mayelana nendlela yokuphila ukungayiqondi kahle umthelela wayo kumjikelezo noma, ngokuphambene, ukuthembisa ukuthi ukudla okunempilo, i-magnesium, ne-yoga kuzoxazulula noma yiziphi izinkinga ze-endocrine noma ubuhlungu.
texts.t1991: Iphrotheni, amafutha, nama-carbohydrate adingeka emsebenzini wokuzala hhayi njengamaphesenti omlingo, kodwa njengesisekelo sokutholakala kwamandla anele, ukwakheka kwama-hormone, kanye ne-physiology ezinzile.
texts.t1992: Iphuzu eliyinhloko elisebenzayo akukhona ukuthola isilinganiso esifanele se-macronutrient, kodwa ukungabikho kokondleka okungapheli kanye nemikhawulo eqinile ethinta kabi umjikelezo.
texts.t1993: Umsebenzi wokuzala uncike ekudleni okunempilo nokuzinzile, hhayi ohlelweni lwe-macro oludumile.
texts.t1994: Esimweni sezokwelapha, ibhalansi yamandla ephelele nokubekezelelana kokudla kubaluleke kakhulu kunokuhlukaniswa okungaguquki phakathi kwama-macronutrients alungile nalungile. Ukukhishwa kwesikhathi eside kwamaqembu okudla aphelele, ikakhulukazi amafutha nama-carbohydrate, kungahambisana nokuba mubi komjikelezo, amandla, ukulala, nesimo sokuzizwa kwabanye abantu.
texts.t2002: Ukushoda kwamakhalori kungaholela ekungavuthweni kweqanda ngokucindezela ukusebenza kokulawulwa kwe-hypothalamic.
texts.t2003: Ukuze kuvuthwe iqanda, akubalulekile kuphela i-BMI esemthethweni, kodwa futhi ukuthi umzimba uthola isignali yokuphepha kwamandla anele.
texts.t2004: Ukushoda kwamandla okuqhubekayo kungacindezela ukuvuthwa kweqanda.
texts.t2005: I-Endocrine Society igcizelela ukuthi ku-amenorrhea ye-hypothalamic esebenzayo, indlela eyinhloko ukushoda kwamandla—ngokuvamile kumongo wokunciphisa ukudla, ukuzivocavoca, noma ukucindezeleka. Lokhu kusho ukuthi ngisho ne-BMI 'ejwayelekile', ukuvuthwa kweqanda kungahlupheka uma ukutholakala kwamandla kuphansi.
texts.t2006: i-amenorrhea noma imijikelezo engavamile ngesikhathi sokulahlekelwa isisindo
texts.t2012: Insimbi ibaluleke kakhulu ngesikhathi sokuya esikhathini okukhulu ngoba ukulahlekelwa kwegazi okuqhubekayo kungaholela ekushodeni kwensimbi kanye ne-anemia.
texts.t2013: Insimbi isiza ukwelapha imiphumela yokulahlekelwa kwegazi kodwa ayisusi imbangela yokopha okukhulu uqobo.
texts.t2014: Ngesikhathi sokuya esikhathini, udaba lwensimbi lubaluleke kakhulu ezimweni zokopha okukhulu.
texts.t2015: Uma ukuya esikhathini kukhulu, umuntu angathola kancane kancane ukushoda kwensimbi ngisho noma kungekho sigameko esisodwa esikhulu sokulahlekelwa kwegazi. Ngokwezokwelapha, lokhu kubonakala njengobuthakathaka, ububende, ukuphefumula okuncane, i-tachycardia, nokwehla kokubekezelela ukuzivocavoca. Ngakho-ke, ngokopha okukhulu, kubalulekile ukubheka i-ferritin/hemoglobin, hhayi amaphakethe nobuhlungu kuphela.
texts.t2022: IMagnesium ivame ukuxoxwa nge-PMS, kodwa idatha ngomthelela wayo iyahlukahluka, futhi ayithathi indawo yokuhlolwa okuphelele kwezimpawu ezinzima.
texts.t2023: Kwabanye abantu, i-magnesium ingaba inketho enengqondo yokwengeza, kodwa akuyona ikhambi elijwayelekile le-PMS.
texts.t2024: IMagnesium ye-PMS iyisithasiselo esiphikisanayo kodwa esingadingeki ngokujwayelekile.
texts.t2025: Ukuthandwa kwe-magnesium kuphakeme kakhulu kunamandla obufakazi bazo zonke izinhlelo ze-PMS ezithile. Ngakho-ke, indlela yegolide yezokwelapha iwukuyibheka njengesithasiselo esingaba khona kunokuba ithathe indawo yediyari yezimpawu, ukulala, ukuzivocavoca, futhi, uma kudingeka, ukwelashwa okusekelwe obufakazini obengeziwe be-PMS noma i-PMDD.
texts.t2034: I-Omega-3 ivame ukuxoxwa kumongo we-PMS nezimpawu zobuhlungu obuvuvukalayo, kodwa indima yayo iyengeza kakhulu kunesisekelo.
texts.t2035: Akuyona indlela yokuthi 'ukujwayela umjikelezo' uqobo, kodwa isu elisekelayo elingaba khona ezimweni ezithile zezimpawu.
texts.t2037: Engxoxweni yezempilo ethandwayo, i-omega-3 ivame ukwethulwa njengesici esicishe sibe yimpoqo sempilo yamahomoni. Ngokwezokwelapha, kunembe kakhudlwana ukukhuluma ngokucophelela: kuyinketho evumelekile yokusekela, ikakhulukazi uma ukudla kuphansi enhlanzini, kodwa akuthathi indawo yokuxilongwa kobuhlungu, ukungavuthwa kweqanda, ukopha okukhulu, noma i-PMS enkulu.
texts.t2038: ubuhlungu obukhulu noma i-AUB ngaphandle kokuhlolwa kwesizathu
texts.t2039: ukulindela ukuthi isithasiselo sizoxazulula inkinga yomjikelezo
texts.t2044: I-Vitamin D ixoxwa mayelana nempilo yokuzala, kodwa ukubaluleka kwayo kuncike ekushodeni kwangempela kanye nomongo wezokwelapha jikelele.
texts.t2045: Ukulungisa ukushoda kwe-vitamin D kunengqondo empilweni ejwayelekile, kodwa akufanele kuthengiswe njengokwelashwa okujwayelekile kwemijikelezo engajwayelekile.
texts.t2046: I-Vitamin D ibalulekile ezimweni zokushoda, kodwa akuyona impendulo ejwayelekile yezikhalazo zamahomoni.
texts.t2047: Lokhu kuyisibonelo esihle sokuthi ukulungiswa kokushoda okusebenzayo kuphenduka inkolelo-ze ye-inthanethi yokubuyiselwa kwamahomoni omlingo. Uma ukushoda kukhona, kuyelashwa. Nokho, imijikelezo engajwayelekile, ukungavuthwa kweqanda, i-PMS, noma ubuhlungu akunakuncishiswa kuphela ku-vitamin D ngaphandle kokuhlolwa okubanzi kwezimbangela.
texts.t2052: Ama-Vitamin B nesimo sokuzizwa phakathi nomjikelezo
texts.t2054: Ama-Vitamin B, ikakhulukazi i-B6, avame ukuxoxwa ngezimpawu zangaphambi kokuya esikhathini, kodwa indima yawo iyengeza futhi incike kumthamo, ukubekezelelana, nenhloso ethile.
texts.t2055: Lokhu kuyinkulumo eyengeziwe, hhayi isixazululo sokuqala sezimpawu ezinzima zesimo sokuzizwa phakathi nomjikelezo.
texts.t2056: Ama-Vitamin B angaxoxwa ngezimpawu zesimo sokuzizwa somjikelezo, kodwa awathathi indawo yokuhlolwa kwezokwelapha.
texts.t2057: Ngezimpawu ezincane, abantu bavame ukuzama ama-Vitamin B6 noma i-B-complex. Nokho, ngokukhathazeka okukhulu, ukudangala, ukuthukuthela, noma i-PMDD, le ndlela akufanele ithathe indawo yesu lokwelashwa eliphelele. Ngaphezu kwalokho, ukuphepha nokugwema imithamo ephezulu engalawuliwe kubalulekile.
texts.t2060: ama-vitamin b nesimo sokuzizwa phakathi nomjikelezo
texts.t2063: Amanzi, usawoti, nokuvuvukala ngaphambi kokuya esikhathini
texts.t2065: Umuzwa wokuvuvukala ngaphambi kokuya esikhathini ungahluka kuye ngomjikelezo, futhi ukudla okunoshukela ophakeme kwandisa ukugcinwa koketshezi okubonakalayo kwabanye abantu.
texts.t2066: Ukutholakala kwamanzi okwanele kuyasiza, kodwa ngokwalo, akususi ukuvuvukala kwangaphambi kokuya esikhathini futhi akuyona indlela yokwelapha ethile ye-PMS.
texts.t2067: Ukutholakala kwamanzi nosawoti kungathinta umuzwa wokuvuvukala, kodwa akuchazi ngokuphelele i-PMS.
texts.t2068: Ngokusebenzayo, ukuvuvukala ngaphambi kokuya esikhathini kuyisimpawu esinomthelela omningi. Kuncike hhayi kuphela kusawoti namanzi kodwa futhi ekulaleni, isifiso sokudla, umjikelezo, inhlalakahle jikelele, nokuzwela komuntu ngamunye. Ngakho-ke, umqondo wokuzisiza lapha uyisilinganiso, kunokuba izindlela ezinzima ezifana nokunciphisa amanzi noma usawoti ngaphandle kwesizathu sezokwelapha.
texts.t2070: ukuphefumula okuncane noma ukuvuvukala okuqhubekayo ngaphandle komjikelezo
texts.t2071: amanzi, usawoti, nokuvuvukala ngaphambi kokuya esikhathini
texts.t2075: Ukukhululeka okungewona umuthi ngokubanjwa kokuya esikhathini kungafaka ukushisa, ukuhamba, ukulala, izindlela zokuphumula ezithambile, nohlelo olujwayelekile, kodwa akuthathi indawo yokuhlolwa kwesizathu sobuhlungu obukhulu.
texts.t2076: Uma ubuhlungu bujwayelekile futhi buphakathi, izinyathelo ezinjalo zingasiza kakhulu. Uma ubuhlungu bukhubaza, akudingeki ukuzinakekela kuphela kodwa futhi nokubuyekezwa kwezokwelapha.
texts.t2077: Usizo olungewona umuthi lunganciphisa ukuquleka kodwa akufanele kufihle ubuhlungu besibili.
texts.t2078: I-ACOG ne-MedlinePlus zisekela izinyathelo ezilula zokusekela: ukushisa, umsebenzi, ukulala, nezindlela zokuphumula. Lokhu kuyisinyathelo esihle sokuqala sobuhlungu obungelukhuni. Kodwa uma umuntu ekhubazekile njalo umjikelezo, ukufuna amaqhinga amasha okuphila kuphela futhi engahloli i-endometriosis engaba khona noma i-dysmenorrhea yesibili, lokhu kuyiphutha lezokwelapha.
texts.t2080: ubuhlungu buqhubeka noma buhambisana nezinye izimpawu
texts.t2086: Ukushisa kungenye yezindlela ezilula nezisekelwa kakhulu zokunciphisa ubuhlungu bokuya esikhathini.
texts.t2087: Iphakethe lokushisa, ibhavu elishisayo, noma ukushisa kwendawo kungaba usizo njengesinyathelo esizimele sobuhlungu obuncane futhi njengesengezo sokwelashwa kobuhlungu obukhulu.
texts.t2088: Ukushisa kwendawo kuyindlela yokuzinakekela yokuqala esebenzayo yokubanjwa.
texts.t2089: Kokubili i-ACOG ne-MedlinePlus zincoma ngokusobala ukushisa njengenye yezinyathelo eziyisisekelo zokusekela i-dysmenorrhea. Inani layo lilele ekubeni yisinyathelo esinobungozi obuphansi okulula ukusihlanganisa nama-NSAIDs, ukuphumula, nomsebenzi othambile. Nokho, uma ukushisa kuphela kungasasebenzi, futhi kusebenza njengesikhumbuzo sokuxilongwa.
texts.t2095: Ukulala kuthinta izimpawu ze-PMS ngokukhathala, ukuthukuthela, ukukhathazeka, isifiso sokudla, nokuzwela kobuhlungu.
texts.t2096: Ukushoda kokulala akuyona imbangela eyodwa ye-PMS, kodwa ukulala okungalungile kungakhulisa kakhulu izimpawu zomjikelezo.
texts.t2097: Ukulala kuyisici esibalulekile sokuguqula ubukhulu be-PMS.
texts.t2098: Esikhaleni sokuzisiza, ukulala kuvame ukungabhekwa kanti izithasiselo zihlukaniswa kakhulu. Phakathi naleso sikhathi, ukulala okungalungile kukhuphula izimpawu ezivame ukuhlupha isikhathi sangaphambi kokuya esikhathini: ukukhala, ukukhathazeka, izifiso zokudla, ukukhathala, nobuhlungu. Ngakho-ke, ukuthuthukisa ukulala akuyona isincomo sesibili kodwa isinyathelo esiyisisekelo, esisekelwe kwezokwelapha.
texts.t2104: Ukuzivocavoca okulingene ngesikhathi sokuya esikhathini kuphephile kwabanye futhi kunganciphisa ubuhlungu, ukukhathala, nokucindezeleka.
texts.t2105: Ukuya esikhathini ngokwalo akuvimbi ukuzivocavoca; umhlahlandlela kufanele ube ukuthi umuntu uzizwa kanjani, ubukhulu bobuhlungu, kanye nenani lokopha.
texts.t2106: Ukuzivocavoca okulingene ngesikhathi sokuya esikhathini kuvame ukwamukeleka futhi kuyasiza.
texts.t2107: I-ACOG incoma ukuzivocavoca okuvamile njengokuwusizo ngezikhathi ezibuhlungu kanye ne-PMS. Ngokusebenzayo, kubalulekile ukuthi ungaziphoqi ukuthi uzivocavoce 'kuze kube sekupheleni', kodwa futhi ungabheki ukuya esikhathini njengokuvinjelwa okuphelele kokunyakaza. Umsebenzi othambile uvame ukubekezelelwa kangcono kunokunganyakazi ngokuphelele.
texts.t2108: ukukhathala, ubuthakathaka obukhulu, noma ukopha okukhulu
texts.t2112: Yiziphi izivivinyo ezifanele izigaba ezahlukene zomjikelezo
texts.t2114: Ukubona izivivinyo kungashintsha phakathi kwezigaba zomjikelezo, kodwa ayikho inqubo ejwayelekile edingekayo kuwo wonke umuntu esekelwe kumjikelezo.
texts.t2115: Kuyasiza kakhulu ukugxila kumaphethini akho aphindaphindayo wamandla, ubuhlungu, ukulala, nokululama kunamashadi aqinile e-inthanethi.
texts.t2116: Ukulungiswa komuntu ngamunye kokuqeqeshwa ngokusekelwe ekuzizweni kwakho kuyasiza kakhulu kunohlelo oluqinile olusekelwe esigabeni.
texts.t2117: Abanye abantu bazizwa benamandla amakhulu kwezinye izigaba futhi bezwela kakhulu kwezinye. Lokhu kungasetshenziswa ngokusebenzayo uma amaphethini anjalo ezinzile. Kodwa 'ukuqeqeshwa okusekelwe esigabeni' akufanele kuphenduke uhlobo olusha lokulawula okuqinile nokukhathazeka: uma umehluko umncane, asikho isidingo sokuphinda uhlele uhlelo lonke lokuzivocavoca.
texts.t2118: izivivinyo zenza umjikelezo noma ukululama kube kubi
texts.t2119: ukulawula okuqinile nokuba kubi kokuziphatha kokudla
texts.t2120: yiziphi izivivinyo ezifanele izigaba ezahlukene zomjikelezo
texts.t2125: Ukuqeqeshwa okukhulu kungaphazamisa ukuvuthwa kweqanda uma kuhlanganiswa nokudla okunganele, ukushoda kwamandla, nokungabuyiseli.
texts.t2126: Inkinga ngokuvamile akuyona imidlalo uqobo, kodwa ukuhlanganiswa komthwalo ngomshikashika wokudla nokucindezeleka.
texts.t2127: Ukuqeqeshwa okukhulu kungaphazamisa ukuvuthwa kweqanda ngokutholakala kwamandla okuphansi.
texts.t2128: I-Endocrine Society igcizelela isixhumanisi phakathi komthwalo ophezulu, ukushoda kwamandla, nokuphazamiseka kwe-hypothalamic. Lokhu kubaluleke kakhulu lapho umuntu eziqhenya ngokuzibamba futhi engaboni ukuthi umjikelezo wakhe usuphenduke ongavamile, omfushane, noma usushabalala. Lapha, ukuzisiza kufanele kushintshwe ngokuhlolwa kwezokwelapha ngaphambi kokuphuka kokucindezeleka kanye ne-amenorrhea eqhubekayo.
texts.t2129: i-amenorrhea noma imijikelezo engavamile ngesikhathi sokuqeqeshwa
texts.t2135: I-Yoga, ukuphefumula, nezindlela zokuphumula zingasiza abanye abantu nge-PMS njengendlela yokunciphisa ukucindezeleka, ubuhlungu, nokukhathazeka okubonakalayo.
texts.t2136: Lezi ziyizinsiza ezizuzisayo, kodwa azithathi indawo yokuxilongwa nokwelashwa kwe-PMS enkulu noma i-PMDD.
texts.t2137: Izindlela zokuphumula zingaba yingxenye yokuzinakekela kwe-PMS.
texts.t2138: I-MedlinePlus neminye imithombo yezokwelapha ifaka izindlela zokuphumula ohlwini lwezinyathelo ezizuzisayo ezingezona ezemithi zobuhlungu bokuya esikhathini nezimpawu ezihlobene. Ezingeni lokucabanga kwezokwelapha, lokhu kuyisengezo esihle esinobungozi obuphansi, ikakhulukazi uma umuntu ebhekene nokucindezeleka okukhulu, ukuthukuthela, nokucindezeleka komzimba ngaphambi kwesikhathi sakhe.
texts.t2143: Ukuphathwa kokucindezeleka kubalulekile kumjikelezo ngoba ukucindezeleka okuqhubekayo kungathinta ukuvuthwa kweqanda, ukulala, isifiso sokudla, nobukhulu bezimpawu ezibonakalayo.
texts.t2144: Lokhu akusho ukuthi yonke imijikelezo engajwayelekile ivela 'ezinhliziyweni', kodwa ukucindezeleka kungaba yingxenye ebalulekile yesithombe sezokwelapha.
texts.t2145: Ukuphathwa kokucindezeleka kungasiza umjikelezo, kodwa akuthathi indawo yokuxilongwa.
texts.t2146: Ngokusebenzayo, ibhalansi iyisihluthulelo lapha: ungaphiki umthelela wokucindezeleka, kodwa ungawusebenzisi ukuchaza konke. Uma ukuzilawula kusiza, umjikelezo uzinzile, futhi azikho ezinye izimpawu—lokho kuyindaba eyodwa. Uma ukungajwayelekile kuqhubeka, kukhona ukulahlekelwa isisindo, i-amenorrhea, ukopha okukhulu, noma ukungazali—kufanele kufunwe ezinye izimbangela.
texts.t2148: ukucindezeleka + ukulahlekelwa isisindo + ukulahlekelwa ukuvuthwa kweqanda
texts.t2153: Idiyari yomjikelezo nezimpawu isiza ukuhlukanisa iphethini ye-physiological ephindaphindayo kusuka ezinzwaneni ezingahleliwe nezimpawu ezidinga ukuxilongwa.
texts.t2154: Kubaluleke kakhulu nge-PMS, ubuhlungu, imijikelezo engajwayelekile, ukopha okuncane, nemizamo yokuqonda ukuxhumana phakathi kwezimpawu nezigaba zomjikelezo.
texts.t2155: Idiyari yomjikelezo ingenye yamathuluzi wokuzilandelela awusizo kakhulu.
texts.t2156: Ngaphandle kokurekhoda, abantu bavame ukweqisa izigameko ezicacile futhi banciphise isikhathi. Idiyari isiza ukubona: ngabe izimpawu ziyazijikeleza ngempela, ziveza kuphi isigaba, zihlala isikhathi esingakanani, yini ezikhulula, futhi ziyabi ziba zimbi. Lokhu kwenza ukuxhumana nodokotela kube nomkhiqizo omkhulu.
texts.t2158: ukusola i-PMDD, ukungavuthwa kweqanda, noma i-AUB
texts.t2163: Indlela yokuhlukanisa izindinganiso zomuntu ngamunye nezimpawu ezibomvu
texts.t2164: Indinganiso yomuntu ngamunye vs izimpawu ezibomvu
texts.t2165: Indinganiso yomuntu ngamunye iyiphethini ephindaphindayo futhi ebekezelekayo engathuthuki futhi engaphazamisi impilo yansuku zonke; izimpawu ezibomvu ziyizimpawu ezintsha, ezinzima, eziqhubekayo, noma zomzimba.
texts.t2166: Umhlahlandlela oyinhloko akuwona nje ukuba khona kwesimptomu, kodwa ubukhulu bayo, ukuphindaphinda, umthelela empilweni, nezimpawu ezibomvu.
texts.t2167: Umjikelezo ojwayelekile akuwona ukungabi bikho kwanoma yiziphi izimpawu, kodwa ukuqagela ngaphandle kokuphazamiseka okukhulu.
texts.t2168: Abanye abantu bahlala bezwa ubuhlungu obuncane bezinwele noma ukukhathala ngaphambi kwesikhathi sabo — futhi lokhu kungaba yizinga labo lomuntu siqu. Nokho, uma isimpawu siba namandla, sishintsha, noma sihambisana nokukhathala, ukopha okukhulu, ubuhlungu obuhlangothi olulodwa, ukudangala okukhulu, noma i-amenorrhea, ukuzisiza akusanele. Ukuthuthuka nokukhubazeka kokusebenza yikho okwenza isithombe sezokwelapha sibe esibalulekile.
texts.t2170: ukukhathala, ukopha okukhulu, i-amenorrhea, izimpawu ezinzima zokuzizwa
texts.t2171: indlela yokuhlukanisa izindinganiso zomuntu ngamunye nezimpawu ezibomvu
texts.t2172: indinganiso yomuntu ngamunye vs izimpawu ezibomvu
texts.t2175: Uma ukubambezeleka kungenzeka kuhlobene nokucindezeleka, ukuzisiza kungafaka ukulala, ukudla, ukunciphisa umthwalo, nokulandelela umjikelezo, kodwa ukukhulelwa nezinye izimbangela kusamele kubhekwe.
texts.t2176: Ukucindezeleka akufanele kuchaze ngokuzenzakalelayo noma yikuphi ukubambezeleka, ikakhulukazi uma kunengozi yokukhulelwa, ukulahlekelwa isisindo, noma uma ukubambezeleka kuqhubeka.
texts.t2177: Ukuzisiza ngokubambezeleka okuhlobene nokucindezeleka kufanelekile kuphela ngemuva kokusetshenziswa komqondo oyisisekelo wezokwelapha.
texts.t2178: Indlela ehlakaniphile yokusebenza ilandelayo: okokuqala, susa ukukhulelwa, bese uhlole ukuthi bekukhona yini ukulahlekelwa isisindo ngokuzumayo, ukucindezeleka okukhulu, noma ukucindezeleka okukhulu. Uma kungekho ezinye izimpawu ezibomvu, ukubuyisela ukulala, ukunciphisa umthwalo, ukudla okwanele, nokubuka kuyasiza. Nokho, ezimweni ze-amenorrhea eqhubekayo noma iphethini ephindaphindayo, ukuhlolwa okuhlelekile kudingeka.
texts.t2180: ukubambezeleka > izinyanga ezi-3 noma iphethini ephindaphindayo
texts.t2184: Ukuvimbela inzalo yamahomoni kuvimbela ukukhulelwa ngokucindezela ukuvuthwa kweqanda, ukujiya kwe-mucus ye-cervical, kanye/noma ukuguqula i-endometrium — kuye ngendlela.
texts.t2185: Akuzona zonke izindlela ezisebenza ngendlela efanayo: ama-COC, ama-implant, imijovo, amaphilisi amancane, nama-IUD amahomoni ahlukile endleleni yawo kanye nezinga lokucindezela ukuvuthwa kweqanda.
texts.t2186: Ukuvimbela inzalo yamahomoni kusebenza ngokuthinta ukuvuthwa kweqanda, i-mucus, kanye ne-endometrium.
texts.t2187: Kubalulekile ukuthi unganciphisi zonke izindlela zamahomoni ohlelweni olulodwa. Izindlela ezihlanganisiwe zicindezela kakhulu ukuvuthwa kweqanda, kuyilapho izindlela ze-progestin kuphela zivame ukwenza i-mucus ingabi namandla kakhulu kumasperm futhi ziguqule i-endometrium. Ngakho-ke, kokubili umthelela kumjikelezo kanye nephethini yokopha kuyahluka kakhulu phakathi kwezindlela ezahlukene.
texts.t2188: ukuvimbela inzalo kuthinta umjikelezo ngendlela ehlukile kuye ngendlela
texts.t2189: izinguquko ezilindelekile ephethini yokopha nezimpawu ezibomvu akufani
texts.t2190: uma ukhetha indlela, kubalulekile ukubheka kokubili inhloso yokuvimbela inzalo kanye nokuhlela ukukhulelwa kwesikhathi esizayo
texts.t2191: uma iphethini yokopha iba nkulu noma iphazamisa kakhulu
texts.t2192: uma kukhona ukungabaza ukuthi ushintsho lulindelekile yini endleleni
texts.t2193: uma indlela ikhethwa noma iyekwa kumongo wokuhlela ukukhulelwa
texts.t2201: Kulesi sigaba, iphethini yokopha elindelekile nokubuyela ekuzaleni ngohlobo lwendlela kubaluleke kakhulu kunenkomba yelabhorethri.
texts.t2202: uhlobo lwendlela → umthelela ekuvuthweni kweqanda, i-mucus, kanye ne-endometrium → iphethini yokopha kanye nezinga lokubuyela ekuzaleni

texts.t2204: ukuyeka indlela akuhlali kubuyisela umjikelezo ojwayelekile ngokushesha, kodwa ngemuva kwezindlela eziningi, ukuzala kubuyela ngokushesha
texts.t2206: ukukhulelwa okusolwayo ngesikhathi sokusetshenziswa noma ngemuva kokuyeka indlela
texts.t2207: ukungabikho komjikelezo isikhathi eside ngendlela engahambisani nendlela
texts.t2212: amaphethini alindelekile nomqondo ojwayelekile wezokwelapha angachazwa
texts.t2213: amaqhinga okuvimbela inzalo akufanele ashintshwe mathupha ngaphandle kokubheka iziphikiso kanye nezinhloso zomsebenzisi
texts.t2215: ngezinye izimpawu ezinzima, ukungabaza mayelana nokukhulelwa, noma ukungahambisani nephatheni elilindelekile, ukuhlolwa kwezokwelapha kuyadingeka
texts.t2216: ukopha ngenkathi usebenzisa ukuvimbela inzalo kuyingozi
texts.t2218: ngemuva kokuyeka ukuvimbela inzalo, kubalulekile ukulinda imijikelezo eminingana ngaphambi kokuzama ukukhulelwa

texts.t2221: uma umbuzo uphathelene nokuzama ukukhulelwa ngemuva kokuyeka → cabanga ngendlela ethile nokubuyela ekuzaleni

texts.t2223: ukwethembisa umphumela ofanayo kumjikelezo kuzo zonke izindlela
texts.t2224: ukwehluleka ukuxoxa ngokopha okuncane nokubuyela ekuzaleni kusengaphambili
texts.t2225: ukudida ukopha kokuyeka nokuyeka kokuya esikhathini kwemvelo
