texts.t2234: Kwakunikezwe okubalulekile ku-ACOG, CDC, kanye ne-ASRM; kulesi sigaba, kubalulekile ukuhlukanisa phakathi kwezinguquko ezilindelekile ezisekelwe endleleni, ukusebenza kahle kokuvimbela inzalo, nokubuyela ekuzaleni.
texts.t2243: izinguquko zomjikelezo ekusetshenzisweni kokuvimbela inzalo zihlala zihunyushwa ngohlobo lwendlela
texts.t2244: iphethini yokopha elindelekile nokopha okungelona elijwayelekile akufani
texts.t2245: uma uhlela ukukhulelwa, ukubuyela ekuzaleni kubaluleke kakhulu kunenganekwane yesidingo sokuhlanza umzimba
texts.t2246: chaza indlela, isikhathi sokuqala noma sokuyeka, kanye nohlobo lokopha
texts.t2248: uma ukukhulelwa kusolwayo, uma kukhona ukopha okukhulu noma ubuhlungu, dlulela ekuhlolweni kwezokwelapha
texts.t2250: ungathembisi izikhathi zokubuyisela umjikelezo ofanayo ngemuva kwazo zonke izindlela
texts.t2251: Iphutha eliyinhloko mayelana nokuvimbela inzalo nomjikelezo ukulindela noma iyiphi indlela ephumelelayo ukwenza izikhathi zibe njalo ngokuphelele; ngokusebenzayo, izindlela ezahlukene zenza amaphethini wokopha ahlukene, kwesinye isikhathi ahluke kakhulu.
texts.t2254: Uma ama-COC ethathwa kahle, ukuvuthwa kweqanda kuvame ukucindezelwa, futhi lokhu kuyindlela eyinhloko yokuvimbela inzalo yendlela.
texts.t2255: Ngamaphilisi aphuthelwe, ukuqala kwephakethe sekwephuzile, nezimo ezithile zokusetshenziswa, ukuvimbela ukuvuthwa kweqanda kungase kungathembeki kangako.
texts.t2256: Kuma-COC, ukuvuthwa kweqanda kuvame ukucindezelwa uma amaphilisi ethathwa kahle.
texts.t2257: Lokhu kuyiphuzu elibalulekile kwezokwelapha: ama-COC awahambisani 'nomjikelezo wemvelo' kodwa adala uhlelo lwamahomoni oluphathwayo. Ngakho-ke, ukopha kuma-COC akuyona imvume yokuthi ukuvuthwa kweqanda kwenzekile. Ngokuphambene, amaphutha okuthatha anganciphisa ukuvimbela ukuvuthwa kweqanda futhi andise ingozi yokukhulelwa.
texts.t2264: Ukopha kuma-COC ngesikhathi sekhefu lamahomoni kuvame ukuba ukopha kokuyeka, hhayi ukuya esikhathini kwemvelo okuvuthwa kweqanda.
texts.t2265: Kungase kube lula, kube mfushane, futhi kushintshe ngokuhamba kwesikhathi; ukuba khona kwayo akusho ukuthi umjikelezo kuma-COC uqhubeka ngokwemvelo.
texts.t2266: Kuma-COC, ngokuvamile kuba nokopha kokuhoxiswa kunokuthi kube nezikhathi ezijwayelekile.
texts.t2267: Lena ingenye yezinkolelo ezivamile ezingalungile. Ama-COC adala uhlelo oluphathwa ngamahomoni, ngakho-ke ukopha ngesikhathi sekhefu kwenzeka ngenxa yokuhoxiswa kwehomoni, hhayi ngenxa yomjikelezo wemvelo ophelele ngokukhishwa kweqanda. Yingakho kuvame ukuba lula futhi kube buhlungu kancane kunangaphambi kokuqala ama-COC.
texts.t2268: ukuntuleka kokopha ngemva kokuphuthelwa amaphilisi noma ingozi yokukhulelwa
texts.t2274: Ukopha okungajwayelekile ekuthinteni kuvame ukwenzeka ezinyangeni zokuqala zokusetshenziswa futhi kuvame kakhulu ezindleleni ezine-progestin kuphela.
texts.t2275: Ukopha okuncane kungaba umphumela olindelekile wokuzivumelanisa, kodwa ukopha okuqhubekayo, okukhulu, noma okushintshile kakhulu kudinga ukuhlolwa kokuthobela nezinye izimbangela.
texts.t2276: Ukopha okuncane ekuthinteni kuvame ukulindeleka, kodwa akuhlale kungabi yingozi.
texts.t2277: I-ACOG igcizelela ukuthi ukopha okuphukile kuvame kakhulu ekuqaleni kokusetshenziswa kwendlela yamahomoni nangezikhathi eziphuthelwe. Nokho, kubalulekile ukuhlukanisa ukuzivumelanisa okulindelekile ezimweni lapho ukopha kukhulu kakhulu, kuqhubekayo, noma kuhambisana nobuhlungu, okudinga ukuhlolwa okubanzi kwe-differential.
texts.t2284: Ama-IUD angashintsha kakhulu izikhathi, kodwa uhlobo lwezinguquko luncike ohlotsheni: ama-IUD e-hormonal nama-copper athinta umjikelezo ngendlela ehlukile.
texts.t2285: Ngakho-ke, umbuzo othi 'kuzokwenzekani ngezikhathi nge-IUD' uhlale udinga ukucaciswa ukuthi iyiphi idivayisi ethile ekukhuluma ngayo.
texts.t2286: Izinguquko zesikhathi nge-IUD zincike ekutheni iyinsimbi noma i-hormonal.
texts.t2287: Lena ingenye yamaphuzu abalulekile okubonisana. Abanye abantu balindele noma iyiphi i-IUD ukuthi inciphise ukopha, kanti abanye balindele noma iyiphi ukuthi ikhulise. Eqinisweni, iphethini incike kakhulu kumshini wendlela: i-IUD ye-hormonal ivame ukunciphisa ukopha, kanti eyensimbi ingase, ngokuphambene, ikhulise, ikakhulukazi ezinyangeni zokuqala.
texts.t2289: ubuhlungu obukhulu noma umkhuhlane ngemva kokufakwa
texts.t2295: I-IUD ye-hormonal ivame ukudala ukopha okuncane nokungajwayelekile ezinyangeni zokuqala, bese kuba baningi, inciphisa ivolumu yokuya esikhathini noma iholele ku-amenorrhea.
texts.t2296: Ukungabikho kwezikhathi ku-IUD ye-hormonal akusho ukuthi kunenkinga; kwabanye abasebenzisi, lokhu kuyisiphumo esilindelekile sendlela.
texts.t2297: I-IUD ye-hormonal ivame ukunciphisa ukopha ngokuhamba kwesikhathi.
texts.t2298: I-ACOG ichaza iphethini ejwayelekile: ukopha okuncane nokungajwayelekile kungenzeka ekuqaleni ngemva kokufakwa, futhi kamuva, ukopha kuvame ukuba lula kakhulu. Kwabanye abasebenzisi, izikhathi cishe ziyanyamalala. Lokhu kuhlukanisa i-IUD ye-hormonal neyensimbi futhi kubalulekile ukukhuluma ngaphambi kwesikhathi ukuze umphumela olindelekile ungathathwa njengesimptom esikhathazayo.
texts.t2300: isimpawu esisha esingazelelwe ngemva kwesikhathi esizinzile
texts.t2304: I-IUD yensimbi ingandisa ukopha nobuhlungu bezikhathi, ikakhulukazi ezinyangeni zokuqala ngemva kokufakwa.
texts.t2305: Uma umuntu esenazo izikhathi ezinzima kakhulu noma ezibuhlungu, leli phuzu libaluleke kakhulu uma ukhetha indlela.
texts.t2306: I-IUD yensimbi ingenza izikhathi zibe zinkulu, ikakhulukazi ekuqaleni.
texts.t2307: I-ACOG ibeka ngokusobala ukuthi ukopha nezikhathi ezibuhlungu kungase kwande ezinyangeni zokuqala nge-IUD yensimbi. Kwabanye, lokhu kuyisivumelwano esamukelekayo sendlela engeyona eye-hormonal; kwabanye, kuyisizathu sokukhetha okunye ukuvimbela inzalo. Ngakho-ke, iphrofayili yokuya esikhathini yokuqala ibaluleke kakhulu lapha.
texts.t2312: I-implant yokuvimbela inzalo ivame ukushintsha iphethini yokopha: ukopha okungajwayelekile, ukopha okungajwayelekile, noma i-amenorrhea kungenzeka.
texts.t2313: Iphuzu elibaluleke kakhulu lokubonisana ukuthi ukopha nge-implant kungaba okungalindelekile, okuyimbangela evame ukwaneliseka okuncane ngale ndlela.
texts.t2314: I-implant ivame ukushintsha umjikelezo uye ekophweni okungajwayelekile.
texts.t2315: Ngokuphambene nokulindela ukuthi 'njengoba indlela isebenza kahle kakhulu, izikhathi zizoba njalo,' i-implant ivame ukwenza ukopha kungabi nakho ukubikezela. Lokhu ngokuvamile akuyona ingozi ngokwalo kodwa kufanele kuxoxwe ngaphambi kwesikhathi ngoba ukubekezelela iphethini enjalo kuyinto yomuntu ngamunye.
texts.t2317: ukukhulelwa okusolwayo noma enye imbangela ye-AUB
texts.t2323: Ngemva kokuthintwa kwe-injectable, ukubuyela emuva kokukhishwa kweqanda kanye nethuba lokukhulelwa kungathatha isikhathi eside kunemva kwezinye izindlela eziningi.
texts.t2324: Ukubuyela emuva kokuzala okuhamba kancane kuvamile ku-DMPA; lokhu kubalulekile ukukucabangela ngaphambi kwezinhlelo zokuzala zesikhathi esizayo.
texts.t2325: Ngemva kokuthintwa kwe-injectable, umjikelezo nokuzala kungase kubuyiselwe kancane.
texts.t2326: I-ACOG ithi ngemva kokuyeka imijovo, ukukhulelwa kungase kungenzeki ngokushesha ngokwesilinganiso; ukubuyiselwa kuvame ukuthatha izinyanga. Lokhu akusho ukwehluleka kokuzala unomphela, kodwa uma uhlela ukukhulelwa, indlela kufanele ikhethwe ngokucabangela isikhathi.
texts.t2327: i-amenorrhea ende kakhulu ngemva kokuyeka + nezinye izimpawu
texts.t2333: Izindlela zokuvimbela inzalo azilawuleli amahomoni ngakho-ke akufanele zishintshe ngqo ukukhishwa kweqanda noma umjikelezo wemvelo.
texts.t2334: Uma umjikelezo ushintshile ngenkathi usebenzisa izindlela zokuvimbela inzalo kuphela, imbangela ehlukile ivamise ukufunwa kunokuthi ibangelwe yindlela.
texts.t2335: Izindlela zokuvimbela inzalo akufanele zishintshe ngqo umjikelezo wokuya esikhathini.
texts.t2336: Amakhondomu, ama-diaphragm, nezinye izindlela zokuvimbela inzalo zivimbela ukukhulelwa ngokomshini, kunokuphazamiseka nge-hypothalamus–pituitary–ovarian axis. Ngakho-ke, azisetshenziswa ukulawula umjikelezo futhi ngokuvamile azichazi izikhathi ezingajwayelekile. Okuphambene akuhlangene nomjikelezo, kodwa nenduduzo, izifo zokungezwani komzimba, noma ukuvuvukala kwendawo.
texts.t2337: ukuphazamiseka komjikelezo okusha ngaphandle kwembangela yamahomoni
texts.t2341: Izindlela zemvelo zokuvimbela inzalo nokulandelela ukukhishwa kweqanda
texts.t2343: Izindlela zemvelo zokuvimbela inzalo zithembele ekuqapheliseni iwindi elizalayo ngokusekelwe ezimpawini zomjikelezo futhi zidinga ukuzinikela, ukuqeqeshwa, nokuchazwa okufanele kwezimpawu zokukhishwa kweqanda.
texts.t2344: Azicindezeli ukukhishwa kweqanda kodwa azama ukugwema ucansi olungavikelekile ngezinsuku ezizalayo.
texts.t2345: Izindlela zokwazi ukuzala zisebenza ngokulandelela kunokucindezela amahomoni omjikelezo.
texts.t2346: I-ACOG igcizelela ukuthi izindlela zokwazi ukuzala zidinga ukuqeqeshwa nokuthobela imithetho ngokuqinile. Ukwehluleka lapha kuvame ukuthi akukhona ebhayoloji yendlela, kodwa kumuntu: ukuchazwa okungalungile kwe-mucus, ikhalenda, noma iwindi elizalayo kunciphisa ukwethembeka.
texts.t2347: izindleko eziphezulu zephutha uma kwenzeka ukukhulelwa okungahlosiwe
texts.t2348: imijikelezo engajwayelekile ngaphandle kwamakhono amahle okulandelela
texts.t2351: izindlela zemvelo zokuvimbela inzalo nokulandelela ukukhishwa kweqanda
texts.t2356: Indlela yekhalenda ayithembeki kakhulu kunamanye ama-conceptives amaningi esimanjemanje, ikakhulukazi ngemijikelezo engajwayelekile.
texts.t2357: Ngisho nasekusebenziseni okuhle, izindlela zokwazi ukuzala zincike endleleni nokuzinikela, futhi ngokusetshenziswa okujwayelekile, ukusebenza kahle kuphansi kakhulu kunokuthi nge-LARC nezindlela zamahomoni.
texts.t2358: Indlela yekhalenda ayibhekwa njengendlela ethembekile kakhulu yokuvimbela inzalo.
texts.t2359: I-ACOG ithi izindlela zokwazi ukuzala ngokuvamile azisebenzi kahle kunamanye amaningi ama-conceptives, futhi indlela yekhalenda ibuthakathaka ikakhulukazi uma ukukhishwa kweqanda kushintsha. Ngakho-ke, ikhalenda njengethuluzi elilodwa alifanele kahle labo abakhulelwa okwamanje okungathandeki kakhulu.
texts.t2364: Indlela yokuvimbela inzalo ephuthumayo ethinta kanjani ukukhishwa kweqanda
texts.t2366: Ukuthintwa kwe-inzalo ephuthumayo kungabambezela noma kuvimbele ukukhishwa kweqanda, futhi isikhathi esihlobene nokukhishwa kweqanda sithinta kakhulu ukusebenza kahle kwayo.
texts.t2367: Akuyona indlela yokuphelisa ukukhulelwa okukhona; inhloso yayo ukuvimbela ukukhulelwa ngaphambi kokufakwa.
texts.t2368: Ukuthintwa kwe-inzalo ephuthumayo kusebenza, ngokwengxenye, ngokushintsha noma ukubambezela ukukhishwa kweqanda.
texts.t2369: I-ACOG ibonisa ukuthi imithi yokuvimbela inzalo ephuthumayo, kuhlanganise ne-levonorgestrel ne-ulipristal, isebenza ikakhulukazi ngaphambi kokukhulelwa, kuhlanganise nokuthinta isikhathi sokukhishwa kweqanda. Ngakho-ke, lapho ukukhishwa kweqanda kusondele ekwenzekeni, ukusebenza kahle kwezinye izinhlelo kuncishisiwe.
texts.t2373: indlela yokuvimbela inzalo ephuthumayo ethinta kanjani ukukhishwa kweqanda
texts.t2376: Lapho umjikelezo ubuyiselwa ngemva kokuyeka ukuvimbela inzalo
texts.t2378: Ngemva kokuyeka ukuvimbela inzalo, isikhathi sokubuyiselwa komjikelezo sincike endleleni: ngemva kwezindlela eziningi, ukuzala kubuyela ngokushesha, kuyilapho ngemva kokuthintwa kwe-injectable, kungathatha isikhathi eside.
texts.t2379: Kubalulekile ukuhlukanisa phakathi kokubuyiselwa kokuzala nokubuyiselwa kwephethini yokopha ejwayelekile—akuhlali kuyinto efanayo.
texts.t2380: Umjikelezo ngemva kokuyeka ukuvimbela inzalo ubuyiselwa ngezinga elihlukile kuye ngendlela.
texts.t2381: Ngemva kwe-COC, ama-implant, nama-IUD, ukukhishwa kweqanda nethuba lokukhulelwa kuvame ukubuyela ngokushesha. Nokho, umuzwa wokuthi 'umjikelezo wami awukabi njengakuqala' ungase uqhubeke, ikakhulukazi uma ukuvimbela inzalo ngaphambili kufihla ukungajwayelekile okungaphansi. Ngemva kokuthintwa kwe-injectable, ukubuyiselwa kuvame ukuba kancane, futhi lokhu kufanele kucatshangelwe ngaphambi kwesikhathi.
texts.t2383: ukuntuleka komjikelezo isikhathi eside ngemva kwe-DMPA
texts.t2385: lapho umjikelezo ubuyiselwa ngemva kokuyeka ukuvimbela inzalo
texts.t2388: Lapho ungahlela ukukhulelwa ngemva kokuyeka ukuvimbela inzalo
texts.t2389: Ukuhlela ukukhulelwa ngemva kokuyeka ukuvimbela inzalo
texts.t2390: Ngemva kokuyeka izindlela eziningi zokuvimbela inzalo, ungahlela ukukhulelwa ngokushesha, kodwa okulindelwe mayelana nesikhathi sokubuyiselwa kokukhishwa kweqanda kufanele kuthathe indlela ethile.
texts.t2391: Kwezinye izindlela, akukho mthetho wezokwelapha ophoqelekile wokulinda imijikelezo eminingana nje 'ukuhlanza umzimba'; okuhlukile okubalulekile ekubaleni okusebenzayo ukuthintwa kwe-injectable ngokubuyiselwa kokuzala okuhamba kancane.
texts.t2392: Ngemva kokuyeka izindlela eziningi, ungakwazi ukuqala i-TTC ngaphandle kwekhefu eliphoqelekile.
texts.t2393: Iseluleko esisebenzayo sincike hhayi enganekwaneni yokuhlanza umzimba, kodwa endleleni nezinhlelo zokuzala. Uma ukukhulelwa kufiswa ngokushesha, kubaluleke kakhulu ukuqala i-folic acid, ukubuyekeza imithi, nokuqonda ukuthi ukukhishwa kweqanda kuvame ukubuyela ngokushesha ngemva kwendlela ethile. Ku-DMPA, isikhathi sivame ukuba side kunesibulala, i-implant, noma i-IUD.

texts.t2402: Umjikelezo ungathinteka izidakamizwa zamahomoni, ama-antipsychotic, ama-antidepressant, izidakamizwa ze-thyroid, ama-glucocorticosteroids, nezinto ezithile ezithinta i-prolactin, ukukhishwa kweqanda, noma ukopha.
texts.t2403: Izidakamizwa zingashintsha imvamisa yezikhathi, ivolumu yokopha, ukukhishwa kweqanda, noma zibangele ukopha okuncane. Ngakho-ke, lapho kuvela ukungajwayelekile komjikelezo okusha, kuhlale kuwusizo ukubuyekeza uhlu lwezidakamizwa.
texts.t2404: Izidakamizwa eziningi zingashintsha iphethini yokuya esikhathini.
texts.t2405: Akuzona zonke izinguquko zomjikelezo ezihlobene nesifo sohlelo lokuzala ngokwalo. Kwesinye isikhathi isihluthulelo sephazili yisidakamizwa esisha noma esishintshile muva nje. Izinguquko zomjikelezo zivame kakhulu ngezinto zamahomoni, izidakamizwa ezithinta i-prolactin, nezidakamizwa ezishintsha ukukhishwa kweqanda noma uhlobo lwe-endometrium.

texts.t2465: Iphutha eliyinhloko mayelana nezidakamizwa nomjikelezo noma ukweqisa noma yimuphi umphumela ongemuhle njengengozi noma, ngokuphambene, ukubeka zonke izinguquko ekuzivumelaneni okujwayelekile ngaphandle kokuhlola isimo sezokwelapha.
texts.t2468: Ama-NSAID abhekwa njengenye yezindlela zokuqala zokwelapha izikhathi ezibuhlungu ngoba anciphisa ubuhlungu obuphakathi kwe-prostaglandin.
texts.t2469: Ziwusizo kakhulu uma ziqalwa ekuqaleni kwezimpawu noma kusengaphambili uma umjikelezo ubikezelwa. Zisiza kokubili ubuhlungu futhi, ngokwengxenye, ukopha okukhulu.
texts.t2471: I-ACOG igcizelela ukuthi i-ibuprofen namanye ama-NSAID asebenza kangcono uma ethathwa ngesikhathi kunokulinda kuze kube ubuhlungu bube bukhulu kakhulu. Nokho, uma ubuhlungu bukhulu njalo ngenyanga, abuphenduli kuma-NSAID, noma buhambisana nezinye izimpawu, kuyisizathu sokufuna imbangela yesibili kunokushintsha amaphilisi nje.
texts.t2473: isilonda esiswini noma izimo eziphikisanayo zesitho sokuhlunga
texts.t2480: Ama-antispasmodics axoxwa ngawo ngobuhlungu bokuya esikhathini, kodwa indima yawo ngokuvamile ayibalulekile kangako futhi ayisekelwe kangako kunaleyo yama-NSAID.
texts.t2481: Uma ubuhlungu buvame ukuphakathi kwe-prostaglandin, ama-NSAID ngokuvamile abhekwa njengendlela yokuqala. Ama-antispasmodics angasetshenziswa njengenye inketho yezimpawu ezithile kwezinye izinhlelo.
texts.t2482: Ama-antispasmodics awathathi indawo yokuhlola okuyisisekelo kwembangela yobuhlungu.
texts.t2483: Ngama-cramps omjikelezo, abantu bavame ukusebenzisa ama-antispasmodics ngenxa yokujwayela. Nokho, lo mqondo wezokwelapha uvame ukubeka phambili ama-NSAID ngoba aqondisa umshini oyinhloko we-dysmenorrhea yokuqala. Uma umuntu ethembele kuphela kuma-antispasmodics futhi ubuhlungu buhlala bukhulu, ubuhlungu besibili kufanele bucabangele futhi isu lokuphatha libuyekezwe.
texts.t2491: Izidakamizwa zamahomoni zingasetshenziswa ukulawula ukopha, ukuvimba ukukhishwa kweqanda, ukunciphisa ubuhlungu, nokuvikela i-endometrium, kodwa ukukhetha kuncike embangeni yokuphazamiseka komjikelezo.
texts.t2492: Azilungisi nje umjikelezo ukuze ube lula: kwesinye isikhathi zisetshenziswa ukwelapha i-AUB, i-dysmenorrhea, i-PCOS, nezinye izimo.
texts.t2493: Ukulawulwa komjikelezo wamahomoni kuncike enhlosweni yezokwelapha.
texts.t2494: Ukubeka isidakamizwa samahomoni ngaphandle kokuqonda inhloso kuyiphutha elijwayelekile. Kuhlukile ukwelapha ukopha okukhulu, okunye ukuvimba ukukhishwa kweqanda, nokwesithathu ukulawula ukopha okungakhishwa kweqanda noma ukusiza ngobuhlungu. Ngakho-ke, ikilasi elifanayo lezidakamizwa lingase lifanele kwesinye isimo futhi lingaxazululi inkinga kwesinye.
texts.t2504: Izidakamizwa ze-Progestin ne-progesterone zisetshenziswa ezimweni ezihlukene: ukulawula ukopha, ukuvikela i-endometrium ekukhishweni kweqanda, ukuvimbela inzalo, nakwezinye izinqubo zokuzala.
texts.t2505: Igama livakala lifana, kodwa izinhloso zezokwelapha nezinhlelo zokusebenza ziyahlukahluka kakhulu.
texts.t2506: Izidakamizwa ze-Progesterone azisetshenziswa ngenhloso eyodwa evamile.
texts.t2507: Zingasetshenziswa njengengxenye yomjikelezo wokuvuselela ukopha, njengengxenye yokuvimbela inzalo, njengendlela yokuzinzisa i-endometrium, noma njengengxenye yokwelashwa kokuzala. Ngakho-ke, umbuzo uhlale ungowokuthi 'ngabe i-progesterone iyadingeka noma cha', kodwa 'yisiphi isidakamizwa, kumthamo onjani, kungani, futhi kumongo muni'.
texts.t2515: Ama-COC ashintsha umjikelezo ngokuvimba ukukhishwa kweqanda futhi ahlinzeka ngohlelo oluphathwa ngamahomoni, ngakho-ke ukopha kuwo akufani nokuya esikhathini ngokwemvelo.
texts.t2516: Ama-COC avame ukunciphisa ubuhlungu, ukopha, nokungajwayelekile, kodwa angabangela ukopha okuphukile, ikakhulukazi ekuqaleni noma uma amaphilisi ephuthelwa.
texts.t2517: Ama-COC adala umjikelezo olawulwa ngokufakelwa kunokuthi abuyisele umjikelezo wemvelo.
texts.t2518: Ama-COC angenza umjikelezo ube njalo ngaphandle, kodwa awalungisi ngempela imbangela engaphansi yokungajwayelekile. Ngakho-ke, ngemva kokuyeka, iphethini eyayikhona ngaphambili ivame ukuvela futhi. Lapho uqala ama-COC, ukopha okuncane ezinyangeni zokuqala akuyona into engavamile, ikakhulukazi uma amaphilisi ephuthelwa.
texts.t2519: izinhlungu ezinzima ezintsha noma izimpawu ze-thrombotic
texts.t2526: Ama-mini-pills nezinye izindlela ezine-progestin kuphela zivame ukubangela ukopha okungajwayelekile, ikakhulukazi ekuqaleni kokusetshenziswa.
texts.t2527: Iphethini enjalo ingalindeleka, kodwa ukopha okuqhubekayo kudinga ukubuyekezwa kokuthobela, isikhathi, nezinye izimbangela ze-AUB.
texts.t2528: Ukopha okungajwayelekile kuma-mini-pills kuwumphumela ongemuhle ojwayelekile.
texts.t2529: I-ACOG ibeka ngokusobala ukuthi izindlela ezine-progestin kuphela zingabangela ukopha okuncane nokungajwayelekile, ikakhulukazi ngonyaka wokuqala. Lokhu akuhlali kuyingozi, kodwa uma ukopha kuba kukhulu, kuqhubekayo, noma kukhathaza kakhulu, kuyadingeka ukuhlola hhayi indlela kuphela kodwa nokunemba kokuthatha nezinye izimbangela ezingaba khona.
texts.t2530: ukushintsha okungazelelwe kwephethini ngenkathi usebenzisa indlela
texts.t2536: Ngemva kokuthintwa kwe-inzalo ephuthumayo, umjikelezo ungashintsha okwesikhashana: izikhathi zingafika ngaphambi kwesikhathi noma kamuva, futhi ukopha okuncane nokungajwayelekile kwesikhashana kungenzeka.
texts.t2537: Lokhu kuyisiphenduli esivamile sesikhashana, kodwa ubuhlungu obukhulu, ukopha okungajwayelekile kakhulu, noma ukubambezeleka okuqhubekayo kudinga ukuhlolwa okwengeziwe.
texts.t2538: Ukuthintwa kwe-inzalo ephuthumayo kungashintsha okwesikhashana umjikelezo.
texts.t2539: I-ACOG ibonisa ukuthi ukopha okungajwayelekile noma okuncane ngemva kwamaphilisi e-EC kungenzeka. Nokho, i-EC akufanele ibe yincazelo ejwayelekile yanoma yimuphi ubuhlungu noma ukubambezeleka okuqhubekayo. Uma isikhathi sibambezeleka kakhulu, kufanele kuthathwe ukuhlolwa kokukhulelwa; uma kukhona ubuhlungu obungashadile noma ukuwa, ukukhulelwa okuyinkimbinkimbi kufanele kukhishwe.
texts.t2544: Ama-antidepressant awabhekwa njengembangela eyinhloko ejwayelekile yokuphazamiseka komjikelezo, kodwa kwabanye abantu, angashintsha iphethini yokuya esikhathini ngokungaqondile ngemiphumela ku-prolactin, isisindo, ukulala, i-libido, nengcindezi.
texts.t2545: Iphuzu eliyinhloko elisebenzayo ukubheka isikhathi: ngabe umjikelezo ushintshile ngemva kokuqala noma ukushintsha isidakamizwa?
texts.t2546: Isixhumanisi phakathi kwama-antidepressant nomjikelezo sivame ukuba ngokungaqondile kunokuthi siqonde ngqo.
texts.t2547: Iqiniso lokuthatha i-antidepressant akuchazi ngokuzenzakalelayo noma yimuphi umjikelezo ongajwayelekile. Nokho, uma izinguquko ziqale ngemva kokubekwa, ikakhulukazi kanye neminye imiphumela engemihle, ukubuyekezwa kwezidakamizwa kuba yingxenye enengqondo yokuhlolwa. Ngokuhambisana, umuntu akufanele akhohlwe ukuthi ukucindezeleka, ingcindezi, nezinguquko esisindweni nasekulaleni nazo zithinta umjikelezo ngokwazo.
texts.t2556: Ama-antipsychotic angakhuphula i-prolactin ngaleyo ndlela abangele i-amenorrhea, i-oligomenorrhea, ukungakhishwa kweqanda, ne-galactorrhea.
texts.t2557: Uma umjikelezo uphazamisekile ngenkathi uthatha i-antipsychotic, i-prolactin iba enye yezincazelo ezibalulekile ezidinga ukuhlolwa.
texts.t2559: Lo ngumshini ojwayelekile wokuphazamiseka komjikelezo okubangelwa izidakamizwa. Ngokusebenzayo, kubalulekile ukungayeki izidakamizwa ze-psychiatric ngokwakho, kodwa ukuxoxa ngezimpawu nodokotela abelaphi: kwesinye isikhathi kuyadingeka ukukala i-prolactin, ukubuyekeza uhlelo, noma ukuhlola ezinye izimbangela, ikakhulukazi uma kukhona izinhlungu zekhanda noma izikhalazo zokubona.
texts.t2565: Izidakamizwa ze-thyroid azithinti umjikelezo ngqo njengezokuthintwa kwezinzalo, kodwa ngokulungiswa kwesimo se-thyroid, esithinta ngokwaso ukukhishwa kweqanda nokopha.
texts.t2566: Uma umsebenzi we-thyroid uzinzile, umjikelezo nawo uba nokubikezela okwengeziwe kwabanye abantu.
texts.t2567: Izinguquko ezikhathini ngesikhathi sokwelashwa kwe-thyroid zivame ukubonisa izinguquko emsebenzini we-thyroid kunokuba umphumela ongemuhle ohlukile.
texts.t2568: Ngokwesayensi, kubalulekile ukuhumusha lokhu ngomongo: ukonakala noma ukuthuthuka kungase kuhlobene ne-hypo- noma i-hyperthyroidism engalashwa, hhayi iphilisi kuphela. Ngakho-ke, umbuzo ngokuvamile awukona ukuthi uyeke isidakamizwa, kodwa ukuthi ukulungiswa kwesimo se-thyroid kuyanele yini.
texts.t2574: Ama-glucocorticosteroids angathinta umjikelezo ngokungaqondile nge-stress hormone axis, isisindo, i-metabolism, nesimo esijwayelekile, nakuba engayona imbangela ejwayelekile yokuphazamiseka komjikelezo kuphela.
texts.t2575: Uma ukuphazamiseka komjikelezo kuvela ngesikhathi sokwelashwa kwesistimu eside, kuhlolwa kanye nesifo esingaphansi kanye nomongo we-endocrine jikelele.
texts.t2576: Ama-glucocorticosteroids angaba yingxenye ye-differential yokuphazamiseka komjikelezo okuhlobene nezidakamizwa.
texts.t2577: Ngokusebenzayo, kubalulekile ukungakuhumushi lokhu ngokuncane kakhulu: umjikelezo ungashintsha hhayi nje kusuka esidakamizweni uqobo kodwa futhi kusuka esifweni esingaphansi sokuvuvukala, izinguquko esisindweni, ingcindezi, nezidakamizwa ezihambisana nazo. Ngakho-ke, ukuhlolwa kuhlale kuphelele.
texts.t2578: i-amenorrhea eqhubekayo noma i-AUB ngesikhathi sokwelashwa kwesikhathi eside
texts.t2583: Izidakamizwa zokukhishwa kweqanda zisetshenziswa ekukhishweni kweqanda noma ukukhishwa kweqanda okungajwayelekile, kodwa zidinga ukukhethwa okufanele kwesiguli nokubhekwa.
texts.t2584: Lezi akuzona amaphilisi ajwayelekile okusheshisa ukukhulelwa, kodwa amathuluzi okukhishwa kweqanda anezinkomba ezithile nezingozi.
texts.t2585: Ukukhishwa kweqanda kuyindlela eqondisiwe yokwelapha ukungazali okukhishwa kweqanda.
texts.t2586: Umlando oyinhloko: qonda kuqala imbangela yokuntuleka kokukhishwa kweqanda, bese ukhetha isidakamizwa esifanele nohlelo. Izingozi zihlanganisa ukukhulelwa okuningi, izinguquko ze-cystic, futhi ngezinye izinhlelo, i-OHSS; ngakho-ke, ukuvuselela akunakuncishiswa kumyalo ojwayelekile wokuthatha okuthile kokukhishwa kweqanda.
texts.t2588: ubuhlungu, ukuvuvukala, noma ukuphefumula okufushane ngesikhathi sokuvuselela
texts.t2594: I-Clomiphene iyisidakamizwa esijwayelekile sokukhishwa kweqanda, kodwa kwezinye izimo, ikakhulukazi ku-PCOS, i-letrozole manje ibhekwa njengenketho yokuqala efanele.
texts.t2595: I-Clomiphene ayisebenzi ngendlela efanayo kuwo wonke umuntu futhi idinga ukuqonda impendulo yokukhishwa kweqanda, izingozi, nezinhloso zokwelashwa.
texts.t2596: I-Clomiphene ayiyona inketho yokuqala yazo zonke izimo zokukhishwa kweqanda.
texts.t2597: Ngokomlando, i-clomiphene yayisetshenziswa kabanzi ekukhishweni kweqanda. Manje, umqondo weseluleko usucace kakhudlwana: isibonelo, ekungazaleni okungakhishwa kweqanda okuhlobene ne-PCOS, i-letrozole ivame ukuncanyelwa. Nokho, i-clomiphene isalokhu ibalulekile njengesikhali kumongo wezokwelapha othile.
texts.t2605: I-Letrozole ingenye yezidakamizwa ezibalulekile zokukhishwa kweqanda, futhi ku-PCOS ivame ukubhekwa njengenketho yokuqala yokukhishwa kweqanda.
texts.t2606: Ayibekelwa umgomo othi 'okunamandla, kungcono'; isebenza ngaphakathi kwezinhlelo ezithile nokubhekwa.
texts.t2607: I-Letrozole iyisidakamizwa esibalulekile sokuqala sokukhishwa kweqanda ku-PCOS.
texts.t2608: Izinkombandlela zesimanjemanje zigcizelela indima ye-letrozole ekuphatheni ukungazali okungakhishwa kweqanda ku-PCOS. Lokhu akusho ukuthi iyadingeka kuwo wonke umuntu onomjikelezo ongajwayelekile. Okokuqala, inhloso iqinisekiswa: ukuthi inkinga ngempela iwukuphazamiseka kokukhishwa kweqanda nokuthi kukhona yini ezinye izici zokungazali.
texts.t2610: ubuhlungu, ukuvuvukala, noma impendulo engajwayelekile ekukhuthazeni
texts.t2615: Umjovo we-hCG njengesikhuthazi usetshenziswa ezinhlelweni zokuvuselela ukukhuthaza ukuvuthwa kokugcina kwe-oocyte nesenzakalo sokukhishwa kweqanda esihlelwe.
texts.t2616: Kuyithuluzi lesikhathi esilawulwayo, hhayi ukwelashwa okuvamile kwekhaya komjikelezo ongajwayelekile.
texts.t2617: Isikhuthazi se-hCG sisetshenziswa ezinhlelweni zokuzala ezibhekiwe.
texts.t2618: Ngokusebenzayo, inani lesikhuthazi ukuthi lisiza ukuvumelanisa isikhathi sokukhishwa kweqanda nocansi, i-IUI, noma ezinye izigaba zokwelashwa. Nokho, ayibekelwa ngokungahleliwe: ukubhekwa kwe-follicle, ukuqonda ingozi yokuvuselela ngokweqile, nenhloso yohlelo kuyadingeka.
texts.t2619: Izimpawu ze-OHSS noma ukuvuvukala okungazelelwe nokuphefumula okufushane
texts.t2625: I-Metformin ku-PCOS ixoxwa kakhulu njengesengezo se-metabolic, esingasiza umjikelezo nokukhishwa kweqanda kwabanye iziguli, kodwa akuyona enye into yokukhishwa kweqanda.
texts.t2626: Uma inhloso eyinhloko ukukhulelwa, isu lincike esithombeni esigcwele, hhayi nje ukuba khona kwe-PCOS nokumelana ne-insulin.
texts.t2627: I-Metformin ku-PCOS akuyona nje iphilisi lezikhathi.
texts.t2628: Umlando weseluleko ku-PCOS wakhiwe ngokuzungeza iphrofayili yezimpawu: izinhloso ze-metabolic, umjikelezo, ukukhishwa kweqanda, umongo ohlobene nesisindo. I-Metformin ingasiza abanye abantu, ikakhulukazi ngezici ze-metabolic, kodwa akuhlali kuyisinyathelo sokuqala esisebenzayo ngokukhethekile sokukhulelwa.
texts.t2630: Imiphumela emibi ye-GI nokuntuleka kohlelo olucacile
texts.t2636: Ezikhathini ezinzima, insimbi ivame ukuhlolwa futhi igcwaliswe uma kunokuntuleka kwensimbi noma i-anemia, kodwa insimbi ngokwayo ayiphathisi imbangela yokopha okukhulu.
texts.t2637: Lokhu kuyingxenye yokuphathwa okusekelayo futhi okuvame ukubaluleka, ikakhulukazi ezimweni zokukhathala, ububende, ukuphefumula okufushane, kanye ne-ferritin noma i-hemoglobin ephansi.
texts.t2638: Insimbi iphathe imiphumela yokulahlekelwa igazi, hhayi umthombo wokopha.
texts.t2639: Ku-HMB, iphutha lezokwelapha ukwelapha kuphela ngamaphilisi obuhlungu nokunganaki ukulahlekelwa kwensimbi okuqhubekayo. Uma umuntu ekhathele, ebubende, ephefumula ngokushesha, enokushaya kwenhliziyo okusheshayo, noma ukuntuleka kuqinisekisiwe elebhu, ukulungiswa kwensimbi kuba yingxenye yohlelo kanye nokuhlola imbangela yokopha.
texts.t2641: insimbi yokopha okukhulu kokuya esikhathini ne-anemia
texts.t2644: Yiziphi izithasiselo ezivame ukuxoxwa ngazo nge-PMS
texts.t2646: I-Magnesium, i-vitamin B6, i-calcium, nezinye izithasiselo zivame ukuxoxwa ngazo nge-PMS, kodwa izinga lobufakazi bezindlela ezihlukene liyahlukahluka, futhi ukuphepha nomthamo kubaluleke njengokuduma.
texts.t2647: Izithasiselo akufanele zithathe indawo yokuhlolwa kwe-PMS noma i-PMDD uma izimpawu zikhulu noma ziyingozi.
texts.t2649: Ngomongo we-PMS, kulula ukuwela ekuhloleni okungapheli. Indlela ewusizo kakhulu ukuqonda kuqala ubukhulu bezimpawu, ugcine idayari, uxoxe ngokulala, ubuhlungu, nesimo sengqondo, bese ukhetha izinketho ezincane ezizwakalayo kunokuthatha konke ngasikhathi sinye. Kubaluleke kakhulu ukukhumbula ukusebenzisana nemithamo edlulele.
texts.t2651: yiziphi izithasiselo ezivame ukuxoxwa ngazo nge-pms
texts.t2654: Kungani izidakamizwa kufanele zihlolwe nodokotela ngokucabangela umjikelezo
texts.t2656: Izidakamizwa kufanele zihlolwe nodokotela ngokucabangela umjikelezo ngoba isidakamizwa esifanayo singaba usizo kwesinye isimo futhi sibe yinkinga kwesinye—kuye ngenhloso, iminyaka, izimo eziphikisanayo, izinhloso zokukhishwa kweqanda, nezimo ezihambisana nazo.
texts.t2657: Umjikelezo awuyona ingxenye ehlukile kodwa uyingxenye yesistimu ye-endocrine nezokuzala jikelele; ngakho-ke, ukuhlolwa kwezidakamizwa kudinga umongo.
texts.t2658: Ukubuyekezwa kwezidakamizwa ngokucabangela umjikelezo kuyadingeka ukuze kubalansiswe inzuzo, ingozi, nezinhloso zokuzala.
texts.t2659: Lokhu kubaluleke kakhulu uma kunezinhlelo zokukhulelwa, i-amenorrhea, i-HMB, ubuhlungu obungapheli, ukwelashwa kwesimo sengqondo, noma isifo se-endocrine. Udokotela uhlola hhayi isidakamizwa uqobo kuphela kodwa nokuthi kungani sidingeka, yini esivele ishintshile kumjikelezo, ukuthi kukhona yini izimo eziphikisanayo, uma kubhekwa kuyadingeka, nokuthi isidakamizwa sifihla inkinga ejulile yini.
texts.t2661: ukuphazamiseka komjikelezo okuqhubekayo ngemva kokuqala isidakamizwa
texts.t2662: kungani izidakamizwa kufanele zihlolwe nodokotela ngokucabangela umjikelezo
texts.t2667: I-Amenorrhea ukungabi bikho kokukhulelwa, futhi ngokwezokwelapha, ukukhulelwa kufanele kuhlolwe kuqala, kulandele ukufuna imbangela emgudwini we-hypothalamus–pituitary–ovaries–uterus.
texts.t2668: I-Amenorrhea yisimpawu, hhayi isifo esizimele. Ingahambisana nokukhulelwa, i-PCOS, i-hyperprolactinemia, izifo ze-thyroid, ukuphazamiseka kwe-hypothalamic, kanye ne-POI.
texts.t2669: I-Amenorrhea ukungabi bikho kokukhulelwa ngesikhathi esilindelekile.
texts.t2670: I-ACOG ne-ASRM bagcizelela ukuthi i-amenorrhea ayinakuchazwa ngokucindezeleka noma isisindo kuphela ngaphandle kokuhlola umehluko oyisisekelo. I-amenorrhea yesibili ivame ukufuna ukuqeda ukukhulelwa kuqala, bese kuhlolwa umlando, isisindo, ukucindezeleka, imithi, ama-hormone, futhi kwenziwe i-ultrasound uma kunesidingo. Uma ukukhulelwa kungabikho isikhathi eside, kubaluleke kakhulu ukuhlaziya okuhlelekile kwembangela.
texts.t2671: ukuguquka okuqhubekayo komjikelezo kuyisikhumbuzo sezokwelapha, hhayi nje ukuphazamiseka
texts.t2672: ezinye izimbangela zihlobene nokuphazamiseka kokukhulelwa, ezinye zine-pathology ye-uterine
texts.t2673: ukukhulelwa kungenye yezinto zokuqala okufanele ziqedwe uma kunokungajwayelekile komjikelezo
texts.t2674: uma umjikelezo usuphenduke ongajwayelekile noma ongajwayelekile
texts.t2675: uma kuba khona ukopha okukhulu, okuphindaphindiwe, noma okuphakathi
texts.t2676: uma kunobuhlungu, izimpawu zokungalingani kwe-hormonal, noma izinhlelo zokukhulelwa
texts.t2681: ubuhlungu, i-galactorrhea, izimpawu ze-hyperandrogenism, ukuguquka kwesisindo
texts.t2682: ukucindezeleka, imithi, ukuzalwa, ukukhishwa kokukhulelwa, ukuyeka ukuvimbela ukukhulelwa
texts.t2683: Ngokungajwayelekile komjikelezo, akugcini nje ngamanani elebhu abalulekile, kodwa futhi iphethini yokopha, ukukhulelwa, ubuhlungu, kanye nomongo wezokwelapha jikelele.
texts.t2686: izifo ze-endocrine, metabolic, structural, kanye ne-iatrogenic → zishintsha imvamisa, ivolumu, noma ubukhona bokopha
texts.t2687: ukuphambuka komjikelezo owodwa kungaba ukwehluka kwesikhashana
texts.t2688: iphethini eqhubekayo yokuphambuka ivame ukufuna ukuhlolwa kwezokwelapha kwembangela
texts.t2691: umjikelezo onobuhlungu, ukungabi nabantwana, i-hyperandrogenism, noma izimpawu zesistimu
texts.t2697: izincazelo, izindlela eziyisisekelo, nemihlahlandlela yokuhlola ingachazwa
texts.t2698: isigwebo sokugcina asikwazi ukwenziwa ngokuguquka komjikelezo owodwa kuphela ngaphandle kokuhlolwa kwezokwelapha
texts.t2699: ukuphazamiseka kwesikhathi esisodwa kuvame ukuvumela ukubhekwa
texts.t2700: ukuphazamiseka okuvame ukuphindaphinda, ikakhulukazi ngezimpawu ezibomvu, kudinga ukuhamba ekwahloleni okuhlelekile
texts.t2703: ngemuva kokucindezeleka, ukuzalwa, noma ukuyeka ama-COC, umuntu angachitha iminyaka ngaphandle kokuhlola lutho
texts.t2705: uma ukuphazamiseka kuhlukanisiwe futhi kunganazo izimpawu → bheka iphethini
texts.t2706: uma ukuphazamiseka kuqhubeka → hlola ukuthi kuyimbangela yokukhulelwa, yokwakheka, ye-endocrine, noma ye-iatrogenic
texts.t2707: uma izimpawu ezibomvu zikhona → hlola ngokuphuthumayo
texts.t2710: ukubambezeleka kokuhlolwa ezimweni zemijikelezo emide nezinhlelo zokukhulelwa
texts.t2713: thola uhlobo lokuphazamiseka: ukungabi bikho, ukungajwayelekile, imvamisa, ivolumu, okuphakathi, noma ubuhlungu
texts.t2715: cabanga ngokukhulelwa, iminyaka, izinhlelo zokuzala, nezimpawu ezibomvu
texts.t2719: bese, ukuhumusha kwezokwelapha nokuthi nini ukufuna usizo lwezokwelapha
texts.t2720: Kwakunikezwe okubalulekile ku-ACOG, ASRM, ESHRE, Endocrine Society, kanye ne-StatPearls; kulesi sigaba, kubalulekile ukuhlukanisa phakathi kokuphazamiseka kokukhulelwa, i-AUB yesakhiwo, nezimbangela ze-endocrine zesistimu.
texts.t2727: ukungajwayelekile komjikelezo kufanele kuchazwe kuqala ngohlobo: ukungabi bikho, ukungajwayelekile, imvamisa, ivolumu, ukopha phakathi, noma ubuhlungu
texts.t2728: okulandelayo, kubalulekile ukuhlukanisa phakathi kwezimbangela zokwakheka nezokukhulelwa/endocrine
texts.t2731: khipha ukukhulelwa nezimbangela ze-endocrine eziyisisekelo ezimweni ze-amenorrhea/oligomenorrhea
texts.t2732: bheka i-pathology yesakhiwo ezimweni ze-AUB nobuhlungu
texts.t2733: ungaziduduzi ngokucabanga ukuthi ukungajwayelekile kungaba ngenxa yokucindezeleka
texts.t2734: ungacabangi ukuthi izikhathi ezinzima noma ezingavamile azinangozi ngokuzenzakalelayo
texts.t2735: Iphutha eliyinhloko lezokwelapha mayelana nokungajwayelekile komjikelezo ukubheka kuphela ikhalenda nokungaboni ukuthi isibonakaliso esifanayo singabonisa ukwehluka kwesikhashana kanye ne-pathology ye-endocrine, yokwakheka, noma ehlobene nobuhlungu.
texts.t2738: I-Oligomenorrhea ibhekisela ekukhulelweni okungavamile, okuvame ukukhombisa ukuphazamiseka kokukhulelwa noma ukuphazamiseka kokukhulelwa.
texts.t2739: Izikhathi ezingavamile azilona nje ikhalenda elingaphatheki kahle, kodwa isikhumbuzo sezokwelapha ngezinkinga ezingaba khona zokukhulelwa, i-PCOS, isitho se-thyroid, i-prolactin, isisindo, noma ukucindezeleka.
texts.t2741: Empeleni, i-oligomenorrhea ivame ukuhlotshaniswa nokungakhulelwa noma ukukhulelwa okungavamile. Lokhu kubaluleke kakhulu uma uhlela ukukhulelwa nokuhlola ingozi ye-hyperplasia ye-endometrial uma ukopha kungavamile futhi kungalindelekile. Ukungajwayelekile komjikelezo ngokwawo kuyisizathu sokuhlola izimbangela, kunokuba nje uphile ngekhalenda elide.
texts.t2749: I-Polymenorrhea ibhekisela ekukhulelweni okungavamile ngokweqile, futhi kudinga ukuhlukanisa umjikelezo omfushane kodwa okhulelwayo ekuphazamisekeni okungajwayelekile kokopha kwe-uterine.
texts.t2750: Izikhathi ezivame kakhulu zingahambisana nokuphazamiseka kokukhulelwa, izimbangela zokwakheka, noma ezinye izinhlobo ze-AUB.
texts.t2751: I-Polymenorrhea iwukuphindaphinda okungavamile phakathi kwezikhathi zokopha.
texts.t2752: Kubalulekile ukungadidanisi ukukhulelwa njengomjikelezo nanoma yikuphi ukuphindaphinda kokopha. Izikhathi zokopha ezivame kakhulu zingaba ukuphuma kwegazi phakathi, i-AUB, noma umphumela we-pathology yesakhiwo. Ngakho-ke, umsebenzi wezokwelapha ukuthola ukuthi yini ngempela ebhekwa njengenkathi nokuthi ukopha kuhambisana kahle kanjani nokukhulelwa kwangempela.
texts.t2753: ukopha okuphindaphindiwe kunokujwayelekile izikhathi eziningana ezilandelanayo
texts.t2760: I-Menorrhagia ibhekisela ekukhulelweni okukhulu, okungaholela ku-anemia, ubuthakathaka, kanye nokwehla okukhulu kwekhwalithi yokuphila.
texts.t2761: Ubukhulu bunqunywa hhayi kuphela ngama-milliliters, kodwa ngokuthi iziphi izindlela zokuhlanzeka kufanele zishintshwe ngokushesha, ukuthi ngabe kukhona amahlule, ubuthakathaka, kanye nokwehla kokusebenza kwansuku zonke.
texts.t2763: Imigomo yesimanje ivame ukusebenzisa ukukhulelwa okukhulu, kodwa incazelo esebenzayo iyefana: ukopha okukhulu kakhulu kumuntu othile othile. Izimbangela zihlanganisa imithombo ye-AUB yesakhiwo kanye ne-non-structural ngokusho kwe-PALM-COEIN. Kubalulekile ngokwezokwelapha ukungajwayeli ubukhulu nje ngoba bekulokhu kunjalo.
texts.t2773: I-Hypomenorrhea iwukukhulelwa okukhanyayo, futhi kungabonisa ukwehluka okuvamile komuntu siqu kanye nezinkinga zokukhulelwa, i-endometrium, noma ibhalansi ye-hormonal.
texts.t2774: Izikhathi ezilula ngokwazo azihlali zibonisa isifo, kodwa ngokuhambisana ne-amenorrhea, ukucindezeleka, ukwehla kwesisindo, izinqubo ze-uterine, noma ukungabi nabantwana, zidinga ukuhlolwa.
texts.t2776: Ukubaluleka kwezokwelapha kwe-hypomenorrhea kuncike kumongo. Kubantu abathile, ukukhulelwa kuyimvelo okufushane futhi okulula. Nokho, uma ukopha kushintshe ngokuzumayo, kwaba cishe kungabikho, noma kwenzeka ngemuva kokukhipha isisu, ukuzalwa, ukwehla kwesisindo, noma ngemuva kokungakhulelwa, kuyisimo esihlukile.
texts.t2783: Ukopha phakathi kokukhulelwa kuwukuphuma kwegazi noma ukopha ngaphandle kokulindelekile kokukhulelwa, futhi kufanele kuhlolwe njengohlobo lokopha okungajwayelekile kwe-uterine.
texts.t2784: Izimbangela zihlanganisa ukuphazamiseka kokukhulelwa, ama-polyps, izifo, imithi ye-hormonal, ukukhulelwa, nezinye izimo.
texts.t2785: Ukopha phakathi kokukhulelwa akuyona into ejwayelekile yokukhulelwa.
texts.t2786: Izikhathi zokukhanya ezisodwa zingaba nencazelo enobungane, kodwa iphethini eliphindaphindayo noma elinzima lifuna ukuhlolwa. Kubaluleke kakhulu ukungaphuthelwa ukukhulelwa, ama-polyps, i-pathology ye-cervical, kanye nokuvuvukala. Iqiniso nje lokuthi ukopha kukhanya akusho ukuthi isimo siphephile ngokuzenzakalelayo.
texts.t2792: Ukungakhulelwa kuwumjikelezo ngaphandle kokukhishwa kweqanda, futhi kungabonakala njengokungavamile, okungajwayelekile, noma ukopha okungajwayelekile.
texts.t2793: Ubukhona bokopha akubona isiqinisekiso sokuthi ukukhulelwa kwenzekile. Ukungakhulelwa kuyisisekelo esivamile somjikelezo ongajwayelekile.
texts.t2794: Ukungakhulelwa ukungabi bikho kokukhulelwa kumjikelezo onikeziwe.
texts.t2795: Imijikelezo yokungakhulelwa yenzeka ngezikhathi ezithile ngisho nakubantu abaphilile, kodwa ukungakhulelwa okuqhubekayo kudinga ukufuna imbangela. Izimo ezivame kakhulu yi-PCOS, i-hypothalamic amenorrhea, i-hyperprolactinemia, izifo ze-thyroid, nezinye izifo ze-endocrine.
texts.t2800: Ukuntuleka kwesigaba se-Luteal kuwumqondo ophikisanayo futhi ongacacile ngokwezokwelapha; isigaba se-luteal esifushane noma i-progesterone ephansi akuhlali kuyisigwebo esizimele.
texts.t2801: Leli gama livame ukusetshenziswa ngokukhululekile kakhulu. Empeleni, kubaluleke kakhulu ukuhlola ukukhulelwa kwangempela, umjikelezo jikelele, kanye nomongo wokungabi nabantwana kunokwenza isinqumo esisuselwa ekuhlolweni okukodwa.
texts.t2802: Ukuntuleka kwesigaba se-Luteal akuyona into elula yokuxilonga esekelwe ezingeni elilodwa le-progesterone.
texts.t2803: Ezokwelapha zokuzala zesimanje ziqaphela lo mqondo. Isigaba se-luteal esifushane, amashadi e-BBT angazinzile, noma izinga elilodwa le-progesterone eliphansi alihlinzeki ngokuqiniseka okulula kwe-nosology ehlukile. Imvamisa, lezi zibukeli zibangelwa amaphutha wesikhathi, ukuphazamiseka kokukhulelwa, noma ukwehluka okuvamile komjikelezo.
texts.t2809: I-PCOS iyimbangela evamile yezikhathi ezingajwayelekile, ukungakhulelwa, kanye ne-hyperandrogenism, kunokuba kube khona ama-cysts kuma-ovari.
texts.t2810: I-PCOS ithinta umjikelezo, ukukhulelwa, impilo ye-metabolic, kanye nokuzala, ngakho-ke indlela yokuyibheka kufanele ibe yohlelo.
texts.t2811: I-PCOS iyisifo se-hormonal kanye ne-metabolic esinokuphazamiseka kokukhulelwa.
texts.t2812: Ngokwe-PCOS, izikhathi ezingajwayelekile, izimpawu ze-hyperandrogenism, kanye/noma i-morphology ye-ovarian ye-polycystic kubalulekile, hhayi nje isithombe se-ultrasound. Ngokwezokwelapha, iyimbangela evamile kakhulu ye-oligomenorrhea kanye nokungakhulelwa.
texts.t2819: I-Endometriosis isimo lapho izicubu ezifana ne-endometrial zitholakala ngaphandle komgodi wesibeletho futhi zivame ukuhlotshaniswa nobuhlungu nokungabi nabantwana.
texts.t2820: Iphethini eliyisici lihlanganisa i-dysmenorrhea ebuhlungu, i-dyspareunia ejulile, ubuhlungu ngesikhathi sokuchama, kanye nobuhlungu be-pelvic obungapheli, kodwa izimpawu ziyahlukahluka kakhulu.
texts.t2821: I-Endometriosis iyimbangela evamile yobuhlungu besibili bomjikelezo.
texts.t2822: Izimpawu ze-endometriosis zihluke kakhulu: kusukela ebuhlungwini obukhulu kuya ekungabi nabantwana kanye nokuhamba ngaphandle kwezimpawu. Iphutha elivamile ukuchaza ubuhlungu bokukhulelwa obuqhubekayo njengokujwayelekile futhi ungacabangi nge-endometriosis iminyaka.
texts.t2829: I-Adenomyosis isimo lapho izicubu ze-endometrial zingena emsipheni wesibeletho futhi zivame ukudala izikhathi ezibuhlungu kanye/noma ezinzima.
texts.t2830: I-Adenomyosis ivame ukuvela njengokopha okukhulu, i-dysmenorrhea, kanye nomuzwa wokucindezeleka kwe-pelvic.
texts.t2831: I-Adenomyosis iyimbangela evamile yezikhathi ezibuhlungu nezinkulu.
texts.t2832: Ngokwezokwelapha, iyisihlukanisi esibalulekile sobuhlungu bomjikelezo kanye nokopha okukhulu, ikakhulukazi uma isibeletho sikhulisiwe futhi ubuhlungu/ukopha kuyaqhubeka. Ingahambisana ne-endometriosis kanye nama-fibroids.
texts.t2837: Ama-fibroids wesibeletho ayizimila ezinomusa zezicubu zomgogodla wesibeletho ezingadala izikhathi ezinzima, ukucindezeleka, ubuhlungu, nezinkinga zokuzala.
texts.t2838: Akuzona zonke i-fibroid ezibangela izimpawu, kodwa ngokuba khona kwe-AUB kanye nomuzwa wesisindo/ukucindezeleka, ingenye yezinto ezibalulekile zokuhlukanisa isakhiwo.
texts.t2839: I-fibroid iyimbangela yesakhiwo yokopha okungajwayelekile kwe-uterine.
texts.t2840: Ngaphakathi kohlelo lwe-PALM-COEIN, ama-fibroids ahlukaniswa njengezimbangela zesakhiwo ze-AUB. Ukubaluleka kwezokwelapha kuncike kusayizi, inani, nendawo yezinhlamvu. Izindawo ze-Submucosal zivame ukuhlotshaniswa nokopha, kanti ezinkulu zihlotshaniswa nokucindezeleka nokungakhululeki kwe-pelvic.
texts.t2847: Ama-polyps e-Endometrial ayizimila ezikhulayo ze-endometrium ezivame ukuvela njengokopha phakathi, ukuphuma kwegazi, noma izikhathi ezinzima.
texts.t2848: Ama-polyps ahlukaniswa njengezimbangela zesakhiwo ze-AUB futhi abaluleke kakhulu ekuxilongeni okuhlukile kokuphindaphinda kokuphuma kwegazi nokopha phakathi.
texts.t2850: Uma umuntu ehlangabezana njalo nokuphuma kwegazi phakathi noma izikhathi zokopha, ama-polyps angomunye wezinto ezibalulekile zokuhlukanisa. Awahlali ebangela ubuhlungu, ngakho-ke ukungabi khona kobuhlungu akududuzi.
texts.t2857: Ama-cysts e-Ovarian asebenzayo avela njengengxenye yenqubo yokukhulelwa futhi avame ukuxazululwa ngokuzimela, kodwa angadala ubuhlungu noma ukubambezeleka komjikelezo.
texts.t2858: Akuzona zonke i-cyst eziyingozi, kodwa ubuhlungu obusha, ukuphazamiseka kwezimpawu, noma izinkinga ze-cyst zidinga isu lokuphatha elihlukile.
texts.t2859: I-cyst esebenzayo ivame ukuhlotshaniswa ne-physiology ejwayelekile yokukhulelwa.
texts.t2860: Ama-cysts e-Follicular kanye ne-luteal avame ukwakheka njengengxenye yomsebenzi ojwayelekile we-ovarian. Amaningi awanazo izimpawu futhi anyamalale ngokwawo. Ukubaluleka kwezokwelapha kuvela uma kunobuhlungu obuhlukile, usayizi omkhulu, ukusola ukugqashuka noma ukujika, noma ukuphazamiseka komjikelezo okuqhubekayo.
texts.t2867: Ukuntuleka kwe-Ovarian ngaphambi kwesikhathi ukulahlekelwa umsebenzi ojwayelekile we-ovarian ngaphambi kweminyaka engu-40, okuvame ukuvela njengokungajwayelekile komjikelezo, i-amenorrhea, kanye ne-FSH ephakeme.
texts.t2868: I-POI akuyona nje "i-menopause yokuqala" ngomqondo ojwayelekile, kodwa isimo esibucayi sokuzala nesokuphila esidinga ukuqinisekiswa nokuphathwa.
texts.t2869: I-POI ukwehla ngaphambi kwesikhathi komsebenzi we-ovarian ngaphambi kweminyaka engu-40.
texts.t2870: I-POI ithinta hhayi kuphela ukuzala kodwa futhi nempilo yamathambo, yenhliziyo, kanye ne-psycho-emotional. Izimpawu ezibalulekile zomjikelezo zifaka izikhathi ezintsha ezingavamile, i-amenorrhea, nezimpawu zokuntuleka kwe-estrogen kowesifazane osemusha.
texts.t2877: I-Hyperprolactinemia ingadala i-amenorrhea, i-oligomenorrhea, ukungakhulelwa, kanye ne-galactorrhea ngokucindezela i-GnRH.
texts.t2878: I-Prolactin ephezulu ingenye yezimbangela zakudala ze-amenorrhea yesibili nemijikelezo engajwayelekile.
texts.t2879: I-Hyperprolactinemia iyinani eliphakeme le-prolactin elinemiphumela yokuzala.
texts.t2880: I-Prolactin ephakeme ingahlotshaniswa ne-prolactinoma, imithi, ukucindezeleka, i-hypothyroidism, nezinye izimbangela. Ukuhlanganiswa okukhathazayo kwezokwelapha kufaka izikhathi ezingajwayelekile, ukungabi bikho kokukhulelwa, i-galactorrhea, izinhlungu zekhanda, kanye/noma izimpawu zokubona.
texts.t2886: Izifo ze-Thyroid zingaphazamisa umjikelezo, ukukhulelwa, namaphethini okopha; ngakho-ke, isimo se-thyroid siyingxenye yokuhlolwa kokuhlukana kwezikhathi ezingajwayelekile.
texts.t2887: Kokubili i-hypo- ne-hyperthyroidism kungathinta umsebenzi wokukhulelwa, nakuba indlela kanye nephrofayili yokuphazamiseka kwehlukile.
texts.t2888: Isitho se-thyroid sixhumene kakhulu nomsebenzi wokukhulelwa.
texts.t2889: Izifo ze-Thyroid zithinta i-hypothalamus–pituitary–ovarian axis, i-metabolism, i-prolactin, kanye nokukhulelwa. Ngakho-ke, ezimweni ze-amenorrhea, i-oligomenorrhea, noma ukungakhulelwa, ukuhlolwa komsebenzi we-thyroid kuvame ukuba yingxenye yokuhlolwa okuyisisekelo.
texts.t2895: Ukumelana ne-Insulin kungathinta umjikelezo ikakhulukazi ngokuhlotshaniswa ne-PCOS, ukuphazamiseka kokukhulelwa, nezifo ze-metabolic.
texts.t2896: Igama ngokwalo alichazi zonke iziphazamiso zomjikelezo, kodwa livame ukuba yingxenye yomongo we-metabolic we-PCOS.
texts.t2897: Ukumelana ne-Insulin kungaba yingxenye ye-pathogenesis yomjikelezo ongajwayelekile.
texts.t2898: Ngokwezokwelapha, le nkinga ivame ukuvela kubantu abane-PCOS, isisindo esingaphezu kwesisindo, i-acanthosis nigricans, umlando womndeni we-diabetes, nemijikelezo emide. Kubalulekile ukunganciphisi yonke imijikelezo engajwayelekile ekumelaneni ne-insulin, kodwa futhi ungayishiyi ingxenye ye-metabolic uma ikhona ngempela.
texts.t2904: I-Hypothalamic amenorrhea yenzeka ngenxa yokucindezelwa okusebenzayo kwe-GnRH ngokumelene nesizinda sokuntuleka kwamandla, ukucindezeleka, ukwehla kwesisindo, noma ukuzivocavoca okukhulu.
texts.t2905: Lokhu akukhona 'ama-ovari avilaphayo,' kodwa ukulungiswa okuyinhloko komzimba endaweni yamandla angaphephile.
texts.t2906: I-Hypothalamic amenorrhea iyisiphazamiso esisebenzayo sokucindezelwa komgogodla wokuzala.
texts.t2907: I-FHA ivame ukuhlotshaniswa nokuntuleka kwamandla, ukuqeqeshwa ngokweqile, ukwehla kwesisindo, kanye nokucindezeleka kwe-psychosocial. Ngokwezokwelapha, akubalulekile kuphela ukungabi bikho kwezikhathi, kodwa futhi nemiphumela yamathambo, ukuzala, kanye nempilo iyonke.
texts.t2913: Ukucindezeleka okukhulu kungaphazamisa okwesikhashana umjikelezo ngomphumela wawo ekulawuleni kwe-hypothalamic-pituitary, kodwa akufanele kuchaze ngokuzenzakalelayo i-amenorrhea ende ngaphandle kokuhlolwa.
texts.t2914: Ukucindezeleka kuyinto yangempela, kodwa akususi isidingo sokukhipha ukukhulelwa, izimbangela ze-endocrine, kanye nokuphazamiseka kokukhulelwa.
texts.t2915: Ukucindezeleka kungashintsha ukukhulelwa futhi kuphazamise umjikelezo.
texts.t2916: Kubucayi ngokwezokwelapha ukuqaphela umthelela wokucindezeleka, kodwa ungawusebenzisi njengencazelo yazo zonke izinto. Uma umjikelezo ushintshe ngokuzumayo ngemuva kwesigameko esicindezelayo futhi ungabuyeli emuva, kudingeka ukuhlaziywa okuhlelekile kwezimbangela.
texts.t2921: Ukuphazamiseka komjikelezo ngemuva kokwehla kwesisindo ngokushesha
texts.t2923: Ukwehla kwesisindo ngokushesha kuvame ukuphazamisa umjikelezo ngokuntuleka kwamandla kanye nokucindezelwa kwe-hypothalamic kokukhulelwa.
texts.t2924: Kwesistimu yokuzala, akugcini nje nge-BMI ebalulekile, kodwa futhi nesilinganiso sokwehla kwesisindo, ukunciphisa ukudla, kanye nokutholakala kwamandla jikelele.
texts.t2925: Ngemuva kokwehla kwesisindo ngokushesha, umjikelezo ungaphazamiseka ngenxa yokuntuleka kwamandla.
texts.t2926: Ngisho noma isisindo somzimba sokugcina sihlala ngaphakathi kobubanzi obujwayelekile, ukuntuleka kwamandla okusheshayo nokubalulekile kungaphazamisa i-GnRH pulsation, ukukhulelwa, kanye nokukhulelwa.
texts.t2929: ukuphazamiseka komjikelezo ngemuva kokwehla kwesisindo ngokushesha
texts.t2933: Ngemuva kokubeletha, ukubuyiselwa komjikelezo kuncike ekunceliseni, i-prolactin, kanye ne-physiology yomuntu ngamunye; ngakho-ke, isikhathi sokubuya kokukhulelwa siyahlukahluka.
texts.t2934: Ngesikhathi sokuncelisa, ukungabi bikho kokukhulelwa kungaqhubeka isikhathi eside, kodwa lokhu akufanele kuvimbele ukuhlolwa kwezimpawu ezibuhlungu.
texts.t2935: Ngemuva kokubeletha, umjikelezo awubuyi ngesilinganiso esifanayo kubo bonke.
texts.t2936: Kubalulekile ukukhumbula amaqiniso amabili ahambisanayo: ngemuva kokubeletha, umjikelezo ungabuyela kancane kancane futhi uncike ekunceliseni; ukopha okukhulu okungajwayelekile, ubuhlungu obungapheli, ukungabuyeli emuva kanye nezinye izimpawu, noma izimpawu zenkinga ye-endocrine zidinga ukuhlolwa.
texts.t2938: ukungabi bikho okuqhubekayo komjikelezo nezinye izimpawu
texts.t2942: Ngemuva kokukhishwa kokukhulelwa, umjikelezo ungashintsha okwesikhashana, kodwa ukungabi bikho kokukhulelwa isikhathi eside, ubuhlungu obungajwayelekile, noma ukuphindaphinda kokopha kudinga ukukhipha izinkinga nezimbangela zesakhiwo.
texts.t2943: Umbuzo oyinhloko ukuthi ngabe kuwukubuyiselwa kwesikhashana okulindelekile noma uphawu lwenkinga, njengokuthi izicubu ezisele, ukutheleleka, noma i-synechiae ye-intrauterine.
texts.t2944: Ngemuva kokukhishwa kokukhulelwa, umjikelezo ungase ungabuyeli emuva ngokushesha, kodwa izimpawu ezibomvu akufanele zinganakwa.
texts.t2945: Izimbangela zesakhiwo ze-amenorrhea yesibili kufanele zicatshangelwe uma ukuphela kokukhulelwa kwenzeka ngemuva kokungenelela kwe-instrumental emgodini wesibeletho. Ngakho-ke, ukubambezeleka kokubuyiselwa komjikelezo ngemuva kokukhishwa kokukhulelwa kuyisimo lapho kubalulekile ukukhumbula hhayi ama-hormone kuphela kodwa futhi nezindlela zesakhiwo nezokutheleleka.
texts.t2950: Ukuphazamiseka komjikelezo ngemuva kokuyeka ukuvimbela ukukhulelwa kwe-hormonal
texts.t2952: Ngemuva kokuyeka ukuvimbela ukukhulelwa kwe-hormonal, umjikelezo kwesinye isikhathi udinga isikhathi sokubonisa iphethini yawo, kodwa i-amenorrhea eqhubekayo noma ukungajwayelekile kudinga ukuhlolwa kwembangela.
texts.t2953: Ukuvimbela ukukhulelwa akuphuli umjikelezo; imvamisa, ngemuva kokuyeka, ukuthambekela okuyisisekelo kwe-PCOS, i-oligomenorrhea, noma ukungakhulelwa kuyabonakala.
texts.t2954: Ngemuva kokuyeka ukuvimbela ukukhulelwa kwe-hormonal, umjikelezo ungabuyela ngezindlela ezahlukene.
texts.t2955: Kubantu abathile, ukukhulelwa kubuyela ngokushesha; kwabanye, umjikelezo ungazinzile ezinyangeni zokuqala ezimbalwa. Ngokwezokwelapha, kubalulekile ukungagxili kumqondo wokuthi 'kungenxa nje yamaphilisi' uma ukukhulelwa kungabuyi isikhathi eside noma uma iphethini endala yokungajwayelekile ibonakala ngokushesha.
texts.t2959: ukuphazamiseka komjikelezo ngemuva kokuyeka ukuvimbela ukukhulelwa kwe-hormonal
texts.t2961: umjikelezo ngemuva kokuyeka ukuvimbela ukukhulelwa kwe-hormonal
texts.t2963: Umjikelezo ongajwayelekile udinga ukuhlolwa uma ukungajwayelekile kuqhubeka, kuhambisana ne-amenorrhea, ukopha okukhulu, ubuhlungu, i-hyperandrogenism, ukungabi nabantwana, noma izimpawu zesistimu.
texts.t2964: Umthetho oyinhloko akuwona ukulinda kuze kube phakade uma umjikelezo uhlala uphume ngaphandle kobubanzi obujwayelekile bokwehluka futhi uthinta impilo noma ukuzala.
texts.t2965: Umjikelezo ongajwayelekile oqhubekayo uyisikhumbuzo sokuhlola imbangela, hhayi nje ukubhekwa.
texts.t2966: Umjikelezo owodwa ongajwayelekile ungaba uhlobo lokwehluka kwesikhashana kwe-physiological. Nokho, ukopha okuphindaphindayo okude, okungavamile, okuphindaphindiwe, okukhulu, noma okulula, kanye nezimpawu ezibonisa i-endocrine, isakhiwo, noma i-pathology ehlobene nobuhlungu, kudinga ukuhlolwa.
texts.t2972: Izimpawu zokuqala zokukhulelwa zivame ukungacaci futhi zingafaka izikhathi eziphuthelwe, ubuhlungu bezinselo, ukukhathala, isicanucanu esincane, kanye nezinguquko ekukhishweni.
texts.t2973: Esigabeni sokuqala kakhulu, izimpawu azivumeli ukuqinisekiswa okuthembekile kokukhulelwa ngaphandle kokuhlolwa. Ukukhulelwa kokuqala kuvame ukuzwakala okufana ne-PMS.
texts.t2975: Ezikhathini zokuqala kakhulu, umzimba usaqala ukusabela ekukhuphukeni kwe-hCG kanye nezinguquko ze-hormonal. Ngakho-ke, izimpawu zingaba buthakathaka, zihluke kumuntu nomuntu, futhi zivame ukuhambisana nesigaba se-luteal esijwayelekile. Ngokwezokwelapha, iphuzu eliyinhloko lokubhekisela akuzona izinzwa ezizwakalayo ngokwazo, kodwa isikhathi esiphuthelwe, ukuhlolwa, futhi, uma kunesidingo, amazinga e-hCG alandelanayo.

texts.t2988: Ezikhathini zokuqala kakhulu, isikhathi sokuhlola nomongo wezokwelapha kuba okubalulekile; umphumela owodwa ohlukanisiwe unganele.

texts.t2995: ubuhlungu obuhlangothini olulodwa, ukuphelelwa umoya, noma ubuhlungu behlombe

texts.t3007: uma izimpawu zisemncane futhi zingacacile → gcina usuku olulindelekile lokukhulelwa nokuhlolwa
texts.t3008: uma ukuhlolwa kungacacile noma kusenesikhathi kakhulu → phinda ukuhlolwa noma uthole ukuhlolwa kwegazi le-hCG
texts.t3009: uma izimpawu ezibomvu zikhona → funa usizo lwezokwelapha ngokuphuthumayo ukuze ukhiphe ukukhulelwa kwe-ectopic noma ukulahlekelwa kokukhulelwa kokuqala
texts.t3010: ukuthatha ukuhlolwa kusenesikhathi kakhulu nokucabanga ukuthi udaba luvaliwe
texts.t3011: ukuziduduza ngombono wokuthi 'ukopha kokufakwa' lapho uhlangabezana nobuhlungu noma ukopha okukhulayo
texts.t3012: ukungayinaki izinhlungu ezihlangothini olulodwa lapho kukhona isikhathi esiphuthelwe
texts.t3013: ukukhathala okuncane noma ubuhlungu bezinselo ngaphandle kwesikhathi esiphuthelwe
texts.t3014: ukuhlolwa okungalungile okukodwa ngaphambi kwesikhathi esilindelekile
texts.t3015: thola ukuthi umbuzo uphathelene nezimpawu, izivivinyo, noma ukuhlolwa okuphuthumayo kokukhulelwa kokuqala

texts.t3021: Kwakunikezwe okubalulekile ku-ACOG, NHS, MedlinePlus/NIH, kanye ne-StatPearls; kulesi sigaba, isikhathi sokuhlola, i-hCG dynamics, kanye nokuhlolwa okuphuthumayo kokukhulelwa kwe-ectopic kubaluleke kakhulu.
texts.t3030: izimpawu zokuqala zodwa azithembekile ekwehlukaniseni phakathi kokukhulelwa ne-PMS

texts.t3032: ubuhlungu nokopha kumongo wokukhulelwa okungenzeka kwandisa ukubaluleka kokuhlolwa
texts.t3033: thembela osukwini olulindelekile lokukhulelwa kunokucabanga ngokusekelwe ezinzweni
texts.t3034: uma umphumela ungacacile, phinda ukuhlolwa noma uthole ukuhlolwa kwegazi le-hCG ngesikhathi esifanele
texts.t3035: uma kusolwa ukukhulelwa kwe-ectopic, funa usizo lwezokwelapha ngokuphuthumayo
texts.t3036: ungazami ukuxilonga ukukhulelwa ngokusekelwe kusimpawu esisodwa
texts.t3037: ungayinaki izinhlungu ezihlangothini olulodwa, ukopha, ukuphelelwa umoya, noma ubuhlungu behlombe
texts.t3038: Iphutha elivamile kakhulu mayelana nokukhulelwa kokuqala ukudidanisa izinzwa ezingacacile nobufakazi bokukhulelwa ngenkathi kuncishiswa izimpawu ezibomvu ezidinga ukukhipha ukukhulelwa kwe-ectopic.
texts.t3039: Indlela yokuthi ukukhulelwa kokuqala kufana ne-PMS
texts.t3041: Ukukhulelwa kokuqala kufana ne-PMS ngoba zombili izimo zenzeka ngesikhathi se-progesterone futhi zingadala ubuhlungu bezinselo, ukukhathala, ukuvuvukala, kanye nemizwa yokukhathala.
texts.t3042: Kokubili i-PMS kanye nokukhulelwa kokuqala kungahambisana nezimpawu ezifanayo, ngakho-ke kuvame ukuba nzima ukuhlukanisa ngokuzethemba phakathi kwazo ngokusekelwe ezinzweni ngaphambi kokuhlolwa.
texts.t3043: Ukukhulelwa kokuqala ne-PMS kuvame ukufana ngokomqondo.
texts.t3044: Yingakho imizamo yokuthi 'uqagele ukukhulelwa ngezimpawu zomzimba' ngaphambi kwesikhathi esiphuthelwe kuvame ukuholela ekukhathazekeni nasekuphethweni okungamanga. Umehluko awukho ukuthi ukukhulelwa kunesinye isibonakaliso esiyingqayizivele sokuqala, kodwa ukuthi ekukhulelweni, ukukhulelwa akuvamile ukwenzeka, futhi ukuhlolwa kuba okuhle njengoba amazinga e-hCG ekhuphuka.
texts.t3047: indlela yokuthi ukukhulelwa kokuqala kufana ne-PMS
texts.t3052: Ukopha kokufakwa kuvame ukubhekisela ekuphuma kwegazi okukhanyayo, kwesikhashana ekukhulelweni kokuqala kakhulu, kodwa leli gama livame ukusetshenziswa ngokweqile.
texts.t3053: Ukuphuma kwegazi okuncane kungenzeka ekukhulelweni kokuqala, kodwa akusikho konke ukopha kokuqala okuyimfanelo yokufakwa engenangozi.
texts.t3054: Igama elithi 'ukopha kokufakwa' akufanele liduduze ngokuzenzakalelayo.
texts.t3055: Ngokwesiko elivamile, noma yikuphi ukuphuma kwegazi kokuqala kuvame ukubizwa ngokuthi ukopha kokufakwa. Ngokwezokwelapha, lokhu kuyinto eyingozi yokwenza lula: ukuphuma kwegazi ngesikhathi sokukhulelwa okungenzeka kungaba nezincazelo ezahlukene futhi kwesinye isikhathi kudinga ukukhipha ukulahlekelwa kokukhulelwa noma ukukhulelwa kwe-ectopic. Ngakho-ke, ubukhulu, ubuhlungu, ukubambezeleka, nemiphumela yokuhlolwa kubalulekile, hhayi ilebula uqobo.
texts.t3063: Lapho kufanele uthole ukuhlolwa kokukhulelwa ngemuva kokukhulelwa
texts.t3064: Lapho kufanele uthole ukuhlolwa ngemuva kokukhulelwa
texts.t3065: Ukuhlolwa kokukhulelwa kunikeza ulwazi oluningi kakhulu ngemuva kosuku olwalulindelwe lokukhulelwa; ukuhlolwa kusenesikhathi ngemva kokukhulelwa kuvame ukuholela kumphumela ongemuhle ongalungile.
texts.t3066: Noma ngabe ukukhulelwa sekufezekile, i-hCG kufanele ibe nesikhathi sokukhuphuka kufinyelele ezingeni elibonakalayo. Ngakho-ke, ukuhlolwa kusenesikhathi ngaphambi kokuphuthelwa kwesikhathi kunomkhawulo ekuzwelaneni.
texts.t3067: Umkhawulo ojwayelekile wokuhlolwa kusenesikhathi ukuthi kusenesikhathi kakhulu.
texts.t3068: Ngemuva kokukhulelwa, ukufakelwa, nokufakwa, kuthatha isikhathi ngaphambi kokuba i-hCG ibe yinto ebonakalayo emchameni. Ngakho-ke, ukuhlolwa okwenziwe kusenesikhathi kungase kube kubi hhayi ngoba akukho ukukhulelwa, kodwa ngoba kusenesikhathi kakhulu ukukuthola ngokuhlolwa. Empeleni, kunokwethenjelwa kakhulu ukulinda kuze kube usuku lwesikhathi olwalulindelwe noma ukuphinda ukuhlolwa ngemuva kwamahora angama-48 uma isikhathi sisabambezeleka.
texts.t3072: nini ukuthatha ukuhlolwa kokukhulelwa ngemuva kokukhulelwa
texts.t3075: Lapho ukuhlolwa kokukhulelwa kungaba kubi okungalungile
texts.t3077: Ukuhlolwa kokukhulelwa kungaba kubi okungalungile uma kuthathwa kusenesikhathi kakhulu, umchamo uthambile kakhulu, noma isikhathi/ukukhulelwa kunqunywe ngokungalungile.
texts.t3078: Umphumela ongemuhle ongalungile uvame kakhulu uma ukuhlolwa kuthathwa ngaphambi kwesikhathi esilindelekile noma ngokukhulelwa okungajwayelekile.
texts.t3079: Ukuhlolwa okungalungile kuvame kakhulu ukuhlobene nesikhathi, kunokuba kube yimbangela engaqondakali eyinqaba.
texts.t3080: Empeleni, izizathu ezivame kakhulu isikhathi esifanele nesinqumo esingalungile ngosuku lokukhulelwa. Le ngozi iphakeme emijikelezweni engajwayelekile. Ngakho-ke, ukuhlolwa okungalungile akuhlali kuxazulula udaba uma isikhathi sisabambezeleka noma uma izimpawu ezingahambisani ne-PMS evamile zivele. Ezimweni ezinjalo, kunengqondo ukuphinda ukuhlolwa noma ukushintshela ekuhlolweni kwe-serum hCG.
texts.t3081: isikhathi esiphuthelwe + ukuhlolwa okungalungile + ubuhlungu obuhlukile
texts.t3082: ukukhathala noma ubuhlungu obukhulu ngokuhlolwa okungalungile
texts.t3083: lapho ukuhlolwa kokukhulelwa kungaba kubi okungalungile
texts.t3086: Izinga lokushisa lomzimba eliyisisekelo ngesikhathi sokukhulelwa
texts.t3088: Uma ukukhulelwa sekufezekile, izinga lokushisa lomzimba eliyisisekelo lingahlala liphakeme isikhathi eside kunesigaba se-luteal esivamile, kodwa i-BBT yodwa ayiqinisekisi ukukhulelwa.
texts.t3089: I-BBT ephezulu engaguquki ingaba yinkomba engatheni, kodwa isifo sisabekwa ngokuhlolwa kokukhulelwa noma i-hCG.
texts.t3090: I-BBT ephezulu ingahambisana nokukhulelwa kwasekuqaleni kodwa ayibuyisele ukuhlolwa.
texts.t3091: Njengoba umphumela we-progesterone uqhubeka, ishadi le-BBT kwabanye abantu alinciphi ngaphambi kokukhulelwa okulindelekile. Lokhu kungase kuphakamise ukukhulelwa. Nokho, i-BBT ithonywa ubuthongo, ukugula, utshwala, kanye nendlela yokulinganisa; ngakho-ke, ngokwezokwelapha, iyisibonakaliso esisizayo kuphela kunendlela yokuhlola ukukhulelwa.
texts.t3093: izimpawu ezinzima lapho uzama ukuthembela ku-BBT kuphela
texts.t3094: izinga lokushisa lomzimba eliyisisekelo ngesikhathi sokukhulelwa
texts.t3098: Esikhathini sokukhulelwa kwasekuqaleni, ukukhishwa kungase kube kukhulu, kube nombala okhanyayo, futhi kube yisikhwehlela, kodwa iphunga elingathandeki, ukuluma, ubuhlungu, noma igazi kudinga ukuhlolwa okuhlukile.
texts.t3099: Izinguquko ekukhishweni zingenzeka ngaphandle kwesifo; nokho, ukukhulelwa kwasekuqaleni akuchazi ngokuzenzakalelayo noma yikuphi ukukhishwa okungajwayelekile.
texts.t3100: Ukukhishwa kokukhulelwa kwasekuqaleni kungashintsha, kodwa izimpawu zosulelo noma ukopha zihlala zibalulekile.
texts.t3101: Kwabanye abantu, ukukhishwa okukhanyayo noma okucacile kwesikhwehlela kuyanda ngesikhathi sokukhulelwa kwasekuqaleni. Nokho, uma kukhona ukushisa, ukuluma, iphunga, ubuhlungu obukhulu, noma igazi, kudlula incazelo elula ethi 'kungukukhishwa kokukhulelwa nje.' Ngokwezokwelapha, izimpawu ezinjalo zidinga ukucatshangelwa kosulelo, ukopha, noma ezinye izimbangela.
texts.t3109: Ubuhlungu bezinsini nokuzwela kungenzeka kokubili ku-PMS nasekuqaleni kokukhulelwa, ngakho-ke abakwazi ukuhlukaniswa ngokuthembekile ngalesi sifo sodwa.
texts.t3110: Umehluko uvame ukunqunywa hhayi ngohlobo lobuhlungu, kodwa ngokuthi ukukhulelwa kwenzekile yini nokuthi umphumela wokuhlolwa uyini.
texts.t3112: Kokubili isigaba se-progesterone somjikelezo kanye nokukhulelwa kwasekuqaleni kungahambisana nokugcwala kwezinsini nokuzwela. Ngakho-ke, ukuzama ukubahlukanisa ngobukhulu bobuhlungu kuvame ukungathembeki. Isikhathi esiphuthelwe, ukuqhubeka kwezimpawu, nokuhlolwa kokukhulelwa ngesikhathi esifanele kunikeza ulwazi oluningi.
texts.t3113: ubuhlungu bezinsini nesiqeshana noma ukukhishwa kwezinhlamvu
texts.t3118: Ukuqina esiswini esingezansi: PMS noma ukukhulelwa
texts.t3120: Ukuqina esiswini esingezansi kungenzeka kokubili ku-PMS nasekuqaleni kokukhulelwa, ngakho ngaphandle kokuhlolwa, akuhlukanisi ngokuthembekile phakathi kwezimo.
texts.t3121: Imizwa emincane ingenzeka, kodwa ubuhlungu obukhulu, obuhlukile, noma obukhulayo akufanele kube yinto elahliwe kalula njenge-PMS noma ukukhulelwa kwasekuqaleni.
texts.t3122: Imizwa emincane yokukhathala ayicacile, kuyilapho ubuhlungu obukhulu kuyisixwayiso.
texts.t3123: Empeleni, lesi sifo esithile sivame ukwenza abantu bazibuze, 'ingabe isikhathi sami noma ukukhulelwa'. Ngokwezokwelapha, impendulo ithi: ayikwazi ukunqunywa ngemizwa kuphela. Nokho, uma ubuhlungu bukhulu, bugxile ohlangothini olulodwa, buhambisana nokopha, ukukhathala, noma ubuthakathaka obukhulu, izimbangela eziyingozi, kuhlanganise nokukhulelwa okungaphandle kwesibeletho, kufanele zikhishwe ngokushesha.
texts.t3127: ukuqina esiswini esingezansi: pms noma ukukhulelwa
texts.t3130: Ukuzwa isicanucanu ngaphambi kwesikhathi esiphuthelwe: kungenzeka yini
texts.t3132: Ukuzwa isicanucanu ngaphambi kwesikhathi esiphuthelwe kungenzeka ngokomqondo, kodwa njengesibonakaliso sokuqala, akuthembekile futhi akuqinisekisi ukukhulelwa.
texts.t3133: Abanye abantu babona imizwa engajwayelekile kusenesikhathi, kodwa ngokwezokwelapha, ukuzwa isicanucanu ngaphambi kwesikhathi esiphuthelwe akucatshangwa njengesibonakaliso esicacile ngokwanele.
texts.t3134: Ukuzwa isicanucanu ngaphambi kwesikhathi esiphuthelwe kungenzeka, kodwa akukwazi ukusetshenziswa ukwahlulela ukukhulelwa ngokuthembekile.
texts.t3135: Imizwa yokuqala yesisu ingavela kwabanye abantu; nokho, ngalesi sikhathi, umzimba uthonywa futhi ukukhathazeka, i-PMS, kanye nokulindela ukukhulelwa. Ngakho-ke, ukuzwa isicanucanu akukwazi ukusetshenziswa njengokuhlolwa kokukhulelwa kwasekuqaleni. Empeleni, kunenzuzo enkulu ukulinda isikhathi esifanele sokuhlolwa kunokwandisa ukuzihlola kwemizwa yonke.
texts.t3137: ubuhlungu obukhulu noma ukopha okwenzeka ngesikhathi esifanayo
texts.t3138: ukuzwa isicanucanu ngaphambi kwesikhathi esiphuthelwe: kungenzeka yini
texts.t3143: Ukukhathala okwandayo ngaphambi kwesikhathi esiphuthelwe kungenzeka, kodwa kuyafana nokungacacile njenge-PMS, ukucindezeleka, noma ukuphazamiseka kokulala.
texts.t3144: Lesi sifo singahambisana nokukhulelwa kwasekuqaleni, kodwa ngokwaso, asifakazeli lutho.
texts.t3145: Ukukhathala ngaphambi kwesikhathi esiphuthelwe kuyisibonakaliso esibuthakathaka nesingacacile.
texts.t3146: Ngaphambi kwesikhathi esiphuthelwe, kulula kakhulu ukubeka ukukhathala okuvamile ekukhulelweni uma okulindelwe kokukhulelwa kubalulekile ngokomzwelo. Ngokwezokwelapha, kunenzuzo enkulu ukubheka ukukhathala njengesifo somongo kunesilinganiso sokuxilonga. Ezimweni zokukhathala okukhulu, ukushintsha kombala, noma isiyezi, kubalulekile ukucatshangelwa ezinye izimbangela, kuhlanganise nokulahlekelwa igazi, i-anemia, nezimo eziphuthumayo.
texts.t3154: Ukuhlolwa kwe-serum hCG kufanelekile uma kudingeka ukuhlolwa okuzwelayo noma kusenesikhathi kunokuhlolwa komchamo, noma uma kudingeka ukuhlola izinguquko esimweni esingacacile.
texts.t3155: I-hCG iyasiza ikakhulukazi ezimweni zesikhathi esiphuthelwe, ukuhlolwa okungabazekayo, ubuhlungu, noma ukopha ngesikhathi sokukhulelwa kwasekuqaleni okusolwayo.
texts.t3156: I-hCG iyindlela yokuhlola yokufakazela nokuhlola ukukhulelwa kwasekuqaleni.
texts.t3157: Ngokungafani nokuhlolwa komchamo wasekhaya, i-serum hCG izwela kakhulu futhi ifanele izilinganiso eziphindaphindwayo ngokuhamba kwesikhathi. Lokhu kubaluleke kakhulu uma kunqunywa ukuthi ukukhulelwa kuyathuthuka njengoba kulindelwe, ukukhishwa kokulahlekelwa kwasekuqaleni, noma ukuhlola ingozi yokukhulelwa okungaphandle kwesibeletho kanye ne-ultrasound kanye nokutholakala kwezokwelapha. Nokho, inani elilodwa elihlukanisiwe ngaphandle komongo linokuhumusha okulinganiselwe.
texts.t3164: Ukuhlolwa okuhle okuncane kuvame ukukhombisa ukukhulelwa kwasekuqaleni ngezinga eliphansi le-hCG, kodwa kudinga ukuhlolwa okuphindaphindwayo ngokuhamba kwesikhathi nomongo wezokwelapha.
texts.t3165: Umugqa omuhle okuncane awuyona inkinga ngempela, kodwa futhi akuyona isizathu sokuthi udaba luphothulwe ngokuphelele ngaphandle kokuhlolwa okulandelayo.
texts.t3166: Ukuhlolwa okuhle okuncane kuvame ukufuna ukuhlolwa okuphindaphindwayo noma ukuhlolwa kwegazi le-hCG.
texts.t3167: Lapho ukuhlolwa kwenziwa kusenesikhathi, kuvame kakhulu ukuthi umugqa ube mncane. Lokhu kungahambisana nokukhulelwa okujwayelekile kwasekuqaleni kakhulu. Nokho, uma umugqa ungafiphali, ukuhlolwa kuziphatha ngendlela engalindelekile, noma kukhona ubuhlungu nokopha, kubalulekile ngokwezokwelapha ukuhamba kusuka ekubhekeni ekhaya kuya ekuhlolweni kwelebhu. Umugqa omncane ungukuqala kwengxoxo kunokuphetha kwayo.
texts.t3173: Yini okufanele uyenze uma isikhathi sakho sibambezeleka futhi ukuhlolwa kungalungile
texts.t3175: Uma isikhathi sakho sibambezeleka futhi ukuhlolwa kungalungile, kubalulekile ukucatshangelwa isikhathi sokukhulelwa, ukuphinda ukuhlolwa ngamahora angama-48, noma ukuba nokuhlolwa kwe-hCG uma ukubambezeleka kuqhubeka noma izimpawu zikhona.
texts.t3176: Ukuhlolwa okungalungile lapho isikhathi sibambezeleka akuhlali kuxazulula udaba, ikakhulukazi uma ukukhulelwa bekusemva noma kungaziwa.
texts.t3177: Isikhathi esibambezelekile ngokuhlolwa okungalungile sidinga ukuhlolwa kabusha kwesikhathi nezimpawu kunokwesaba.
texts.t3178: Uma ukukhulelwa kushintshile, ukubambezeleka kwekhalenda kungase kungabi ukubambezeleka kwe-biological yangempela. Ngakho-ke, isinyathelo esilandelayo esinengqondo ukuhlolwa okuphindaphindwayo ngamahora angama-48, ikakhulukazi uma ukuhlolwa kokuqala bekusenesikhathi. Nokho, uma kunobuhlungu, ukopha, ukukhathala, noma ubuthakathaka obukhulu, ukulinda ekhaya akuseyona inketho engcono kakhulu — izinkinga zokukhulelwa kwasekuqaleni noma enye imbangela ephuthumayo kufanele zikhishwe.
texts.t3181: yini okufanele uyenze uma isikhathi sakho sibambezeleka futhi ukuhlolwa kungalungile
texts.t3184: Nini ukukhishwa ngokuphuthumayo ukukhulelwa okungaphandle kwesibeletho
texts.t3186: Ukukhulelwa okungaphandle kwesibeletho kufanele kukhishwe ngokuphuthumayo uma ukuhlolwa okuhle noma isikhathi esibambezelekile kuhlanganiswa nobuhlungu obuhlukile, ukopha, ukukhathala, ubuthakathaka obukhulu, noma ubuhlungu behlombe.
texts.t3187: Ukukhulelwa okungaphandle kwesibeletho akuhlali kuveza isithombe esijwayelekile, kodwa ukuhlanganiswa kobuhlungu nezimpawu zokukhulelwa kudinga ukunakwa okukhethekile.
texts.t3188: Ukukhulelwa okungaphandle kwesibeletho kuyisifo esiphuthumayo sokuhlukanisa ekukhulelweni kwasekuqaleni ngobuhlungu noma ukopha.
texts.t3189: I-NHS igqamisa izimpawu ezijwayelekile: ubuhlungu obuphansi ohlangothini olulodwa, ukopha kwesitho sangasese sowesifazane noma ukukhishwa okumnyama okumanzi, ubuhlungu behlombe, ukungakhululeki uma uchama noma uyangena, futhi uma kuqhuma — ubuhlungu obukhulu, ukuwa, isiyezi, nokukhathala. Kungcono ukweqa uhlangothi lokuhlolwa ngokuphuthumayo kunokulinda 'kuze kube izinto zicaca'.
texts.t3191: ubuhlungu behlombe noma ukopha nesikhathi esibambezelekile
texts.t3193: nini ukukhishwa ngokuphuthumayo ukukhulelwa okungaphandle kwesibeletho
texts.t3198: Ukukhiqiza inzalo kuyikhono lokufeza ukukhulelwa uma kukhona ukukhulelwa, isidoda esiphilayo, amathumbu avulekile, nezimo ezinhle zokufakelwa.
texts.t3199: Ukukhiqiza inzalo akuyona inkomba eyodwa noma ukuhlolwa okukodwa, kodwa umphumela womsebenzi ohlelekile wokukhulelwa, isitho sokuzala, isidoda, iminyaka, kanye nempilo yonke.
texts.t3201: Ngokwezokwelapha, ukukhiqiza inzalo akukhawulwanga iminyaka noma amahomoni kuphela. Ukuze ukukhulelwa kwenzeke, okulandelayo kuyadingeka: ukuhlangana ngesikhathi esifanele ngaphakathi kwewindi elizala, ukukhulelwa, ikhwalithi yesidoda eyanele, ukuvuleka kwamathumbu, kanye nendawo yesibeletho evumela ukufakelwa.
texts.t3202: ukukhiqiza inzalo kuncike ebhayoloji yombhangqwana, iminyaka, isikhathi sokukhulelwa, kanye nempilo yonke
texts.t3203: ku-TTC, isikhathi sibalulekile, kodwa asibuyisele ukuhlolwa kwezimbangela uma ukukhulelwa kungenzeki

texts.t3215: Izikhawu zezokwelapha nezinkomba zangaphambi kokukhulelwa zibalulekile kulesi sigaba; ukuhumusha kwanoma yiziphi izivivinyo kuncike eminyakeni, umjikelezo, kanye nenhloso yonke.

texts.t3247: Kwakunikezwe okubalulekile ku-ASRM, ACOG, kanye ne-CDC; lesi sigaba sincike ekwelulekeni ngaphambi kokukhulelwa, ukuhlolwa kokungazali, kanye nemihlahlandlela ye-TTC esebenzayo.
texts.t3258: ukukhiqiza inzalo kuhlale kuhlolwa kumongo weminyaka, ukukhulelwa, isici sowesilisa, kanye nesikhathi semizamo
