texts.t3262: uma izingozi zikhona noma imikhawulo yeminyaka isondela, qhubeka nokuhlolwa okuhlelekile
texts.t3264: ungathembisi imiphumela esheshayo ngokusekelwe kuphela endleleni yokuphila
texts.t3265: ungabambezeli ukuhlolwa kwesici sowesilisa nokukhulelwa okungajwayelekile
texts.t3266: Iphutha eliyinhloko esihlokweni sokukhiqiza inzalo ukufuna iseluleko esisodwa esiphelele esikhundleni sokucabangela ngesikhathi esifanayo, ibhayoloji yomjikelezo, iminyaka, impilo yombhangqwana, nezikhathi ezizwakalayo zokushintshela ekuxilongeni.
texts.t3267: Yini ukukhiqiza inzalo kwabesifazane kuncike kuyo
texts.t3269: Ukukhiqiza inzalo kwabesifazane kuncike eminyakeni, ukukhulelwa, isamba samaqanda, isimo samathumbu nesibeletho, izimo ezihambisanayo, kanye nendlela yokuphila.
texts.t3270: Ayikho into eyodwa evamile: ukukhiqiza inzalo kuncipha ngezindlela ezihlukahlukene, futhi imbangela eyinhloko ingahluka kumuntu nomuntu.
texts.t3271: Ukukhiqiza inzalo kuncike emazingeni amaningana ohlelo lokuzala.
texts.t3272: Izici ezibalulekile zifaka phakathi iminyaka, ukuba khona nokujwayeleka kokukhulelwa, i-endometriosis, i-PCOS, isici samathumbu, ukuhlinzwa, izifo, izimo ezihambisanayo ze-endocrine, isisindo somzimba, ukubhema, nezinye izinto zendlela yokuphila.
texts.t3274: yini ukukhiqiza inzalo kwabesifazane kuncike kuyo
texts.t3279: Iminyaka ithinta amathuba okukhulelwa ikakhulukazi ngokuncipha kwenani nekhwalithi yama-oocytes, futhi le nto iba sobala ikakhulukazi ngemuva kweminyaka engama-35.
texts.t3280: Iminyaka ingenye yezinto ezizinzile nezibalulekile ngokomzimba zokukhiqiza inzalo, nakuba ukwehluka komuntu ngamunye kukhona.
texts.t3282: Iminyaka ithinta hhayi kuphela ithuba lokukhulelwa kodwa futhi nengozi yokulahlekelwa ukukhulelwa nezinkinga zokukhulelwa. Ngokwezokwelapha, lokhu kusho ukuhlela kusenesikhathi nangokwazi okwengeziwe, ikakhulukazi uma sekukhona imijikelezo engajwayelekile noma ezinye izingozi.
texts.t3283: iminyaka engama-35+ futhi akukho ukukhulelwa izinyanga eziyisi-6
texts.t3290: Isamba samaqanda siyisici esingaqondile senani lama-follicles asele kanye nesiphendulo esilindelekile samaqanda, kunokuba kube ukuhlolwa okuqondile kokukhiqiza inzalo ngokwemvelo lapha manje.
texts.t3291: Ukuncipha kwesamba samaqanda akusho ngokuzenzakalelayo ukuthi ukukhulelwa ngokwemvelo akunakwenzeka, kodwa kunikeza ulwazi olubalulekile mayelana nempilo yokuzala kanye nesiphendulo esilindelekile.
texts.t3292: Isamba samaqanda kuwukuhlola isamba sama-follicles esibelethweni.
texts.t3293: I-AMH kanye nenani lama-follicles asiza ukuhlola isamba samaqanda, ikakhulukazi kwezokwelapha zokuzala. Nokho, izivivinyo ezinjalo akufanele zisetshenziswe njengethuluzi elikhulu lokubikezela ukukhiqiza inzalo ngokwemvelo kuwo wonke umuntu ngaphandle kwenhloso yezokwelapha.
texts.t3295: izinguquko ezisheshayo zomjikelezo noma izimpawu ze-POI
texts.t3298: Indlela yokwazi ukuthi sekuyisikhathi sokuqala ukuhlolwa kokungazali
texts.t3300: Ukuhlolwa kokungazali kufanele kuqale uma imizamo isidlule isikhathi esilindelekile noma uma kunezingozi ezicacile ezenza ukulinda kungabi namqondo.
texts.t3301: Umhlahlandlela oyinhloko akuyona nje inani lezinyanga, kodwa futhi iminyaka, ukujwayeleka kokukhulelwa, umlando wokuhlinzwa, i-endometriosis, izifo, nesici sowesilisa.
texts.t3302: Ukuqala kokuhlolwa kuncike esikhathini semizamo nezingozi.
texts.t3303: Uma kukhona imijikelezo engajwayelekile, ukukhulelwa okusolwayo, isici sowesilisa esaziwayo, i-endometriosis, izingozi zamathumbu, noma izizathu ezihlobene neminyaka, ukulinda isikhathi esijwayelekile akuhlali kunengqondo.
texts.t3307: indlela yokwazi ukuthi sekuyisikhathi sokuqala ukuhlolwa kokungazali
texts.t3310: Ngemva kwezinyanga ezingaki zokuzama ukubona udokotela
texts.t3312: Ngokuvamile, usizo lufunwa ngemuva kwezinyanga eziyi-12 zemizamo kulabo abangaphansi kweminyaka engama-35, ngemuva kwezinyanga eziyisi-6 kulabo abangu-35 nangaphezulu, futhi kulabo abangaphezu kweminyaka engama-40, kungcono ukuxoxa ngokuhlolwa ngokushesha.
texts.t3313: Lezi zikhathi zisebenza ocansini olungavikelekile olujwayelekile ngaphandle kwesizathu esicacile sokungazali.
texts.t3314: Isikhathi sokufuna usizo sincike eminyakeni nasemongweni.
texts.t3315: Uma kukhona ukukhulelwa okungajwayelekile noma ezinye izinkinga ezicacile, izikhathi zifushane kakhulu.
texts.t3316: iminyaka engama-35+ nezinyanga ezingaphezu kwezi-6 ngaphandle kokukhulelwa
texts.t3318: ngemva kwezinyanga ezingaki zokuzama ukubona udokotela
texts.t3321: Uhlelo lokulungiselela ngaphambi kokukhulelwa oluhamba ngezinyathelo
texts.t3323: Ukulungiselela ngaphambi kokukhulelwa kufaka ukuhlolwa komjikelezo, ukwengezwa kwe-folic acid, ukubuyekezwa kwemithi, ukugoma, ukuphathwa kwezifo eziphikelelayo, nokuqonda iwindi elizala.
texts.t3324: Indlela engcono kakhulu ngaphambi kokukhulelwa akuyona isethi yezeluleko eziphithizelayo, kodwa ukulungiselela okuhlelekile kwempilo nesikhathi.
texts.t3325: Ukulungiselela ukukhulelwa kuqala ngaphambi kokuhlolwa okuhle.
texts.t3326: Ukuvakashelwa ngaphambi kokukhulelwa kusetshenziselwa ukuhlola izifo eziphikelelayo, imithi, ukudla, isisindo somzimba, imikhuba yokuphila, impilo yengqondo, isimo sokuzivikela, nezingozi zosulelo.
texts.t3329: uhlelo lokulungiselela ngaphambi kokukhulelwa oluhamba ngezinyathelo
texts.t3333: Iwindi elizala libalwa hhayi ngosuku lwe-14 oluyinganekwane, kodwa ngamathuba angempela okukhulelwa: ngokuvamile, izinsuku ezi-5 ngaphambi kokukhulelwa kanye nosuku lokukhulelwa.
texts.t3334: Ngemijikelezo ejwayelekile, ukubalwa kulula, kodwa ngokukhulelwa okuguquguqukayo, kungcono ukuthembela kuzimpawu zomzimba kunekhalenda kuphela.
texts.t3335: Iwindi elizala yisikhathi samathuba aphezulu okukhulelwa eduze kokukhulelwa.
texts.t3336: Ukubalwa kwekhalenda kunikeza umhlahlandlela kuphela. Indlela yasekhaya enembile kakhulu ifaka inhlanganisela yokulandelela umjikelezo, izivivinyo ze-LH, kanye nesikhwehlela sesibeletho, kunosuku olulodwa lwezibalo.
texts.t3342: Izinsuku ezinhle kakhulu zokukhulelwa ngokuvamile ziwela izinsuku ezi-1-2 ngaphambi kokukhulelwa kanye nosuku lokukhulelwa.
texts.t3343: Ngokuvamile, izinsuku ngaphambi kokukhulelwa zinquma ngoba isidoda singaphila, kuyilapho iqanda linempilo emfushane.
texts.t3344: Izinsuku ezinhle kakhulu zokukhulelwa ngokuvamile ziza ngaphambi kokukhulelwa.
texts.t3345: Kunenzuzo enkulu ukumboza iwindi kusenesikhathi kunokuzama ukushaya usuku olulodwa olucatshangwa ukuthi luphelele.
texts.t3352: Ukuqonda iwindi elizala, ucansi olujwayelekile, ukulawula izici zendlela yokuphila, nokuhlolwa ngesikhathi uma kukhona okungahambi kahle kusiza ukwandisa amathuba okukhulelwa ngokwemvelo.
texts.t3353: Izinyathelo ezisiza kakhulu zilula: shaya izinsuku ezizala, wehlise izici eziyingozi, futhi ungabambezeli ukuhlolwa uma kunezinkinga ezicacile.
texts.t3354: Isikhathi nempilo yonke yokuzala kwandisa amathuba okukhulelwa.
texts.t3355: Ayikho isengezo somlingo noma i-biohack eyodwa ezokwandisa kakhulu amathuba okukhulelwa kuwo wonke umuntu. Okubaluleke kakhulu: ucansi olujwayelekile ngesikhathi sewindi elizala, ukuyeka ukubhema, isisindo esinempilo, i-folic acid, kanye nokubuyekezwa kwezici zombhangqwana.
texts.t3361: Yimuphi umkhuba wokuphila othuthukisa ukukhiqiza inzalo
texts.t3363: Ukukhiqiza inzalo kusekelwa ukuyeka ukubhema, umsebenzi womzimba ophakathi, ubuthongo obanele, isisindo esanele, ukunciphisa utshwala, nokulawula ukucindezeleka.
texts.t3364: Indlela yokuphila ayibuyisele ukuhlolwa kokungazali, kodwa ithinta ukukhulelwa, ikhwalithi yesidoda, kanye nempilo yonke yokuzala.
texts.t3365: Indlela yokuphila ingasekela noma iphule ukukhiqiza inzalo.
texts.t3366: Ukuhlolwa ngaphambi kokukhulelwa kugcizelela izici eziguqukayo: ukubhema, utshwala, ukudla, isisindo somzimba, umsebenzi womzimba, imithi, nezifo eziphikelelayo.
texts.t3370: yimuphi umkhuba wokuphila othuthukisa ukukhiqiza inzalo
texts.t3375: Kokubili isisindo esiphansi nesisindo esikhulu kunganciphisa amathuba okukhulelwa ngokuthinta ukukhulelwa nendawo yokuziphatha.
texts.t3376: Isisindo asiyona indaba yokubukeka, kodwa ingenye yezinto zomzimba zokuzala.
texts.t3377: Isisindo somzimba sithinta amathuba okukhulelwa ngokusebenzisa ukulawulwa kwehomoni nokuziphatha.
texts.t3378: Ngokwezokwelapha, akuyona nje inombolo eyodwa ebalulekile, kodwa umongo: izinga lokushintsha kwesisindo, ukudla, ukutholakala kwamandla, ukumelana ne-insulin, nomjikelezo.
texts.t3385: Isisindo esiphansi nokushoda kwamandla kungavimba ukukhulelwa ngokusebenzisa ukuphazamiseka kwe-hypothalamic.
texts.t3386: Ukuze ukukhulelwa kwenzeke, akuyona nje i-body mass index ebalulekile, kodwa futhi ukutholakala kwamandla, izinga lokulahlekelwa kwesisindo, nesignali yokuphepha kokuziphatha.
texts.t3388: Ekushodeni kwamandla, ukukhishwa kwe-GnRH okuphindaphindayo kuyancipha, ukuvuselelwa kwe-LH/FSH kuncipha, futhi i-oligomenorrhea noma i-anovulation iyenzeka.
texts.t3395: Isisindo esikhulu singanciphisa amathuba okukhulelwa ngokuthinta ukukhulelwa, ukulawulwa kwe-insulin, nokulinganisa kwehomoni.
texts.t3396: Lokhu akusho ukuthi ukukhulelwa akunakwenzeka, kodwa ngokwezokwelapha, isisindo esikhulu singaba yingxenye yokuphazamiseka kokukhulelwa nomthwalo wokuziphatha.
texts.t3397: Isisindo esikhulu singaphazamisa ukukhulelwa namathuba okukhulelwa.
texts.t3398: Inkinga ivame ukuhlotshaniswa nenhlanganisela yokumelana ne-insulin, i-PCOS, izinguquko zokuvuvukala, nezinguquko zokuziphatha.
texts.t3404: Ukudla lapho uhlela ukukhulelwa kufanele kusekele amandla anele, amaprotheni anele, izakhi ezincane, kanye nesikhathi esiqhubekayo, kunokulinganisa okukhulu.
texts.t3405: Inhloso enkulu ukulungiselela umzimba ukukhulelwa nokukhulelwa kwasekuqaleni, hhayi ukusungula ukudla okuphelele nganoma iyiphi intengo.
texts.t3406: Ukudla ngesikhathi se-TTC kufanele kube ngokwanele futhi kuqhubeke.
texts.t3407: I-ACOG igcizelela ukudla okwanele nokulinganiselayo, ukubuyekezwa kokushoda, kanye ne-folic acid.
texts.t3414: Umsebenzi womzimba ophakathi usekela impilo yokuzala, kodwa ukuzivocavoca ngokweqile okuhlanganiswe nokushoda kwamandla kungaphazamisa ukukhulelwa.
texts.t3415: Kubalulekile ukuhlukanisa phakathi komsebenzi onempilo nokucindezeleka kokuqeqesha ngokunganele ukubuyisela.
texts.t3416: Umsebenzi womzimba ungasekela futhi uphazamise ukukhiqiza inzalo.
texts.t3417: Ukunyakaza kuyasiza empilweni yokuziphatha kanye nokulungiselela ukukhulelwa. Nokho, ngemithwalo ephezulu kakhulu, ikakhulukazi ngokumelene nesizinda sokulinganisa kokudla, i-anovulation ingenzeka.
texts.t3424: Ubuthongo buhlobene nempilo yokuzala ngokusebenzisa ukulawulwa kwehomoni, ukumelana nokucindezeleka, nokubuyiselwa komzimba wonke.
texts.t3425: Ubuthongo obubi akuyona imbangela eyodwa yokungazali, kodwa ukushoda kobuthongo okuqhubekayo kubhebhethekisa indawo yokuziphatha kanye ne-neuroendocrine.
texts.t3426: Ubuthongo buyingxenye yendawo lapho uhlelo lokuzala lusebenza khona.
texts.t3427: Ubuthongo obuhle buthinta ukucindezeleka, isifiso sokudla, isimo sengqondo, ubuhlungu, kanye nekhono lokugcina indlela yokuphila eqhubekayo.
texts.t3434: Ukucindezeleka kungathinta umjikelezo, impilo yezocansi, nokuziphatha, kodwa ngokwaso, akuchazi zonke izikhathi zokukhulelwa ezingenzeki.
texts.t3435: Kubalulekile ukugwema kokubili ukweqisa nokulahla indima yokucindezeleka.
texts.t3436: Ukucindezeleka kungaphazamisa i-TTC, kodwa akuyona incazelo ejwayelekile yokungazali.
texts.t3437: Ukucindezeleka kungaphazamisa isikhathi, ubuthongo, ucansi, nokukhulelwa kubantu abathintekayo, kodwa akubuyisele ukuxilongwa uma kunenkinga yangempela.
texts.t3445: Ukubhema kuphazamisa ukukhiqiza inzalo futhi kuhlotshaniswa nemiphumela emibi yokuzala; ngakho-ke, uma i-TTC, ukuyeka ukubhema kungenye yezinyathelo ezibaluleke kakhulu.
texts.t3446: Lokhu kusebenza kokubili ukubhema okusebenzayo nokuchayeka ngaphakathi kombhangqwana.
texts.t3447: Ukubhema kuyinto ebhekwa njengokuyingozi empilweni yokuzala.
texts.t3448: Ukuyeka ukubhema kungenye yezinyathelo ezisebenzayo ngaphambi kokukhulelwa ezinokuzuza kwangempela.
texts.t3455: Kuhle ukunciphisa utshwala lapho uhlela ukukhulelwa, futhi uma ukukhulelwa kwenzeka, akukho umthamo ophephile obhekwa njengosunguliwe.
texts.t3456: Uma i-TTC, udaba akuyona nje ukukhiqiza inzalo kodwa futhi ukuthi ukukhulelwa kungenzeka ngaphambi kokuba kwaziwe.
texts.t3457: Utshwala alusize ukukhiqiza inzalo futhi luphazamisa indlela yokuphila ngaphambi kokukhulelwa.
texts.t3458: I-CDC igcizelela izingozi zotshwala ngesikhathi sokukhulelwa, ngakho-ke kungcono ukungabambezeli ingxoxo ngotshwala kuze kube ukuhlolwa okuhle.
texts.t3466: Ukusetshenziswa kwekhofi okulinganiselwe kuvame ukubhekwa njengokwamukelekayo uma uzama ukukhulelwa, kodwa izilinganiso eziphezulu kakhulu kufanele zigwenywe.
texts.t3467: Ikhofi akuyona into eyinhloko ku-TTC, kodwa ukulinganisela okufanele kufanelana nesu lokuzama ukukhulelwa.
texts.t3468: Ikhofi ngenkathi uzama ukukhulelwa kuvame ukudinga ukulinganisela kunokwesaba.
texts.t3469: Indlela ethule iyasiza ngokwesayensi: ungagxili ekhofini elilodwa, kodwa ungacabangi ukuthi ukusetshenziswa kwekhofi okuphezulu kakhulu akuthinti impilo yonke, ukulala, nokukhathazeka.
texts.t3471: ukungakwazi ukulala nokukhathazeka ngenkathi uzama ukukhulelwa
texts.t3477: Ukuthatha i-folic acid kufanele kuqale ngaphambi kokukhulelwa ngoba ukuvaleka kwe-neural tube kwenzeka kusenesikhathi, ngokuvamile ngaphambi kokuba ukukhulelwa kuqapheleke.
texts.t3478: Lena ingenye yezinyathelo ezihlonziwe kakhulu ngaphambi kokukhulelwa ezinokuhlomula okuvimbelayo kwangempela.
texts.t3479: I-folic acid iyisengezo esiyisisekelo sokuzama ukukhulelwa.
texts.t3480: 400 mcg ye-folic acid ngosuku kunconywa kwabesifazane abaningi abaneminyaka yokuzala abangakhulelwa; kulabo abasengozini enkulu, izilinganiso zingahluka.
texts.t3489: Izivivinyo ngaphambi kokukhulelwa zikhethwa ngokusekelwe emlandweni nasezinhlekeleleni, kunokuba kube uhlu lokuhlola olungenamkhawulo kubo bonke.
texts.t3490: Indlela kufanele ibe nesisindo: ukuhlola izifo ezingamahlalakhona, izifo ezithathelwanayo njengoba kubonisiwe, isimo somzimba, kwesinye isikhathi i-TSH, i-HbA1c, nezinye izivivinyo kuye ngesimo.
texts.t3492: Ukuvakashela ngaphambi kokukhulelwa kuyadingeka ukuze kugwenywe ukuhlola konke ngokungakhethi futhi esikhundleni salokho kuhlelwe ukuhlolwa ngokusekelwe emlandweni, ubudala, imithi, ukuvikelwa, izingozi zomndeni, nezimpawu.
texts.t3494: umlando wokuphuphuma kwebele noma ukuvuthwa okungajwayelekile
texts.t3500: Kubalulekile ukuxoxa ngokuvikelwa ngaphambi kokukhulelwa kusenesikhathi, ngoba ezinye izivikelo kungcono ukuhlolwa nokuphathwa ngesikhathi sokuhlela.
texts.t3501: Inhloso eyinhloko ukunciphisa izingozi ezingavinjelwa kumuntu okhulelwe nasefetus.
texts.t3503: Ukubonisana ngaphambi kokukhulelwa kufaka phakathi ukubuyekezwa kwesimo somzimba nokuxoxisana ngezivikelo ngokusekelwe ebudaleni, emlandweni, nasezinhlekeleleni.
texts.t3505: ukuhlela ukukhulelwa ngaphandle kokubuyekezwa ngaphambi kokukhulelwa
texts.t3511: Ngaphambi kokukhulelwa, kubalulekile ukuhlola ingozi yezifo ezingathinta inkambo yokukhulelwa, ukuzala, noma ezidinga ukwelashwa ngesikhathi sokuhlela.
texts.t3512: Lokhu akukhona ukuhlolwa okuphelele kwakho konke, kodwa indlela eqondisiwe ngokusekelwe emlandweni, ukuvikelwa, nasezinhlekeleleni.
texts.t3513: Ukuhlolwa kwezifo ngaphambi kokukhulelwa kuncike esimweni.
texts.t3514: Ngokwesayensi, izifo nesimo somzimba esithinta ukukhulelwa nempilo yokuzala, kanye ne-STIs ngokusekelwe ezinhlekeleleni, kubaluleke kakhulu.
texts.t3523: Isici sowesilisa sidlala indima ebalulekile ekukhulelweni, futhi ukuzala akukwazi ukuhlolwa ngokusekelwe kowesifazane kuphela.
texts.t3524: Ukukhulelwa kuwumsebenzi wesibili; ngakho-ke, ukunganaki isidoda nomlando wezokwelapha wesilisa kuyiphutha elivamile kwezokwelapha.
texts.t3525: Isici sowesilisa siyingxenye ephelele yokuhlola ukuzala.
texts.t3526: Ngisho nangesici esisobala sowesifazane, isici sowesilisa singase sihlale khona. Ngakho-ke, ezimweni zokuzama isikhathi eside, kubalulekile ukuhlola bobabili abalingani.
texts.t3534: Kuyasiza ukuhlola ukuhlaziywa kwesidoda somlingani ekuqaleni kokuhlolwa kokungazali, kunokuba kushiyelwe isigaba sokugcina.
texts.t3535: Lokhu kubaluleke kakhulu ngoba isici sowesilisa sivamile futhi singase sihlale khona nesici sowesifazane.
texts.t3536: Ukuhlaziywa kwesidoda kuyingxenye eyisisekelo yokuhlola ukungazali kwesibili.
texts.t3537: Ukuhlolwa kwesidoda kungenye yezingxenye zokuqala nezisebenzayo zokuhlolwa kokungazali. Ukulibazisa izinyanga kuyinkinga evamile futhi engadingekile yokuchitha isikhathi.
texts.t3538: izinyanga eziyi-12 TTC ngaphambi kweminyaka engu-35
texts.t3546: Ukuhlela ukukhulelwa kuyasebenza kakhulu futhi kuqinisa ngokwengqondo uma kuwumsebenzi ohlanganyelwe wesibili, kunokuba kube iphrojekthi yomuntu oyedwa.
texts.t3547: Indlela ehlanganyelwe inciphisa ukungalingani komthwalo futhi isiza ukubheka isici sowesilisa, isikhathi, ukucindezeleka, nemikhawulo yangempela yabalingani bobabili ngesikhathi.
texts.t3549: Kubalulekile ukuxoxa hhayi kuphela ngefasitela elizala kodwa futhi nangokujwayelekile kokuhlangana ngokocansi, isimo sengqondo ngeshejuli, ukucindezeleka, ukubhema, utshwala, ukulala, umlando wezokwelapha, nokulungela kokubili abalingani ukuhlolwa.
texts.t3555: Yini okufanele uyenze uma ukuvuthwa kungajwayelekile
texts.t3556: Ngekuvuthwa okungajwayelekile, kubalulekile hhayi kuphela ukuzama ukubala ifasitela elizala kodwa futhi nokufuna imbangela: i-PCOS, ukucindezeleka, ukuntuleka kwamandla, izinkinga zesitho samathumbu, i-prolactin, nezinye izici.
texts.t3557: Ukuvuthwa okungajwayelekile akukhona nje umjikelezo ongemuhle, kodwa futhi kuyisikhumbuzo sezokwelapha mayelana nokungasebenzi kahle kokuvuthwa okungenzeka.
texts.t3559: Uma ukuvuthwa kungaqondakali, i-TTC esekelwe ekhalendeni iba nzima kakhulu. Kodwa umbuzo oyinhloko akukhona ukuthi ungabala kanjani izinsuku ngokuhlakanipha, kodwa kungani umjikelezo ungazinzile.
texts.t3563: Yini okufanele uyenze uma ukukhulelwa kungenzeki
texts.t3565: Uma ukukhulelwa kungenzeki, kubalulekile ukungagxili ekulandeleni okungapheli, kodwa ukuhamba ekuhloleni okuhlelekile kwesibili ngesikhathi esifanele.
texts.t3566: Isinyathelo esilandelayo sincike ebudaleni, isikhathi sokuzama, ukuvuthwa okujwayelekile, isici sowesilisa, nezinye izingozi.
texts.t3567: Uma ukukhulelwa kungenzeki, kudingeka uhlelo, hhayi nje ukukhathazeka okwengeziwe nezeluleko ezivela ku-inthanethi.
texts.t3568: I-algorithm esebenzayo: qinisekisa isikhathi nobuningi bokuhlangana ngokocansi, hlola umjikelezo, cabanga ngemininingwane yobudala, isici sowesilisa, ubuhlungu, ukuhlinzwa, izifo, nezifo ezingamahlalakhona, bese uqhubeka nokuhlolwa okuqondisiwe.
texts.t3569: izinyanga eziyi-12 TTC ngaphansi kweminyaka engu-35
texts.t3570: noma iyiphi ingozi esobala noma iminyaka engu-40+
texts.t3571: yini okufanele uyenze uma ukukhulelwa kungenzeki
texts.t3575: Ucansi ngesikhathi sokukhulelwa kungenzeka, kodwa induduzo, inhlanzeko, ingozi yezifo, nethuba lokukhulelwa kuncike esimweni.
texts.t3576: Kwabanye abantu, ucansi ngesikhathi sokukhulelwa kuyamukeleka futhi kuyakhululeka; kwabanye, akunjalo. Ngokwezokwelapha, ukuvuma, ukuvikelwa, induduzo, nokuqonda ukuthi ukukhulelwa akususi izingozi ze-STIs nokukhulelwa kubalulekile.
texts.t3577: Ucansi ngesikhathi sokukhulelwa ngokwalo aluvinjelwe, kodwa ludinga izimiso zokuphepha nenduduzo ezifanayo njengakwezinye izinsuku zomjikelezo.
texts.t3578: Ukukhulelwa akusho ukuthi ucansi luyingozi noma luyingozi. Nokho, lungashintsha izimo ezisebenzayo: igazi eliningi, ukugcotshwa okuhlukile, ukungakhululeki okungenzeka, ukucindezeleka kwengqondo, nezinkinga zenhlanzeko. Ukuvikelwa kwe-barrier kusalokhu kufaneleka, futhi noma yimaphi ama-tampons noma izinkomishi kufanele zisuswe ngaphambi kocansi. Uma ucansi luhambisana nobuhlungu, iphunga, umkhuhlane, noma ukungakhululeki okukhulu, akusaseyona nje indaba yokukhetha.
texts.t3579: umjikelezo uthinta induduzo, ukugcotshwa, ifasitela elizala, nemizwa, kodwa awunqumi isimo esijwayelekile

texts.t3590: Kulesi sigaba, isikhathi, amaphethini ezimpawu, nekhwalithi yesipiliyoni socansi kubaluleke kakhulu kunamaphuzu elabhorethri.

texts.t3598: ukukhathazeka okukhulu, izingxabano, nokucindezeleka kwengqondo okuhambisana nocansi ngesikhathi se-TTC
texts.t3604: ungathembisi usuku oluqondile lokukhulelwa noma uqinisekise imiphumela ngokusekelwe kumthetho owodwa
texts.t3605: kweminye imibuzo, ukulungisa okulindelwe, isikhathi, nenduduzo kuyasiza

texts.t3612: uma inhloso kungukucansi okukhululekile, gxila ekuvumeni, ekuvikelweni, ekugcotshweni, nasekuntulekeni kobuhlungu

texts.t3615: ukunciphisa konke ukuhlela ukukhulelwa kosuku olulodwa lomjikelezo

texts.t3620: thola ukuthi umbuzo ungowokuphepha, induduzo, i-TTC, noma izici zengqondo nezocansi

texts.t3626: Kubaluleke kakhulu ku-ASRM, ACOG, CDC, nezibuyekezo zokulandelela ukuvuthwa nokugcotshwa; imithetho esebenzayo kunemithetho edumile ibalulekile kulesi sigaba.
texts.t3634: umjikelezo uthinta isipiliyoni socansi, kodwa ukuhlolwa kwezokwelapha kusekelwe enhlosweni: induduzo, ukuphepha, noma i-TTC
texts.t3636: ngempilo yezocansi, ubuhlungu nokopha kubaluleke kakhulu kunokuchazwa kwekhalenda

texts.t3638: ezimweni zobuhlungu nokoma, xoxa ngokugcotshwa, imbangela yezimpawu, nokuhlolwa kwezokwelapha okungenzeka
texts.t3639: uma kukhona ukucindezeleka okuhambisana nocansi, shintshela kushejuli kuya kucebo lokuxhumana nokuhlela elizinzile
texts.t3640: ungathembisi ukuthi isenzo esisodwa socansi ngosuku 'olufanele' luzoxazulula konke
texts.t3641: ungazinaki ubuhlungu, ukoma, noma ukopha ngenxa yokuzama ukukhulelwa
texts.t3642: Esihlokweni socansi nomjikelezo, umthombo oyinhloko wamaphutha ukuxuba ibhayoloji yefasitela elizala namasiko adumile nezinkolelo zokuziphatha; izeluleko ezisebenzayo zivame ukuba lula kunalokho okulindelwe abasebenzisi.
texts.t3645: Ucansi ngesikhathi sokukhulelwa lungaphephile uma lufiswa, lukhululekile, futhi kuvikelwe kahle, kodwa ukukhulelwa akususi ingozi ye-STIs.
texts.t3646: Ukuvikelwa kwe-barrier nokunakwa kwezimpawu kusalokhu kufaneleka kunoma yisiphi isigaba somjikelezo, kuhlanganise nokukhulelwa.
texts.t3647: Ukuphepha kocansi ngesikhathi sokukhulelwa kunqunywa hhayi ngokuba khona kwegazi, kodwa ngezinga lokuvikelwa, induduzo, nokuntuleka kwezimpawu ezikhathazayo.
texts.t3648: Ungaba nocansi ngesikhathi sokukhulelwa uma kungabangeli ubuhlungu futhi uma imithetho efanayo yokuphepha kwezocansi ilandelwa njenganoma yisiphi esinye isikhathi: ukuvuma, ukuvikelwa okufanele, ukuvikelwa kwe-STIs, nokuntuleka kwezimpawu ezinganakwa. Igazi alisona isimo sokuvikelwa futhi alisusi ukuvikelwa kwe-barrier. Isimo se-anatomical nesemicrobiological sokukhulelwa asenzi umuntu 'angavikeleki' ezifo.
texts.t3651: akukho ukuvikelwa okufanele uma kunengozi ye-STIs
texts.t3657: Yebo, ukukhulelwa ngesikhathi sokukhulelwa kungenzeka, ikakhulukazi uma umjikelezo umfishane, ukuvuthwa kusekuqaleni, noma ukopha kuthathwa njengokujwayelekile.
texts.t3658: Ukukhulelwa akusona isivikelo esithembekile sokukhulelwa. Ingozi incike esikhathini sangempela sokuvuthwa nokuphila kwesidoda.
texts.t3659: Ucansi ngesikhathi sokukhulelwa aluqinisekisi ukungabi khona kokukhulelwa.
texts.t3660: Isizathu esiyinhloko sokudideka ukuthi abantu bacabanga ngamagama ekhalenda: 'njengoba ngikhulelwa, ukuvuthwa kusekude.' Kodwa ngemijikelezo emifushane noma ukuvuthwa okungazinzile, isidoda singaphila kuze kube ifasitela elizala. Ngaphezu kwalokho, akuwona wonke ukopha okuyisikhathi esigcwele: ukopha phakathi komjikelezo noma ukopha kokuqala kungathathwa ngokungalungile.
texts.t3668: Ucansi ngesikhathi sefesitela elizala kubaluleke kakhulu ekukhulelweni ngoba isidoda singaphila izinsuku ezimbalwa, kuyilapho iqanda liphila isikhathi esifushane.
texts.t3669: Ngokusebenzayo, kubaluleke kakhulu ukungalindi usuku oluqondile lokuvuthwa, kodwa ukuba nocansi ngezinsuku lapho ifasitela selivuliwe.
texts.t3670: Ifasitela elizala yizinsuku zethuba eliphakeme kakhulu lokukhulelwa eduze nokuvuthwa.
texts.t3671: Ifasitela elizala ngokwemvelo livame ukufaka izinsuku ezi-5 ngaphambi kokuvuthwa nosuku lokuvuthwa. Ngakho-ke, ucansi oluyisihluthulelo luvame ukwenzeka hhayi 'ngokuqondile ngesikhathi sokuvuthwa,' kodwa izinsuku ezi-1-2 ngaphambi kwalo. Ngalesi sisho, ukulandelela isikhwehlela somlomo wesibeletho, izivivinyo ze-LH, nephatheni lomjikelezo jikelele kuyasiza kakhulu kunokuthembela kuphela ngosuku lwekhalenda.
texts.t3672: ukungaqondi ifasitela elizala uma uzama ukukhulelwa
texts.t3678: Uma uhlela ukukhulelwa, izinsuku zikhethwa hhayi ngokusekelwe osukwini lwezinkolelo olungu-14, kodwa ngokusekelwe efesiteleni elizala nezimpawu zokufika kokuvuthwa.
texts.t3679: Ngokusebenzayo, umuntu uthembele esikhwehlela, izivivinyo ze-LH, nokubikezela komjikelezo, kunokuba nje ekhalendeni.
texts.t3680: Ukukhulelwa, kuwusizo ukuhlose izinsuku ngaphambi kokuvuthwa nosuku lokuvuthwa.
texts.t3681: Iphutha elivamile kakhulu ukulinda usuku olulodwa 'oluphelele'. Indlela enengqondo kakhulu iwukumboza ifasitela elizala ngokuhlangana okuningana ngokocansi. Uma umjikelezo uyahlukahluka, ikhalenda iba ithuluzi elibuthakathaka, futhi indima yezimpawu zangempela iyanda: isikhwehlela, i-LH, nephatheni lomjikelezo jikelele.
texts.t3682: izinyanga eziningana zokuzama ngaphandle kokuqonda ifasitela
texts.t3686: Kangaki ukuba nocansi uma uhlela ukukhulelwa
texts.t3688: Uma uzama ukukhulelwa, ucansi oluvamile ngesikhathi sefesitela elizala luyasiza, kuyilapho ucansi olujwayelekile izikhathi ezi-2-3 ngesonto luvame ukuba lusebenzayo cishe futhi lunciphisa ukucindezeleka.
texts.t3689: I-ASRM iphakamisa ukuthi ukuhlangana njalo ezinsukwini eziyi-1-2 ngesikhathi sefesitela elizala kunikeza amathuba aphezulu, kodwa iningi lezibili akufanele liqinise noma likhinyabeze ishejuli yalo ngokweqile.
texts.t3690: Ucansi olungajwayelekile kakhulu lunganciphisa ithuba lokushaya ifasitela elizala, kuyilapho ishejuli eqinile kakhulu ingakhulisa ukucindezeleka.
texts.t3691: Ngokusebenzayo, odokotela bavame ukuncoma ukuhlangana njalo ezinsukwini eziyi-1-2 efesiteleni elisolisayo noma nje ucansi olujwayelekile izikhathi eziningana ngesonto uma isikhathi esinemininingwane eningi sibangela ukucindezeleka. Uhlelo oluzinzile nolungokoqobo luwusizo kakhulu kuneshejuli 'ephelele' kodwa eyonakalisa ngokwengqondo.
texts.t3693: ukuhlangana okungajwayelekile kakhulu uma uzama ukukhulelwa
texts.t3694: kangaki ukuba nocansi uma uhlela ukukhulelwa
texts.t3698: Ukugcotshwa kwemvelo kuvame ukushintsha phakathi kwezikhathi zomjikelezo: kuvame ukuba khona okwengeziwe eduze nokuvuthwa, futhi kungase kube kuncane ngemuva kokuvuthwa nangesikhathi i-estrogen iphansi.
texts.t3699: I-estrogen yenza isikhwehlela sibe manzi futhi sikhululeke, ngakho-ke ukugcotshwa ngokocansi nemizwa kungashintsha phakathi nomjikelezo.
texts.t3700: Ukugcotshwa akuncikile kuphela ekuvuseleleni kodwa futhi kumongo wehomoni, isigaba somjikelezo, nesimo sezindwangu zomzimba.
texts.t3701: Abanye abantu bazizwa benokugcotshwa kwemvelo okwengeziwe ngesikhathi se-periovulatory, futhi kuncane kwezinye izigaba. Kodwa lokhu akuyona imithetho eqinile: ukucindezeleka, ukukhathala, imithi, ukukhathazeka, ubuhlungu, ukuncelisa, nezici zezindwangu zomzimba kungaba nomthelela omkhulu kunomjikelezo uqobo. Ngakho-ke, ukuntuleka kokugcotshwa 'okuphelele' ngesikhathi sokuvuthwa akusho inkinga ngokwalo.
texts.t3710: I-libido ingashintsha phakathi kwezikhathi zomjikelezo, futhi kwabanye abantu, iphakeme eduze nokuvuthwa, kodwa lezi zinguquko zihluke kakhulu kumuntu ngamunye.
texts.t3711: Ukuntuleka kwe-'libido peak' akufanele kubhekwe njengokuphazamiseka: isifiso socansi sinqunywa hhayi amahomoni kuphela kodwa futhi nobudlelwano, ukucindezeleka, ubuhlungu, nokukhathala.
texts.t3712: Umjikelezo ungathinta i-libido, kodwa awuyali ngendlela efanayo kuwo wonke umuntu.
texts.t3713: Umbono odumile wokuthi i-libido kufanele ngempela inyuke ngesikhathi sokuvuthwa uyaphikiswa. Kwabanye abantu, lokhu kuyiqiniso; kwabanye, akunjalo. Kubaluleke kakhulu ukubheka iphethini yakho ephindaphindayo kunokuzifanisa nesikimu esimaphakathi kusuka ezinkundleni zokuxhumana.
texts.t3718: Ubuhlungu ngesikhathi socansi nokuxhumana kwaso nesigaba somjikelezo
texts.t3720: Ubuhlungu ngesikhathi socansi bungashintsha phakathi kwezikhathi zomjikelezo, kodwa abubhekwa njengokujwayelekile ngokwalo ngoba nje bungokwesikhathi.
texts.t3721: Uma ubuhlungu buphindaphinda, ikakhulukazi esigabeni esithile, kuyisikhumbuzo sezokwelapha esibalulekile kunesizathu sokunganaki isimpawu.
texts.t3722: I-dyspareunia yesikhathi idinga ukuhlolwa njengokungathi i-dyspareunia engesiyo yesikhathi.
texts.t3723: Ucansi lungaba buhlungu kakhulu ngokoma, ukuvuvukala, ubuhlungu be-pelvic, i-endometriosis, ukungezwani kwemisipha ye-pelvic floor, nezinye izimo. Ukuxhumana nokukhulelwa noma ukuvuthwa kusiza ukuthola inkinga kodwa akuxazululi umbuzo wembangela. Uma ubuhlungu buphindaphinda, bufanelwe ukuhlolwa, noma ngabe bubonakala buqondakala.
texts.t3725: igazi noma ubuhlungu obukhulu ngemuva kocansi
texts.t3726: ubuhlungu ngesikhathi socansi nokuxhumana kwaso nesigaba somjikelezo
texts.t3730: Ukopha ngemuva kocansi akusho ngaso sonke isikhathi inkinga enkulu, kodwa isimpawu esiphindaphindayo noma esigqamile sidinga ukuhlolwa.
texts.t3731: Isigameko esisodwa esincane singase sihlobene nokungqubuzana, ukoma, noma ukuzwela komlomo wesibeletho, kodwa iphethini eqhubekayo akufanele inakwe.
texts.t3732: Ukopha ngemuva kocansi akubhekwa njengomthetho ojwayelekile.
texts.t3733: Kubalulekile ngokwezokwelapha ukuhlukanisa phakathi kwesigameko esisodwa sokopha nokopha okuqhubekayo ngemuva kocansi. Lokhu kudinga ukunakwa, ikakhulukazi uma kukhona ubuhlungu, iphunga elingathandeki, ukuvuvukala, ukuthinteka kokuxhumana, noma izinguquko zomlomo wesibeletho. Umjikelezo uqobo awuchazi ngokuphelele lesi simo.
texts.t3740: Ukoma nokungakhululeki ngesikhathi socansi kungahlobene nesigaba somjikelezo, i-estrogen ephansi, ukuncelisa, ukucindezeleka, imithi, nokuntuleka kokugcotshwa.
texts.t3741: Lokhu kuyimbangela evamile yobuhlungu ngesikhathi socansi, futhi akufanele kuthathwe njengento engabalulekile.
texts.t3742: Ukoma ngokocansi kuyisimpawu, hhayi ukwehluleka komuntu siqu noma ukuntuleka kwesifiso.
texts.t3743: Ukoma kungaba kwesikhashana futhi kuhlobene nesigaba, noma kungaba okuqhubekayo. Kubalulekile ukuhlola isimo: ukuncelisa, imithi, ama-antidepressants, ama-antihistamines, i-estrogen ephansi, ukukhathazeka, isipiliyoni sobuhlungu, ukuntuleka kokuvuselela, nezinye izici. Ukugcotshwa okuhle nokwelapha imbangela kuvame ukushintsha isimo kakhulu.
texts.t3750: Uma ucansi luphazamisa ukuzama ukukhulelwa futhi uma kungenjalo
texts.t3752: Ucansi olujwayelekile ngokwalo aluphazamisi ukukhulelwa; ngokuvamile, izithiyo yisikhathi esingalungile, ukucindezeleka okukhulu, ubuhlungu, ukuxhumana okungajwayelekile, noma ukungakhululeki okugqamile.
texts.t3753: Ucansi 'ngendlela engalungile' kuvame ukuba yinkinga; ngokuvamile, umbuzo uwukuthi ingabe luwela ngaphakathi kwefasitela elizala nokuthi lwenza inqubo ibe yinkinga kakhulu.
texts.t3754: Ukukhulelwa, isikhathi nobuningi kubaluleke kakhulu kunamasiko nezinkolelo.
texts.t3755: Izibili eziningi ziqala ukufuna 'iphutha' elifihlekile kubuchwepheshe bocansi uqobo, nakuba ngokwezokwelapha, isikhathi, ubuningi, nokuqonda ifasitela elizala kuvame ukuba yizici ezinqumayo. Ucansi lungaphazamisa kuphela uma lunjalo olungajwayelekile, olubuhlungu, olonakalisayo ngokwengqondo, noma uma isibili sigwema ubuhlobo ngezinsuku ezidingekayo ngenxa yokucindezeleka nokukhathala.
texts.t3758: uma ucansi luphazamisa ukuzama ukukhulelwa futhi uma kungenjalo
texts.t3761: Ingabe kuyadingeka ukulala ngemuva kocansi ukuze ukhulelwe
texts.t3763: Ukulala ngokukhethekile ngemuva kocansi ukuze ukhulelwe kuvame ukungadingeki: isidoda singena ngokushesha esikhwehlela somlomo wesibeletho nasezingxenyeni eziphezulu zomgudu wokuzala.
texts.t3764: Lezi zeluleko zidumile, kodwa azikho phakathi kwezimo eziqinisekisiwe zokukhulelwa.
texts.t3765: Ukulala ngemuva kocansi akubhekwa njengesimo esidingekayo ukuze ukukhulelwa kwenzeke.
texts.t3766: Inganekwane yokuthi ngaphandle kokulala isikhathi eside, isidoda 'sizophuma futhi konke kuzolahleka' iyaphikiswa indima yamandla adonsela phansi. Ingxenye enkulu yesidoda iqala ukuhamba ngokushesha. Ngakho-ke, ngemuva kocansi, asikho isidingo sokuguqula ukuzama ukukhulelwa kube yinkolelo yokunganyakazi uma kukhulisa ukucindezeleka. Isikhathi esifanele ngaphakathi kwefasitela elizala sibaluleke kakhulu.
texts.t3768: ukukhathazeka okugqamile ngenxa yokuziphatha 'okungalungile' ngemuva kocansi
texts.t3769: ingabe kuyadingeka ukulala ngemuva kocansi ukuze ukhulelwe
texts.t3774: Azikho izizathu eziqinile zokukholelwa ukuthi i-orgasm yabesifazane iyisimo esidingekayo sokukhulelwa; okubaluleke kakhulu isikhathi sokuhlangana ngokocansi maqondana nefasitela elizala.
texts.t3775: I-orgasm ingathinta induduzo yomuntu siqu nekhwalithi yocansi, kodwa akufanele iguqulwe ibe ngumsebenzi oyisibopho wezokwelapha ukuze ukukhulelwa kwenzeke.
texts.t3777: Isiko elidumile kwesinye isikhathi likhombisa ngokweqile indima ye-orgasm njengesikhuthazi sezokwelapha sokukhulelwa. Nokho, ngokwezokwelapha, isikhathi sokuhlangana ngokocansi, ukuba khona kwesidoda efesiteleni elizala, nokuntuleka kwezinye izithiyo kusalokhu kuyizinto ezibalulekile. Uma ukuzama ukukhulelwa kuguquka kube ukucindezela 'ukuqeda kahle,' kuvame ukonakalisa uhlangothi lwengqondo lwenqubo kunokusiza.
texts.t3783: Ingabe ukugcotshwa kungasetshenziswa uma uhlela ukukhulelwa
texts.t3785: Ukugcotshwa kungasetshenziswa uma uhlela ukukhulelwa, kodwa kubalulekile ukukhumbula ukuthi eminye imikhiqizo ithinta kabi isidoda ku-vitro.
texts.t3786: Uma ukugcotshwa kudingeka ngenxa yokoma noma ubuhlungu, kungcono ukukhetha izinketho ezibekwe njengokukhulelwa-friendly noma isidoda-friendly, futhi ungayinaki imbangela yokoma uqobo.
texts.t3787: Ukugcotshwa akuvinjelwe uma uzama ukukhulelwa, kodwa ukukhetha kubalulekile.
texts.t3788: Ezinye izifundo zelabhorethri zibonise ukwehla kokuhamba kwesidoda ngemikhiqizo ethile edumile yokugcotshwa. Nokho, idatha yokukhulelwa kwangempela iyinkimbinkimbi futhi ayihlali icacile. Indlela enengqondo ngokusebenzayo yilena: uma ukugcotshwa kudingeka, kungcono ukukhetha umkhiqizo wokukhulelwa-friendly futhi ugweme ukusebenzisa imikhiqizo engahleliwe, ikakhulukazi uma ukuzama ukukhulelwa sekuthathe isikhathi eside.
texts.t3789: ukoma okukhulu noma ubuhlungu ngesikhathi socansi
texts.t3790: ukusetshenziswa kwemikhiqizo engahleliwe ngesikhathi sokuzama ukukhulelwa isikhathi eside
texts.t3794: ingabe ukugcotshwa kungasetshenziswa uma uhlela ukukhulelwa
texts.t3799: Ukugcotshwa kwesidoda-friendly kuyimikhiqizo ebekwe njengengalimazi kakhulu isidoda futhi ivame ukukhethwa uma uzama ukukhulelwa.
texts.t3800: Ngokwezokwelapha, akuyona ibhrendi njengenkolo ebalulekile, kodwa isimiso: uma ukugcotshwa kudingeka ngesikhathi se-TTC, kungcono ukukhetha inketho yokukhulelwa-friendly kunomkhiqizo ojwayelekile ongahleliwe.
texts.t3801: Ukugcotshwa kwesidoda-friendly kuyisidoda esinezimangalo zokuhambisana nokuzama ukukhulelwa.
texts.t3802: Izincwadi zibonisa ukuthi imikhiqizo ehlukene ithinta isidoda ngendlela ehlukene ezimeni zelabhorethri. Ngakho-ke, uma uhlela ukukhulelwa, kungcono ukukhetha izinketho eziklanyelwe ngqo le njongo. Nokho, ngisho nokugcotshwa 'okuhle' akuxazululi inkinga uma kukhona ukoma okukhulu, ubuhlungu, isifo, noma ukucindezeleka okukhulu okuhambisana nocansi.
texts.t3804: ukugxila kuphela kumkhiqizo ngaphandle kokuhlola imbangela yokungakhululeki
texts.t3810: Ngemuva kokuhlolwa okuhle kokuvuthwa, ucansi luvame ukuba nencazelo ngosuku lokuhlolwa okuhle nosuku olulandelayo, ngoba ukuvuthwa kungenzeka phakathi namahora angama-24-36.
texts.t3811: Ukuhlolwa kwe-LH okuhle akusona isignali 'yokulinda', kodwa kunalokho iwindi lesenzo uma inhloso ukukhulelwa.
texts.t3812: Ngemuva kokuhlolwa okuhle kwe-LH, asikho isidingo sokulibazisa ucansi.
texts.t3813: Njengoba ukuhlolwa kwe-LH kukhombisa ukufika kokuvuthwa kunokuphela komcimbi, inhloso yokuhlolwa ngokuyisisekelo ukusebenzisa iwindi lamanje. Ukulinda 'usuku olulodwa olungaphezulu lapho ukuvuthwa kwenzeka ngokuqinisekile' kungasebenza ngokumelene nenhloso. Lokhu kungenye yamaphutha avamile okusebenzayo ezibilini ezihumusha ukuhlolwa ngokweqile.
texts.t3814: imijikelezo eminingi enezivivinyo ezinhle ngaphandle kwesikhathi esicacile
texts.t3815: ukukhathazeka okukhulu mayelana nehora eliqondile locansi
texts.t3821: Ukuzila isikhathi eside ngaphambi kokukhulelwa kuvame ukungathathwa njengokudingekayo; ezibilini eziningi, ucansi olujwayelekile luyasebenza kakhulu kunokuhlanganiswa okwenziwe.
texts.t3822: Ukuxhumana ngokocansi okungajwayelekile kakhulu kunganciphisa ngisho nethuba lokushaya ifasitela elizala.
texts.t3823: Uma uzama ukukhulelwa, ukuzila ngokweqile kuvame ukungahlinzeki ngenzuzo ezibilini eziningi.
texts.t3824: Umbono wokuthi isidoda sidinga 'ukugcinwa' isikhathi eside ngangokunokwenzeka akuyona isu eliwusizo ngokujwayelekile. Ngokusebenzayo, ukuzila ngokweqile kunganciphisa ubuningi bokuxhumana ngezinsuku ezidingekayo. Esimweni esijwayelekile, ukujwayeleka okungokoqobo kubaluleke kakhulu kunenkolelo yokuhlanganisa. Izincomo zespermatological zomuntu ngamunye zingahluka, kodwa lokho kuyindaba ehlukile yezokwelapha.
texts.t3833: Ingxoxo evulekile yomjikelezo, ifasitela elizala, izifiso, nemikhawulo inciphisa ukukhathazeka futhi isiza ukwenza ucansi lube luncane ngokomshini futhi lube luhlanganyelwe kakhulu.
texts.t3834: Ingxoxo iyadingeka hhayi kuphela ngezinsuku, kodwa futhi ngobuhlungu, ukoma, ukukhathala, ukucindezeleka, nomthwalo wemizwa.
texts.t3835: Umjikelezo nocansi kungcono ukuxoxwa njengomsebenzi ohlanganyelwe wesibili, kunokuba kube umthwalo womuntu oyedwa.
texts.t3836: Uma umjikelezo uguquka ube iphrojekthi yangaphakathi ethule yomuntu oyedwa, ukwandisa ukungalingani komthwalo. Kubalulekile ngokusebenzayo ukuxoxa kusengaphambili: yiziphi izinsuku ezingaba ifasitela elizala, yini ebangela ukucindezeleka, yini eyenza ucansi lube lukhuni, yiziphi izinhlobo zobuhlobo ezamukelekayo, nokuthi kuphi umugqa phakathi kokuhlela nokucindezela. Lokhu kuyingxenye yezempilo yokuzala neyocansi.
texts.t3845: Ucansi 'oluhleliwe' lungasiza ngesikhathi sokukhulelwa, kodwa kwezinye izibili, lukhulisa ukucindezeleka, lunciphisa isifiso, futhi lwenza ubuhlobo bube yisibopho.
texts.t3846: Kubalulekile ngokwezokwelapha hhayi kuphela ukushaya ifasitela elizala kodwa futhi ukungonakalisi inhlalakahle yezocansi yesibili.
texts.t3847: Ucansi oluhleliwe luwusizo kuphela inqobo nje uma lungabi yinhlekelele yesibili.
texts.t3848: Ipharadoxi yokuhlela ukukhulelwa ukuthi nakuba isikhathi sibalulekile ngokomzimba, ngokwengqondo, ukugxila ngokweqile kushejuli kungonakalisa ikhwalithi yocansi, kukhulise ukukhathazeka, futhi kunciphise ubuningi bokuxhumana. Ngakho-ke, ukuxhumana okusebenzayo kuvame ukusebenza kangcono: qonda ifasitela elizala, kodwa ungaguquli ucansi lube ukuhlolwa ngokuqinile kokuphumelela.
texts.t3855: Ubuhlungu obuhlabayo obuphakathi nendawo esiswini phakathi nomjikelezo
texts.t3856: Ubuhlungu obuhlabayo obuphakathi nendawo phakathi nomjikelezo
texts.t3857: Ubuhlungu obuhlabayo obuncane phakathi nomjikelezo bungase buhlotshaniswe nokuvuthwa, kodwa abuqinisekisi ngokwalo.
texts.t3858: Ubuhlungu obuphakathi nendawo obuphakathi nendawo buvame ukuba buhlungu, kodwa ubuhlungu obukhulu, obukhulayo, noma obungajwayelekile budinga ukuhlolwa okuhlukile.
texts.t3859: Ubuhlungu obuhlabayo obuphakathi nendawo phakathi nomjikelezo bungaba ngokomzimba, kodwa hhayi ngaso sonke isikhathi.
texts.t3860: Ngokwesiko, buhlotshaniswa nesikhathi sokuvuthwa, ukunwebeka nokuphuka kwefollicle, noma ukuvuvukala kwendawo ye-peritoneum. Nokho, noma yibuphi ubuhlungu obuphakathi nendawo phakathi nomjikelezo buhlala buyisimpawu esingacacile: kungase kungahlobene nokuvuthwa. Ngakho-ke, kubalulekile ngokwezokwelapha ukubheka ubukhulu, isikhathi, ukuphindaphinda, nezimpawu ezihambisana nazo.
texts.t3861: ubukhulu, isikhathi, nokuphindaphinda kobuhlungu kubaluleke kakhulu kunencazelo eyodwa
texts.t3862: ubuhlungu besikhathi bungaba ngokomzimba, kodwa akufanele bucatshangelwe ngokuzenzakalelayo
texts.t3863: ubuhlungu obuhambisana nezimpawu zesistimu noma ukuwohloka kokusebenza kudinga ukuhlolwa okukhulu
texts.t3864: uma ubuhlungu buphindaphinda phakathi kwemijikelezo futhi buphazamisa impilo yansuku zonke
texts.t3866: uma kunokuxhumana nocansi, ukuqunjelwa, noma ukuchama
texts.t3872: izimpawu ezihambisana nazo: ukukhishwa, umkhuhlane, ukulahlekelwa umqondo, buthakathaka
texts.t3873: Ngobuhlungu, izici ezinqumayo azikho kumikhawulo yelebhu, kodwa kumongo wezokwelapha, iphethini, nezimpawu ezibomvu.
texts.t3874: isigaba somjikelezo kanye neziganeko ze-prostaglandins/ovulatory → ubuhlungu obungaba khona bemvelo
texts.t3875: ukuvuvukala, i-endometriosis, isifo esingapheli se-pelvic, noma ukulahlekelwa igazi → ubuhlungu obungelapheki nezimpawu ezixwayisayo
texts.t3876: ubuhlungu obufushane obuphakathi nendawo obungenazo izimpawu zesistimu bungaba bungenabungozi
texts.t3877: isigameko esisodwa sobuhlungu asihlali sivumela ukutholakala kwesizathu ngokushesha
texts.t3880: ubuhlungu obunezinga lokushisa, ukulahlekelwa umqondo, ukukhulelwa, ukukhishwa, noma buthakathaka obukhulu

texts.t3884: ukuxilongwa okuthile akunakwenziwa ngokusekelwe kusimptom esisodwa sobuhlungu kuphela ngaphandle kokuhlola umongo
texts.t3885: ubuhlungu obuphakathi nendawo obufushane bomjikelezo ngokuvamile budinga ukubhekwa kanye nedayari
texts.t3886: ubuhlungu obukhulu, obungajwayelekile, obukhulayo, noma obuhambisana nesistimu budinga ukuhlolwa mathupha
texts.t3887: noma yiluphi ubuhlungu phakathi nomjikelezo lujwayelekile
texts.t3888: uma ubuhlungu buhambisana nokuvuthwa noma nokuya esikhathini, akukho okudingeka kuhlolwe
texts.t3889: ubuhlungu obukhulu bokuya esikhathini kufanele bume nje
texts.t3892: uma ubuhlungu bufushane, buphakathi nendawo, futhi abunazo izimpawu ezibomvu → landela iphethini
texts.t3893: uma ubuhlungu buphindaphinda, buqhubeka, noma buthinta impilo → funa isizathu sesibili
texts.t3894: uma izimpawu ezibomvu zikhona → funa usizo oluphuthumayo
texts.t3895: ukuhlobanisa ubuhlungu obusha obukhulu kuphela nokuvuthwa
texts.t3896: ukunganaki ukuhlobana kobuhlungu nokuchama, ucansi, noma ukuqunjelwa
texts.t3897: ukwehlisa amandla ukulahlekelwa umqondo, buthakathaka, nokuphuzi ngesikhathi sokuya esikhathini
texts.t3899: ubuhlungu obuncane obungenazo izinkinga zokusebenza futhi obungenazo izimpawu ezengeziwe
texts.t3902: hlola izimpawu zesizathu sesibili noma isimo esiphuthumayo
texts.t3903: nikeza isiqondiso sokuthi nini ukubheka nokuthi nini ukufuna usizo lwezokwelapha
texts.t3906: Kwakunikezwa okubalulekile ku-ACOG, CDC, kanye ne-ESHRE; izimpawu ezibomvu nokuhlukaniswa kobuhlungu bomjikelezo ezimeni eziphuthumayo kubaluleke kakhulu kulesi sigaba.
texts.t3914: noma yiluphi ubuhlungu buhlolwa ngobukhulu, isikhathi, ukuphindaphinda, nezimpawu ezihambisana nazo
texts.t3915: ukuhlobana komjikelezo kunikeza umkhondo kodwa akususi ingozi yesizathu sesibili
texts.t3916: izimpawu zesistimu kanye nokungazinzi kokusebenza kwandisa ukuphuthuma
texts.t3918: hlobanisa ubuhlungu nokuya esikhathini, ukuvuthwa, ucansi, ukuqunjelwa, nokuchama
texts.t3919: uma kusolakala isizathu sesibili noma esiphuthumayo, qhubeka nokuhlolwa kwezokwelapha
texts.t3920: ungahlobanisi ubuhlungu obukhulu nomjikelezo ojwayelekile ngaphandle kokuhlola izimpawu ezibomvu
texts.t3921: unganganaki ukulahlekelwa umqondo, ukuphuzi, nobuthakathaka obukhulu ngesikhathi sokuya esikhathini
texts.t3922: Iphutha eliyinhloko kwezokwelapha kulesi sihloko ukujwayela ubuhlungu obukhulu bomjikelezo njengengxenye ejwayelekile yokuya esikhathini, nakuba ukuphindaphinda, ukuqhubeka, nokuphazamiseka kokusebenza kudinga ukunakwa okukhethekile.
texts.t3925: Ubuhlungu esiswini esingezansi esisodwa bunokuhlukaniswa okubanzi futhi akufanele kuhlotshaniswe ngokuzenzakalelayo nokuvuthwa.
texts.t3926: Uma ubuhlungu bungasohlangothini olulodwa, kubalulekile ukuhlola ubukhulu, isikhathi, ukuhlobana nomjikelezo, nokuba khona kwezimpawu ezibomvu.
texts.t3927: Ubuhlungu be-pelvic obungasohlangothini olulodwa budinga ukuhunyushwa ngokucophelela.
texts.t3928: Kumongo wezifo zabesifazane, ubuhlungu obunjalo bungahlotshaniswa nokuvuthwa, isistimu ye-ovarian, i-endometriosis, ukuvuvukala, ukukhulelwa, nezinye izimo. Yingakho kungaphephile ukuziduduza ngokuzenzakalelayo ngesisho esithi 'kuyivuthwa nje,' ikakhulukazi uma ubuhlungu bukhona, bukhulu, noma buhambisana nezimpawu zesistimu.
texts.t3933: Ubuhlungu bokuvuthwa: obujwayelekile noma isizathu sokuhlola
texts.t3935: Ubuhlungu obuphakathi nendawo obufushane obuzungeze ukuvuthwa bungaba ukuhluka okujwayelekile, kodwa ubuhlungu obukhulu noma obungajwayelekile buyisizathu sokuhlolwa.
texts.t3936: Okuvamile kunokukhathazeka okufushane, okulinganiselwe ngesikhathi. Noma yini ebuhlungu, eqhubekayo, ekhula, noma engajwayelekile akufanele ibhekwe ngokuzenzakalelayo njengemvelo.
texts.t3937: Ubuhlungu bokuvuthwa akufanele bube bukhulu noma buphazamise.
texts.t3938: Abanye abantu bazizwa maphakathi nomjikelezo wabo, kodwa isizathu sezinga lezokwelapha silula: ubuhlungu obukhulu, kuncane isizathu sokubheka njengokujwayelekile ngaphandle kokuhlolwa okwengeziwe. Ubuhlungu obudinga ukuphuthelwa imisebenzi, buhambisana nokuhlanza, umkhuhlane, ukulahlekelwa umqondo, noma buphindaphinda ngokuba kubi kuyakhathaza kakhulu.
texts.t3941: ubuhlungu bokuvuthwa: obujwayelekile noma isizathu sokuhlola
texts.t3946: Ukukhathazeka okuncane ngemuva kokuvuthwa kungenzeka, kodwa ubuhlungu obukhulu ngemuva kokusolwa ukuvuthwa kudinga ukuhlukaniswa okubanzi.
texts.t3947: Ngemuva kokuvuthwa, ubuhlungu abuvamile ukuchazwa ngomzuzu wokuphuka kwefollicle uqobo, ngakho kubalulekile ukubheka izistimu, i-endometriosis, ukuvuvukala, nezinye izimbangela.
texts.t3948: Ubuhlungu ngemuva kokuvuthwa abuvamile njengophawu oluhlanzekile lwemvelo.
texts.t3949: Uma umuntu ehlobanisa ubuhlungu 'nokuvuthwa okwedlule,' kubalulekile ukuthi angayeki kulowo mcabango. Izinguquko ze-Luteal ziqala ngemuva kokuvuthwa, kodwa ubuhlungu obukhulu uqobo abubhekwa njengengxenye edingekayo yenorm. Ukusola kwezokwelapha kuyanda uma ubuhlungu buqhubeka, bukhula, noma buhlanganiswa nokukhishwa okungajwayelekile nomkhuhlane.
texts.t3952: ubuhlungu obunezinga lokushisa noma ukukhishwa okungajwayelekile
texts.t3957: Ubuhlungu ngaphambi kokuya esikhathini kuvame ukuhlotshaniswa nokuqala kwe-dysmenorrhea ehambisana ne-prostaglandin, kodwa ubukhulu nephrofayili yobuhlungu kubalulekile.
texts.t3958: Ukukhathazeka okuncane ngaphambi kokuya esikhathini kungaba yingxenye yomjikelezo ojwayelekile; nokho, ubuhlungu obukhulu, ikakhulukazi uma buqhubeka, kudinga ukuhlolwa kwezimbangela.
texts.t3959: Ubuhlungu bangaphambi kokuya esikhathini bungahlotshaniswa ne-dysmenorrhea, kodwa akuhlali kungabi yingozi.
texts.t3960: Abanye abantu baqala ukuzizwa ubuhlungu ngisho nangaphambi kokuqala kokopha. Lokhu kungaba yingxenye ye-dysmenorrhea yokuqala. Nokho, uma ubuhlungu bukhula ngokuhamba kweminyaka, bujula, buhambisana nobuhlungu ngesikhathi socansi, ukuqunjelwa, noma ukungabi nenzalo, ngokwezokwelapha umuntu kufanele acabangele izimbangela zesibili, ikakhulukazi i-endometriosis ne-adenomyosis.
texts.t3961: ukungabi nenzalo noma ubuhlungu be-pelvic obungapheli
texts.t3966: Ubuhlungu obukhulu bokuya esikhathini bungavela nge-dysmenorrhea yokuqala, kodwa ubukhulu, ukumelana nokwelashwa, nezimpawu ezihambisana nazo kudinga ukususwa kwesizathu sesibili.
texts.t3967: Ubuhlungu bokuya esikhathini buvame kakhulu, kodwa akufanele bube bukhulu kangangokuthi umuntu akakwazi ukusebenza njalo ngenyanga.
texts.t3968: Ubuhlungu obukhulu bokuya esikhathini akufanele bubhekwe njengokujwayelekile ngokuzenzakalelayo.
texts.t3969: I-dysmenorrhea yokuqala ihlotshaniswa ne-prostaglandins futhi ivame ukuphendula kahle kuma-NSAIDs kanye/noma ukwelashwa kwehomoni. Uma lokhu kungenzeki, uma ubuhlungu buqhubeka noma buhambisana ne-dyspareunia, ubuhlungu ngesikhathi sokuqunjelwa, izikhathi ezinzima, noma ubuhlungu be-pelvic obungapheli, kufanele kufunwe isizathu sesibili ngokusebenzayo.
texts.t3977: Ubuhlungu be-pelvic obungapheli wubuhlungu endaweni ye-pelvic obuhlala izinyanga eziyi-6 noma ngaphezulu, futhi kuvame ukuba nemvelo enezici eziningi.
texts.t3978: Akuyona ngempela isifo esisodwa; umuntu oyedwa angaba nenhlanganisela yezingxenye zobuhlungu bezifo zabesifazane, izisu, izitho zangasese, i-myofascial, nezokwelapha kwengqondo.
texts.t3979: Ubuhlungu be-pelvic obungapheli kuyinkinga yezokwelapha ezimele, hhayi nje uphawu lomjikelezo.
texts.t3980: I-ACOG igcizelela ukuthi ubuhlungu be-pelvic obungapheli abuhlali buchazwa ngokugcwele ukutholakala okukodwa ku-ultrasound noma i-laparoscopy. Kuvame ukuba yisifo sobuhlungu esiyinkimbinkimbi esinezinto eziningi ezibangela ubuhlungu. Ngakho-ke, indlela kufanele ibe banzi kunokufuna 'isizathu somlingo' esisodwa, ikakhulukazi uma ubuhlungu sekuvele kube yinto engapheli.
texts.t3988: Ubuhlungu ngesikhathi socansi lungaba lukhulu ngezikhathi ezithile zomjikelezo, kodwa iphethini yomjikelezo uqobo ayenzi kube okujwayelekile.
texts.t3989: Uma ubuhlungu ngesikhathi socansi buphindaphinda, ikakhulukazi ngaphakathi kwe-pelvic noma eduze nokuya esikhathini, izimbangela zesibili kufanele zicatshangwe, kufaka phakathi i-endometriosis nobuhlungu be-pelvic obungapheli.
texts.t3990: I-Dyspareunia idinga ukuhlolwa, noma ngabe ibonakala ihlobene nomjikelezo.
texts.t3991: Ukuxhumana kobuhlungu nomjikelezo kunganikeza umkhondo, kodwa hhayi isizathu. I-dyspareunia ejulile neyangaphandle inezinhlaka ezihlukene. Ubuhlungu obujulile, ikakhulukazi uma buhlanganiswa nobuhlungu bokuya esikhathini, ubuhlungu ngesikhathi sokuqunjelwa, nobuhlungu be-pelvic obungapheli, kuvame ukukhulisa ukusola kwe-endometriosis.
texts.t3993: ubuhlungu bokuya esikhathini obuhambisana nezimpawu ze-GI
texts.t3998: Ubuhlungu ngesikhathi sokungena okujulile buphakamisa kakhulu isifo se-pelvic esijulile kunokukhathazeka okungaphezulu.
texts.t3999: Uma ubuhlungu obunjalo buphindaphinda, ikakhulukazi kanye nobuhlungu be-pelvic bomjikelezo noma ubuhlungu ngesikhathi sokuqunjelwa, kuyiphethini ebalulekile kwezokwelapha.
texts.t4000: I-Dyspareunia ejulile iyisimpawu ebalulekile sobuhlungu be-pelvic besibili.
texts.t4001: Umehluko wezifo zabesifazane ojwayelekile kakhulu uhlanganisa i-endometriosis, ubuhlungu be-pelvic obungapheli, izinqubo zokuvuvukala, nezinye izimbangela zesakhiwo. Ngokwezokwelapha, kubalulekile ukungayeki lesi simo njengesokuthi 'sokwengqondo' ngaphandle kokuhlola umzimba nomjikelezo. I-Dyspareunia ejulile ivame ukuhlinzeka ngolwazi oluwusizo mayelana nendawo yobuhlungu.
texts.t4003: ubuhlungu ngesikhathi sokuqunjelwa noma nokuya esikhathini
texts.t4010: Ubuhlungu ngesikhathi sokufakwa kwe-tampon abubhekwa njengokujwayelekile ngokuzenzakalelayo futhi kudinga ukuhlukaniswa phakathi kokoma, ukuvuvukala, ubuhlungu be-vulvar, kanye ne-hypertonicity ye-pelvic floor.
texts.t4011: Lokhu kuvame ukuba ubuhlungu obungaphezulu kunobuhlungu bokuya esikhathini obujwayelekile.
texts.t4012: Ubuhlungu ngesikhathi sokufakwa kwe-tampon kuyisimpawu ehlukile, hhayi nje umkhawulo ophansi wobuhlungu.
texts.t4013: Uma umuntu ezwa ubuhlungu ngesikhathi sokufakwa kwe-tampon, kubalulekile ukucatshangelwa hhayi nje indlela kodwa futhi nokoma kwe-mucosal, ukuvuvukala, ukutheleleka, i-vulvodynia, i-hypertonicity yemisipha ye-pelvic floor, nezinye izimbangela zobuhlungu obungaphezulu. Ukuxhumana nomjikelezo kungase kube khona, kodwa akuchazi ngokuphelele isimpawu ngokwaso.
texts.t4022: Ubuhlungu emhlane ongaphansi lungakhula ngesikhathi sesigaba sokuya esikhathini kanye nobuhlungu be-pelvic njengophawu oludlulisiwe, kodwa ubukhulu nephrofayili kubalulekile.
texts.t4023: Ubuhlungu obuncane emhlane ongaphansi ngesikhathi sokuya esikhathini kuvamile; nokho, ubuhlungu obungapheli, obukhulayo, noma obungajwayelekile budinga ukuhlukaniswa okuhlukile.
texts.t4024: Ubuhlungu emhlane ongaphansi bungaba yingxenye yobuhlungu be-pelvic obudlulisiwe.
texts.t4025: Ngobuhlungu bokuya esikhathini, ukukhathazeka kuvame ukusakazeka emhlane ongaphansi nasemhlane. Nokho, ubuhlungu emhlane ongaphansi akuhlali kuyinto yezifo zabesifazane, futhi akuwona wonke ubuhlungu be-pelvic obudluliselwa emhlane. Uma iphethini yobuhlungu iba njalo, ayilingani, noma ihambisana nezimpawu zezinzwa, ukusesha izimbangela kufanele kwandiswe.
texts.t4034: Ubuhlungu emilenzeni ngaphambi kokuya esikhathini kungaba yingxenye yobuhlungu be-pelvic obudlulisiwe, kodwa akuyona isimpawu esithile.
texts.t4035: Uma ubuhlungu emilenzeni bungumjikelezo futhi buhlanganiswa nobuhlungu be-pelvic bokuya esikhathini, kungaba yingxenye yephethini yobuhlungu ejwayelekile, kodwa kudinga ukuhunyushwa ngokucophelela.
texts.t4036: Ubuhlungu emilenzeni ngaphambi kokuya esikhathini akusho, ngokwalo, ukuxilongwa okuthile.
texts.t4037: Abanye abantu bachaza ubunzima, ubuhlungu, noma ubuhlungu obudlulayo emilenzeni ngaphambi kokuya esikhathini. Lokhu kungase kuhlotshaniswe ne-prostaglandins, ubuhlungu obudlulisiwe, noma ukuzwela okuvamile. Nokho, ubuhlungu obukhulu obungasohlangothini olulodwa, ukuvuvukala, ububomvu, izimpawu zezinzwa, noma imvelo engajwayelekile kudinga indlela yokuhlola ehlukile.
texts.t4045: Umuzwa wokucindezela kwe-rectal ngesikhathi sokuya esikhathini ungahambisana nobuhlungu be-pelvic, kodwa uma uphindaphinda futhi mkhulu, kudinga ukuhlolwa kwezimbangela.
texts.t4046: Lesi simo sibaluleke kakhulu kwezokwelapha uma sihlanganiswa nokuhamba kwamathumbu okubuhlungu, i-dyspareunia ejulile, nobuhlungu obukhulu bokuya esikhathini.
texts.t4047: Ukucindezela kwe-rectal ngesikhathi sokuya esikhathini akuyona into ejwayelekile kakhulu, kodwa kuyisimpawu ebalulekile yobuhlungu be-pelvic.
texts.t4048: Uma umuntu echaza umuzwa wokucindezela, ukugcwala, noma ubuhlungu endaweni ye-rectal ikakhulukazi ngesikhathi sokuya esikhathini, kungase kube yingxenye ye-dysmenorrhea enkulu, kodwa futhi kukhulisa ukusola kwe-endometriosis nezinye izimbangela ze-pelvic. Akukhona nje isimpawu uqobo kodwa nomongo walo kubalulekile.
texts.t4054: Ukuhamba kwamathumbu okubuhlungu ngesikhathi sokuya esikhathini
texts.t4056: Ukuhamba kwamathumbu okubuhlungu ngesikhathi sokuya esikhathini kungenye yezimpawu ezikhulisa ukusola kwe-endometriosis nezinye izimbangela zesibili zobuhlungu be-pelvic.
texts.t4057: Lesi simo sibaluleke kakhulu uma siphindaphinda kusukela kumjikelezo kuya kumjikelezo futhi sihlanganiswa ne-dyspareunia noma ubuhlungu be-pelvic obungapheli.
texts.t4058: Ubuhlungu bomjikelezo ngesikhathi sokuqunjelwa kuyisimpawu esibalulekile kwezokwelapha.
texts.t4059: Nakuba ama-prostaglandins nokuzwela kwezisu kungakhulisa ukukhathazeka, ubuhlungu obukhulu obuphindaphindayo ngesikhathi sokuqunjelwa ngesikhathi sokuya esikhathini akuyona into okufanele ibhekwe njengokujwayelekile nje izikhathi. Kumongo we-endometriosis, kungenye yezimpawu ezibaluleke kakhulu kwezokwelapha.
texts.t4063: ukuhamba kwamathumbu okubuhlungu ngesikhathi sokuya esikhathini
texts.t4067: Ukuchama okubuhlungu okuhlotshaniswa nomjikelezo kudinga ukuhlukaniswa phakathi kwezimbangela zokuchama, ukutheleleka, nobuhlungu be-pelvic bezifo zabesifazane.
texts.t4068: Uma isimpawu siphindaphinda ngomjikelezo, ikakhulukazi kanye nobuhlungu bokuya esikhathini nezinye izimpawu ze-pelvic, kukhulisa ukusola kwesizathu sesibili.
texts.t4069: I-Dysuria akufanele ibhekwe ngokuzenzakalelayo njenge-cystitis ngaphandle komongo.
texts.t4070: Abanye abantu bayabona ukuthi ukuchama okubuhlungu kuba kubi ngezikhathi ezithile zomjikelezo. Lokhu kubalulekile ngoba isimpawu singase sibe nesici sokuchama kuphela kodwa futhi nesici se-pelvic/endometriotic. Ngasikhathi sinye, ukutheleleka emgudwini wokuchama, ukuvuvukala, nezinye izimbangela kufanele zisuswe ngokusekelwe ekubonisweni kwezokwelapha.
texts.t4078: Ukusola kwe-endometriosis kuyanda ngobuhlungu be-pelvic bomjikelezo, i-dysmenorrhea enkulu, i-dyspareunia ejulile, ukuhamba kwamathumbu okubuhlungu, nobuhlungu be-pelvic obungapheli.
texts.t4079: Akukho simo esisodwa esenza ukuxilongwa ngokwaso, kodwa inhlanganisela yezimpawu zomjikelezo eziphindaphindayo yenza i-endometriosis ibe yinto engaba khona.
texts.t4080: I-Endometriosis kufanele isolwe ngokusekelwe ephethini yobuhlungu ebonakalayo, kunokuba kube uphawu olulodwa.
texts.t4081: I-ESHRE igcizelela ukuthi i-endometriosis ivame ukuvezwa ngokukhethekile njengobuhlungu, okuvame ukuhlotshaniswa nomjikelezo wokuya esikhathini. I-dysmenorrhea eqhubekayo, i-dyspareunia ejulile, i-dyschezia, nobuhlungu be-pelvic obungapheli kuyakhathaza kakhulu. Isizathu sezokwelapha akusikho ukulinda isithombe esiphelele, kodwa ukubona inhlanganisela yezimpawu eziphindaphindayo.
texts.t4088: Ukuvuvukala kungenzeka kuboniswe ubuhlungu obuhambisana nomkhuhlane, ubuhlungu ngesikhathi sokuhlolwa, ukukhishwa okungajwayelekile, noma ukonakala okukhulu jikelele.
texts.t4089: Ngokungafani nobuhlungu bomjikelezo obujwayelekile, ubuhlungu bokuvuvukala buvame ukuvela kakhulu, butheleleke, futhi abuhlotshaniswa ngokungaqondakali nesigaba somjikelezo.
texts.t4090: Ubuhlungu be-pelvic bokuvuvukala buvame ukuba nezimpawu ezengeziwe zokutheleleka.
texts.t4091: I-CDC incoma ukuthi ungaphuthelwa i-PID kubantu abenza ucansi abanobuhlungu be-pelvic uma kungekho sizathu esingaba khona futhi kunezimpawu ezengeziwe zokuvuvukala. Ngokwezokwelapha, kubalulekile ukungalindi i-triad ejwayelekile: inhlanganisela yobuhlungu, ubuhlungu, ukukhishwa, umkhuhlane, kanye nobungozi be-STI isivele idinga ukunakwa.
texts.t4100: Usizo oluphuthumayo luyadingeka ngobuhlungu obukhulu obungazelelwe, ukulahlekelwa umqondo, ukukhulelwa okusolwayo, buthakathaka obukhulu, umkhuhlane, noma ukonakala okusheshayo.
texts.t4101: Isimiso esiyinhloko akusikho ukuzama ukuchaza ubuhlungu obungase bube yingozi kuphela ngomjikelezo uma kunezimpawu zokungazinzi noma ukungajwayelekile.
texts.t4102: Ubuhlungu be-pelvic buba yisimo esiphuthumayo uma buhambisana nezimpawu zesimo esiyingozi empilweni.
texts.t4103: Umjikelezo awuvikeli ezimbangeleni eziphuthumayo zobuhlungu. Ubuhlungu obuba bukhulu ngokuzumayo, buhambisana nokulahlekelwa umqondo, ukuphuthelwa isikhathi, ukuhlolwa kokukhulelwa okuhle, umkhuhlane, ukuhlanza, noma ukungakwazi ukuhamba nokusebenza ngokujwayelekile, kudinga ukuhlolwa okuphuthumayo. Kungcono ukweqa ohlangothini lokuqapha.
texts.t4110: Ukulahlekelwa umqondo ngesikhathi sokuya esikhathini akubhekwa njengokuhluka okujwayelekile futhi kudinga ukuhlolwa kwesizathu, kufaka phakathi ubuhlungu, ivolumu yokulahlekelwa igazi, nezinye izici.
texts.t4111: Ngezinye izikhathi isizathu ukusabela kwe-vasovagal ebuhlungwini, kodwa i-anemia, ukubaluleka kwe-hemodynamic yokopha, nezinye izinkinga azikwazi ukususwa.
texts.t4112: Ukulahlekelwa umqondo ngesikhathi sokuya esikhathini kuyisimpawu esibomvu, hhayi nje i-PMS engathandeki.
texts.t4113: Ngisho noma umuntu enomlando wobuhlungu obukhulu, iqiniso lokulahlekelwa umqondo lidinga ukunakwa okukhulu. Ikakhulukazi okukhathazayo ukuhlanganiswa nokopha okukhulu kakhulu, ukuphuzi, i-tachycardia, ukwanda kobuthakathaka, noma isigameko sokuqala. Lokhu akuseyona inkinga yokubhekwa ekhaya okuvamile.
texts.t4120: Ubuthakathaka obukhulu nokuphuzi ngesikhathi sokuya esikhathini
texts.t4122: Ubuthakathaka obukhulu nokuphuzi ngesikhathi sokuya esikhathini kudinga ukucatshangelwa hhayi nje ubuhlungu kodwa futhi nokulahlekelwa igazi ngokweqile, ukuntuleka kwe-ayoni, nesimo sezokwelapha esijwayelekile.
texts.t4123: Uma umuntu eba mhlophe ngokuzumayo, edangele, ephelelwa umoya, noma engakwazi ukuma ngesikhathi sokuya esikhathini, lokhu kudlula ukukhathazeka okuvamile.
texts.t4124: Ubuthakathaka obukhulu nokuphuzi ngesikhathi sokuya esikhathini kuyizimpawu ezibalulekile kwezokwelapha.
texts.t4125: Ukukhathala okuncane ngesikhathi sokuya esikhathini kuvamile, kodwa ubuthakathaka obukhulu, ukushaya kwenhliziyo okusheshayo, isiyezi, ukuphuzi, nokuncipha kokubekezelela umzamo ojwayelekile kudinga ukuhlolwa kwe-anemia nobukhulu bokopha. Lokhu kubaluleke kakhulu uma kuhlanganiswa nezikhathi ezinzima.
texts.t4129: ubuthakathaka obukhulu nokuphuzi ngesikhathi sokuya esikhathini
texts.t4133: Izimpawu zangaphambi kokuya esikhathini zihlolwa ngokujikeleza, ubukhulu, nomthelela empilweni.
texts.t4134: Okubalulekile ekuhunyushweni ukuvela okuphindaphindayo kwezimpawu esigabeni se-luteal kanye nokuncipha ngemuva kokuqala kokuya esikhathini.
texts.t4135: Izimpawu zangaphambi kokuya esikhathini ziyizibonakaliso zomjikelezo ezinomjikelezo nezomzimba zesigamu sesibili somjikelezo.
texts.t4136: Ngokwezokwelapha, akukhona nje ukuba khona kwesimpawu okubalulekile, kodwa ubudlelwano baso besikhathi nomjikelezo. Ku-PMS, kuvamile ukuthi izimpawu zivele esigabeni se-luteal esiphuzile futhi zinciphe ngemuva kokuqala kokuya esikhathini. Uma izimpawu zihlala unyaka wonke noma ziba yingozi, umuntu kufanele acabangele hhayi nje i-PMS kodwa futhi i-PMDD noma ezinye izimo zokwelapha kwengqondo nezomzimba.

texts.t4253: Ukuhlolwa kokukhishwa kusekelwe ezimpawini, i-pH, iphunga, nomongo (umjikelezo, amahomoni, izici zangaphandle).
texts.t4254: Into ebalulekile akuyona umbala, kodwa inhlanganisela: iphunga + ukuluma + i-pH + izinguquko.
texts.t4255: Ukukhishwa kwe-vaginal kuwumphumela wokuxhumana phakathi kwamahomoni, i-microbiota, nezici zangaphandle.
texts.t4256: I-Estrogen yandisa amanzi nokusobala kwe-mucus, kuyilapho i-progesterone iyenza ibe mkhulu. I-semen, ucansi, ama-lubricants, nama-antibiotics angashintsha isikhashana isimo sokukhishwa. Ukuphazamiseka kwe-microbiota kwandisa i-pH futhi kubangele izimpawu.
texts.t4298: Ukuhlolwa kwe-ovulation ngokuvamile kuthola i-LH surge emchameni, okuyisignali ye-hormonal evame ukuhamba phambi kwe-ovulation.
texts.t4299: Lokhu akuyona "ukuhlolwa kweqanda" noma ukuhlolwa okuqondile kweqiniso le-ovulation uqobo. Kubonisa ukukhuphuka kwe-hormone ye-luteinizing evame ukwenzeka ngaphambi kwe-ovulation.
texts.t4300: Ukuhlolwa kwe-ovulation kuwukuhlolwa kwekhaya kwe-LH surge emchameni.
texts.t4301: Iningi lokuhlolwa kwe-ovulation ekhaya liphendula ku-hormone ye-luteinizing. Lapho i-LH ikhuphuka ngokushesha, amathuba okuthi i-ovulation yenzeke maduze ayanda. Nokho, ukuhlolwa akuboni ngqo ukuqhuma kwe-follicle, ngakho-ke umphumela omuhle ukhombisa i-hormonal peak, hhayi ubufakazi obuphelele bokuthi i-ovulation isenzekile ngempela.
texts.t4302: Ukuhlolwa kwe-LH kukhombisa i-hormonal peak, hhayi ukuqhuma kwe-follicle uqobo

texts.t4344: Kwakunikezwe phambili ku-ASRM, ukubuyekezwa kokulandelela i-ovulation, kanye ne-physiology yomjikelezo; kule ngxenye, kubaluleke kakhulu ukuhlukanisa kalula kokuhlolwa kusuka ekunembeni kwayo kwe-biological neklinikhi.
texts.t4348: Ukuhlolwa kwe-LH kuqondwa kangcono njengethuluzi lokungenzeka kunokufakazela ngokuqinisekile i-ovulation
