texts.t4354: ungacabangi ukuhlolwa okuhle kwe-LH njengobufakazi bokuthi i-ovulation isivele yenzekile ngokuqinisekile
texts.t4355: ungasebenzisi ukuhlolwa okungalungile njengobufakazi obuqinisekile bokungabi khona kwe-ovulation
texts.t4356: Umthombo oyinhloko wephutha mayelana nokuhlolwa kwe-LH umuzwa wamanga wokunemba: umphumela wasekhaya olula uvame ukubonakala njengokuxilonga kakhulu kunalokho empeleni.
texts.t4359: Ukuhlolwa kwe-LH kusebenza ngomgomo wokutholwa kwe-immuno ye-hormone emchameni futhi kuba kuhle lapho izinga le-LH lidlula umkhawulo wokuhlolwa.
texts.t4360: Ukuhlolwa akukali i-ovulation njengomcimbi. Ithola i-LH surge, evame ukuqalisa ukuvuthwa kokugcina kwe-oocyte futhi ihambe phambi kwe-ovulation.
texts.t4361: Ukuhlolwa kwe-LH kuwukuhlolwa kwekhwalithi yokudlula izinga lomkhawulo we-LH.
texts.t4362: Lapho ukugxila kwe-LH emchameni kufinyelela ezingeni elithile, umugqa wokuhlolwa uba ulingana noma umnyama kunomugqa wokulawula, noma idivayisi yedijithali ikhombisa umphumela omuhle. Imikhiqizo ehlukene inezinzwa ezihlukene, futhi i-biology ye-LH surge uqobo ingahluka ngobude nangesikhathi. Ngakho-ke, umsebenzisi akaboni 'i-ovulation eqondile' yomhlaba wonke, kodwa isignali ye-hormonal yomkhawulo.
texts.t4364: ukungakwazi ukuthola ukuhlolwa okuhle ngemizamo ejwayelekile
texts.t4370: Ukuqala kokuhlolwa kuncike ebudeni bomjikelezo kanye nosuku olulinganiselwe lwe-ovulation, kunokuba usuku olujwayelekile kubo bonke.
texts.t4371: Ngemijikelezo ejwayelekile kakhulu, ukuhlolwa kuvame ukuqala ezinsukwini ezimbalwa ngaphambi kokulindelekile kwe-ovulation. Ngemijikelezo engajwayelekile, iwindi lokubheka kufanele linwetshwe.
texts.t4372: Ukuqala kokuhlolwa kwe-LH kulungiswa kubude bomjikelezo wakho siqu.
texts.t4373: Uma umjikelezo ubikezelwa, qala kusenesikhathi ukuze ungaphuthelwa i-surge: hhayi ngosuku olungalindelekile lwe-ovulation, kodwa ngaphambi kwayo. Ngemijikelezo emide, emifushane, noma eguquguqukayo, kungcono ukuvumela izinsuku eziningi zokuhlolwa. Iphutha elivame kakhulu ukuqala sekwephuzile, ukuthembela osukwini lwe-14 oluyinganekwane noma umqondo wokuthi wonke umuntu unomjikelezo ofanayo.
texts.t4379: Yisiphi isikhathi sosuku sokuthatha ukuhlolwa kwe-ovulation
texts.t4381: Ukuhlolwa kwe-LH kuvame ukuba nolwazi oluthe xaxa phakathi nosuku noma ntambama, kunokuba nje emchameni wokuqala ekuseni.
texts.t4382: Kubantu abaningi, umchamo wasekuseni akuyona inketho engcono kakhulu ngoba i-LH surge emchameni ingase ibonakale kamuva. Kubaluleke kakhulu ukulandela imiyalelo yokuhlolwa okuthile nokusebenzisa indlela ephindaphindekayo.
texts.t4383: Isikhathi sosuku sithinta amathuba okuthola i-LH surge.
texts.t4384: I-LH ikhishwa ngamaphaphu bese ibonakala emchameni ngokubambezeleka. Ngakho-ke, abakhiqizi abaningi nezibuyekezo azincomi ukunciphisa ukuhlolwa kuphela ekuseni kakhulu. Kuvame ukusiza ukuhlola phakathi nosuku noma ntambama futhi ugweme ukuncibilika ngokweqile komchamo ngaphambi kokuhlolwa. Nokho, umkhiqizo othile ungase ube nemiyalelo yawo okufanele icatshangelwe.
texts.t4387: yisiphi isikhathi sosuku sokuthatha ukuhlolwa kwe-ovulation
texts.t4390: Kangaki ngosuku ukuhlola nge-LH surge emfushane
texts.t4392: Uma i-LH surge imfushane, ukuhlolwa kanye ngosuku kungase kunganele, futhi kwesinye isikhathi kuwusizo ukuhlola kabili ngosuku.
texts.t4393: Kubantu abathile, i-LH surge imfushane noma idlula ngokushesha umkhawulo wokuhlolwa. Ezimweni ezinjalo, ukuhlolwa okuphindaphindiwe ngosuku olufanayo kunciphisa ingozi yokuphuthelwa kwewindi.
texts.t4394: I-LH surge emfushane ingase idinge ukuhlolwa okuphindaphindiwe.
texts.t4395: Lapho umuntu esola ukuthi i-surge yakhe imfushane, isibonelo ngokusekelwe kumijikelezo edlule noma izinguquko ezisheshayo, kunengqondo ukushintshela ekuhlolweni kabili ngosuku ewindi elilinganiselwe le-ovulation. Lokhu kubaluleke kakhulu kumijikelezo emifushane, imijikelezo engajwayelekile, noma imijikelezo 'emibi ngokuphelele' yangaphambilini lapho i-surge yayiphuthelwe cishe. Kodwa noma kunjalo, ukuhlolwa kwe-LH akuphenduki ithuluzi eliphelele.
texts.t4397: kangaki ngosuku ukuhlola nge-lh surge emfushane
texts.t4402: Kuma-strip tests, umphumela ngokuvamile uthathwa njengomuhle lapho umugqa wokuhlolwa umnyama njengomugqa wokulawula noma umnyama kunawo.
texts.t4403: Ukuba khona nje komugqa wesibili akwenzi ukuhlolwa kube kuhle. Kubalulekile ukuqhathanisa amandla omugqa nokulawula noma ukulandela i-algorithm yedivayisi yedijithali.
texts.t4404: Umphumela wokuhlolwa kwe-LH ulinganiswa ngokusekelwe kumthetho womkhawulo, hhayi nje ukuba khona komugqa wesibili.
texts.t4405: Njengoba amanani amancane e-LH ekhona emzimbeni ngisho nangaphandle kwe-peak, umugqa wesibili ungaba buthakathaka cishe ngaso sonke isikhathi. Ngakho-ke, 'Ngibona umugqa wesibili' akulingani 'lokhu i-ovulation.' Kuma-strip tests ajwayelekile, umkhawulo wokuba kuhle yilokho okubalulekile. Ukuhlolwa kwedijithali kuhilela ukuhumusha okuncane komsebenzisi, kodwa imikhawulo ye-biological isekhona.
texts.t4412: Umugqa wesibili obuthakathaka ngokuvamile usho ukuthi i-LH ikhona ezingeni eliyisisekelo, kodwa i-peak ayikafinyeleli umkhawulo wokuhlolwa.
texts.t4413: Lokhu akuthathwa njengokuhlolwa okuhle kumakiti amaningi we-strip. Umugqa obuthakathaka ungaba isizinda esijwayelekile futhi awukhombisi i-ovulation.
texts.t4414: Umugqa wesibili obuthakathaka ngokuvamile awulingani nokuhlolwa okuhle kwe-LH.
texts.t4415: I-LH akuyona i-hormone 'zero' phakathi kwe-peak, ngakho umugqa obuthakathaka uyinto evamile. Iphutha livela lapho noma yimuphi umugqa wesibili uthathwa njengobufakazi be-ovulation. Ngokwelashwa, lokhu kuholela ekutheni isikhathi sokuhlangana ngokocansi singalungile noma umuzwa wamanga wokuthi i-ovulation isenzekile ngokuqinisekile. Kubalulekile kuphela kumadynamics: umugqa uba mnyama, ulingana nokulawula, futhi ufinyelela umkhawulo.
texts.t4416: imijikelezo eminingi elandelanayo enemigqa ebuthakathaka kuphela
texts.t4423: Ukuhlolwa kwe-LH okuhle ngokuvamile kusho ukuthi amathuba e-ovulation esikhathini esiseduze ayanda, okwenza kube iwindi elisebenzayo lemizamo yokukhulelwa.
texts.t4424: Uma inhloso iwukukhulelwa, ukugxila kuvame ukuba ngosuku lokuhlolwa okuhle kanye nosuku olulandelayo. Uma inhloso iwukulandelela, kunengqondo ukuqhubeka nokubheka uslima kanye/i-BBT.
texts.t4425: Ukuhlolwa kwe-LH okuhle kuyisignali yokusondela okungenzeka kwe-ovulation.
texts.t4426: Kubalulekile ukungadidanisi lesi sikhathi nokuqinisekiswa kokugcina kwe-ovulation. Ukuhlolwa okuhle kudingeka kakhulu ngesikhathi: lokhu kuyilapho amathuba ewindi elizala elibaluleke kakhulu. Kusebenziseka ngokomsebenzi ukuhlanganisa ukuhlolwa okuhle nokubheka uslima lwesibeletho bese ubona ukuthi ukushintsha kwe-BBT ngemuva kwe-ovulation kuyenzeka yini. Lokhu kunciphisa ingozi yokweqisa ukubaluleka komphumela owodwa.
texts.t4427: ukuhlolwa okuhle ngaphandle kwesibonakaliso sokuphuma kwe-ovulation
texts.t4428: imijikelezo eminingi ngaphandle kokukhulelwa naphezu kwesikhathi esifanele
texts.t4432: Kuthatha isikhathi esingakanani ngemuva kokuhlolwa okuhle ukuthi i-ovulation ibe khona
texts.t4434: Ngemuva kokuhlolwa kwe-LH okuhle, i-ovulation ivame ukuba khona phakathi namahora angu-24–36 alandelayo, kodwa ukwehluka komuntu ngamunye kungenzeka.
texts.t4435: Lolu hlu luyisiqondiso seklinikhi, hhayi isethembiso sehora eliqondile. Isikhathi singahluka phakathi kwabantu abahlukene nangemijikelezo ehlukene.
texts.t4436: Ukuhlolwa kwe-LH okuhle ngokuvamile kuhamba phambi kwe-ovulation ngamahora angamashumi, hhayi izinsuku eziningi.
texts.t4437: Inani elisebenzayo lokuhlolwa kwe-LH ukuthi linciphisa iwindi elizala kodwa alinqumi isikhathi esiqondile sokuqhuma kwe-follicle. Ngakho-ke, lapho uhlela ukukhulelwa, ukugxila kusebange kunokuba ihora elithile. Ngokwelashwa, le nuance ibalulekile kubantu abaqala ukusebenza sekwephuzile, belinde 'i-ovulation eqondile' kuphela ngemva kokuzizwa okucacile.
texts.t4438: ukuhlolwa okuhle okuphindaphindiwe ngaphandle kwezimpawu ze-ovulation
texts.t4439: ukungabi nenzalo naphezu kwezinyanga eziningana zokusetshenziswa okulungile
texts.t4440: kuthatha isikhathi esingakanani ngemuva kokuhlolwa okuhle ukuthi i-ovulation ibe khona
texts.t4443: Ukuhlolwa okungalungile kuwo wonke umjikelezo: izimbangela ezingaba khona
texts.t4445: Ukuhlolwa kwe-LH okungalungile ngokuphelele kuwo wonke umjikelezo kungase kube ngenxa yokuphuthelwa kwe-peak emfushane, isikhathi esingalungile, i-sensitivity yokuhlolwa ephansi, noma i-anovulation.
texts.t4446: Ukuhlolwa okungalungile akusho njalo ukungabi khona kwe-ovulation, kodwa ukuphindaphinda kwalolu hlobo kudinga ukuhlolwa okunakekela kakhulu komjikelezo nendlela yokuhlola.
texts.t4447: Uchungechunge oluphelele lokuhlolwa okungalungile lungaba nezimbangela zobuchwepheshe nezomzimba.
texts.t4448: Izizathu ezivame kakhulu ukuqala ukuhlolwa sekwephuzile kakhulu noma ngokungajwayelekile, ukuphuza kakhulu ngaphambi kokuhlolwa, ukusebenzisa isikhathi esingalungile sosuku, ukukhetha umkhawulo we-sensitivity ophakeme kakhulu, noma ukuntuleka kwe-LH peak/ovulation evelele. Umjikelezo owodwa ungase ube nomsindo, kodwa imijikelezo eminingana emibi ngokuphelele ilandelana idinga ukuhlukanisa phakathi kwamaphutha okusebenza kanye nokungasebenzi kahle kwe-ovulatory.
texts.t4452: ukuhlolwa okungalungile kuwo wonke umjikelezo: izimbangela ezingaba khona
texts.t4457: Ukuhlolwa kwe-LH okuhle kwamanga kungenzeka lapho ukuhlolwa kuthola i-LH surge ngaphandle kwe-ovulation elandelayo noma lapho izinga le-LH eliyisisekelo liphakeme ngokungajwayelekile.
texts.t4458: Ukuhlolwa okuhle akuqinisekisi ukuthi i-follicle izoqhuma ngempela. Lokhu kubaluleke kakhulu ukukhumbula nge-PCOS nemijikelezo ethile engajwayelekile.
texts.t4459: Ukuhlolwa kwe-LH okuhle kwamanga kuyisignali enhle ngaphandle kokuqinisekiswa okuthembekile kwe-ovulation.
texts.t4460: Ngokwemvelo, i-LH ingakhuphuka ngokungaphelele: kungase kube nama-peak amaningi, amaphrofayili angajwayelekile, nezimo lapho ukuhlolwa kuhle kodwa i-ovulation ephelele ayenzeki. Ngokusebenzayo, lokhu kuholela kumuzwa wamanga wokunemba. Kubalulekile ukungathembeli ngokweqile ekuhlolweni futhi, uma ungabaza, ukuhambisana ne-BBT, i-progesterone, i-ultrasound, noma iphethini yomjikelezo ophelele.
texts.t4461: ukuhlolwa okuhle ngaphandle kwesigaba sesibili somjikelezo
texts.t4469: Ukuhlolwa kwe-LH okungalungile kwamanga kungenzeka uma i-peak yayimfushane kakhulu, ukuhlolwa kwenziwa ngesikhathi esingalungile, noma umchamo wawuncibilike ngokweqile.
texts.t4470: Ukuhlolwa okungalungile akukhishi ukuthi i-peak yenzeke phakathi kokulinganisa. Ngakho-ke, umphumela ongemuhle ukhiywa ikakhulukazi uma ukuhlolwa kungavamile noma kungajwayelekile.
texts.t4471: Ukuhlolwa kwe-LH okungalungile kwamanga kuyisikhukhula se-hormonal esiphuthelwe lapho i-ovulation isondela noma isenzekile.
texts.t4472: Ama-peak amafushane, ukuhlolwa kanye ngosuku, ukuhlolwa kwasekuseni okungahambisani nemiyalelo, uketshezi olweqile ngaphambi kokuhlaziywa, kanye nokuguquguquka okukhulu komjikelezo yizizathu eziyinhloko zokuphuthelwa kwe-peak. Kubalulekile ukubheka hhayi nje i-biology kodwa futhi nendlela. Yingakho ukuhlolwa okungalungile kungcono ukuhumusha ngokuhambisana noslima lwesibeletho, i-BBT, nobude bomjikelezo ophelele, kunokuba kube yisinqumo sokugcina.
texts.t4473: imijikelezo eminingana ilandelana ngaphandle kokuhlolwa okuhle
texts.t4474: ukuhlolwa okungalungile ngezimpawu ezicacile zesigaba sesibili
texts.t4480: Nge-PCOS, ukuhlolwa kwe-LH kungase kungathembeki kangako ngenxa ye-LH eyisisekelo engajwayelekile, ama-peak amaningi, kanye ne-ovulation engajwayelekile.
texts.t4481: Kubantu abathile abane-PCOS, ukuhlolwa kusalokhu kuwusizo, kodwa kwabanye, kunikeza imiphumela eminingi yamanga noma enzima ukuhumusha. Ngakho-ke, ukuxilongwa kwe-PCOS akuguquli nje kuphela umjikelezo kodwa futhi nendlela yokulandelela.
texts.t4482: I-PCOS inganciphisa ukusetshenziswa okusebenzayo kokuhlolwa kwe-LH okujwayelekile.
texts.t4483: Inkinga akukhona ukuthi ukuhlolwa 'kuvinjelwe' ku-PCOS, kodwa ukuthi ukuhumusha kwawo kuba nzima kakhulu. Ngemijikelezo engajwayelekile, ukuhlolwa kufanele kwenziwe isikhathi eside, futhi i-LH ephakeme noma eguquguqukayo yenza ukuhlolwa komkhawulo kungacaci. Ezimweni ezinjalo, indlela ehlanganisiwe iyasiza kakhulu: uslima, i-BBT, umongo weklinikhi, futhi uma kudingeka, ukuhlolwa kwelebhu kanye ne-ultrasound.
texts.t4489: Ngemijikelezo engajwayelekile, ukuhlolwa kwe-LH kungasetshenziswa, kodwa iwindi lokuhlolwa liba libanzi, libiza kakhulu, futhi lingabikezelwa kangako.
texts.t4490: Ubunzima obukhulu akukhona ukuhlolwa uqobo, kodwa iqiniso lokuthi akucaci kusengaphambili ukuthi i-peak izolindelwa nini. Ngakho-ke, ngokungajwayelekile, ukubhekwa isikhathi eside kanye nenhlanganisela yezimpawu kuvame ukudingeka.
texts.t4491: Umjikelezo ongajwayelekile unciphisa ukusetshenziswa kalula nokubikezelwa kokuhlolwa kwe-LH.
texts.t4492: Uma umjikelezo ungathatha izinsuku ezingama-28, 40, noma 55, akunakwenzeka ukukhetha usuku lokuqala lokuhlolwa olujwayelekile. Umuntu kufanele ahlole izinsuku eziningi zilandelana noma athembele kumamaki engeziwe, njengoslima. Uma umjikelezo uhlangene kakhulu, ukuhlolwa kwe-LH ekhaya kungase kube kubiza kakhulu futhi kungabi nolwazi, kuphakamisa umbuzo wokuhlolwa kwezinga leklinikhi kwezimbangela zokungajwayelekile.
texts.t4501: Ukuhlolwa kwedijithali kunciphisa ukungathathi hlangothi kokufunda ama-strip kodwa akususi imikhawulo ye-biological yendlela.
texts.t4502: Kungase kube lula kumsebenzisi ngoba kuhunyushwa umphumela ngokwawo. Nokho, ukunemba kusakhiywa iqiniso lokuthi i-LH ilinganiswa, hhayi ukuqhuma kwe-follicle uqobo.
texts.t4503: Ukuhlolwa kwe-ovulation kwedijithali kuwukuhumusha okuzenzakalelayo komgomo ofanayo we-LH.
texts.t4504: Ifomethi yedijithali iyasiza ngoba isusa amanye amaphutha omsebenzisi: izimpikiswano ezimbalwa mayelana 'nokuthi i-strip imnyama ngokwanele.' Nokho, ayenzi i-biology ibikezelwe kakhulu. Nge-PCOS, ama-peak amafushane, imijikelezo engajwayelekile, noma isikhathi esingalungile, ukuhlolwa kwedijithali kungase kudukise; kwenza nje kanjalo ngokukhululeka nangokuzethemba.
texts.t4506: ukungafani phakathi kwedatha yedijithali nezinye izimpawu
texts.t4512: Amadivayisi aphindaphindekayo angalandelela izitayela ze-hormonal noma izimpawu zedijithali ngokuhamba kwesikhathi, kodwa inani lawo leklinikhi lisakhiywa umongo kanye nekhwalithi ye-algorithm.
texts.t4513: Amadivayisi anjalo angaba lula futhi angabizi kakhulu ekusetshenzisweni kwesikhathi eside, kodwa akufanele athathwe njengesixilongo esizimele se-ovulation noma inzalo.
texts.t4514: Idivayisi ephindaphindekayo iyithuluzi ledijithali lokubheka izimpawu zokuzala ngokuphindaphindiwe.
texts.t4515: Amanye amadivayisi ahlaziya ama-strip tests, amanye ahlaziya ama-hormone emchameni, kanti amanye ahlanganisa uhlelo lokusebenza, izinzwa, nedatha yokuziphatha. Inzuzo yawo iwukuzishintsha kanye nokuqoqwa kwezitayela. Ingozi yawo iyikhanga lobuchwepheshe: umuntu angase azizwe ukuthi idivayisi 'iyazi' usuku oluqondile lwe-ovulation, nakuba isasebenza ngaphakathi kwemodeli yokungenzeka kanye nemikhawulo yedatha yomthombo.
texts.t4516: ukuphikisana phakathi kwedivayisi nezimpawu zomjikelezo zangempela
texts.t4517: imizamo emide yokungaphumeleli yokukhulelwa naphezu kokuzethemba okuphezulu kugajethi
texts.t4521: Ukuhlolwa kwe-ovulation kuhluke kanjani ekuhlolweni kokukhulelwa
texts.t4523: Ukuhlolwa kwe-ovulation ngokuvamile kuthola i-LH, kuyilapho ukuhlolwa kokukhulelwa kuthola i-hCG; lezi ama-hormone ahlukene kanye nemisebenzi ehlukene yezokwelapha.
texts.t4524: Awashintshisani. Omunye uhlola ukusondela kwewindi elizala, omunye — ukuba khona kokukhulelwa ngemva kokufakwa.
texts.t4525: Ukuhlolwa kwe-ovulation nokuhlolwa kokukhulelwa kukala ama-hormone ahlukene.
texts.t4526: Ukuhlolwa kokukhulelwa kubheka i-human chorionic gonadotropin, ebonakala ngemva kokufakwa. Ukuhlolwa kwe-ovulation kubheka i-LH ngaphambi kwe-ovulation. Ukudideka phakathi kwazo kuvame ukuvela ngenxa yefomethi efanayo yama-strip, kodwa incazelo yazo ye-biological nesikhathi sehlukile ngokuphelele. Kwesinye isikhathi abantu basebenzisa ukuhlolwa okukodwa njengesikhundla sokunye, okuholela eziphethweni ezingalungile.
texts.t4529: ukuhlolwa kwe-ovulation kuhluke kanjani ekuhlolweni kokukhulelwa
texts.t4534: Ukuhlanganisa ukuhlolwa kwe-LH ne-BBT kuyasiza ngoba i-LH isiza ukubamba ukusondela kwe-ovulation, kuyilapho i-BBT ivumela ukubhekwa ngemuva kwesikhathi sesibili.
texts.t4535: Lena enye yezindlela ezihlanganisiwe ezisebenzayo kakhulu ekhaya: ukuhlolwa kusiza ukwenza kusengaphambili, futhi izinga lokushisa lisiza ukuhlola ukuthi ukushintsha ngemuva kwe-ovulation kwenzekile yini ngemuva kwalokho.
texts.t4536: I-LH ne-BBT kuyahambisana ngoba baphendula imibuzo ehlukene.
texts.t4537: I-LH iphendula umbuzo 'kubukeka sengathi i-ovulation isiseduze?', kuyilapho i-BBT iphendula 'ingabe isigaba se-luteal esingaba khona senzekile ngemuva kwalokho?'. Ngokuhlanganiswa, izindlela zinolwazi oluthe xaxa kunokuhlukana. Nokho, uma idatha iphikisana, akusho njalo ukuthi kukhona isifo: kwesinye isikhathi inkinga ilele kubuchwepheshe bokulinganisa i-BBT, i-LH peak emfushane, noma ukuhumusha kokuhlolwa.
texts.t4544: Indlela yokuhlanganisa ukuhlolwa kwe-ovulation nokubheka uslima
texts.t4546: Ukuhlanganisa ukuhlolwa kwe-LH noslima kusiza ukubona kangcono iwindi elizala ngoba uslima uvame ukushintsha ngisho nangaphambi kokuhlolwa okuhle.
texts.t4547: Uslima ungaxwayisa ukuthi iwindi elizala selivele liqala, kuyilapho ukuhlolwa kwe-LH okuhle kucacisa ukuthi i-ovulation iseduze.
texts.t4548: I-LH noslima kubonisa izigaba ezihlukene zokusondela kwe-ovulation.
texts.t4549: Ukukhuphuka kwe-estrogen kuqala kushintsha uslima lwesibeletho, lwenza lube lula kakhulu ku-sperm, bese i-LH peak ibonakala kamuva. Ngakho-ke, inhlanganisela iyasiza kakhulu ekuhleleni ukukhulelwa: hhayi nje ukulinda ukuhlolwa okuhle, kodwa ukubona ukuthi iwindi elizala selivele livuleka. Nokho, ukukhishwa okungajwayelekile, izifo, kanye nokuhumusha okungalungile koslima kungaphazamisa indlela.

texts.t4555: Amaphutha ajwayelekile lapho usebenzisa ukuhlolwa kwe-ovulation
texts.t4557: Amaphutha ajwayelekile afaka ukuqala ukuhlolwa sekwephuzile kakhulu, ukuhlolwa ngokungajwayelekile, isikhathi esingalungile sosuku, ukweqisa umugqa obuthakathaka, nokulindela ukunemba okuphelele.
texts.t4558: Imvamisa inkinga ayikho ekuhlolweni uqobo, kodwa kulindelo lomsebenzisi: ukuhlolwa kuthathwa njengobufakazi obuqondile be-ovulation nesikhathi esiqondile sokukhulelwa.
texts.t4559: Amaphutha amakhulu nge-LH tests ahlobene nobuchwepheshe nokuhumusha okungalungile.
texts.t4560: Amaphutha ajwayelekile kakhulu: ukuqala sekwephuzile kakhulu, ukuhlolwa kanye ngosuku ngesikhathi se-peak emfushane, ukuphuza kakhulu ngaphambi kokuhlaziywa, ukufunda noma yimuphi umugqa wesibili njengokuhle, ukuthembela kuphela kuhlelo lokusebenza nokunganaki ezinye izimpawu. Iphutha lesibili elikhulu ukulindela ukunemba kwezokwelapha okuvela ekuhlolweni okufana ne-ultrasound. Lapho la malindelo ehla, ukusetshenziswa kwendlela kuvame ukukhula.

texts.t4569: Indlela yekhalenda ilinganisa izinsuku ezingenzeka ze-ovulation ngokusekelwe ebudeni bemijikelezo edlule kodwa ayiqinisekisi ngokuqondile i-ovulation.
texts.t4570: Ingasebenza njengesikhombisi semijikelezo ezinzile ngokulinganayo kodwa iba yiphutha ngokushintsha kwe-ovulation, ukucindezeleka, i-PCOS, nezinye izimbangela zokungajwayelekile.
texts.t4571: Indlela yekhalenda iwukubalwa kwezigaba zomjikelezo ezingaba khona ngokusekelwe ezinsukwini zokukhulelwa.
texts.t4572: Le ndlela ithatha ukuthi umjikelezo wesikhathi esizayo uzofana nemijikelezo edlule. Nokho, i-ovulation ingashintsha ngisho kumuntu ofanayo ngoba isigaba se-follicular siyaguquguquka. Ngakho-ke, ukubalwa kwekhalenda kuyasiza njengemephu yomjikelezo oluhlaza kodwa kubuthakathaka njengethuluzi elizimele lokunquma iwindi elizala eliqondile noma ukuqinisekisa i-ovulation.

texts.t4630: Izinhlelo zokusebenza zokulandelela umjikelezo: izinzuzo nemikhawulo

texts.t4633: Ziwusizo kwidayari yezimpawu namaphethini, kodwa zingaba yiphutha uma zithembele kuphela kudatha yekhalenda ngaphandle kwezimpawu zangempela.
texts.t4634: Izinhlelo zokusebenza zokulandelela umjikelezo ziyamathuluzi edijithali okuqopha nokubikezela izigaba zomjikelezo.
texts.t4635: Inzuzo yezinhlelo zokusebenza ilele ekusebenziseni kalula: zigcina izinsuku zokukhulelwa, izimpawu, i-BBT, ukuhlolwa kwe-LH, nezinye izibukeli. Umkhawulo ukuthi ama-algorithms alula avame ukuhlinzeka ngosuku oluqondile lwe-ovulation ngisho noma i-ovulation empeleni ishintshiwe noma ingekho. Kubalulekile ngokwelashwa ukuchaza ukuthi uhlelo lokusebenza alulingani nedivayisi yokuxilonga: ikhwalithi yesibikezelo incike kudatha ethile efakwe kulo.
texts.t4638: izinhlelo zokusebenza zokulandelela umjikelezo: izinzuzo nemikhawulo
texts.t4643: Indlela yezinga lokushisa lomzimba eliyisisekelo ilandelela ukukhuphuka kwezinga lokushisa ngemuva kwe-ovulation ngaphansi kwethonya le-progesterone.
texts.t4644: Ifaneleka kangcono ukuqinisekiswa ngemuva kwe-ovulation kunokubikezela okunembile kusengaphambili.
texts.t4645: Indlela ye-BBT ihilela ukubheka izinga lokushisa lomzimba ekuseni ngesikhathi sokuphumula.
texts.t4646: Ngemuva kwe-ovulation, i-progesterone inyusa izinga lokushisa lomzimba eliyisisekelo, okuholela ekukhuphukeni okuqhubekayo eshadini. Amandla endlela ukuthi isiza ukukhomba ukuba khona kwesigaba sesibili somjikelezo. Ubuthakathaka ukuthi izinga lokushisa lenyuka kuphela ngemuva kwe-ovulation, futhi ishadi lithinteka ukulala, ukugula, utshwala, ukuhamba, nesikhathi sokulinganisa.
texts.t4652: Indlela yokulinganisa kahle izinga lokushisa lomzimba eliyisisekelo
texts.t4654: Izinga lokushisa lomzimba eliyisisekelo lilinganiswa ekuseni ngokushesha ngemva kokuvuka, ngaphambi kokuphuma embhedeni, futhi uma kungenzeka ngesikhathi esifanayo.
texts.t4655: Ngeshadi elihumushwayo, ukuhambisana kwezimo nendlela yokulinganisa efanayo kubalulekile, kunokuba kube nezibalo ezinembile ezisodwa.
texts.t4656: Ukulinganisa kahle kwe-BBT kudinga izimo eziphindaphindekayo.
texts.t4657: Ngokusebenzayo, kusetshenziswa i-thermometer efanayo, futhi izilinganiso zithathwa ngemva kokulala nangaphambi kokudla, ukukhuluma, noma umsebenzi womzimba. Izinguquko ezisheshayo esikhathini sokuvuka, ukuvuka ebusuku, ukushintsha idivayisi, noma indlela yokulinganisa kuphazamisa ukuqhathanisa kwamaphuzu edatha. Ngakho-ke, isiyalo sokubheka sibaluleke kakhulu kule ndlela.
texts.t4660: indlela yokulinganisa kahle izinga lokushisa lomzimba eliyisisekelo
texts.t4663: Amaphutha ekulinganiseni izinga lokushisa lomzimba eliyisisekelo
texts.t4665: Iziphazamisi eziyinhloko ekulinganiseni i-BBT yisikhathi esingajwayelekile, ukuntuleka kokulala, ukugula, ukushintsha ithomometha, nokuzama ukuhumusha amaphuzu ngamunye esikhundleni sepateni.
texts.t4666: Ukufundwa okukodwa okuphezulu noma okuphansi ngokungahleliwe akuvamile ukufakazela lutho; ukushintsha okuphelele nokuphindaphindeka kubaluleke kakhulu.
texts.t4667: Amaphutha e-BBT avame ukuhlotshaniswa nokwephulwa kwezimo zokulinganisa nokuhumusha okungalungile kunethomometha uqobo.
texts.t4668: Amaphutha ajwayelekile afaka phakathi ukulinganisa sekwephuzile ngemuva kokunyakaza, ukulinganisa ngemuva kokulala okuncane, ukusetshenziswa kotshwala, umkhuhlane, kanye nokulindela ukuthi ishadi lizoba bushelelezi ngokuphelele nsuku zonke. Iqembu lesibili lamaphutha lihlobene nokuhlaziya: ukubeka i-ovulation ephuzwini eliphakeme elilodwa noma ukubheka noma yiluphi udlame njengobufakazi besifo.
texts.t4671: amaphutha ekulinganiseni izinga lokushisa lomzimba eliyisisekelo
texts.t4676: Ukuhumusha kwe-shadi le-BBT kusekelwe ekutholeni ukushintsha okuzinzile kwezinga lokushisa ngemuva kokusola i-ovulation, kunokuba kube ngophawu olulodwa.
texts.t4677: Okuyinto ejwayelekile kakhulu iphethini ye-biphasic: amanani aphansi ngaphambi kwe-ovulation namanye aphakeme ngemuva kwayo.
texts.t4678: Ishadi le-BBT lihunyushwa ngephethini, hhayi ngamaphuzu ngamanye.
texts.t4679: Ngokwezokwelapha, ukushintsha kusuka kulayini we-follicular ophansi kuya kulayini we-luteal ophakeme kuyafunwa. Ukungabikho kwephethini ye-biphasic ecacile akusho njalo i-anovulation: kwesinye isikhathi inkinga isezingeni lokulinganisa. Nokho, amashadi e-monophasic aphindaphindiwe anokuqoqwa kwedatha okuhle akhulisa ukusola ukungabikho kwe-ovulation.
texts.t4687: Indlela ye-symptothermal ihlanganisa izimpawu eziningana — ngokuvamile i-BBT, i-mucus yomlomo wesibeletho, nedatha yekhalenda — okwenza ithembeke kakhulu kunophawu olulodwa olulodwa.
texts.t4688: Amandla ayo asekukhombeni izimpawu zokusondela kwe-ovulation nezimpawu eziyiqinisekisa ngemuva kweqiniso.
texts.t4689: Indlela ye-symptothermal iwukubheka okuhlanganisiwe kwezimpawu zokuzala.
texts.t4690: I-Mucus isiza ukuqonda ukuthi iwindi elizalayo liyasondela, kuyilapho ukushintsha kwezinga lokushisa kukhombisa ukuthi i-ovulation kungenzeka ukuthi isivele yenzekile. Idatha yekhalenda ingeza umongo. Indlela isebenza kahle kakhulu ngokuqeqeshwa okuhlelekile nokuzimisela. Imikhawulo yayo ifaka phakathi isici somuntu, ukwehluka komjikelezo, nomuzwa wamanga wokuphepha uma kuziwa ekuboneni okungaphelele noma okuphikisanayo.
texts.t4691: izimpawu eziphikisanayo kusuka kumjikelezo kuya kumjikelezo
texts.t4697: Ukubheka i-mucus yomlomo wesibeletho kungenye yezindlela ezisebenzayo kakhulu ekhaya zokuhlola ukusondela kwe-ovulation kanye newindi elizalayo.
texts.t4698: Njengoba amazinga e-estrogen ekhuphuka, i-mucus ngokuvamile iba manzi, icace, ishelele, futhi iyeluleka.
texts.t4699: Indlela ye-mucus ihlola izinguquko ezincike ku-estrogen ekukhishweni kwe-mucus yomlomo wesibeletho.
texts.t4700: Kuyisibonakaliso esiwusizo sewindi elizalayo ngoba sibonisa izimo ezivumayo zokuphila kwe-sperm. Nokho, ukuhumusha kuyinkimbinkimbi ngenxa yezifo, ukuvusa ucansi, izinsalela ze-semen, imithi ye-vaginal, nezici zomuntu ngamunye zokukhishwa. Ngakho-ke, i-mucus ihlulelwa kangcono ngokuhamba kwesikhathi kunokusekelwe esigamekweni esisodwa.
texts.t4702: ukungakwazi ukuhlukanisa ukukhishwa okungelapheki kokukhishwa okuzalayo
texts.t4707: Isikhundla somlomo wesibeletho singashintsha phakathi kwezigaba zomjikelezo, kodwa siyisibonakaliso esingaphezulu kokuzibandakanya futhi esingaphindaphindeki kunemithi ye-mucus noma ye-LH.
texts.t4708: Ngaphambi kwe-ovulation, umlomo wesibeletho kwabanye abantu uba phezulu, uthambe, futhi uvuleke kakhulu, kuyilapho ngemuva kwe-ovulation uba phansi futhi uqine.
texts.t4709: Ukubheka umlomo wesibeletho kuyisibonakaliso esengeziwe, kunokuba kube isibonakaliso esiyinhloko sokuzala ekhaya.
texts.t4710: Indlela idinga amakhono, isikhathi sokubuka okuqhubekayo, nokuqonda okuhle kwesakhiwo somzimba. Kubaningi, akulula futhi akuzwakali njengokubheka i-mucus. Emkhubeni wezokwelapha, ayivamile ukusetshenziswa njengesibonakaliso esinqumayo, kodwa ingaqinisa indlela ye-symptothermal kubasebenzisi abakhuthazekile.
texts.t4711: ubuhlungu, ukopha, noma ukulimala ngesikhathi sokuzihlola
texts.t4716: Indlela ehlanganisiwe inembe kakhudlwana kunendlela eyodwa yasekhaya ngoba ihlobanisa izimpawu ezahlukene zomzimba.
texts.t4717: Empeleni, kuwusizo ukuhlanganisa izinsuku zomjikelezo, i-mucus, izivivinyo ze-LH, futhi, uma kudingeka, i-BBT noma idatha yelabhorethri.
texts.t4718: Indlela ehlanganisiwe ihlanganisa ukusebenzisa izimpawu eziningana ezizimele ze-ovulation.
texts.t4719: Isibonakaliso esisodwa singadukisa noma singacaci: isibonelo, i-LH peak ingenzeka ngaphandle kwe-ovulation, i-BBT ingathinteka ukungalali, futhi i-mucus izifo. Lapho izindlela eziningana zihambisana, ukuzethemba ekuhumusheni kuphakeme. Le ndlela iyasiza ikakhulukazi uma uhlela ukukhulelwa noma uma kukhona ukungabaza ukuthi i-ovulation iyenzeka yini nhlobo.
texts.t4727: Ukubheka i-ultrasound kuvumela ukubona ngqo ukukhula kwe-follicle nezimpawu ze-ovulation, okwenza kube enye yezindlela ezinembe kakhulu zokwelapha.
texts.t4728: Ngokungafani nokubuka okusekhaya, i-ultrasound ihlola ngqo isakhiwo se-ovary kanye nezimo ze-follicle elibusayo.
texts.t4729: Ukubheka i-ultrasound kwe-ovulation kuwukubuka okuguquguqukayo kwe-ovaries ngezinsuku ezahlukene zomjikelezo.
texts.t4730: Indlela isetshenziselwa ukungazali, imijikelezo engajwayelekile, ukuvuselela i-ovulation, nemisebenzi yokuxilonga eyinkimbinkimbi. Ivumela ukubona i-follicle ekhula, ukubikezela ukusondela kwe-ovulation, bese uqinisekisa ngokuhamba kwesikhathi ngezimpawu ze-ultrasound ezingaqondile. Imikhawulo ifaka phakathi izindleko, ukufinyeleleka, isidingo sokuvakashela kaningi, nokuncika esikhathini.
texts.t4731: akukho i-ovulation ngokwedatha yasekhaya uma uzama ukukhulelwa
texts.t4739: I-Folliculometry iwuchungechunge lwezivivinyo ze-ultrasound phakathi nomjikelezo ukuhlola ukukhula kwe-follicle elibusayo nokwenzeka kwe-ovulation.
texts.t4740: Kuyindlela ebonakalayo kakhulu yokuhlola inqubo ye-ovulatory.
texts.t4742: Indlela isiza ukuqonda ukuthi i-follicle elibusayo iyakhula yini, ukuthi ifinyelela usayizi we-pre-ovulatory, nokuthi ukuqhuma kwayo kwenzekile yini. Kuyasiza ikakhulukazi kwezokwelapha kokuzala, ukuvuselela i-ovulation, nasezikhathini lapho izimpawu zasekhaya zinganele. Nokho, akuyona ithuluzi elijwayelekile lasekhaya, kodwa iyindlela yezokwelapha esetshenziswa uma kudingeka.
texts.t4748: I-Progesterone esigabeni se-luteal esisolwayo isiza ukuqinisekisa ukuthi i-ovulation kungenzeka ukuthi yenzekile, kodwa kufanele ihlotshaniswe ne-ovulation yangempela kunosuku olungaguquki lwe-21 lomjikelezo.
texts.t4749: Iphutha eliyinhloko ukuhlola i-progesterone ngokwesifanekiso ngaphandle kokucabangela ubude bomjikelezo nosuku olusolwayo lwe-ovulation.
texts.t4750: I-Progesterone ye-Luteal iyisibonakaliso selabhorethri sesigaba se-post-ovulatory.
texts.t4751: Ngemuva kwe-ovulation, i-corpus luteum iqala ukukhiqiza i-progesterone, ngakho-ke ukukhuphuka kwamazinga kusekela isiphetho sokuthi i-ovulation yenzekile. Nokho, ukuhlolwa okukodwa ngaphandle kwesikhathi esifanele kungaduduzisa ngokungamanga noma kuthuse ngokungamanga. Ngokwezokwelapha, amazinga egazi ngokuvamile ahlotshaniswa ne-ovulation esolwayo kunosuku lwekhalenda olujwayelekile kuwo wonke umuntu.
texts.t4759: Izimpawu zelabhorethri ze-ovulation zifaka phakathi i-progesterone ye-luteal; amanye amahomoni asiza hhayi kangako ukuqinisekisa i-ovulation uqobo kodwa ukuqonda imbangela yokuphazamiseka kwayo.
texts.t4760: Ukuhlolwa kwelabhorethri kuyasiza ikakhulukazi uma ukubuka okusekhaya kungabazeka, umjikelezo ungajwayelekile, noma kudingeka ukuxilongwa kwezokwelapha kwe-anovulation.
texts.t4761: Izimpawu zelabhorethri ze-ovulation ziyizivivinyo ezihlola ukwenzeka noma amathuba enqubo ye-ovulatory.
texts.t4762: I-Progesterone isiza ukukhombisa ukuthi i-ovulation kungenzeka ukuthi yenzekile. I-FSH, i-LH, i-prolactin, i-TSH, ama-androgens, nezinye izinkomba zivame kakhulu ukudingeka ekuxilongweni okuhlukanisayo kwezimbangela ze-anovulation. Ngakho-ke, kubalulekile ukungalindeli ukuthi noma yimuphi i-hormone eyodwa ngokwayo izonikeza impendulo ephelele mayelana ne-ovulation.
texts.t4770: Izindlela zokwazi ukuzala ekhaya zifaka indlela yekhalenda, i-mucus yomlomo wesibeletho, izivivinyo ze-LH, i-BBT, nezindlela ezihlanganisiwe.
texts.t4771: Zingaba wusizo kakhulu ekuqondeni umjikelezo womuntu, kodwa ukunemba kwazo kuncike ekutheni ukubuka kuhle kangakanani nokuthi i-ovulation ijwayelekile kangakanani.
texts.t4772: Izindlela zasekhaya ziyizindlela ezingahlaseli zokubuka izimpawu zokuzala ngaphandle kwesibhedlela.
texts.t4773: Inzuzo yazo ukufinyeleleka kanye nekhono lokubona iphethini yomuntu. Umkhawulo wazo ukungabi khona kokunemba okuphelele: izindlela eziningi zasekhaya zisebenza ngokusekelwe kumathuba kunokubona ngqo i-ovulation. Emijikelezweni ejwayelekile, zivame ukusiza kakhulu kunokubonakala; ku-PCOS, isikhathi sokubeletha, noma ukuntuleka kwamandla, azinakulindeleka kangako.
texts.t4775: amaphutha lapho usebenzisa le ndlela yokuvimbela inzalo noma ukukhulelwa
texts.t4778: Yiziphi izimpawu okufanele zilandelwe nsuku zonke
texts.t4780: Kuyasiza ukulandelela usuku lomjikelezo, izici zokopha, i-mucus yomlomo wesibeletho, izivivinyo ze-LH, i-BBT, izimpawu, nezinto ezithinta nsuku zonke.
texts.t4781: Lapho ukubuka kuqhubekayo futhi kujwayelekile, kuba phezulu inani le-shadi lomjikelezo.
texts.t4782: Ukulandelela kwansuku zonke kuwukurekhoda okuhlelekile kwezimpawu zomjikelezo eziphindaphindayo.
texts.t4783: Okuncane okusebenzayo kuncike enhlosweni. Ukuze uqonde umjikelezo jikelele, izinsuku, ukopha, nezimpawu kuyanele. Ukuhlola iwindi elizalayo, kuwusizo ukwengeza i-mucus nezivivinyo ze-LH; ukuqinisekiswa kokubuyela emuva, i-BBT. Kufanele futhi kubhalwe ukulala, ukugula, utshwala, ukucindezeleka, ukuzivocavoca, nemithi, njengoba kuthinta ukuhumusha.
texts.t4785: akukho ukuqonda ukuthi i-ovulation iyenzeka yini
texts.t4786: yiziphi izimpawu okufanele zilandelwe nsuku zonke
texts.t4791: Ishadi lomjikelezo liyirekhodi elihlelekile lezimpawu ngosuku olusiza ukubona iphethini ephindaphindekayo nokuhlukanisa umsindo kusuka kumkhuba.
texts.t4792: Kuhle ukubhala izimpawu nsuku zonke kunokuzama ukuzakhela inkumbulo ekupheleni kwenyanga.
texts.t4793: Ishadi lomjikelezo liyisistimu ebonakalayo noma yethebula yokurekhoda ukubuka ngosuku.
texts.t4794: Ngokuvamile ibonisa usuku lokuqala lokukhulelwa, ubude bokopha, i-mucus, i-LH, i-BBT, ubuhlungu, isimo sengqondo, ukulala, nezinye izici ezibalulekile. Inani lezokwelapha le-shadi ukuthi libonisa izinguquko kunemicimbi eyodwa. Lokhu kuyasiza ikakhulukazi ku-PMS, i-anovulation, ukuzama ukukhulelwa, nokuhlola imiphumela yokwelashwa.
texts.t4795: akukho ukuthuthuka ekuqondeni komjikelezo ngemuva kwezinyanga ezi-2-3 zokulandelela kwekhwalithi
texts.t4801: Ngokusekelwe ekubukeni, umjikelezo we-anovulatory ungasuswa uma kungekho iphethini ye-ovulatory ejwayelekile: i-mucus elizalayo, i-LH peak, ukukhuphuka okuqhubekayo kwe-BBT, noma isigaba sesibili esilindelekile.
texts.t4802: Nokho, ukubuka okusekhaya akuhlukanisi njalo i-anovulation yangempela nekhwalithi yedatha embi, ngakho-ke ukuphindaphinda kwephethini nomongo wezokwelapha kubalulekile.
texts.t4803: Ukusola i-anovulation ngokusekelwe ekubukeni kuyisiphetho sokungabikho okungenzeka kwe-ovulation ngokusekelwe ezimpawini eziningana ezingaqondile.
texts.t4804: Umjikelezo owodwa ongajwayelekile awukalingani nokuxilongwa. Ukuphindaphinda kuyakhathaza: imijikelezo mide, iphethini ye-ovulatory ayenzi, i-BBT ihlala i-monophasic, i-progesterone ayiqinisekisi isigaba sesibili, nokopha akujwayelekile. Ngenjongo yezokwelapha, kubalulekile ukungarekhodi leli qiniso kuphela kodwa futhi ukuthola imbangela ye-anovulation.
texts.t4805: imijikelezo eminingana ilandelana ngaphandle kwezimpawu ze-ovulation
texts.t4809: Zinembile kangakanani izindlela zasekhaya zokunquma i-ovulation
texts.t4811: Ukunemba kwezindlela zasekhaya kunqunyelwe: ezinye zingcono ekubikezeleni ukusondela kwe-ovulation, ezinye zikuqinisekisa ngemuva kweqiniso, kodwa akukho ndlela yasekhaya ephelele ngokwayo.
texts.t4812: Iphutha elivame kakhulu ukulindela ukunemba okuphelele kwendlela yasekhaya ezingeni lokubheka i-ultrasound.
texts.t4813: Izindlela zasekhaya zokunquma i-ovulation zisebenza ngokusekelwe kumathuba, hhayi ukubona ngqo umcimbi.
texts.t4814: I-Mucus nezivivinyo ze-LH zilungele ukusondela kwe-ovulation; i-BBT yokuqinisekisa kokubuyela emuva; ikhalenda lesiqondiso esilukhuni. Ukwehluka komuntu ngamunye, i-PCOS, ukugula, ukungalali, nephutha lomsebenzisi kunciphisa ukunemba. Ngakho-ke, izindlela zasekhaya zilungele ikakhulukazi njengengxenye yendlela ehlanganisiwe, kunokuba kube ukuhlolwa komlingo okukodwa.
texts.t4816: imizamo engaphumelelanga yokukhulelwa naphezu kokuzethemba ekulandeleleni ekhaya
texts.t4817: zinembile kangakanani izindlela zasekhaya zokunquma i-ovulation
texts.t4822: Ukulandelela ekhaya akukwanele uma umjikelezo ungajwayelekile, i-anovulation isolwa, ukukhulelwa akufinyelelwa, izimpawu zibi kakhulu, noma izimpawu ziphikisana.
texts.t4823: Kulezi zimo, izindlela zokwelapha ziyadingeka: izivivinyo zelabhorethri, ukubheka i-ultrasound, nokufuna imbangela yezinkinga ze-ovulation, kunokulandelela ngokuzimisela okwengeziwe.
texts.t4824: Ukulandelela ekhaya kunemikhawulo futhi kwesinye isikhathi kufanele kuhlanganyelwe ukuhlolwa kwezokwelapha.
texts.t4825: Uma imizamo yokukhulelwa ithatha isikhathi eside, imijikelezo ididekile, i-BBT ne-LH azinikezi isithombe esicacile, kukhona i-PCOS, i-FHA, isikhathi sokubeletha, noma izimpawu ezivelele, ukubuka ekhaya kuphela akukwanele. Kubalulekile ukudlulela ekuxilongweni kwembangela, ngoba inhloso akukhona ukuqoqa idatha eyengeziwe ngenxa yedatha, kodwa ukuqonda i-biology yomjikelezo othile.
texts.t4833: I-Ovulation ukukhululwa kweqanda elivuthiwe kusuka ku-follicle elibusayo ngemuva kwe-LH peak.
texts.t4834: I-Ovulation umcimbi oyinhloko womjikelezo we-ovulatory. Ngemuva kokuvuthwa kwe-follicle elibusayo, i-LH surge ivula ukuqhuma kwe-follicle nokukhululwa kwe-oocyte, ngemuva kwalokho kuqala isigaba se-luteal.
texts.t4835: I-Ovulation ukukhululwa kwe-oocyte evuthiwe kusuka ku-ovary.
texts.t4836: I-Ovulation yenzeka lapho i-follicle elibusayo iqeda ukuvuthwa futhi iqhuma ngaphansi kwethonya le-LH surge. Iqanda libanjwa ama-fimbriae we-tube. Lokhu kuhlukanisa umjikelezo ube izigaba ze-follicular ne-luteal.
texts.t4838: kubalulekile ukuhlukanisa izimpawu zokusondela kwe-ovulation nezimpawu eziyiqinisekisa ngemuva kweqiniso
texts.t4839: ukopha okuvamile akusho njalo ukuthi i-ovulation yenzekile ngokuqinisekile
texts.t4840: uma umjikelezo usungajwayelekile noma ukuzethemba kokuthi i-ovulation iyenzeka kuphelile
texts.t4841: uma izimpawu ziphindaphinda imijikelezo eminingana futhi ziba sobala kakhulu
texts.t4846: Kulesi sigaba, iphethini phezu kwemijikelezo eminingana nomongo wezokwelapha kubaluleke kakhulu kunesikhombisi esisodwa esihlukanisiwe.
texts.t4847: ukukhula kwe-follicle elibusayo → i-estradiol → i-LH peak → i-ovulation → i-corpus luteum → i-progesterone

texts.t4884: Izimpawu ezivamile ze-ovulation ziyasiza, kodwa ukunemba kwanoma iyiphi indlela eyodwa kunqunyelwe; ngezinhloso eziningi, inhlanganisela yezimpawu namaphethini omuntu ngamunye kubaluleke kakhulu.
texts.t4887: I-Ovulation akudingeki yenzeke ngosuku lwe-14; ngokuvamile yenzeka cishe izinsuku ezingu-12-14 ngaphambi kokukhulelwa okulandelayo.
texts.t4888: Kubantu abaningi, isigaba se-luteal sizinzile, kuyilapho isigaba se-follicular sihluka. Ngakho-ke, i-ovulation ingenzeka ngaphambi noma ngemuva kosuku lwe-14, kuye ngobude bomjikelezo othile.
texts.t4889: I-Ovulation ivame ukuhlotshaniswa nosuku lokukhulelwa okulandelayo kunosuku lomjikelezo olungaguquki.
texts.t4890: Umbono odumile we-ovulation edingekayo ngosuku lwe-14 usebenza kuphela engxenyeni yemijikelezo yezinsuku ezingama-28. Empeleni, usuku lwe-ovulation lunqunywa ubude besigaba se-follicular, esihluka kaningi kunesigaba se-luteal.
texts.t4897: Yebo, i-ovulation ingashintsha kusuka kumjikelezo kuya kumjikelezo ngoba isigaba se-follicular siyahluka.
texts.t4898: Ukucindezeleka, ukugula, ukuhamba, ukuntuleka kwamandla, izinguquko zokulala, imithi, nokwehluka okuvamile komzimba kungashintsha i-ovulation ngosuku lwangaphambili noma lwangemuva.
texts.t4899: I-Ovulation ingenzeka ngezinsuku ezahlukene ngisho kumuntu ofanayo.
texts.t4900: Ukushintsha kwe-ovulation kuyisibonakaliso esijwayelekile sokuthi umjikelezo awufani ngokomshini njalo ngenyanga. Isigaba se-follicular, lapho i-follicle elibusayo ikhethwa khona futhi ikhula, sibucayi kakhulu.
texts.t4906: Ihlala isikhathi esingakanani iqanda ngemuva kwe-ovulation
texts.t4908: Iqanda lihlala likwazi ukufakelwa cishe amahora angama-24 ngemuva kwe-ovulation.
texts.t4909: Ngemuva kokukhululwa ku-follicle, i-oocyte ingafakelwa ngaphakathi kwewindi elifushane, ngokuvamile cishe amahora angama-24. Ngakho-ke, amathuba aphezulu okukhulelwa avame ukuhlotshaniswa nocansi ngaphambi kwe-ovulation kunangemva kwayo.
texts.t4910: Ngemuva kwe-ovulation, iqanda lihlala isikhathi esifushane—ngokuvamile cishe amahora angama-24.
texts.t4911: Ukuphila okufushane kwe-oocyte kuchaza ukuthi kungani iwindi elizalayo lesayensi lihanjiswa kakhulu ezinsukwini ngaphambi kwe-ovulation kunangemva kwayo.
texts.t4913: ihlala isikhathi esingakanani iqanda ngemuva kwe-ovulation
texts.t4916: Ihlala isikhathi esingakanani i-sperm emgudwini wokuzala
texts.t4918: Ku-mucus yomlomo wesibeletho evumayo, i-sperm ingahlala ikwazi ukufakelwa izinsuku ezifika kwezi-5.
texts.t4919: Kuyimpilo ye-sperm eyenza izinsuku ngaphambi kwe-ovulation zibaluleke kakhulu ekukhulelweni. Ngaphandle kwe-mucus evumayo, isikhathi sokuphila kwazo sivame ukuba sifushane.
texts.t4920: I-Sperm ingahlala emgudwini wokuzala wesifazane izinsuku ezimbalwa.
texts.t4921: Ikhwalithi nesimo se-mucus yomlomo wesibeletho ngaphambi kwe-ovulation kudala izimo lapho i-sperm ingaphila khona futhi ilinde iqanda ukuthi likhululwe. Ngakho-ke, ukukhulelwa kungenzeka ngemuva kocansi izinsuku ezimbalwa ngaphambi kwe-ovulation.
texts.t4922: ihlala isikhathi esingakanani i-sperm emgudwini wokuzala
texts.t4927: I-Fertile window yisikhathi somjikelezo lapho ucansi lungaholela ekukhulelweni; ngokwesayensi, iyisikhawu sezinsuku ezi-6 esiphela ngosuku lwe-ovulation.
texts.t4928: I-Fertile window iqukethe izinsuku ezimbalwa zokuphila kwe-sperm kanye nosuku olulodwa lokuphila kweqanda. Ngakho-ke, izinsuku ezibaluleke kakhulu ekukhulelweni zingaphambi kwe-ovulation futhi ngosuku lwe-ovulation.
texts.t4929: I-Fertile window yisikhathi samathuba aphezulu okukhulelwa eduze kwe-ovulation.
texts.t4930: Imithombo ivamise ukuchaza iwindi elizalayo lesayensi njengesikhawu sezinsuku ezi-6: izinsuku ezi-5 ngaphambi kwe-ovulation nosuku lwe-ovulation. Iwindi elizalayo lezokwelapha lapho kulandelelwa izimpawu lingabonakala lide ngoba umuntu kufanele asebenze ngokusekelwe kumathuba kusengaphambili.
texts.t4937: Amathuba aphezulu okukhulelwa ngokuvamile kwenzeka izinsuku ezi-1-2 ngaphambi kwe-ovulation nangelanga le-ovulation.
texts.t4938: Lokhu kungenxa yokuthi i-sperm ingaba khona emgudwini wokuzala kusengaphambili, kuyilapho iqanda lihlala isikhathi esifushane ngemuva kwe-ovulation.
texts.t4939: Izinsuku ezizalayo kakhulu ngokuvamile ziba ngaphambi kwe-ovulation futhi zifaka usuku lwe-ovulation.
texts.t4940: Nakuba iwindi elizalayo lihlanganisa izinsuku ezimbalwa, amathuba okukhulelwa ngaphakathi kwalo awasatshalaliswa ngokulinganayo. Kusiza kakhulu ukugxila ezimpawini zokusondela kwe-ovulation kunosuku lwekhalenda kuphela.
texts.t4946: Yebo, i-ovulation ingenzeka ngaphandle kwezimpawu ezibonakalayo, futhi lokhu kujwayelekile.
texts.t4947: Abantu abaningi abakwazi ukuzwa i-ovulation nhlobo. Ukungabikho kobuhlungu, ukukhishwa, noma ezinye izimpawu ezibonakalayo akusho ngokuzenzakalelayo ukuthi i-ovulation ayenzekanga.
texts.t4949: Kubanye abantu, i-ovulation yenzeka ngokuphelele ingabonakali. Ngakho-ke, ukungabikho kwezimpawu akunakusetshenziswa njengobufakazi obuzimele be-anovulation; izindlela zokuqinisekisa ezithembeke kakhulu ziyadingeka.
texts.t4955: Izimpawu eziyinhloko ze-ovulation zifaka izinguquko ku-mucus yomlomo wesibeletho, ubuhlungu obuphakathi nomjikelezo, i-LH peak, kanye nokukhuphuka okulandelayo kwezinga lokushisa lomzimba eliyisisekelo.
texts.t4956: Akukho siginali esisodwa esiphelele ngokwaso. Kusiza kakhulu ukuhlola inhlanganisela yezimpawu nokuphindaphindeka kwazo phezu kwemijikelezo eminingana.
texts.t4957: Izimpawu ze-ovulation izinguquko zomzimba ezihambisana nokusondela noma ukwenzeka kwe-ovulation.
texts.t4958: Ezinye izimpawu zikhombisa ukuthi i-ovulation isondela, njengokuthi i-mucus elizalayo noma ukuhlolwa kwe-LH okuhle kwe-urinary. Ezinye izimpawu, njengokukhuphuka okuqhubekayo kwe-BBT, kungenzeka kakhulu ukuqinisekisa ukuthi i-ovulation isivele yenzekile.
texts.t4960: ukungabikho kwephethini ye-ovulatory imijikelezo eminingi ilandelana
texts.t4963: Ubuhlungu obufishane obungashintshi obuphakathi nomjikelezo bungase buhlotshaniswe ne-ovulation, kodwa ubuhlungu obukhulu noma obungajwayelekile akufanele kubhekwe ngokuzenzakalelayo njengokujwayelekile.
texts.t4964: I-Mittelschmerz ebizwa kanjalo yenzeka kwabanye abantu futhi ngokuvamile ayihlali isikhathi eside. Nokho, ubuhlungu obukhulu, obude, noma obungajwayelekile budinga ukukhipha ezinye izimbangela.
texts.t4965: Ubuhlungu be-Ovulatory kungaba ukungakhululeki kwesikhashana eduze kwe-ovulation.
texts.t4966: Ubuhlungu obunjalo buhlotshaniswa nokwelulwa kwe-follicle, ukuqhuma, kanye/noma ukucasuka kwendawo ye-peritoneal. Nokho, noma yiluphi ubuhlungu obukhulu obungashintshi phakathi nomjikelezo akufanele lubhekwe ngokuzenzakalelayo ku-ovulation: ukukhulelwa, ama-cysts, i-torsion, nezinye izimbangela kufanele zicatshangwe.
texts.t4973: Ukopha okuncane, okufushane phakathi nomjikelezo kungenzeka, kodwa ukopha okuphindaphindayo noma okukhulu kudinga ukuhlolwa.
texts.t4974: Ukopha okuncane kwesikhashana eduze kwe-ovulation kwesinye isikhathi kuchazwa njengokuhluka okuvamile. Nokho, uma ukukhishwa kuba iphethini eqhubekayo, kukhuphuka, noma kuhambisana nobuhlungu nokubambezeleka, kudingeka ukuxilongwa okuhlukanisayo okuhlukile.
texts.t4975: Ukopha kwe-ovulatory kuyinani elincane lokukhishwa kwegazi phakathi nomjikelezo.
texts.t4976: Umshini ophakanyisiwe uhlotshaniswa nokushintsha okusheshayo kwe-hormonal eduze kwe-ovulation. Nokho, ukopha phakathi nomjikelezo akucacile: kungase futhi kwenzeke ngama-polyps, izifo, imithi ye-hormonal, ukukhulelwa, nezinye izimbangela zokopha okungajwayelekile.
texts.t4984: Kubanye abantu, i-libido iyakhuphuka ngesikhathi se-periovulatory, kodwa lokhu kuyinto yomuntu ngamunye futhi akuyona isibonakaliso esiyimpoqo se-ovulation.
texts.t4985: Ukukhuphuka kwesifiso socansi eduze kwe-ovulation kuchazwe kwezinye izifundo nokubuka, kodwa ukungabikho komuzwa onjalo akukhombisi inkinga.
texts.t4986: I-Libido eduze kwe-ovulation ingashintsha, kodwa lezi zinguquko azijwayelekile.
texts.t4987: I-Libido ithonywa hhayi ama-hormone kuphela kodwa nobudlelwano, ukucindezeleka, ukukhathala, ubuhlungu, nezici zengqondo. Ngakho-ke, lesi siginali siyahlukahluka kakhulu ukuthi singasetshenziswa njengesilinganiso sokuxilonga.
texts.t4993: Izinguquko ku-mucus yomlomo wesibeletho ngesikhathi se-ovulation
texts.t4994: Ngaphambi kwe-ovulation, i-mucus yomlomo wesibeletho ngokuvamile iba yiningi, icace, ishelele, futhi iyeluleka.
texts.t4995: I-Estrogen yenza i-mucus ibe manzi kakhulu ku-sperm, ngakho-ke izinguquko ku-mucus kungenye yezimpawu ezisebenzayo kakhulu zokusondela kwe-ovulation.
texts.t4996: I-Mucus elizalayo iyinguquko encike ku-estrogen ekukhishweni kwe-mucus yomlomo wesibeletho ngaphambi kwe-ovulation.
texts.t4997: Ukubheka i-mucus kungenye yezindlela ezisebenzayo kakhulu zasekhaya zokuhlola iwindi elizalayo. Njengoba amazinga e-estrogen ekhuphuka, i-mucus iba manzi, ishelele, futhi ifana neqanda elibomvu elingavuthiwe.
texts.t5000: izinguquko ku-mucus yomlomo wesibeletho ngesikhathi se-ovulation
texts.t5004: Esikhathini se-periovulatory, umlomo wesibeletho kwabanye abantu uba phezulu, uthambe, futhi uvuleke kakhulu, kodwa lokhu kunzima ukukuhlola ngokuthembekile ngokwakho.
texts.t5005: Izinguquko esikhundleni somlomo wesibeletho zibhekwa njengezimpawu zokwazi ukuzala, kodwa zidinga ulwazi futhi azibhekwa njengendlela ethembeke kakhulu yokuzihlola.
texts.t5006: Isikhundla somlomo wesibeletho singashintsha ngokuphendula esigabeni somjikelezo.
texts.t5007: Ngaphambi kwe-ovulation, ngaphansi kwethonya le-estrogen, umlomo wesibeletho ungase ubekwe phezulu, uzwakale uthambe uma uthintwa, futhi ube nomlomo wangaphandle ovulekile kakhulu. Ngemuva kwe-ovulation, njengoba i-progesterone ikhuphuka, ivame ukuba phansi futhi iqine futhi.
texts.t5011: Izinga lokushisa lomzimba eliyisisekelo ngemuva kwe-ovulation
texts.t5013: Ngemuva kwe-ovulation, izinga lokushisa lomzimba eliyisisekelo ngokuvamile liyakhuphuka ngaphansi kwethonya le-progesterone futhi lihlale liphakeme kuze kube ukukhulelwa.
texts.t5014: I-BBT ayibikezeli kahle i-ovulation kusengaphambili, kodwa ingasiza ukuqinisekisa ukuthi isivele yenzekile uma kubonwa ukushintsha kwezinga lokushisa okuqhubekayo.
texts.t5015: Ukukhuphuka kwezinga lokushisa lomzimba eliyisisekelo kuyisiphumo se-progesterone ye-post-ovulatory.
texts.t5016: Ngokwesiko, kuchazwa ukukhuphuka okungaba ngu-0.3–0.6°C, kodwa ukukhuphuka okuqhubekayo uma kuqhathaniswa ne-baseline yomuntu kubaluleke kakhulu kunenani eliphelele. Indlela ibucayi kumaphethini okulala, ukugula, nesikhathi sokulinganisa.
texts.t5017: ishadi elihlala njalo le-monophasic lapho i-anovulation isolwa
texts.t5018: izinga lokushisa lomzimba eliyisisekelo ngemuva kwe-ovulation
texts.t5023: I-Ovulation ivame ukuqinisekiswa ngemuva kwesikhathi: ngokukhuphuka okuqhubekayo kwe-BBT, izinguquko ku-mucus, uchungechunge lwezivivinyo ze-LH, noma amazinga e-progesterone esigabeni se-luteal.
texts.t5024: I-nuance ebaluleke kakhulu ukuthi izimpawu eziningi ze-ovulation zingcono ekuqinisekiseni ngemuva kweqiniso kunokubikezela umzuzu oqondile kusengaphambili.
texts.t5025: Ukuqinisekiswa kwe-ovulation kuvame kakhulu ukwenzeka ngemuva kokuthi yenzekile, kunokuba ngesikhathi.
texts.t5026: Lesi ngesinye sezizathu zokuthi kungani ukuhlela ukukhulelwa kungcono kusekelwe ezimpawini zokusondela kwe-ovulation kunokulinda ubufakazi bokuthi isidlulile. Ngokwezokwelapha, inhlanganisela yomlando, izivivinyo ze-LH, i-progesterone, i-ultrasound, nokushintsha kwezinga lokushisa kuyasetshenziswa.
texts.t5030: Ingabe i-ovulation emibili ingenzeka kumjikelezo owodwa?
texts.t5032: I-Ovulation emibili ngezinsuku ezahlukene zomjikelezo ofanayo ngokuvamile ayenzeki njengezikhathi ezihlukene, ezihlukaniswe kude; ukukhululwa kwe-oocyte okuningi eduze kwesikhathi kungenzeka.
texts.t5033: Uma amaqanda amabili ekhululwa, ngokuvamile kwenzeka ngaphakathi kwewindi le-ovulatory elifanayo, kunokuba kube ama-ovulations amabili azimele ngesonto elilodwa.
texts.t5034: Kungaba khona i-oocyte engaphezu kweyodwa kumjikelezo owodwa, kodwa hhayi ama-ovulations amabili ahlukene ngokuphelele ahlukaniswe ikhefu elide.
texts.t5035: Ngemuva kwe-ovulation, i-progesterone kanye nokulawulwa kwe-luteal kwenza i-trigger yesibili ye-ovulation entsha kumjikelezo ofanayo ingabi khona. I-Ovulation eminingi, uma yenzeka, yenzeka eduze kwesikhathi.
texts.t5036: ingabe i-ovulation emibili ingenzeka kumjikelezo owodwa
texts.t5041: Umjikelezo we-Anovulatory umjikelezo lapho i-ovulation ingenzekanga.
texts.t5042: Ku-anovulation, ukopha kungase kwenzeke, kodwa isigaba se-luteal esigcwele ngokukhuphuka okujwayelekile kwe-progesterone asithuthukisi. Ngakho-ke, ukopha akuhlali kufakazela i-ovulation.
texts.t5043: Umjikelezo we-Anovulatory umjikelezo wegazi noma wokukhulelwa ngaphandle kokukhululwa kweqanda.
texts.t5044: I-Anovulation ingaba yisikhathi esithile futhi ingenzeka ngesikhathi sokuthomba, i-perimenopause, ngaphansi kwengcindezi, ezimweni zokugula, kanye nokuphazamiseka kwe-ovulatory. Ngokuxilonga, umuntu akakwazi ukuthembela kuphela eqinisweni lokukhulelwa—izimpawu ezingaqondile noma eziqondile ze-ovulation ziyadingeka.
texts.t5051: Izimbangela zokungabikho kwe-ovulation zifaka i-PCOS, ukuntuleka kwamandla, isisindo esiphansi, ukucindezeleka, i-hyperprolactinemia, izifo ze-thyroid, nezinye izici.
texts.t5052: I-Ovulation iyisibonakaliso esibucayi sesimo se-neuroendocrine kanye ne-metabolic. Ngakho-ke, ukungabikho kwayo akuyona i-diagnosis uqobo, kodwa umphumela wezimbangela ezahlukene ezingaba khona.
texts.t5053: Ukungabikho kwe-ovulation kuyisibonakaliso, hhayi ukuxilongwa kokugcina.
texts.t5054: I-differential ifaka phakathi izimbangela ze-hypothalamic, i-pituitary, i-ovarian, i-thyroid, kanye ne-metabolic. Ngemikhuba yezokwelapha, kubalulekile ukungayeki esigabeni esithi 'akukho i-ovulation' kodwa ukufuna ukuthi kungani kwenzeka.
texts.t5062: I-Ovulation iqinisekiswa ngenhlanganisela yezindlela: i-progesterone yesigaba se-luteal, uchungechunge lwezivivinyo ze-LH, izinga lokushisa lomzimba eliyisisekelo, i-ultrasound, nomkhuba wezokwelapha.
texts.t5063: Ayikho inkomba eyodwa ephelele yasekhaya. I-Ovulation ihlolwa ngokuthembeka kakhulu kumongo wezindlela eziningana nomsebenzi wezokwelapha othile.
texts.t5064: Ukuqinisekiswa kwe-ovulation ngokuvamile kudinga izimpawu ezingaphezu kweyodwa.
texts.t5065: Ukuze kuqashwe ekhaya, izivivinyo ze-LH, i-mucus yomlomo wesibeletho, kanye ne-BBT kuyasiza. Ukusetshenziswa kweklinikhi, i-serum progesterone, ukuqapha i-ultrasound, nokuhlola ukujwayeleka komjikelezo kuyanezelwa. Usuku lwe-21 lwe-progesterone alufanele wonke umuntu: izivivinyo zegazi kufanele zihambisane nokusolwa kokukhulelwa.
texts.t5071: Ngemva kokuyeka ama-COCs, ukukhulelwa kuvame ukubuyela ngokushesha, kodwa kwabanye abantu, umjikelezo udinga isikhathi sokubuyisela iphethini yawo evamile.
texts.t5072: Ukubambezeleka ekubuyiselweni komjikelezo ngemva kwe-COCs akusho ngaso sonke isikhathi ukuthi amaphilisi 'aphule' ukukhulelwa; kwesinye isikhathi abaveza nje ukuthambekela okungaphansi kokujwayelekile kwemijikelezo engajwayelekile.
texts.t5073: Ngemva kokuyeka ama-COCs, ukukhulelwa kuvame ukuqala kabusha, kodwa isikhathi singahluka.
texts.t5074: Kubantu abaningi, ukukhulelwa kubuyela phakathi namasonto okuqala ngemva kokuyeka, kodwa ukubikezela umjikelezo othile kunzima. Uma umjikelezo wawungajwayelekile ngaphambi kwe-COCs, lokhu kungase kubonakale futhi ngemva kokuyeka.
texts.t5080: Ukukhulelwa ngemva kokubeletha kungabuyela ngaphambi kokuba kuqale isikhathi sokuqala, futhi isikhathi sincike ekunceliseni nasezicini zomuntu ngamunye.
texts.t5081: Kubantu abanganceli, ukukhulelwa kuvame ukubuyela ngokushesha; ngesikhathi sokuncelisa, i-prolactin ingavimbela ukukhulelwa, kodwa lokhu akusho ukuthi akukhona nhlobo.
texts.t5082: Ngemva kokubeletha, ukukhulelwa kungabuyela ngisho nangaphambi kwesikhathi sokuqala.
texts.t5083: Lokhu kubalulekile ekuthinteni izindlela zokuvimbela ukukhulelwa nokuhlela umndeni: ukungabikho kwesikhathi akusho ukuvikelwa okuphelele ekukhulelweni. Nge-lactational amenorrhea, ingozi iphansi, kodwa incike ekuphindaphindeni nasekunceliseni kuphela.
texts.t5091: Nge-PCOS, ukukhulelwa kungase kwenzeke ngokungajwayelekile noma kungabi khona, kodwa i-PCOS ayilingani nokungabi khona ngokuphelele kokukhulelwa kubo bonke abantu.
texts.t5092: Kubanye abantu abane-PCOS, ukukhulelwa kwenzeka kodwa kuyivelakancane futhi akubikezeleki; kwabanye, ukungakhulelwa kuyabonakala kakhulu.
texts.t5094: Izikhathi ezingajwayelekile noma ezingavamile ku-PCOS zivame ukubonisa ukukhulelwa okungavamile. Nokho, ukuba ne-PCOS akusho ukuthi ukukhulelwa akusoze kwenzeka. Ukuhlela ukukhulelwa nezindlela zokuvimbela ukukhulelwa, kubalulekile ukukhumbula ukuthi ukukhulelwa kungenzeka ngezikhathi ezithile.
texts.t5100: Isisindo esiphansi nokushoda kwamandla kungavimbela ukukhulelwa ngokuphazamiseka kwe-hypothalamic.
texts.t5101: Ukuze ukukhulelwa kwenzeke, akubalulekile kuphela isisindo esiphelele, kodwa futhi nokutholakala kwamandla, izinga lokulahlekelwa isisindo, ukudla, ukucindezeleka, nokuphepha okuphelele kwe-metabolic.
texts.t5102: Isisindo esiphansi singaphazamisa ukukhulelwa ngokuvimbela okuphakathi kwe-eksisi yokuzala.
texts.t5103: Uma umzimba ubona ukusilela kwamandla njengesongo, i-hypothalamus inciphisa ukukhishwa kwe-GnRH, kulandelwa ukuwa kwe-FSH ne-LH stimulation. Lokhu kungaholela ku-oligomenorrhea, amenorrhea, nokungakhulelwa.
texts.t5111: Ukuqeqesha okukhulu kungaphazamisa ukukhulelwa hhayi ngokwakho, kodwa ngokuvamile ngokuhlanganiswa komthwalo, ukusilela kwamandla, nokucindezeleka.
texts.t5112: Uma umthwalo uphezulu futhi ukubuyisela nokudla kunganele, i-eksisi yokuzala ingavinjwa. Ngakho-ke, inkinga ivame ukuba hhayi kwezemidlalo uqobo, kodwa ekutholakaleni kwamandla okuphansi kanye ne-RED-S.
texts.t5113: Ukuqeqesha okukhulu kungahambisana nokungakhulelwa, ikakhulukazi ngokushoda kwamandla.
texts.t5114: Ukukhulelwa kuzwela ekuhlanganisweni kokucindezeleka komzimba, ukudla okunganele, nokulahlekelwa isisindo. Kubadlali besifazane nabantu abakhuthele, ukungakhulelwa kungaba yinto efihlekile ngisho nasekukhoneni kokopha.
texts.t5122: Esigabeni sokuqala se-follicular, abanye abantu bangase bazizwe benamandla aphansi ngenxa yokukhulelwa kanye nezinga eliphansi le-estradiol ne-progesterone.
texts.t5123: Ekuqaleni komjikelezo, izimpawu zokukhulelwa nezinga eliphansi le-hormonal kwenzeka ngesikhathi esisodwa; ngakho-ke, abanye abantu babika ukukhathala, ukuquleka, ukwehla kwesifiso, noma isidingo sokubuyisela.
texts.t5124: Isigaba sokuqala se-follicular siwuqala komjikelezo, ngokuvamile kuhambisana nokukhulelwa.
texts.t5125: Ngalesi sikhathi, amazinga e-estradiol ne-progesterone aphansi, futhi abanye abantu basazizwa ubuhlungu bokukhulelwa, buthakathaka, ukuphazamiseka kokulala, nokuzwela okwandisiwe kokungakhululeki. Nokho, ubukhulu bezimpawu buhluka kakhulu: kwabanye, ukuphila kahle kuhlala cishe kungashintshi, kanti kwabanye, izinsuku zokuqala zomjikelezo ziyizinkinga kakhulu ngenxa ye-dysmenorrhea noma ukopha okukhulu.
texts.t5126: izitayela zesigaba esimaphakathi aziyona imithetho ephelele kuwo wonke umuntu
texts.t5127: ukuphila kahle kuthonywa hhayi ama-hormone kuphela kodwa futhi ubuhlungu, ukulala, ukucindezeleka, ukudla, kanye ne-anemia

texts.t5131: uma ubukhulu bezimpawu bukhula ngokuhamba kwesikhathi
texts.t5137: imithi, ukudla, ukucindezeleka, kanye nomphumela wezinyathelo
texts.t5138: Kulolu hlobo, iphethini yezokwelapha, ukuphindaphinda, kanye nomthelela kwekhwalithi yokuphila kubaluleke kakhulu kunamazinga amanani.
texts.t5140: isigaba somjikelezo → izinguquko kumazinga e-estrogen ne-progesterone → izinguquko kumthwalo wezimpawu kanye nokuphila kahle okubonakalayo
texts.t5141: ubuhlungu, ukulala, ukucindezeleka, namandla atholakalayo → shintsha umbono wesigaba ngokuqinile kunemiphumela yesibalo esiphakathi
texts.t5142: ukuguquguquka okulingene komjikelezo ekuphila kahle kungaba ukwehluka okujwayelekile

texts.t5145: izimpawu ezingagcini esigabeni esilindelekile noma ezinganyamalali ngemuva kwaso

texts.t5151: izimpawu ezinzima eziphindaphindayo zidinga ukuhlolwa kwe-PMS/PMDD, i-dysmenorrhea, i-anemia, ukuphazamiseka kokulala, nezinye izimbangela
texts.t5152: wonke owesifazane kufanele azizwe izigaba ezifanayo ngendlela efanayo
