texts.t5156: uma isimpawu sintekenteke futhi silindelekile → landela emijikelezweni futhi ulungise uhlelo
texts.t5157: uma isimpawu sibonakala futhi siphindaphinda → hlola i-PMS/PMDD, ubuhlungu, ukulala, ukuntuleka kwe-ayoni, ukucindezeleka
texts.t5158: uma kunezimpawu ezinzima zemizwa noma izimpawu ze-hemodynamic/neurological → funa usizo oluphuthumayo
texts.t5159: ukuchaza zonke izinguquko ekuphila kahle ngama-hormone kuphela ngaphandle kokuhlola ukulala, ubuhlungu, nokudla
texts.t5160: ukuthembela kumapheshana adumile esikhundleni sokubuka iphethini yangempela yomuntu
texts.t5161: ukunganaki izimpawu ezinzima zemizwa njengengxenye edingekayo yomjikelezo
texts.t5163: ukushintsha okuncane okubonakalayo ngaphandle komthelela empilweni yansuku zonke
texts.t5164: beka ukuthi isiphi isigaba somjikelezo isimpawu esihlobene naso
texts.t5166: hlola ukuthi ngabe ukuguquguquka komjikelezo okulingene noma iphethini ebalulekile ngokomtholampilo
texts.t5167: nikeza umhlahlandlela wokuthi nini idayari idingeka futhi nini ukubonisana kuyadingeka
texts.t5169: Kulolu hlobo, kubaluleke kakhulu ukuhlukanisa phakathi kwezitayela ezimaphakathi zabantu kanye nesipiliyoni somuntu ngamunye; kwahlinzekwa kuqala iziqondiso zezokwelapha, ama-meta-analyses, nezibuyekezo ezine methodology yesigaba esiqinisekisiwe.
texts.t5174: hlola ukuphila kahle emijikelezweni eminingana kunosuku olulodwa
texts.t5175: cabanga hhayi isigaba kuphela kodwa futhi ubuhlungu, ukulala, ukucindezeleka, ukudla, kanye nevolumu yokugeleza kokukhulelwa
texts.t5176: izimpawu ezinzima zomjikelezo kufanele zihlukaniswe nezimo ezijwayelekile zomzimba nezengqondo
texts.t5177: ngokwezimpawu ezinzima, hlola i-PMS/PMDD, i-dysmenorrhea, i-migraine, i-anemia, ukulala, nokuziphatha kokudla
texts.t5178: lungisa umthwalo womsebenzi nohlelo ukuze uhambisane nephethini yangempela kunohlelo olujwayelekile
texts.t5179: ungacabangi noma yiziphi izimpawu ezinzima njengomthetho odingekayo
texts.t5180: ungabeki izincomo kuphela esigabeni somjikelezo ngaphandle kokucabangela impendulo yomuntu ngamunye
texts.t5181: Kuzo izici eziningi zokuphila kahle, umehluko phakathi kwezikhathi ezifundweni mncane futhi awuhambisani; imizwa yokuzibona iyikho, kodwa akufanele iguqulwe ibe imithetho eqinile yomhlaba wonke kuwo wonke umuntu.
texts.t5184: Esigabeni sokugcina se-follicular, abaningi bazizwa benamandla nokuzinza, kodwa lokhu akuyona imithetho yomhlaba wonke.
texts.t5185: Njengoba amazinga e-estradiol ekhuphuka ngemva kokukhulelwa, abanye abantu babika ukuphila kahle okungcono, ubulula bokuzibona, i-libido ephakeme, nezikhalazo ezincane zomzimba, nakuba umehluko womuntu ngamunye mkhulu kakhulu.
texts.t5186: Isigaba sokugcina se-follicular siyingxenye yomjikelezo ngaphambi kokukhulelwa nge-estradiol ekhuphukayo.
texts.t5187: Ngemva kokuphela kokukhulelwa, izimpawu ezihlobene nokopha kanye ne-prostaglandins ngokuvamile ziyancipha. Ngalesi simo, abanye abantu bazizwa benamandla, isimo sengqondo, nokukhiqiza okuthuthukisiwe. Nokho, idatha yesayensi ichaza izitayela ezimaphakathi ezilinganiselwe kunesimo esifanayo esidingekayo kuwo wonke umuntu.
texts.t5188: ukuphila kahle okusha okubi ngaphandle kwesizathu esicacile
texts.t5189: umjikelezo ngaphandle kwephethini ebonakalayo enezimpawu ezinzima
texts.t5194: Ngesikhathi sokukhulelwa, abanye abantu bazizwa benamandla, bejabule, noma be-libido, kodwa abanye bazizwa bekhululekile okwesikhashana.
texts.t5195: Isikhathi sokukhulelwa asidingi ukuba sizwakale kakhulu, kodwa abanye bayabona ubuhlungu obuncane ohlangothini olulodwa, izinguquko ku-mucus, ukwanda kwesifiso sokuziphatha, noma ubulula bokuzibona.
texts.t5196: Ukukhulelwa ukukhishwa kwe-oocyte evuthiwe kulandela i-LH peak.
texts.t5197: Isikhathi sokukhulelwa singahambisana nobuhlungu obuphakathi komjikelezo, i-mucus yomlomo wesibeletho emincane, futhi kwabanye abantu, i-libido ephakeme. Nokho, abaningi abakwazi ukuzizwa ukukhulelwa nhlobo. Uma ubuhlungu bokukhulelwa bukhulu, buphikelele, noma buphindaphinda ngendlela engajwayelekile, akufanele kubhekwe ngokuzenzakalelayo njengokuvamile.
texts.t5204: Esigabeni sokuqala se-luteal, ukuphila kahle kuhlala kuzolile kwabanye abantu, kodwa izinzwa ezihlobene ne-progesterone zingase zikhule kancane kancane.
texts.t5205: Ngemva kokukhulelwa, i-progesterone iyakhuphuka, futhi abanye baqala ukubona ubuthongo, isimo esizolile, izinguquko zesifiso sokudla, noma ukuzwela kwamabele.
texts.t5206: Isigaba sokuqala se-luteal yisikhathi ngemva kokukhulelwa esilawulwa yi-progesterone.
texts.t5207: Ezinsukwini zokuqala ngemva kokukhulelwa, abanye abantu abakwazi ukubona izinguquko, kanti abanye bachaza ubuthongo obukhulayo, ukukhuphuka kwamandla okungaphansi, ukuvuvukala okuncane, noma izinguquko kwamabele. Lokhu kungaba yingxenye yesigaba se-luteal esivamile uma izimpawu zilinganiselwe futhi ziphindaphinda ngendlela elindelekile.
texts.t5208: izimpawu ezinzima ezintsha eziphazamisa kakhulu impilo yansuku zonke
texts.t5215: Ngaphambi kwezikhathi, abanye abantu babona ukwanda kweqembu lezimpawu zomzimba nezomzwelo ezihlobene nesigaba sokugcina se-luteal.
texts.t5216: Yisigaba sokugcina se-luteal esihlotshaniswa kakhulu ne-PMS: ukuvutha, ukukhala, ukuvuvukala, ukuzwela kwamabele, izifiso zokudla, ukuphazamiseka kokulala, nokwehla kokubekezelela ukucindezeleka.
texts.t5217: Isigaba sokugcina se-luteal sivame ukuhambisana nezimpawu zangaphambi kokukhulelwa.
texts.t5218: Izimpawu ezifana ne-PMS zivame ukuvela ezinsukwini ezimbalwa ngaphambi kokukhulelwa futhi zincipha ngemva kokuqala kwayo. Akukhona nje ubukhulu bazo kodwa futhi nokujikeleza kwazo kubalulekile ngokomtholampilo: kufanele ziphindaphinde esigabeni se-luteal kunokuba zikhona njalo ngenyanga. Izimpawu zemizwa ezinzima eziphazamisa ukusebenza zidinga ukuhlolwa kwe-PMDD nezinye izimo.
texts.t5228: Amandla emijikelezweni yomjikelezo ashintsha ngokwehlukana: kwabanye abantu, aphansi ngesikhathi sokukhulelwa nangesigaba sokugcina se-luteal futhi aphakeme ngemva kwezikhathi naseduze kokukhulelwa.
texts.t5229: Kukhona iphethini yokuzibona evamile yamandla amancane ngesikhathi sokukhulelwa nangaphambi kwezikhathi, futhi amaningi phakathi nomjikelezo, kodwa akuyona imithetho yomhlaba wonke futhi incike kakhulu kubuhlungu, ukulala, ukuntuleka kwe-ayoni, nomthwalo womsebenzi.
texts.t5230: Amandla emijikelezweni yomjikelezo awashintshi ngendlela efanayo kuwo wonke umuntu.
texts.t5231: Ukuphila kahle kunqunywa hhayi ama-hormone kuphela kodwa futhi ubuhlungu, ukulala, ukucindezeleka, ukuzivocavoca, ukudla, nokuntuleka kwe-ayoni. Ngakho-ke, isigaba se-hormonal esifanayo sizwakala ngendlela ehlukile kubantu abahlukene. Uma amandla aphansi ezinzima, engapheli, noma engahambisani nesigaba somjikelezo, ezinye izimbangela kufanele zifunwe kunokuchaza konke ngama-hormone kuphela.
texts.t5238: Ngokwesilinganiso, isifiso sokudla nokudla kwamandla kuphakeme esigabeni se-luteal kwabanye abantu, kodwa umehluko womuntu ngamunye mkhulu kakhulu.
texts.t5239: Izibuyekezo zibonisa ukuthambekela kokudla kwamandla okuphakeme esigabeni se-luteal nokudla okuphansi eduze kokukhulelwa; nokho, umphumela awuhambisani futhi uncike endleleni yokusebenza nezici zomuntu ngamunye.
texts.t5240: Isifiso sokudla singashintsha emijikelezweni yomjikelezo, ikakhulukazi esigabeni se-luteal.
texts.t5241: Isifiso sokudla sixhumene hhayi ne-estrogen ne-progesterone kuphela kodwa futhi nokulala, ukucindezeleka, ukuzivocavoca, nokutholakala kwamandla. Ngakho-ke, ukwanda kwesifiso sokudla ngaphambi kokukhulelwa kujwayelekile kwabanye abantu kodwa akufanele kubhekwe ngokuzenzakalelayo njengenkinga. Okukhathazayo kakhulu yizigameko ezibonakalayo zokulahlekelwa ukulawula ukudla, izithiyo ezinzima, noma iphethini elidlula umjikelezo.
texts.t5251: Ukulala kungase kube kubi ngaphambi nangaphakathi kokukhulelwa, ikakhulukazi uma kunobuhlungu, ukuvuvukala, ukujuluka, noma ukukhathazeka.
texts.t5252: Izinguquko zokulala emijikelezweni yomjikelezo aziveli kuwo wonke umuntu, kodwa isigaba sangaphambi kokukhulelwa nokukhulelwa kuvame ukuhambisana nokulala okubi ngokuzibona, ukuvuka ebusuku, nokuncipha komuzwa wokubuyisela.
texts.t5253: Ukulala kungashintsha emijikelezweni yomjikelezo nangaphansi kwethonya lezimpawu.
texts.t5254: Ukulala kuthonywa izinguquko ze-hormonal, izinga lokushisa komzimba, isimo sengqondo, ubuhlungu, nokungakhululeki ebusuku. Ngakho-ke, esigabeni sokugcina se-luteal nangesikhathi sokukhulelwa, abanye abantu bavame ukukhononda ngokulala okuhlukanisiwe nokuncipha kokubuyisela. Nokho, uma i-insomnia inzima futhi ingagcini kuphethini yomjikelezo, ezinye izimbangela kufanele zifunwe.
texts.t5261: I-libido iyakhuphuka kwabanye abantu esigabeni sokugcina se-follicular naseduze kokukhulelwa, kodwa lokhu akuyona imithetho yomhlaba wonke.
texts.t5262: Isifiso sobulili singashintsha ngaphansi kwethonya lama-hormone, isimo sengqondo, ubudlelwane, ubuhlungu, nokuphila kahle okujwayelekile, ngakho umehluko womuntu ngamunye mkhulu kakhulu lapha.
texts.t5263: I-libido ingashintsha phakathi nomjikelezo, kodwa lezi zinguquko zihluke kakhulu kumuntu ngamunye.
texts.t5264: Kubanye abantu, i-libido iphakeme eduze kokukhulelwa lapho i-estradiol ikhuphuka futhi umbono womzimba wakho kanye nesifiso sobulili kuyashintsha. Nokho, kwabanye, izici eziyinhloko zihlala ukucindezeleka, ukukhathala, ubudlelwane, ubuhlungu, ukoma kwe-mucosal, noma izizathu zengqondo. Ukuntuleka kwephuzu eliphakeme le-libido phakathi nomjikelezo akuyona i-pathology ngokwayo.
texts.t5266: ukushintsha ngokuzumayo ngemva kokuqala kokwelashwa noma isifo
texts.t5271: Amandla okusebenza emijikelezweni yomjikelezo ashintsha kwabanye abantu ikakhulukazi ngenxa yezimpawu, kunokuba kube ukwehla okukhulu okungenakugwenywa kwamakhono okucabanga.
texts.t5272: Ukukhiqiza okubonakalayo kungase kwehle ngesikhathi noma ngaphambi kwezikhathi ezibuhlungu, kodwa lokhu kuvame ukuhlobene nobuhlungu, ukulala, nesimo sengqondo kunokukhubazeka okungenakugwenywa okuhlobene nesigaba sokucabanga.
texts.t5273: Amandla okusebenza emijikelezweni yomjikelezo ancike kakhulu ezimpawini kunohlelo lwe-biological oluqinile.
texts.t5274: Ucwaningo alusekeli inkolelo-ze yokwehla okukhulu okungenakugwenywa kwamakhono okucabanga emijikelezweni yomjikelezo. Kubaluleke kakhulu ukuthi umuntu une-dysmenorrhea, i-migraine, i-PMS, ukulala okubi, noma i-anemia. Ngakho-ke, empilweni, kuwusizo kakhulu ukulandelela iphethini yakho yokukhiqiza kunokulindela isimo esifanayo kuwo wonke umuntu.
texts.t5283: Izinguquko ezimaphakathi zokubekezelela emijikelezweni yomjikelezo, uma zikhona, ngokuvamile zincane; umbono wokuzibona ungashintsha kakhulu kunezinkomba ezibonakalayo.
texts.t5284: Idatha yezemidlalo ebonakalayo ayisekeli ukwehla okukhulu, okungenakugwenywa kokubekezelela emijikelezweni, kodwa abanye abantu bazizwa umehluko ngenxa yobuhlungu, ukulala, izinga lokushisa komzimba, ne-PMS.
texts.t5285: Ukubekezelela emijikelezweni yomjikelezo kushintsha kwabanye abantu, kodwa imiphumela emikhulu emaphakathi ngokuvamile incane.
texts.t5286: Ama-meta-analyses abonisa ukuthi umehluko ekusebenzeni komzimba phakathi kwezikhathi zomjikelezo, ngokwesilinganiso, mncane futhi awuhambisani. Ubuhlungu bokukhulelwa, ukopha okukhulu, i-insomnia, nezimpawu zomuntu ngamunye kunomthelela oqinile ekuqeqesheni. Ngakho-ke, izinqumo zokuqeqesha zingcono uma zisekelwe ekuphenduleni komzimba wakho kunemithetho eqinile yomhlaba wonke.
texts.t5297: Ukuzwela kwamabele kuvame ukukhuphuka esigabeni se-luteal ngaphambi kokukhulelwa.
texts.t5298: Ubuhlungu bamabele obujikelezayo nokugcwala kuvame kakhulu engxenyeni yesibili yomjikelezo futhi ngokuvamile kuncipha ngemva kokuqala kokukhulelwa.
texts.t5299: Ukuzwela kwamabele okujikelezayo kuvame kakhulu engxenyeni yesibili yomjikelezo.
texts.t5300: Ukuzwela kwamabele engxenyeni yesibili yomjikelezo kuhlotshaniswa nezinguquko ze-hormonal ezijikelezayo nokubanjwa kwamanzi. Uma ubuhlungu buphindaphinda ngokucacile ngaphambi kokukhulelwa futhi buncipha ngemva kwalokho, kungenzeka kube isimpawu somjikelezo. Nokho, ubuhlungu obungahambisani, obuphikelela, noma obusha budinga ukuhlolwa okuhlukile.
texts.t5309: Ukuvuvukala kwesisu kuvame ukukhuphuka esigabeni se-luteal nangaphambi kokukhulelwa.
texts.t5310: Ukuvuvukala kwangaphambi kokukhulelwa kungenye yezimpawu zomzimba ezijwayelekile ze-PMS, nakuba ubukhulu bazo buhluka kakhulu.
texts.t5311: Ukuvuvukala emijikelezweni yomjikelezo kubonakala kakhulu engxenyeni yesibili yomjikelezo.
texts.t5312: Ukuvuvukala kungase kuhlotshaniswe nezinguquko ku-GI sensitivity, ukubanjwa kwamanzi, ukuziphatha kokudla, nezimpawu zomzimba zangaphambi kokukhulelwa. Uma ukuvuvukala kuncane, kujikelezayo, futhi kuncipha ngemva kokuqala kokukhulelwa, kungenzeka kube isimpawu esihlobene nesigaba. Nokho, ukuvuvukala okuqhubekayo, okukhulayo, noma okungajikelezanga kudinga ukuhlolwa okuhlukile.
texts.t5319: Ukubanjwa kwamanzi nomuzwa wokuvuvukala kuvame ukubonwa esigabeni se-luteal.
texts.t5320: Umuzwa wokuvuvukala ngaphambi kokukhulelwa ujwayelekile kwabanye abantu futhi uyingxenye yesibalo sezimpawu zomzimba zangaphambi kokukhulelwa.
texts.t5321: Isigaba se-luteal sihambisana nomuzwa wokubanjwa kwamanzi kwabanye abantu.
texts.t5322: Umuzwa wokuvuvukala ungase ubonakale njengomuzwa wokugqoka okuqinile, izindandatho, izinguquko zesisindo phakathi nezinsuku ezimbalwa, nokugcwala okujwayelekile. Lokhu akusho ukuthi ukubanjwa kwamanzi okuyingozi, kodwa ukuvuvukala okubonakalayo, okungahambisani, noma okuqhubekayo kudinga ukuhlolwa okuhlukile.
texts.t5330: Izifiso zokudla okumnandi ngaphambi kwesikhathi ziyisikhalazo esivamile esigabeni sokugcina se-luteal, kodwa ubukhulu bazo buhluke kumuntu ngamunye.
texts.t5331: Izinguquko zesifiso sokudla nezintandokazi zokudla zangaphambi kokukhulelwa zijwayelekile kwabanye abantu; izifiso zamakhalori noma ukudla okududuza akusho ngokuzenzakalelayo ukuthi kuyisifo.
texts.t5332: Izifiso zokudla okumnandi ngaphambi kwesikhathi zingaba yingxenye yesibalo sezimpawu zangaphambi kokukhulelwa.
texts.t5333: Kungase kuqine ngemuva kokwanda kwesifiso sokudla, izinguquko zesimo sengqondo, ukukhathala, nesidingo somvuzo wokudla osheshayo. Kubalulekile ngokomtholampilo ukuhlukanisa izifiso zokudla ezijwayelekile zomjikelezo ezivela ezigamekweni ezibonakalayo zokudla ngokweqile, ukukhathazeka okukhulu, nezifo zokudla.
texts.t5342: Ukucasuka esigabeni se-luteal kungenye yezimpawu zomzwelo ezijwayelekile ze-PMS.
texts.t5343: Ukucasuka kwangaphambi kokukhulelwa kubhekwa njengesimpawu somjikelezo esijwayelekile uma kuvela esigabeni se-luteal futhi kuncipha ngemva kokuqala kokukhulelwa.
texts.t5344: Ukucasuka ngaphambi kwesikhathi kungaba yingxenye ye-PMS noma i-PMDD.
texts.t5345: Ukuze kuhlolwe ngokomtholampilo, kubalulekile ukujikeleza, hhayi nje ukuba khona kokucasuka njengomlingiswa. Uma izimpawu zomzwelo zibonakala, ziphindaphinda njalo umjikelezo, futhi ziphazamisa ubudlelwane, umsebenzi, noma ukuphepha, umuntu kufanele acabangele hhayi i-PMS kuphela kodwa futhi i-PMDD nezimo zengqondo ezihambisana nazo.
texts.t5353: Ukukhala ngaphambi kwesikhathi kungaba yingxenye yesibalo sezimpawu zomzwelo zangaphambi kokukhulelwa.
texts.t5354: Uma ukukhala kuphindaphinda esigabeni sokugcina se-luteal futhi kuncipha ngemva kokuqala kokukhulelwa, kuhambisana nephethini yomjikelezo ye-PMS/PMDD.
texts.t5355: Ukukhala ngaphambi kwesikhathi kungaba isimpawu somzwelo somjikelezo.
texts.t5356: Lesi simo asihlolwa ngokuzimele kodwa kanye nokucasuka, ukukhathazeka, ukudangala, ukuphazamiseka kokulala, ukuvuvukala, nezinye izimpawu zangaphambi kokukhulelwa. Kuyakhathaza kakhulu uma izimpawu zomzwelo zibonakala kangangokuthi ziphazamisa ubudlelwane, ukuphepha, nokusebenza kwansuku zonke.
texts.t5365: Ukukhathazeka kuyakhuphuka esigabeni se-luteal kwabanye abantu, kodwa umjikelezo awuyona kuphela incazelo yokukhathazeka.
texts.t5366: Izibuyekezo ezinhle zibonisa ukuthi izimpawu zokukhathazeka zingakhula esigabeni se-luteal nangaphambi kokukhulelwa, ikakhulukazi kubantu abathambekele ezimpawini zomzwelo zomjikelezo.
texts.t5367: Ukukhathazeka kungaba nezinguquko zomjikelezo, ikakhulukazi esigabeni se-luteal.
texts.t5368: Kubucayi ngokomtholampilo ukuhlukanisa phakathi kwesifo sokukhathazeka esingaphansi kanye nokukhula kwezimpawu zomjikelezo zangaphambi kokukhulelwa. Idayari yemijikelezo engu-2 okungenani iyasiza kulokhu. Uma ukukhathazeka kunzima, kuhambisana nezihibe zokukhathazeka, i-insomnia, noma imicabango yokuzibulala, kudingeka ukuhlolwa okuphelele, kunokuchaza nje ngokuthi "ama-hormone."
texts.t5375: Izinguquko zesimo sengqondo emijikelezweni yomjikelezo zivame ukuhlotshaniswa nesigaba sokugcina se-luteal, kodwa kubantu abaphilile, ubukhulu ngokuvamile buphakathi.
texts.t5376: Ukuguquguquka okuncane kwesimo sengqondo komjikelezo kungenzeka, kodwa izinguquko ezibukhali, eziphindaphindayo ezinemizwa zidinga ukuhlolwa kwe-PMS/PMDD nezinye izimbangela.
texts.t5377: Izinguquko zesimo sengqondo zomjikelezo zibonakala kakhulu ngaphambi kokukhulelwa.
texts.t5378: Iqiniso lokushintsha kwesimo sengqondo phakathi nomjikelezo alibonisi i-pathology. Nokho, uma izinguquko zivela ngokubikezela esigabeni se-luteal, zinyamalale ngemva kokuqala kokukhulelwa, futhi ziphazamisa impilo njalo umjikelezo, kuba iphethini ebalulekile ngokomtholampilo. Izifo kule ndawo zenziwa kuphela ngemva kokulandelela izimpawu ezibhekwayo.
texts.t5386: Akukho bufakazi obuqinile bokushintsha okukhulu okungenakugwenywa okuhlobene nesigaba sokugxila, kodwa ukugxila kokuzibona kungase kwehle ngenxa yobuhlungu, izinkinga zokulala, ne-PMS.
texts.t5387: Uma umuntu ethola kunzima ukugxila ngaphambi kwesikhathi sakhe noma ngesikhathi sokukhulelwa okubuhlungu, kuvame ukuhlobene nomthwalo wezimpawu kunokwehla okubonakalayo okuhlobene nesigaba sokucabanga.
texts.t5388: Ukugxila ngezikhathi zomjikelezo kushintsha ngokuvamile ngokuzibona kunokubonakalayo.
texts.t5389: Idatha entsha ye-meta-analytical ayisekeli inkolelo-ze edumile yokukhubazeka okukhulu okuhlobene nesigaba sokucabanga kuwo wonke abesifazane. Nokho, empilweni, ukugxila kungase kuhlupheke uma kunobuhlungu, i-migraine, i-insomnia, ukucasuka, noma i-anemia. Ngakho-ke, izimpawu kufanele ziphathwe kunokuthi kunamathiselwe amalebula anqunyelwe kuwo wonke umjikelezo.
texts.t5397: Ukuzwela kobuhlungu kungashintsha phakathi nomjikelezo kwabanye abantu, kodwa ukubaluleka okusebenzayo kuvame ukunqunywa ukuba khona kwe-dysmenorrhea nama-migraines.
texts.t5398: Ezinye izimpawu zobuhlungu nokungakhululeki zibonakala ziqinile ngesikhathi sokukhulelwa nasekugcineni kwesigaba se-luteal, ikakhulukazi uma i-PMS, i-migraine, noma i-dysmenorrhea isivele ikhona.
texts.t5399: Ukuzwela kobuhlungu kungashintsha phakathi nomjikelezo, kodwa lezi zinguquko azifani kuwo wonke umuntu.
texts.t5400: Esimeni sezokwelapha, umuntu uvame ukubhekana nokukhula kwezimpawu ezithile—ukuquleka, izinhlungu zekhanda, ukuzwela kwamabele, ukuvuvukala—kunokuzwela kobuhlungu obungaqondakali. Ngakho-ke, kuwusizo kakhulu ukulandelela amaphethini obuhlungu athile kunokuzama ukuthola isigaba sobuhlungu somhlaba wonke.
texts.t5401: ubuhlungu obuphazamisa kakhulu impilo yansuku zonke
texts.t5408: Ukuxhumana nabantu nemizwa kungashintsha phakathi nomjikelezo, kodwa lezi zinguquko zincike hhayi kuma-hormone kuphela kodwa futhi kumongo, ukucindezeleka, nezici zomuntu siqu.
texts.t5409: Abanye abantu bazizwa bevulekile futhi benamandla okuxhumana nabantu phakathi nomjikelezo futhi bezwela ngaphambi kwesikhathi sabo, kodwa lokhu akuyona iphethini yomhlaba wonke.
texts.t5410: Umsebenzi womzwelo nowokuxhumana nabantu ungashintsha phakathi nomjikelezo ngokwehlukana.
texts.t5411: Imizwa ithonywa ukuguquguquka kwe-hormonal, ukulala, ubudlelwane, umthwalo womsebenzi, ukucindezeleka, nezimo zengqondo ezikhona. Ngakho-ke, isigaba esifanayo sizwakala ngendlela ehlukile kubantu abahlukene. Empilweni, kubaluleke kakhulu ukuqaphela iphethini yakho ezinzile nezizathu zayo kunokulindela isheduli efanayo yokuxhumana nabantu kuwo wonke umuntu.
texts.t5417: Indlela ukuzivocavoca okuzwakala ngayo ezigabeni ezahlukene zomjikelezo
texts.t5419: Ukuzivocavoca ezigabeni ezahlukene zomjikelezo kungazwakala kuhluke ngisho noma kungekho umehluko omkhulu obonakalayo ekusebenzeni.
texts.t5420: Abanye abantu babekezelela ukuvivinya umzimba kangcono ngemva kokukhulelwa futhi bakuthole kunzima ngezinsuku zobuhlungu noma i-PMS evelele; lokhu kubalulekile ulwazi lokuzibona, ngisho noma izivivinyo zingakhombisi umehluko omkhulu wesigaba.
texts.t5421: Umbono wokuzibona wokuzivocavoca ngezikhathi zomjikelezo ungahluka ezinkombeni ezibonakalayo.
texts.t5422: Ekuzilolongeni, akubalulekile kuphela idatha yokusebenza eluhlaza, kodwa futhi ikhwalithi yokulala, ubuhlungu bokukhulelwa, amandla atholakalayo, nesimo sengqondo ngomthwalo. Ngakho-ke, ukulungisa uhlelo lwezinsuku ezinezimpawu kungaba usizo kakhulu kunokuzama ukuhambisana ngokuqinile nenkathi yomhlaba wonke.
texts.t5424: ubuhlungu noma ukopha okwenza ukuzivocavoca kube nzima
texts.t5426: indlela ukuzivocavoca okuzwakala ngayo ezigabeni ezahlukene zomjikelezo
texts.t5429: Indlela ukudla okungabonakala ngayo ngokwehlukana ngesigaba
texts.t5431: Umbono wendlala, ukwaneliseka, izifiso zokudla, nokubekezelela ukudla kungashintsha phakathi kwezikhathi zomjikelezo.
texts.t5432: Ngaphambi kwesikhathi sabo, abanye abantu babona ukwanda kwesifiso sokudla, izifiso zokudla okumnandi, noma ukuvuvukala okubonakalayo, kuyilapho eduze kokukhulelwa, isifiso sokudla sinciphile kwabanye.
texts.t5433: Ukudla nemizwa yokudla kungashintsha ngokuzibona phakathi nomjikelezo.
texts.t5434: Izikhathi ezahlukene zingahambisana hhayi nenani lokudla kuphela kodwa futhi nendlela ukwaneliseka, ukubekezelela i-fiber, ukudla okunamafutha, ukudla okumnandi, noma osayizi bezingxenye okubonwa ngayo. Nokho, uma izimpawu zinzima, zihlobene nokudla ngokweqile, ukwesaba ukudla, noma ukukhathazeka kwe-GI okuqhubekayo, kudingeka ukuhlolwa okubanzi kunokuthi 'yisigaba'.
texts.t5437: indlela ukudla okungabonakala ngayo ngokwehlukana ngesigaba
texts.t5440: Umehluko womuntu ngamunye ekuboneni izigaba zomjikelezo
texts.t5442: Umehluko womuntu ngamunye ekuboneni izigaba zomjikelezo ubalulekile; ngakho-ke, amashadi aphakathi awathathi indawo yokulandelela iphethini yakho.
texts.t5443: Ngisho noma izifundo zibonisa izitayela ezimaphakathi, imizwa yangempela incike kubuhlungu, ukulala, ukucindezeleka, i-anemia, umsebenzi womzimba, impilo yengqondo, nezilindelo zomuntu ngamunye.
texts.t5444: Isipiliyoni sezikhathi zomjikelezo siyahluka kakhulu phakathi kwabantu.
texts.t5445: Umuntu oyedwa angase angaboni izigaba, kuyilapho omunye ebona ngokucacile izinguquko zamandla, isifiso sokudla, ubuhlungu, nesimo sengqondo. Lokhu akwenzi isipiliyoni somuntu oyedwa sibe semthethweni kakhulu kunesomunye. Ukuze kuhlolwe izinga lezokwelapha, iphethini yomuntu ephindaphindekayo ibaluleke kakhulu kunokuzama ukuzifaka kumashadi adumile omjikelezo.
texts.t5449: umehluko womuntu ngamunye ekuboneni izigaba zomjikelezo
texts.t5454: Ukukhulelwa ukuwa okujikelezayo kwesendlalelo esisebenzayo se-endometrium uma kungekho ukukhulelwa.
texts.t5455: Ukukhulelwa kuqala ekupheleni komjikelezo wokukhulelwa lapho i-corpus luteum ibuyela emuva futhi amazinga e-progesterone ne-estradiol ehla. Lokhu kuholela ekukhishweni kwesendlalelo esisebenzayo se-endometrium.
texts.t5456: Ukukhulelwa ukuwa okujikelezayo kwesendlalelo esisebenzayo se-endometrium.
texts.t5457: Ukukhulelwa akuyona nje 'igazi' kodwa isigaba sokugcina somjikelezo. Emjikelezweni wokukhulelwa, isihluthulelo esiyisihluthulelo ukuwa kwe-progesterone kulandela ukubuyela emuva kwe-corpus luteum. Ngokwezokwelapha, kubalulekile ukuqaphela ukuthi ukopha okufana nokukhulelwa akuhlali kufakazela ukukhulelwa.

texts.t5499: Kwakunikezwe ukubaluleka kokubuyekezwa kwe-FIGO/ACOG/ASRM kanye ne-NCBI Bookshelf; ekusebenzeni, izinkomba zezokwelapha kanye nokuphindaphinda kwephethini kubaluleke kakhulu kunesikhombisi esisodwa esihlukanisiwe.

texts.t5510: Imingcele yokukhulelwa okuvamile kufanele ihlolwe kumongo wekhwalithi yokuphila; incazelo yokusebenza ye-HMB iyasiza ngokwezokwelapha kunokuzama ukukala kahle ama-milliliters ekhaya.
texts.t5513: Ukukhulelwa kokopha kuqala ngenxa yokuhoxiswa kwe-progesterone kanye nokuphuka kwesendlalelo esisebenzayo se-endometrium.
texts.t5514: Ukopha kuvuswa ukwehla kwehomoni okulandela ukuncipha kwe-corpus luteum.
texts.t5515: Ukukhulelwa kokopha kuqala ngemva kokwehla kwehomoni ekupheleni komjikelezo.
texts.t5516: Indlela eyinhloko yokukhulelwa kokopha ukwehla kwe-progesterone ekupheleni kwesigaba se-luteal. Ngalesi simo, ukuzinza kwe-endometrial kuyaphazamiseka, ama-prostaglandins ayanda, futhi izicubu ziyakhishwa.
texts.t5525: Isikhathi sokuhlala esijwayelekile sokukhulelwa kubantu abadala abaningi sifika ku-8 izinsuku, ngokuvamile izinsuku ezi-3–7.
texts.t5526: Isikhathi sokuhlala esifinyelela ku-8 izinsuku ngokuvamile sibhekwa njengesijwayelekile ngokwezokwelapha; ukuzinza kwephethini kanye nevolumu yokulahlekelwa yigazi nakho kubalulekile.
texts.t5527: Ukukhulelwa okuvamile kuvame ukuhlala kungadluli izinsuku ezi-8.
texts.t5528: I-FIGO ichaza isikhathi sokuhlala sokukhulelwa okuvamile njengokufika ku-8 izinsuku. Ukuphikelela isikhathi eside, ikakhulukazi kanye nobuhlungu, i-anemia, noma ukopha phakathi kwemijikelezo, kudinga ukuhlolwa kwezimbangela zokopha okungajwayelekile kwesibeletho.
texts.t5535: Yiliphi ivolumu yokulahlekelwa yigazi elibhekwa njengokujwayelekile
texts.t5537: Ukopha okungaholeli ku-anemia futhi okungaphazamisi impilo yansuku zonke kubhekwa njengokujwayelekile ngokwezokwelapha; isilinganiso sendabuko — ngaphansi kuka-80 ml.
texts.t5538: Ivolumu eqondile kuma-milliliters ivame ukungalinganiswa empilweni yansuku zonke, ngakho-ke ukugxila kwezokwelapha kusephethini nomthelela empilweni.
texts.t5539: Ukulahlekelwa yigazi okuvamile — lokhu ukukhulelwa ngaphandle kwezimpawu zokopha ngokweqile kanye ne-anemia.
texts.t5540: Umkhawulo wendabuko ongaphezu kuka-80 ml wawusetshenziswa ocwaningweni, kodwa ekusebenzeni kwanamuhla, incazelo yokusebenza ibaluleke kakhulu: ukopha kuba yinkinga uma kuphazamisa ikhwalithi yokuphila noma kuholela ekuntulekeni kwe-ayoni.

texts.t5544: yiliphi ivolumu yokulahlekelwa yigazi elibhekwa njengokujwayelekile
texts.t5547: Ungazi kanjani ukuthi izikhathi zinkulu kakhulu
texts.t5549: Izikhathi ezinkulu kakhulu — lokhu ukopha okuphazamisa ikhwalithi yokuphila noma okuhambisana nezimpawu zokulahlekelwa yigazi elikhulu.
texts.t5550: Izilinganiso zokukhulelwa kokopha okukhulu — ukushintsha okuvikelayo njalo, ukuvuza ebusuku, amaqhuqhuva amakhulu, nezimpawu zokuntuleka kwe-ayoni.
texts.t5551: Izikhathi ezinkulu — lokhu ukopha okukhulu kakhulu ngokwezokwelapha.
texts.t5552: Ukusola kuyanda ngokushintsha izicubu/izicubu njalo, isidingo sokuvikelwa kabili, ukuvuza ebusuku, amaqhuqhuva amakhulu noma amaningi, isikhathi esingaphezu kwezinsuku ezi-8, kanye nokwehla kwe-hemoglobin noma i-ferritin.
texts.t5556: ungazi kanjani ukuthi izikhathi zinkulu kakhulu
texts.t5559: Ungazi kanjani ukuthi izikhathi zincane kakhulu
texts.t5561: Izikhathi ezincane ziyivolumu yokopha encishisiwe uma kuqhathaniswa nephatheni elijwayelekile.
texts.t5562: Izikhathi ezincane azihlali zikhombisa inkinga, ikakhulukazi uma iphethini izinzile futhi azikho ezinye izimpawu.
texts.t5563: Izikhathi ezincane ziyisikhukhula sokukhulelwa esincishisiwe esibonakalayo.
texts.t5564: Isikhombisi esiyinhloko ukushintsha kwephethini yomuntu siqu. Izikhathi ezilula zingavela ngenxa yokuphazamiseka kwe-hypothalamic, ukuvimbela ukukhulelwa kwehomoni, i-perimenopause, noma ngemva kwezindlela zangaphakathi zesibeletho.
texts.t5568: ungazi kanjani ukuthi izikhathi zincane kakhulu
texts.t5573: Umbala wegazi lokukhulelwa ungahluka kusuka kokubomvu okukhanyayo kuya kokubomvu okumnyama nokunsundu ngaphakathi kobubanzi obujwayelekile.
texts.t5574: Umbala uncike esilinganisweni sokugeleza kwegazi, ukuxhumana kwalo ne-oxygen, kanye nokuba khona kwezicubu ze-endometrial.
texts.t5575: Umbala wokukhishwa kokukhulelwa ungashintsha ngaphakathi komjikelezo ojwayelekile.
texts.t5576: Uma igazi lihlala isikhathi eside esibelethweni noma esithweni sangasese sowesifazane, libonakala libumnyama ngenxa yokuxubana. Ngakho-ke, umbala uwedwa, ngaphandle kokucabangela ivolumu, iphunga, ubuhlungu, nesikhathi, ngokuvamile awukhombisi isimo sezokwelapha.
texts.t5583: Ukukhishwa okunsundu kuvame ukuba kujwayelekile ekuqaleni noma ekugcineni kokukhulelwa, lapho igazi ligeleza kancane futhi lixubana.
texts.t5584: Inani elincane lokukhishwa okunsundu ekuqaleni noma ekugcineni kwesikhathi kuvame ukuhlotshaniswa negazi elidala.
texts.t5585: Ukukhishwa okunsundu kuvame ukubonisa ukugeleza okuncane kanye nokuxubana kwegazi.
texts.t5586: Umbala onsundu uvame ukuhlotshaniswa nenani elincane legazi elinethuba lokuxubana ngaphambi kokuphuma. Kuyakhathaza uma ukukhishwa kuba iphethini entsha, eqhubekayo, kuvela phakathi kwezikhathi, noma kuhambisana nephunga nobuhlungu.
texts.t5592: Igazi elibomvu elikhanyayo ngesikhathi sokukhulelwa: kusho ukuthini
texts.t5594: Igazi elibomvu elikhanyayo ngokuvamile libonisa ukugeleza okusheshayo nokusebenzayo.
texts.t5595: Igazi elibomvu elikhanyayo lingaba ukuhluka okuvamile ngezinsuku zokopha okukhulu.
texts.t5596: Igazi elibomvu elikhanyayo ngokuvamile lihlotshaniswa nokopha okusebenzayo.
texts.t5597: Uma igazi liphuma esibelethweni ngokushesha, linethuba elincane lokuxubana futhi libonakala likhanya. Okubaluleke kakhulu kunombala ukugeleza, isikhathi, ukuba khona kobuhlungu, amaqhuqhuva, nezimpawu ze-anemia.
texts.t5601: igazi elibomvu elikhanyayo ngesikhathi sokukhulelwa: kusho ukuthini
texts.t5606: Amaqhuqhuva amancane ngezinsuku zokukhulelwa ezinzima angamukeleka, kodwa amaqhuqhuva amakhulu futhi avamile avame ukuhambisana nokopha okukhulu.
texts.t5607: Amaqhuqhuva akha lapho igazi nezicubu ze-endometrial ziphuma ngokushesha kunokuthi zixubane ngokuphelele futhi zibe uketshezi.
texts.t5608: Amaqhuqhuva angavela ngesikhathi sokugeleza kokukhulelwa okukhulu.
texts.t5609: Amaqhuqhuva amancane ngezikhathi ezithile angenzeka ezinsukwini zokuqala ezi-1–2. Ukukhathazeka kwezokwelapha kuvuswa amaqhuqhuva amakhulu aphindaphindayo kanye nokopha okuqhubekayo noma okukhulu kakhulu nezimpawu zokuntuleka kwe-ayoni.
texts.t5616: Iphunga elingathandeki ngesikhathi sokukhulelwa: uma kuyisixwayiso
texts.t5617: Iphunga elincane elithile ngesikhathi sokukhulelwa lingenzeka, kodwa iphunga elibukhali elingathandeki nezinye izimpawu kudinga ukuhlolwa.
texts.t5618: Iphunga elinamandla elingathandeki kanye nokuluma, ukushisa, ubuhlungu, umkhuhlane, noma izinguquko ekukhishweni akuyona ingxenye yephethini ejwayelekile.
texts.t5619: Iphunga elibukhali elingathandeki ngesikhathi sokukhulelwa alibhekwa njengesimpawu ejwayelekile.
texts.t5620: Igazi lokukhulelwa lingaba nephunga elibonakalayo kakhulu kunokukhishwa okuvamile, kodwa iphunga elibukhali elingathandeki, ikakhulukazi elisha, lifuna ukungafakwa kokutheleleka, ukuvuvukala, noma imikhiqizo egcinwe noma into yangaphandle.
texts.t5624: iphunga elingathandeki ngesikhathi sokukhulelwa: uma kuyisixwayiso
texts.t5629: Ukopha okuncane ngaphambi kwezikhathi kwesinye isikhathi kwenzeka, kodwa iphethini eqhubekayo idinga ukuhlolwa.
texts.t5631: Ukopha ngaphambi kwezikhathi kuyinani elincane lokukhishwa kwegazi ngaphambi kokukhulelwa okuphelele.
texts.t5632: Ukopha okuncane usuku olulodwa ngaphambi kokuqala kokopha okugcwele kungase kungabi nencazelo yezokwelapha. Kodwa uma iphethini enjalo iphinda, iba yinde, noma ihlanganiswa nobuhlungu nokungazali, ukuhlolwa kwezimbangela zokopha phakathi kwemijikelezo kuyadingeka.
texts.t5638: Ukopha okuncane ngemva kokukhulelwa kwesinye isikhathi kuhlotshaniswa nokudlula kwegazi elisele, kodwa ukopha okuqhubekayo noma okuphindaphindayo kudinga ukuhlolwa.
texts.t5639: Amahora ambalwa noma usuku olulodwa lokukhopha okuncane ngemva kokopha okuyinhloko kungabonisa ukudlula kwegazi elisele.
texts.t5640: Ukopha ngemva kwezikhathi kuyinani elincane lokukhishwa kwegazi ngemva kokugeleza okuyinhloko sekuphelile.
texts.t5641: Iphethini eqhubekayo, ikakhulukazi uma ihambisana nobuhlungu besisu, ukopha kokuxhumana, noma iphunga elingathandeki, idinga ukuhlolwa okuhlukanisayo. Kubalulekile ngokwezokwelapha ukuhlukanisa phakathi kokukhulelwa okude nokopha kweqiniso phakathi kwemijikelezo.
texts.t5649: Ubuhlungu ngesikhathi sokukhulelwa kuvame ukuhlotshaniswa nama-prostaglandins nokuncipha kwesibeletho.
texts.t5650: Ama-prostaglandins akhulisa ukuncipha kwesibeletho futhi angabangela ubuhlungu be-ischemic.
texts.t5651: Ubuhlungu bokukhulelwa kuvame ukubangelwa ukuncipha kwesibeletho okuqhutshwa ama-prostaglandins.
texts.t5652: Ubuhlungu bokukhulelwa obuyinhloko buvela ngaphandle kwesifo esibonakalayo futhi ngokuvamile buqala ngokushesha ngemva kokusungulwa kwemijikelezo yokukhulelwa. Ama-prostaglandins akhulisa ingcindezi yangaphakathi yesibeletho futhi abangele ubuhlungu obuhlabayo.
texts.t5660: I-dysmenorrhea eyinhloko iwukukhulelwa okubuhlungu ngaphandle kwesifo esibonakalayo sesifuba.
texts.t5661: Ngokuvamile iqala ngemva kokusungulwa kwemijikelezo yokukhulelwa futhi ihlotshaniswa nokweqile kwe-prostaglandins.
texts.t5662: I-dysmenorrhea eyinhloko iwubuhlungu bokukhulelwa ngaphandle kwesizathu esibonakalayo.
texts.t5663: Ubuhlungu buvame ukuqala ngokufika kokopha noma ngaphambi kancane futhi buhlala amahora angu-8–72. Isicanucanu, uhudo, ukukhathala, kanye nobuhlungu bekhanda kuyajwayelekile; ama-NSAID abhekwa njengendlela yokuqala yokwelapha.
texts.t5671: I-dysmenorrhea yesibili iwubuhlungu bokukhulelwa obubangelwa isifo esithile, njenge-endometriosis noma i-adenomyosis.
texts.t5672: Kusolakala uma ubuhlungu buvela kamuva, buba sibi ngokuhamba kwesikhathi, noma buphendula kabi ekwelashweni okujwayelekile.
texts.t5673: I-dysmenorrhea yesibili iwukukhulelwa okubuhlungu ngokumelene nesizinda sesifo esibonakalayo noma esivuvukalayo.
texts.t5674: Izimpawu zesixwayiso zifaka phakathi ubuhlungu obuqale ngemva kwesikhathi sokukhulelwa okungenabuhlungu; ukuthuthuka okubi; i-dyspareunia; ubuhlungu phakathi kwemijikelezo; ukungazali; ukungaphenduli kuma-NSAID kanye nokwelashwa kwe-hormonal.
texts.t5682: Ubuthakathaka ngesikhathi sokukhulelwa kungahlotshaniswa nobuhlungu, ama-prostaglandins, ukuphazamiseka kokulala, futhi, uma kukhona ukukhulelwa kokopha okukhulu, ukuntuleka kwe-ayoni.
texts.t5683: Ukukhathala okuncane ezinsukwini zokuqala zesikhathi kuvamile; okukhathazayo kakhulu ubuthakathaka obukhulu nokuphefumula okuncane, ukushaya kwenhliziyo okusheshayo, noma isiyezi.
texts.t5684: Ubuthakathaka ngesikhathi sokukhulelwa kuyisimpawu esivamile kodwa esingathandeki.
texts.t5685: Ubuthakathaka bokukhulelwa bungakhuliswa ubuhlungu, ukuntuleka kokulala, kanye nemiphumela yezinhlelo ye-prostaglandins. Ezimweni zokukhulelwa kokopha okukhulu, ukuntuleka kwe-ayoni okuqhubekayo kanye ne-anemia kufanele kubhekwe.
texts.t5691: Isicanucanu ngesikhathi sokukhulelwa kuvame ukuhlotshaniswa nama-prostaglandins kanye ne-dysmenorrhea esindayo.
texts.t5692: Ama-prostaglandins asebenza hhayi kuphela esibelethweni kodwa nasezithweni zokugaya ukudla kanye nohlelo lwe-vascular.
texts.t5694: Isicanucanu sivamile ku-dysmenorrhea eyinhloko futhi sivame ukwehla lapho ubuhlungu belawulwa kangcono futhi ukukhiqizwa kwe-prostaglandin kuncishiswa. Nokho, ukuqunjelwa okukhulu, umkhuhlane, noma ubuhlungu obungajwayelekile akuwona umbono ojwayelekile.
texts.t5701: Uhudo ngesikhathi sokukhulelwa kuvame ukuhlotshaniswa nomthelela wama-prostaglandins ezithweni zokugaya ukudla.
texts.t5702: Ama-prostaglandins afanayo akhulisa ukuncipha kwesibeletho angakhulisa ukuhamba kwezitho zokugaya ukudla.
texts.t5703: Uhudo lokukhulelwa luvame ukuhlotshaniswa nokwanda kokuhamba kwezitho zokugaya ukudla okuqhutshwa ama-prostaglandins.
texts.t5704: Uhudo oluncane, lwesikhashana ezinsukwini zokuqala zesikhathi lungaba yingxenye ye-dysmenorrhea ejwayelekile. Kodwa uhudo oluqhubekayo olukhulu, igazi esikhundleni, nezimpawu ngaphandle kokukhulelwa kudinga ukuhlolwa kwesinye isizathu.
texts.t5711: Ubuhlungu bekhanda ngesikhathi sokukhulelwa bungakhuliswa ukucindezeleka okuhlobene nobuhlungu kanye nokuhoxiswa kwehomoni; i-migraine yokukhulelwa ihlotshaniswa ngokukhethekile nokwehla kwe-estrogen.
texts.t5712: Kubantu abathile, ukuhlaselwa kwe-migraine kuvame ukwenzeka ngesikhathi sokukhulelwa lapho amazinga e-estrogen ehliswa.
texts.t5713: I-migraine yokukhulelwa ihlotshaniswa nezinguquko ze-hormonal ezizungeze ukuqala kokukhulelwa.
texts.t5714: Ukuhoxiswa kwe-estrogen ngaphambi kokuqala kokukhulelwa kubhekwa njengenye yezinto ezibalulekile ezibangela i-migraine yokukhulelwa. Ukuphathwa kuncike ohlotsheni lobuhlungu bekhanda, ukuba khona kwe-aura, kanye nokuvama kokuhlaselwa.
texts.t5716: ubuhlungu bekhanda obusha ngemva kweminyaka engu-40
texts.t5722: Ukushisa ngesikhathi sokukhulelwa kungahambisana nobuhlungu kanye nempendulo ye-autonomic, kodwa akufanele kuthathe indawo yokuhlola izinga lokushisa nezimpawu zokutheleleka.
texts.t5723: Ukushisa okuncane ngaphandle komkhuhlane kwesinye isikhathi kwenzeka ngokumelene nesizinda sobuhlungu kanye nempendulo ye-autonomic ejwayelekile.
texts.t5724: Ukushisa ngesikhathi sokukhulelwa akuyona isimpawu esithile ngokwaso.
texts.t5725: Ngesikhathi sokukhulelwa okubuhlungu, umuzwa wokubanda noma ukushisa okuhlotshaniswa nobuhlungu kanye nengcindezi yesistimu kungenzeka. Nokho, ukushisa kufanele kuhlukaniswe nomkhuhlane nokutheleleka.
texts.t5732: Ubuhlungu emhlane ophansi ngesikhathi sokukhulelwa kuvame ukubhekiswa kubuhlungu obuphuma ekunciphiseni kwesibeletho.
texts.t5733: Ukuncipha kwesibeletho kanye nezithwali zokuvuvukala kungabangela hhayi kuphela ukuquleka kwesisu esiphansi kodwa futhi nobuhlungu emhlane ophansi noma i-sacrum.
texts.t5734: Ubuhlungu be-lumbar ngesikhathi sokukhulelwa kuvame ukuhlotshaniswa nobuhlungu besisu obubhekisiwe.
texts.t5735: Umhlane ophansi kanye ne-sacrum kuhlobene ngokuhlobene nezakhiwo zesibeletho, ngakho-ke ngesikhathi sobuhlungu bokukhulelwa, ukungakhululeki kungase kuhanjiswe emhlane. Ubuhlungu ngaphandle kokukhulelwa noma ngokuthuthuka kuyimbangela yokukhathazeka.
texts.t5741: Ukuhlolwa kuyadingeka uma ubuhlungu bukhulu, buthuthuka, buphazamisa impilo, noma abuphenduli ekwelashweni okujwayelekile.
texts.t5742: Ubuhlungu bokukhulelwa budinga ukuhlolwa uma buholela ekushiyweni kwesikole/umsebenzi futhi buphendula kabi kuma-NSAID noma ekwelashweni kwe-hormonal.
texts.t5743: Ubuhlungu bokukhulelwa obukhulu noma obungajwayelekile budinga ukungafakwa kwesizathu esiseceleni.
texts.t5744: I-ACOG igcizelela ukuthi ukungabi nomphumela ekwelashweni kwe-dysmenorrhea eyinhloko kuyimbangela ebalulekile yokucabangela kabusha isifo. Izimpawu ezibomvu ezengeziwe: ukuthuthuka, ukopha okungajwayelekile, umlando womndeni we-endometriosis, kanye nobuhlungu besisu obungapheli.
texts.t5752: Isikhathi esihambayo singabangelwa ukukhulelwa, ukuvuthwa kweqanda okungokuhamba kwesikhathi, noma ukuphazamiseka kwe-hypothalamus–pituitary–ovarian axis.
texts.t5753: Into yokuqala okufanele ifakwe ngaphandle uma kukhona ukulibaziseka ukukhulelwa.
texts.t5754: Ukulibaziseka kokukhulelwa kuwukufika kokopha kamuva uma kuqhathaniswa nephatheni elilindelekile.
texts.t5755: Ukulibaziseka kuvame ukusho ukuthi ukuvuthwa kweqanda kwenzeka kamuva noma akuzange kwenzeke nhlobo. Ngemva kokukhulelwa, izinguquko zesisindo, ukudla, umsebenzi womzimba, ukucindezeleka, izimpawu ze-hyperandrogenism, i-galactorrhea, imithi, kanye neminyaka kuyahlolwa.
texts.t5758: ukushintsha kokuvuthwa kweqanda noma ukungabi khona kokuvuthwa kweqanda -> ukushintsha kwesikhathi noma uhlobo lokopha
texts.t5761: Kungani izikhathi zingase zize ngaphambi kwesikhathi
texts.t5763: Ukukhulelwa kungase kwenzeke ngaphambi kwesikhathi ngenxa yomjikelezo omfushane, ukuvuthwa kweqanda okungokuhamba kwesikhathi, noma ukopha phakathi kwemijikelezo okuthathwa njengokukhulelwa.
texts.t5764: Umjikelezo owodwa wokuqala ngokuvamile uhlotshaniswa nokuhluka okuvamile.
texts.t5765: Ukuqala kokopha ngaphambi kwesikhathi akusho ngaso sonke isikhathi ukukhulelwa kwangempela ngaphambi kwesikhathi.
texts.t5766: Ukopha okucatshangwa ukuthi izikhathi zokuqala kungaba ukukhulelwa kwangempela ngemva komjikelezo omfushane, noma kungaba ukopha okuphukile noma olunye uhlobo lwe-AUB.
texts.t5767: imijikelezo emifushane njalo kunamashumi amabili nane izinsuku
texts.t5770: kungani izikhathi zingase zize ngaphambi kwesikhathi
texts.t5775: Ukuphazamiseka komjikelezo owodwa kuvame ukuhlotshaniswa nokuhluka kwesikhashana, ukucindezeleka, isifo, izinguquko ekulaleni, ekudleni, noma ekuvuthweni kweqanda okungokuhamba kwesikhathi.
texts.t5776: Umjikelezo owodwa ongajwayelekile ngaphandle kwezinye izimpawu ezikhathazayo ngokuvamile awukhombisi isifo.
texts.t5777: Ukuphazamiseka komjikelezo owodwa akuhlali kubonisa isifo.
texts.t5778: Umjikelezo wokukhulelwa uzwela kubhalansi yamandla, ukucindezeleka, ukuhamba, ukuntuleka kokulala, izifo, nemithi. Ukubaluleka kwezokwelapha kuyanda lapho ukuphazamiseka kuba iphethini entsha eqhubekayo.
texts.t5782: Yini okufanele uyenze ngezikhathi ezibuhlungu kakhulu
texts.t5784: Ngokwezikhathi ezibuhlungu kakhulu, isinyathelo sokuqala ngokuvamile ama-NSAID ngesikhathi, ukushisa, kanye nokuhlolwa kwezimpawu ze-dysmenorrhea yesibili.
texts.t5785: Kubalulekile ukungabekezelelani ubuhlungu kuze kube phezulu: ama-NSAID asebenza kangcono uma eqala ekuqaleni kobuhlungu noma amahora ambalwa ngaphambi kokuqala okulindelekile kokukhulelwa.
texts.t5786: Izikhathi ezibuhlungu kakhulu zidinga ukuphathwa kwezimpawu okusebenzayo nokuhlolwa kwesizathu.
texts.t5787: Ulayini wokuqala we-dysmenorrhea eyinhloko ama-NSAID, njengoba enciphisa ukukhiqizwa kwe-prostaglandin. Uma ubuhlungu bungalawulwa, izindlela zokwelashwa kwe-hormonal kanye nokuhlolwa kwe-dysmenorrhea yesibili kufanele kuxoxwe.
texts.t5791: yini okufanele uyenze ngezikhathi ezibuhlungu kakhulu
texts.t5794: Indlela yokugcina idayari yezimpawu ngesikhathi sokukhulelwa
texts.t5796: Idayari yezimpawu isiza ukuhlukanisa isigameko esisodwa esingajwayelekile nephatheni lezokwelapha eliphindaphindayo.
texts.t5797: Kuyasiza ukuqopha usuku lokuqala lokopha, isikhathi, ivolumu, izinga lobuhlungu, kanye nomphumela wemithi.
texts.t5798: Idayari yezimpawu iyirekhodi elihlelekile lezici zokukhulelwa nezimpawu ezihambisana nazo.
texts.t5799: Uma izimpawu zirekhodwa imijikelezo elandelanayo engu-2–3, kuba lula ukubona ukuthi ngabe kukhona iphethini: izinsuku zokuqala ezinzima, i-migraine ejikelezayo, ukopha phakathi kwemijikelezo, noma isixhumanisi phakathi kobuhlungu kanye nevolumu yokulahlekelwa yigazi. Idayari nayo iyasiza ekuhloleni ukusebenza kokwelashwa.
texts.t5800: akudingeki ulinde izimpawu ezibomvu ukuze uqale idayari
texts.t5801: indlela yokugcina idayari yezimpawu ngesikhathi sokukhulelwa
texts.t5803: Yiziphi izidambisi zobuhlungu ezisetshenziselwa izikhathi ezibuhlungu
texts.t5805: Ama-NSAID ngokuvamile ayindlela yokuqala yokwelapha i-dysmenorrhea eyinhloko.
texts.t5806: Ama-NSAID anciphisa ukukhiqizwa kwe-prostaglandin ngakho-ke asebenza ngokomzimba, kunokuba nje adambise ubuhlungu.
texts.t5808: Imithi yokuqala ifaka phakathi i-ibuprofen, i-naproxen, kanye nezinye ama-NSAID; ukukhetha okuthile kuncike ekuphikeni nasekutheni kuyamukeleka. Uma ama-NSAID enganele, izinketho ze-hormonal zixoxwa.
texts.t5809: umlando wesifo se-peptic ulcer noma ukopha
texts.t5812: yiziphi izidambisi zobuhlungu ezisetshenziselwa izikhathi ezibuhlungu
texts.t5815: Uma kudingeka ukubonisana nodokotela ngenxa yokukhulelwa
texts.t5817: Ukubonisana kuyadingeka uma ukukhulelwa sekukhulu kakhulu, kubuhlungu kakhulu, kungajwayelekile, noma kushintshe kakhulu uma kuqhathaniswa nephatheni elijwayelekile.
texts.t5818: Kubuhlungu kakhulu ukufuna usizo lwezokwelapha uma kukhona izimpawu ze-anemia, ubuhlungu buphazamisa impilo yansuku zonke, ukopha kuhlala izinsuku ezingaphezu kwezi-8, noma kukhona ukopha phakathi kwemijikelezo.
texts.t5819: Ukukhulelwa kudinga ukuhlolwa kwezokwelapha uma kudlula okujwayelekile futhi kuphazamisa ikhwalithi yokuphila.
texts.t5820: Ukubonisana kwezokwelapha kuyadingeka hhayi kuphela ezimweni eziphuthumayo kodwa futhi nasezimpawini eziphindaphindayo eziphoqelelwa isiguli ukubekezelela. Ukuphuthuma kuphakeme ezimweni zokukhulelwa okungenzeka, ukopha okukhulu, ubuhlungu obukhulu obungajwayelekile, umkhuhlane, kanye nobuthakathaka obukhulu.
texts.t5823: uma kudingeka ukubonisana nodokotela ngenxa yokukhulelwa
texts.t5826: Umthombo ku-GnRH, ukukhishwa kwe-pulsatile, kanye nokulawulwa kwe-FSH/LH.
texts.t5827: Kusetshenziswa njengokubuyekezwa noma umthombo wezokwelapha wendlela/ukuchazwa.
texts.t5828: Ukubuyekezwa okuningiliziwe komjikelezo ojwayelekile, izigaba, ukuvuthwa kweqanda, indima ye-estradiol, i-progesterone, kanye nempendulo.
texts.t5829: Ukuhlolwa kwezokwelapha kwanamuhla kwe-amenorrhea kanye nokuphazamiseka komjikelezo.
texts.t5830: Imininingwane yokulawulwa kwe-FSH ne-LH nge-GnRH kanye nempendulo.
texts.t5831: Ukubuyekezwa kwendabuko kwendima ye-FSH ekukhuleni kwe-follicle nasekukhethweni.
texts.t5832: Umthombo ku-AMH, inhibin B, AFC, kanye nokuchazwa kwesitoreji samathumbu.
texts.t5833: Ukubuyekezwa okuhlelekile kwesikhathi phakathi kokuqala kwe-LH surge kanye nokuvuthwa kweqanda.
texts.t5835: Ukubuyekezwa okuyisisekelo ekwakhekeni nasekunciphiseni kwe-corpus luteum.
texts.t5836: Imininingwane ngezimbangela, izimpawu, kanye nomthelela we-hyperprolactinemia kumjikelezo.
texts.t5837: Ukubuyekezwa kwezokwelapha kwanamuhla kwe-prolactinomas kanye nomthelela we-prolactin ekuzaleni.
texts.t5838: Umthombo oyinhloko wanamuhla ku-PCOS, i-hyperandrogenism, i-AMH, kanye nezici ze-metabolic.
texts.t5839: Izinga lezokwelapha lokuhlola izimpawu zokweqile kwe-androgen kwabesifazane.
texts.t5840: Ku-AMH physiology kanye nokusetshenziswa kwayo kwezokwelapha.
texts.t5841: Ukubuyekezwa kwendima ye-hormone ye-thyroid emsebenzini wesibeletho, i-endometrium, kanye nokuvuthwa kweqanda.
texts.t5842: Ukubuyekezwa okusebenzayo kwesixhumanisi phakathi kwe-hypothyroidism, i-prolactin, i-anovulation, kanye nokuphazamiseka komjikelezo.
texts.t5843: Ukubuyekezwa kwendabuko kokuthi i-HPA axis icindezela kanjani i-GnRH, i-LH, kanye nokuvuthwa kweqanda.
texts.t5844: Ngokuxhumana kwe-leptin, i-insulin, i-ghrelin, kanye ne-axis yokuzala.
texts.t5845: Ku-leptin, i-adiponectin, isisindo somzimba, kanye nempilo yokuzala.
texts.t5846: Ukubuyekezwa okuhlelekile kwemiphumela ye-estradiol ne-progesterone emizweni nasekucubunguleni imizwa.
texts.t5847: Ukubuyekezwa kwanamuhla kokuhluka kokuzwela kwemizwa ekushintsheni kwe-E2 ne-P4.
texts.t5848: Ukubuyekezwa okuyisisekelo kwe-physiology yomjikelezo, izigaba, ukulawulwa kwe-hormonal, indima yokuvuthwa kweqanda, kanye ne-endometrium.
texts.t5849: Umbono wezokwelapha wamanje wokuhlolwa kokuphazamiseka kokukhulelwa.
texts.t5850: Umthombo oyisisekelo osasetshenziswa wokuhlola iphethini yokukhulelwa kwezokwelapha, ikakhulukazi ukujwayelekile/ukungajwayelekile.
texts.t5851: Izinga lamazwe ngamazwe lokuchaza amaphethini ajwayelekile okukhulelwa.
texts.t5852: Ukubuyekezwa okulula kodwa okuhambisana nezokwelapha kwesikhathi somjikelezo ojwayelekile, isikhathi sokopha, ukulandelela, kanye nokuthi nini okufanele ufune usizo.
texts.t5853: Ukubuyekezwa kwakamuva kwezigaba, ukulawulwa kwe-hormonal, ukuvuthwa kweqanda, kanye nobubanzi besikhathi somjikelezo.
texts.t5854: Kusetshenziswa njengomthombo wokubuyela emuva wezinga lokushisa lomzimba eliyisisekelo nokuqinisekiswa kokuvuthwa kweqanda.
texts.t5855: Ukubuyekezwa kwe-endocrine okuyisisekelo okunokuhlanganiswa kwe-ovarian, i-endometrial, i-mucus ye-cervical, kanye ne-physiology yezinga lokushisa eliyisisekelo.
texts.t5856: Umthombo wezokwelapha obhekene nesiguli wamanje ekusetshenzisweni kwe-BBT kanye nemikhawulo.
texts.t5857: Ukubuyekezwa kwanamuhla kokutholakala kwamandla aphansi, ukuphazamiseka kokukhulelwa, kanye nempilo yamathambo.
texts.t5858: Ukubuyekezwa kwezimbangela ezivamile nezokwelapha zokungajwayelekile ebusheni.
texts.t5859: Ukubuyekezwa okufushane kwanamuhla kwezimpawu ze-perimenopause kanye nendlela yezokwelapha.
texts.t5860: Kusetshenziswa imihlahlandlela yezokwelapha, izimpawu zesixwayiso, kanye nokuhlolwa kokopha.
texts.t5861: Idatha yanamuhla ngemijikelezo engajwayelekile kanye nesixhumanisi phakathi kwezici zomjikelezo nempilo.
texts.t5862: Ukubuyekezwa okuhlelekile kwesixhumanisi phakathi kokucindezeleka kwengqondo kanye nokungajwayelekile komjikelezo.
texts.t5863: Iwindi elivundile, isikhathi sokuhlangana, kanye nendima yokuhlolwa kokukhulelwa.
texts.t5864: I-Physiology yokukhuphuka kwe-LH, ukukhulelwa, kanye nesigaba se-luteal.
texts.t5865: Ukubuyekezwa kwesimanje kokuhlolwa kwe-LH, i-BBT, iwindi elivundile, kanye nemikhawulo yokulandelela ekhaya.
texts.t5866: Ukungakhulelwa, imijikelezo engajwayelekile, nokuhlolwa kwezokwelapha kwezimbangela.
texts.t5867: I-PCOS, ukungasebenzi kahle kokukhulelwa, kanye nemikhawulo yokuhlolwa kwe-LH.
texts.t5868: Izinga lokushisa lomzimba eliyisisekelo njengophawu lokubuyela emuva ngemuva kokukhulelwa.
texts.t5869: Umbono wekomidi mayelana newindi elivundile, isikhathi sokuhlangana, nokuhlolwa kokukhulelwa.
texts.t5870: Ukubuyekezwa kwesimanje kwezindlela zokulandelela ukukhulelwa ekhaya nasezibhedlela kanye nemikhawulo yazo.
texts.t5871: Ukubuyekezwa kwendabuko komjikelezo, ukukhulelwa, isigaba se-luteal, nezimpawu zomzimba.
texts.t5872: Imihlahlandlela nge-PCOS nezinselelo ekutholeni ukukhulelwa emijikelezweni engajwayelekile.
texts.t5873: Ukubuyekezwa kwezinga lokushisa lomzimba eliyisisekelo, ukukhuphuka kwalo ngemuva kokukhulelwa, kanye nemikhawulo yendlela.
texts.t5874: Isetshenziswa njengomthombo wokubuyekeza wokuhlola nge-ultrasound kanye ne-folliculometry kumongo wokulandelela ukukhulelwa.
texts.t5875: Ukulinganiswa kwesimanje kwe-amenorrhea kanye nokungasebenzi kahle kokukhulelwa.
texts.t5876: Ukubuyekezwa okuyisisekelo kwe-physiology yokukhulelwa, indima ye-LH, kanye nezinguquko zesigaba.
texts.t5877: I-ASRM mayelana newindi elivundile, imvamisa yokuhlangana, nokubonwa kokukhulelwa.
texts.t5878: Ukubuyekezwa kwesimanje kwezindlela zokulandelela ukukhulelwa, iwindi elivundile, i-BBT, kanye nokuhluka komuntu ngamunye.
texts.t5879: Ukulinganiswa kwesimanje kokungakhulelwa, i-amenorrhea, nezimbangela zokuphazamiseka kokukhulelwa.
texts.t5880: Ukubuyekezwa kwezinga lokushisa lomzimba eliyisisekelo kanye nokukhuphuka kwalo ngemuva kokukhulelwa.
texts.t5881: Imihlahlandlela nge-PCOS kanye nokungasebenzi kahle kokukhulelwa.
texts.t5882: Imihlahlandlela nge-FHA, isisindo somzimba esiphansi, ukusilela kwamandla, nokuzivocavoca.
texts.t5883: Ukubuyekezwa okuhlelekile kokubuyela ekukhulelweni nasekukhulelweni ngemuva kokubeletha kwabesifazane abanganceli.
texts.t5884: Ukubuyekezwa okuyisisekelo kwezigaba zomjikelezo, ukukhulelwa, kanye nokulawulwa kwehomoni.
texts.t5885: Ukubuyekezwa kwendabuko kwezigaba zomjikelezo wehomoni kanye nemiphumela yazo yomzimba.
texts.t5886: Ukubuyekezwa kwezimpawu ze-PMS kanye nesigaba se-luteal.
texts.t5887: Imihlahlandlela yesimanje nge-PMS/PMDD, isimo sengqondo, izimpawu zomzimba, nokwelashwa.
texts.t5888: Ukubuyekezwa okuhlelekile kwezimpawu zokuziphatha nezokukhathazeka kuzo zonke izigaba zomjikelezo.
texts.t5889: Ukubuyekezwa kokuthi ukulala nekhwalithi yokulala kushintsha kanjani kuzo zonke izigaba zomjikelezo.
texts.t5890: Ukubuyekezwa kokudla kwamandla nesifiso sokudla kuzo zonke izigaba zomjikelezo.
texts.t5891: I-Meta-analysis: akukho bufakazi obuqinile bokuhluka okukhulu okusekelwe esigabeni ekusebenzeni kwengqondo.
texts.t5892: I-Meta-analysis enkulu ngomthelela wezigaba zomjikelezo ekusebenzeni komzimba.
texts.t5893: Ukubuyekezwa kokubona okungokwengqondo nokungokoqobo kokuzivocavoca nokumelana.
texts.t5894: Ukubuyekezwa kwesixhumanisi phakathi kokuhoxiswa kwehomoni nezimpawu ze-neurological/ubuhlungu obujikelezayo.
texts.t5895: Ukubuyekezwa kwe-physiology yomjikelezo wokuya esikhathini, izigaba, i-endometrial desquamation, nezimpawu ezijwayelekile.
texts.t5896: Ukubuyekezwa kwendabuko komjikelezo ojwayelekile, izigaba zehomoni, kanye nomshini wokuya esikhathini.
texts.t5897: I-algorithm yesimanje yokuhlola ukuhamba kancane nokungabikho kokuya esikhathini.
texts.t5898: Izinga le-FIGO lezilinganiso zokopha okujwayelekile nokungajwayelekile kokuya esikhathini.
texts.t5899: Ukubuyekezwa kwencazelo, izimpawu, nokuphathwa kokopha okukhulu kokuya esikhathini.
texts.t5900: Umthombo oyinhloko we-dysmenorrhea yokuqala/yesibili, izimpawu, nezindlela zokwelapha.
texts.t5901: Ukubuyekezwa kwesixhumanisi phakathi kokuhoxiswa kwe-estrogen kanye ne-migraine yokuya esikhathini.
